Domain randomization (DR) is commonly used to improve the robustness of learned policies for such tasks, but conventional DR randomizes one instance per episode, offering very limited exposure to the variability of real-world dynamics. To this end, we propose Domain-Randomized Instance Set (DRIS), which represents and propagates a set of randomized instances simultaneously, providing richer approximation of uncertain dynamics and enabling policies to learn actions that account for multiple possible outcomes. Supported by theoretical analysis, we show that DRIS yields more robust policies and alleviates the need for real-world fine-tuning, even with a modest number of instances (e.g., 10). We demonstrate this on a challenging reactive catching task. Unlike traditional catching setups that use end-effectors designed to mechanically stabilize the object (e.g., curved or enclosing surfaces), our system uses a flat plate that offers no passive stabilization, making the task highly sensitive to noise and requiring rapid reactive motions. The learned policies exhibit strong robustness to uncertainties and achieve reliable zero-shot sim-to-real transfer.

</details>


### [368] [Efficient Multi-Robot Motion Planning with Precomputed Translation-Invariant Edge Bundles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09801)
*Himanshu Gupta,Paul Motter,Aritra Chakrabarty,Rishabh Sodani,Srikrishna Bangalore Raghu,Alessandro Roncone,Bradley Hayes,Zachary Sunberg*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: KiTE-Extend是一种用于基于采样的运动规划的规划器无关动作选择机制，通过离线计算的轨迹段库指导在线规划，显著提升多机器人运动规划的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人运动规划需要为多个交互机器人生成无碰撞的动力学可行轨迹，现有方法在处理密集时空约束时效率有限，需要改进动作选择机制以更有效地探索可行运动。

Method: 提出Kinodynamic Translation-Invariant Edge Bundles (KiTE-Extend)，使用离线计算的轨迹段库作为动作选择机制，在不改变状态传播、碰撞检测或成本评估的情况下指导在线规划，保持原有规划器的理论保证。

Result: 实验表明KiTE-Extend能减少规划时间并提高可扩展性，在三种常见的多机器人运动规划范式（集中式、优先级式和冲突式）中均表现优异，特别是在多智能体场景中效果最显著。

Conclusion: KiTE-Extend是一种有效的规划器无关动作选择机制，能显著提升多机器人运动规划的性能，为密集时空约束下的运动规划提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Solving multi-robot motion planning (MRMP) requires generating collision-free kinodynamically feasible trajectories for multiple interacting robots. We introduce Kinodynamic Translation-Invariant Edge Bundles or KiTE-Extend, a planner-agnostic action selection mechanism for sampling-based kinodynamic motion planning. KiTE-Extend uses a library of trajectory segments computed offline to guide action selection during online planning, improving the ability of existing planners to identify feasible motion segments without altering state propagation, collision checking, or cost evaluation, and without changing their theoretical guarantees. While KiTE-Extend can modestly improve single-agent planners, its benefits are most clear in the multi-agent setting, where it is able to explore more effectively and significantly improve planning through the dense spatiotemporal constraints introduced by robot-robot interaction. Through experiments on multiple kinodynamic systems and environments, we show that KiTE-Extend reduces planning time and improves scalability across the three most common MRMP paradigms: centralized, prioritized, and conflict-based.

</details>


### [369] [Above and Below: Heterogeneous Multi-robot SLAM Across Surface and Underwater Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09811)
*John McConnell,Armon Shariati,Paul Szenher,Yaxuan Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于视觉回环检测的USV-AUV多机器人SLAM系统，替代传统声学测距方法，在复杂海洋环境中实现更鲁棒的协同定位与建图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统USV-AUV多机器人SLAM依赖声学测距，需要在相似位置、无遮挡路径和同步时钟，在复杂海洋环境中易受阻碍。然而，水面和水下可观测的相同结构为跨机器人回环检测提供了机会。

Method: 提出集中式多机器人SLAM系统：各机器人独立进行状态估计，检测AUV与USV数据间的回环闭合，利用这些跨机器人回环将各机器人状态估计合并到集中式图优化中，获得所有机器人完整时间历史的状态估计。

Result: 在三个真实环境中的感知数据验证显示，多机器人SLAM系统相比单机器人SLAM在相同轨迹上显著降低了AUV的误差。这是首个基于回环而非声学测距的USV-AUV多机器人SLAM系统。

Conclusion: 通过利用水面和水下可观测的相同结构进行跨机器人回环检测，成功实现了基于视觉回环的USV-AUV多机器人SLAM系统，在复杂海洋环境中提供比传统声学方法更鲁棒的协同定位解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-robot simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a fundamental task in multi-robot operations. Robots must have a common understanding of their location and that of their team members to complete coordinated actions. However, multi-robot SLAM between Uncrewed Surface Vessels (USVs) and Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) has primarily been achieved through acoustic pinging between robots to retrieve range measurements; a measurement technique requires that robots to be in similar locations simultaneously, have an uninterrupted path for signal propagation, and may necessitate synchronized clocks. This is especially challenging in complex, cluttered maritime environments, where structures may impede signals. However, these same structures may be observable above and below the water's surface, presenting an opportunity for inter-robot SLAM loop closure between USV and AUV data streams. This work builds upon recent research on inter-robot SLAM loop closure between USV and AUV data, extending it to propose a centralized multi-robot SLAM system. Each robot performs its state estimation, and we detect loop closures between each AUV and the USV data. These inter-robot loop closures are used to merge each robot's state estimate into a centralized graph, yielding estimates for the whole time history of the USV and all AUVs in the system. Validation is performed using real-world perceptual data in three different environments. Results show improved errors for AUVs in the multi-robot SLAM system compared to single-robot SLAM over the same trajectories. To our knowledge, this is the first instance of a multi-robot SLAM system with AUVs and USVs built on loop closures rather than acoustic distance measurements.

</details>


### [370] [ConsistNav: Closing the Action Consistency Gap in Zero-Shot Object Navigation with Semantic Executive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09869)
*Haosen Wang,Zhenyang Li,Yinqiang Zhang,Zongqi He,Lutao Jiang,Kai Li,Yizhou Zhao,Liaoyuan Fan,Wenjian Hou,Tingbang Liang,Yibin Wen,Defeng Gu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ConsistNav是一个无需训练、零样本的目标导航框架，通过语义执行器解决现有方法在检测到目标后仍在探索与追踪间振荡或过早放弃的问题，在HM3D和MP3D数据集上取得了SOTA结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前零样本目标导航方法存在动作一致性差距：即使检测到合理的目标假设，智能体仍会在探索与追踪间振荡，或在接近成功时放弃目标。这是因为语义证据在每个步骤中被重复解释，缺乏跨时间步的持续承诺。

Method: 提出ConsistNav框架，包含三个协调模块：有限状态执行控制器通过分阶段的语义阶段引导目标追踪；持久候选记忆将跨帧目标证据积累为稳定的对象假设；稳定性感知动作控制抑制旋转停滞、无效追踪和未经验证的停止。

Result: 在HM3D和MP3D数据集上取得了零样本ObjectNav方法的SOTA结果，在MP3D上比基线方法SR提升11.4%，SPL提升7.9%。消融实验和真实世界部署进一步证明了该执行机制的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: ConsistNav通过语义执行器解决了动作一致性差距问题，在不改变检测器或底层规划器的情况下，控制语义证据何时影响导航，显著提升了零样本目标导航的性能。

Abstract: Zero-shot object navigation has advanced rapidly with open-vocabulary detectors, image--text models, and language-guided exploration. However, even after current methods detect a plausible target hypothesis, the agent may still oscillate between exploration and pursuit, or abandon the object near success. We identify this failure mode as an action consistency gap: semantic evidence is repeatedly reinterpreted at each step without persistent commitment across the episode. We introduce ConsistNav, a training-free zero-shot ObjectNav framework built around a semantic executive composed of three coordinated modules: Finite-State Executive Controller stages target pursuit through guarded semantic phases; Persistent Candidate Memory accumulates cross-frame target evidence into stable object hypotheses; and Stability-Aware Action Control suppresses rotational stagnation, ineffective pursuit, and unverified stopping. This design changes neither the detector nor the low-level planner; instead, it controls when semantic evidence should influence navigation and when it should be suppressed or revisited. We conduct extensive experiments on HM3D and MP3D, where ConsistNav achieves state-of-the-art results among compared zero-shot ObjectNav methods and improves SR by 11.4% and SPL by 7.9% over the controlled baseline on MP3D. Ablation studies and real-world deployment experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed executive mechanism.

</details>


### [371] [Network-Efficient World Model Token Streaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09886)
*Shatadal Mishra,Ahmadreza Moradipari,Nejib Ammar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于生成驾驶世界模型的在线自适应关键帧-差分协议，通过余弦距离和汉明漂移阈值优化网络带宽下的状态流传输


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式驾驶世界模型需要高效的分布式状态传输，在车辆网络带宽限制和丢包环境下，传统固定关键帧策略效率低下，需要自适应的流式传输方案

Method: 使用VQ-U-Net分词器将视频帧编码为token网格，提出完全在线、无标签的自适应算法：基于嵌入空间余弦距离优先更新差分，通过汉明漂移阈值动态触发关键帧

Result: 在0.024 Mb/s带宽下，嵌入失真降低7.2%；在0.036 Mb/s下降低4.8%；10%丢包率下性能仍优于基准；轻量级下一token预测器的困惑度分别改善6.3%和2.1%

Conclusion: 自适应离散token状态流传输为带宽感知同步提供了实用的系统层解决方案，在车辆网络约束下能提升下游token动态预测的实用性

Abstract: Generative driving world models rely on compact latent state representations that must be efficiently transmitted and synchronized across distributed compute and connected vehicles. We study network-efficient streaming of a discrete world model state, where a stride-16 VQ-U-Net tokenizer (codebook size 8,192) maps each 288x512 frame to an 18x32 grid of token IDs (576 tokens/frame), equivalent to 936 bytes/frame under fixed-length coding. We consider a keyframe--delta protocol under strict per-message payload budgets and packet loss, and propose a fully online, label-free algorithm that prioritizes delta updates via cosine distance in codebook embedding space and triggers keyframes adaptively using a Hamming-drift threshold. The adaptive algorithm consistently improves the rate distortion frontier over periodic keyframes at matched bitrates: at 0.024 Mb/s (200-byte budget) dynamic-only embedding distortion drops from 0.0712 to 0.0661 (7.2\%), and at 0.036 Mb/s (400-byte budget) from 0.0427 to 0.0407 (4.8\%). Under 10\% delta packet loss at 200 bytes, dynamic-only distortion is 0.0757 versus 0.0789 for a matched periodic baseline. To connect state fidelity to world model usefulness, we train a lightweight next-token predictor and evaluate perplexity conditioned on streamed receiver states: at 0.024 Mb/s, dynamic-position perplexity improves from 206.0 to 193.1 (6.3\%), and at 0.036 Mb/s from 158.9 to 155.6 (2.1\%). These results support discrete token-state streaming as a practical systems layer for bandwidth-aware synchronization and improved downstream token-dynamics utility under vehicular networking constraints.

</details>


### [372] [Neural Distance-Guided Path Integral Control for Tractor-Trailer Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09939)
*Peng Wei,Chen Peng,Stavros Vougioukas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种结合几何神经编码器和MPPI控制的框架，用于拖拉机-拖车系统在复杂农业环境中的实时安全导航


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法在拖拉机-拖车系统的导航中存在局限性：要么过度简化车辆几何形状，要么依赖预先计算的距离场并假设已知地图，这限制了它们在动态、部分未知环境中的适用性

Method: 1. 提出几何神经编码器，快速准确估计拖拉机-拖车整体与原始LiDAR感知之间的距离；2. 将学习到的距离集成到模型预测路径积分（MPPI）控制器中，使系统能将真实铰接几何直接纳入成本评估

Result: 仿真结果表明，该框架能够在杂乱复杂的农业环境中为拖拉机-拖车系统生成动态可行且安全的轨迹

Conclusion: 提出的方法实现了拖拉机-拖车系统在动态、部分未知农业环境中的实时、无地图几何推理和响应式导航

Abstract: Autonomous and safe navigation of tractor-trailer systems requires accurate, real-time collision avoidance and dynamically feasible control, particularly in cluttered and complex agricultural environments. This is challenging due to their articulated, deformable geometries and nonlinear dynamics. Traditional methods oversimplify vehicle geometry or rely on precomputed distance fields that assume a known map, limiting their applicability in dynamic, partially unknown environments. To address these limitations, we propose a geometric neural encoder that provides fast and accurate distance estimates between the full tractor-trailer body and raw LiDAR perception, enabling real-time, map-free geometric reasoning. These learned distances are integrated into a Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) controller, allowing the system to incorporate true articulated geometry directly into its cost evaluation and enabling more responsive navigation in challenging agricultural settings. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed framework generates dynamically feasible and safe trajectories for navigating tractor-trailer systems in cluttered and complex environments.

</details>


### [373] [Explicit Stair Geometry Conditioning for Robust Humanoid Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09944)
*Jianguo Zhang,Wentai Xu,Shusheng Ye,Yuxiang He,Weimin Qi,Qinbo Sun,Ning Ding,Liguang Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于显式楼梯几何参数调节的人形机器人楼梯攀爬框架，通过提取可解释的几何参数（台阶高度、深度、偏航角）直接调节PPO策略，实现鲁棒的室内外楼梯攀爬。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的运动策略通常依赖隐式地形表示或盲目的本体感觉反馈，难以泛化到不同楼梯几何结构，也无法预判所需的步态调整。人形机器人楼梯攀爬面临几何不连续性、台阶高度变化敏感性和实际环境中感知不确定性的挑战。

Method: 提出显式楼梯几何参数调节框架，提取可解释的几何参数（台阶高度、台阶深度、当前偏航角相对于机器人航向），这些参数直接调节基于PPO的运动策略，使机器人能够根据楼梯结构主动调整摆动脚抬升高度和步幅特征。

Result: 仿真实验显示该方法在超出训练分布的未见台阶高度上具有更好的泛化能力。在Unitree G1人形机器人上的真实世界实验验证了可靠的室内外楼梯穿越能力，在挑战性室外场景中成功连续攀爬33级台阶而无失败。

Conclusion: 显式楼梯几何参数调节框架显著提升了人形机器人楼梯攀爬的鲁棒性和实际部署能力，通过可解释的参数调节实现了对复杂楼梯几何结构的自适应控制。

Abstract: Robust humanoid stair climbing remains challenging due to geometric discontinuities, sensitivity to step height variations, and perception uncertainty in real-world environments. Existing learning-based locomotion policies often rely on implicit terrain representations or blind proprioceptive feedback, limiting their ability to generalize across varying stair geometries and to anticipate required gait adjustments. This paper proposes an explicit stair geometry conditioning framework for robust humanoid stair climbing. Instead of encoding terrain as high-dimensional latent features, we extract a compact set of interpretable geometric parameters, including step height, step depth, and current yaw angle relative to the robot heading. These explicit stair parameters directly condition a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)-based locomotion policy, enabling proactive modulation of swing-foot clearance and stride characteristics according to stair structure. Simulation experiments demonstrate improved generalization across unseen stair heights beyond the training distribution. Real-world experiments on the Unitree G1 humanoid validate reliable indoor and outdoor stair traversal. In challenging outdoor scenarios, the robot successfully ascends 33 consecutive steps without failure, demonstrating robustness and practical deployability.

</details>


### [374] [JODA: Composable Joint Dynamics for Articulated Objects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09954)
*Tianhong Gao,Cheng Yu,Yinghao Xu,Mengyu Chu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: JODA框架通过三通道结构化场表示关节动力学，支持从视觉观察中推断和优化复杂的关节行为，如摩擦、阻尼等。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前仿真和具身AI中使用的关节模型缺乏精细的动力学效果（如摩擦保持、软关闭等），现有方法要么忽略这些细节，要么使用表达能力有限的简单模型。

Method: 提出JODA框架，使用三通道结构化场（保守力、干摩擦、阻尼）表示关节动力学，基于形状约束的PCHIP插值法实现紧凑表达，并利用视觉语言模型从多模态输入中推断和组合动力学基元。

Result: JODA能够实现多样关节行为的合理且可控建模，为推断、编辑和优化提供了统一接口，支持直接操作和基于梯度的精细化调整。

Conclusion: JODA提供了一个表达性强且可解释的关节动力学建模框架，能够从视觉观察中推断复杂的机械行为，为仿真和机器人学中的关节建模提供了新方法。

Abstract: Articulated objects used in simulation and embodied AI are typically specified by geometry and kinematic structure, but lack the fine-grained dynamical effects that govern realistic mechanical behavior, such as frictional holding, detents, soft closing, and snap latching. Existing approaches either ignore the detailed structure of dynamics entirely, or use simple models with limited expressiveness.
  We introduce JODA, a framework for generating joint-level dynamics as a structured three-channel field over the joint degree of freedom, capturing conservative forces, dry friction, and damping. Instantiated using shape-constrained piecewise cubic interpolation (PCHIP), this formulation defines a compact and expressive function space that is both interpretable and compatible with differentiable simulation. Building on this representation, we develop methods for inferring and refining joint dynamics from multimodal inputs. Given visual observations and joint context, a vision-language model proposes structured dynamical primitives, which are composed into a unified dynamics field. The resulting representation supports both direct manipulation and gradient-based refinement. We demonstrate that JODA enables plausible and controllable modeling of diverse joint behaviors, providing a unified interface for inference, editing, and optimization. Code and example assets with their generated profiles will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [375] [HiDrive: A Closed-Loop Benchmark for High-Level Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09972)
*Zhongyu Xia,Guanyu Zhu,Guo Tang,Wenhao Chen,Yongtao Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HiDrive是一个面向端到端自动驾驶的新型闭环基准测试，专注于长尾场景和更全面的驾驶能力评估，包括法规遵守、道德推理和紧急响应等高级决策能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶基准测试已经趋于饱和，模型在常用开环和闭环基准上接近完美分数，但这并不意味着问题已解决。当前基准在场景多样性、对象种类和驾驶能力评估广度上存在局限，特别是缺乏涉及罕见但安全关键对象的长尾场景，且未能评估法规遵守、道德推理和紧急响应等高级决策能力。

Method: 提出HiDrive基准测试，引入多样化的罕见对象和非常规交通场景，将评估从基本驾驶技能扩展到更高级能力（规则遵守、道德推理、上下文相关的紧急操作）。基于更先进的物理引擎，提供物理真实的光照和高保真视觉渲染。

Result: 开发了一个更具挑战性和真实性的测试平台，用于评估自动驾驶系统能否处理现实世界部署的复杂性。将先前以碰撞避免为中心的指标扩展为一个全面的评估系统，包括碰撞和制动、交通规则遵守和道德推理指标。

Conclusion: HiDrive填补了现有基准测试的空白，提供了一个更全面、更具挑战性的评估框架，能够更真实地测试自动驾驶系统在复杂现实世界场景中的能力，为端到端自动驾驶系统评估设立了新标准。

Abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has witnessed rapid progress, yet existing benchmarks are increasingly saturated, with state-of-the-art models achieving near-perfect scores on widely used open-loop and closed-loop benchmarks. This saturation does not mean that the problem has been solved; instead, it reveals that current benchmarks remain limited in scenario diversity, object variety, and the breadth of driving capabilities they evaluate. In particular, they lack sufficient long-tail scenarios involving rare but safety-critical objects and fail to assess advanced decision-making such as legal compliance, ethical reasoning, and emergency response. To address these gaps, we propose HiDrive, a new closed-loop benchmark for end-to-end autonomous driving that emphasizes long-tail scenarios and a richer evaluation of driving capabilities. HiDrive introduces a diverse set of rare objects and uncommon traffic situations, and expands evaluation from basic driving skills to more advanced capabilities, including rule compliance, moral reasoning, and context-dependent emergency maneuvers. Correspondingly, we extend previous collision-avoidance-centered metrics into a comprehensive evaluation system that encompasses collision and braking, traffic-rule compliance, and moral-reasoning indicators. Built on a more advanced physics engine, HiDrive provides physically realistic lighting and high-fidelity visual rendering, offering a more challenging and realistic testbed for assessing whether autonomous driving systems can handle the complexity of real-world deployment. The HiDrive software, source code, digital assets, and documentation are available at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/HiDrive.

</details>


### [376] [StereoPolicy: Improving Robotic Manipulation Policies via Stereo Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09989)
*Evans Han,Yunfan Jiang,Yingke Wang,Haoyue Xiao,Huang Huang,Jianwen Xie,Jiajun Wu,Li Fei-Fei,Ruohan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: StereoPolicy：一种利用同步立体图像对增强几何推理的视觉运动策略学习框架，无需显式3D重建或相机标定，在模拟和真实机器人实验中均优于RGB、RGB-D等基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单目视觉观察缺乏可靠的深度线索和空间感知，这对于在杂乱或几何复杂场景中进行精确操作至关重要。现有方法依赖单目输入，限制了机器人操作的精确性。

Method: StereoPolicy直接使用同步立体图像对，通过预训练的2D视觉编码器独立处理每个图像，然后通过立体Transformer融合表示，隐式捕捉空间对应关系和视差线索。该框架可与基于扩散的预训练视觉-语言-动作策略无缝集成。

Result: 在RoboMimic、RoboCasa和OmniGibson三个模拟基准测试中，StereoPolicy一致优于RGB、RGB-D、点云和多视图基线方法。在真实机器人实验（桌面和双手移动操作）中也得到验证。

Conclusion: 立体视觉是一种可扩展且鲁棒的模态，能够将2D预训练表示与3D几何理解相结合用于机器人操作，StereoPolicy为此提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Recent advances in robot imitation learning have yielded powerful visuomotor policies capable of manipulating a wide variety of objects directly from monocular visual inputs. However, monocular observations inherently lack reliable depth cues and spatial awareness, which are critical for precise manipulation in cluttered or geometrically complex scenes. To address this limitation, we introduce StereoPolicy, a new visuomotor policy learning framework that directly leverages synchronized stereo image pairs to strengthen geometric reasoning, without requiring explicit 3D reconstruction or camera calibration. StereoPolicy employs pretrained 2D vision encoders to process each image independently and fuses the resulting representations through a Stereo Transformer. This design implicitly captures spatial correspondence and disparity cues. The framework integrates seamlessly with diffusion-based and pretrained vision-language-action (VLA) policies, delivering consistent improvements over RGB, RGB-D, point cloud, and multi-view baselines across three simulation benchmarks: RoboMimic, RoboCasa, and OmniGibson. We further validate StereoPolicy on real-robot experiments spanning both tabletop and bimanual mobile manipulation settings. Our results underscore stereo vision as a scalable and robust modality that bridges 2D pretrained representations with 3D geometric understanding for robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [377] [Muninn: Your Trajectory Diffusion Model But Faster](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09999)
*Gokul Puthumanaillam,Hao Jiang,Ruben Hernandez,Jose Fuentes,Paulo Padrao,Leonardo Bobadilla,Melkior Ornik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Muninn是一种无需重新训练的缓存包装器，通过利用扩散轨迹规划器中的两个信号来预测轨迹偏差，智能选择重用缓存或重新计算，实现高达4.6倍的加速，同时保持轨迹质量和安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于扩散的轨迹规划器能生成丰富的多模态机器人运动，但其迭代去噪过程导致在线规划和控制速度过慢。现有加速方法要么牺牲规划质量，要么需要重新训练模型，且未考虑下游控制风险。

Method: Muninn利用扩散轨迹规划器暴露的两个信号：1) 内部轨迹表示在步骤间的变化（廉价探测）；2) 描述去噪器误差如何影响采样器状态更新的解析系数。通过离线校准这两个信号，获得每个步骤的得分作为不确定性预算，在采样过程中根据预算决定重用缓存输出或重新计算去噪器。

Result: 在标准基准测试中，Muninn通过减少去噪器评估实现了高达4.6倍的实时加速，同时保持了任务性能和安全性指标。还能证明缓存轨迹与完整计算轨迹的偏差在指定范围内，并在实时闭环导航和操作硬件部署中验证了这些优势。

Conclusion: Muninn提供了一种无需重新训练、不牺牲轨迹质量的训练免费加速方法，适用于多种状态空间扩散架构，使基于扩散的轨迹规划器能够真正用于实时机器人应用。

Abstract: Diffusion-based trajectory planners can synthesize rich, multimodal robot motions, but their iterative denoising makes online planning and control prohibitively slow. Existing accelerations either modify the sampler or compress the network--sacrificing plan quality or requiring retraining without accounting for downstream control risk. We address the problem of making diffusion-based trajectory planners fast enough for real-time robot use without retraining the model or sacrificing trajectory quality, and in a way that works across diverse state-space diffusion architectures. Our key insight is that diffusion trajectory planners expose two signals we can exploit: a cheap probe of how their internal trajectory representation changes across steps, and analytic coefficients that describe how denoiser errors affect the sampler's state update. By calibrating the first signal against the second on offline runs, we obtain a per-step score that upper-bounds how far the final trajectory can deviate when we reuse a cached denoiser output, and we treat this bound as an uncertainty budget that we can spend over the denoising process. Building on this insight, we present Muninn, a training-free caching wrapper that tracks this uncertainty budget during sampling and, at each diffusion step, chooses between reusing a cached denoiser output when the predicted deviation is small and recomputing the denoiser when it is not. Across standard benchmarks Muninn delivers up to 4.6x wall-clock speedups across several trajectory diffusion models by reducing denoiser evaluations, while preserving task performance and safety metrics. Muninn further certifies that cached rollouts remain within a specified distance of their full-compute counterparts, and we validate these gains in real-time closed-loop navigation and manipulation hardware deployments. Project page: https://github.com/gokulp01/Muninn.

</details>


### [378] [Beyond Self-Play and Scale: A Behavior Benchmark for Generalization in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10034)
*Aron Distelzweig,Faris Janjoš,Andreas Look,Anna Rothenhäusler,Daniel Jost,Oliver Scheel,Raghu Rajan,Daphne Cornelisse,Eugene Vinitsky,Joschka Boedecker*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BehaviorBench是一个全面的自动驾驶测试套件，通过连接PufferDrive和nuPlan，首次实现大规模RL训练策略在标准化规划基准上的评估，并提供交互式交通代理以测试策略在多样化行为下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶研究虽然实现了大规模强化学习训练策略，但这些策略与标准基准脱节，无法评估大规模RL在标准化评估中的性能。同时，当前基准过于简单且缺乏行为多样性。

Method: 1) 提供PufferDrive与nuPlan的连接接口，实现大规模RL策略在规划基准上的评估；2) 从Waymo Open Motion Dataset提取交互丰富的子集；3) 提供多样化交互交通代理套件，超越单一IDM模型；4) 提出结合PPO策略与基于规则规划器的混合规划器。

Result: 研究发现：尽管通过自学习出现了交互行为，但纯自学习策略在标准奖励函数下会过拟合训练对手，无法泛化到其他交通代理行为。混合规划器结合了学习策略和规则方法的优势。

Conclusion: BehaviorBench填补了大规模RL训练策略与标准化评估之间的空白，揭示了纯自学习策略的泛化局限性，并提出了混合规划器作为解决方案，为自动驾驶评估提供了更全面、更具挑战性的测试环境。

Abstract: Recent Autonomous Driving (AD) works such as GigaFlow and PufferDrive have unlocked Reinforcement Learning (RL) at scale as a training strategy for driving policies. Yet such policies remain disconnected from established benchmarks, leaving the performance of large-scale RL for driving on standardized evaluations unknown. We present BehaviorBench -- a comprehensive test suite that closes this gap along three axes: Evaluation, Complexity, and Behavior Diversity. In terms of Evaluation, we provide an interface connecting PufferDrive to nuPlan, which, for the first time, enables policies trained via RL at scale to be evaluated on an established planning benchmark for autonomous driving. Complementarily, we offer an evaluation framework that allows planners to be benchmarked directly inside the PufferDrive simulation, at a fraction of the time. Regarding Complexity, we observe that today's standardized benchmarks are so simple that near-perfect scores are achievable by straight lane following with collision checking. We extract a meaningful, interaction-rich split from the Waymo Open Motion Dataset (WOMD) on which strong performance is impossible without multi-agent reasoning. Lastly, we address Behavior Diversity. Existing benchmarks commonly evaluate planners against a single rule-based traffic model, the Intelligent Driver Model (IDM). We provide a diverse suite of interactive traffic agents to stress-test policies under heterogeneous behaviors, beyond just using IDM. Overall, our benchmarking analysis uncovers the following insight: despite learning interactive behaviors in an emergent manner, policies trained via pure self-play under standard reward functions overfit to their training opponents and fail to generalize to other traffic agent behaviors. Building on this observation, we propose a hybrid planner that combines a PPO policy with a rule-based planner.

</details>


### [379] [Guided Streaming Stochastic Interpolant Policy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10051)
*Puming Jiang,Meiyi Wang,Kelvin Lin,Ce Hao,Harold Soh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于随机插值（SI）的实时机器人控制框架，通过理论推导最优引导项，结合流式架构实现快速反应控制，支持零样本适应和摊销推理两种机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理时引导方法主要局限于基于块（chunk-based）的架构，存在高延迟和缺乏反应性的问题，无法满足实时偏好对齐或障碍物避让的需求。需要一种能够实现快速反应控制的理论框架。

Method: 通过分析值函数的时间演化（后向Kolmogorov方程），正式推导出随机插值（SI）的最优引导项，建立理论保证的目标分布采样。提出流式随机插值策略（SSIP），结合两种机制：无需训练的概率轨迹集成引导（STEG）实现零样本适应，以及基于训练的条件批评者引导（CCG）实现摊销推理。

Result: 实验评估表明，所提出的引导流式方法在反应性方面显著优于传统的基于块策略，并为动态非结构化环境提供更优的物理有效引导。

Conclusion: 通过理论推导的最优引导项与流式架构的统一，实现了快速反应控制，为机器人策略在推理时引导提供了有效解决方案，支持多样化的部署需求。

Abstract: Inference-time guidance is essential for steering generative robot policies toward dynamic objectives without retraining, yet existing methods are largely confined to chunk-based architectures that exhibit high latency and lack the reactivity needed for test-time preference alignment or obstacle avoidance. In this work, we formally derive the optimal guidance term for Stochastic Interpolants (SI) by analyzing the value function's time evolution via the Backward Kolmogorov Equation, establishing a modified drift that theoretically guarantees sampling from a target distribution. We apply this framework to real-time control through the Streaming Stochastic Interpolant Policy (SSIP), which generalizes the deterministic Streaming Flow Policy (SFP). Unifying this guidance law with the streaming architecture enables fast and reactive control. To support diverse deployment needs, we propose two complementary mechanisms: training-free Stochastic Trajectory Ensemble Guidance (STEG) that computes gradients on-the-fly for zero-shot adaptation, and training-based Conditional Critic Guidance (CCG) for amortized inference. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that our guided streaming approach significantly outperforms conventional chunk-based policies in reactivity and provides superior, physically valid guidance for dynamic, unstructured environments.

</details>


### [380] [EFGCL: Learning Dynamic Motion through Spotting-Inspired External Force Guided Curriculum Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10063)
*Keita Yoneda,Kento Kawaharazuka,Kei Okada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出EFGCL方法，通过外部辅助力引导强化学习，解决四足机器人动态全身动作学习中的探索困难和稳定性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统强化学习方法在四足机器人动态全身动作学习中面临高失败风险，导致探索效率低下和学习不稳定，需要更有效的引导机制

Method: 提出外部力引导课程学习（EFGCL），受艺术体操保护动作启发，在训练中引入外部辅助力，让智能体物理体验成功动作执行，无需任务特定奖励塑造或参考轨迹

Result: EFGCL将跳跃任务学习速度提升约2倍，能学习传统RL方法无法掌握的复杂全身动作（如后空翻、侧空翻），且学习策略能成功部署到真实机器人上

Conclusion: 物理引导探索让智能体在训练早期体验成功，是提高动态全身动作任务学习效率的有效通用策略

Abstract: Learning dynamic whole-body motions for legged robots through reinforcement learning (RL) remains challenging due to the high risk of failure, which makes efficient exploration difficult and often leads to unstable learning. In this paper, we propose External Force Guided Curriculum Learning (EFGCL), a guided RL approach based on the principle of physical guidance, in which external assistive forces are introduced during training. Inspired by spotting in artistic gymnastics, EFGCL enables agents to physically experience successful motion executions without relying on task-specific reward shaping or reference trajectories. Experiments on a quadrupedal robot performing Jump, Backflip, and Lateral-Flip tasks demonstrate that EFGCL accelerates learning of the Jump task by approximately a factor of two and enables the acquisition of complex whole body motions that conventional RL methods fail to learn. We further show that the learned policies can be deployed on real robot, reproducing motions consistent with those observed in simulation. These results indicate that physically guided exploration, which allows agents to experience success early in training, is an effective and general strategy for improving learning efficiency in dynamic whole-body motion tasks.

</details>


### [381] [A cell-decomposition based path planner for 3D navigation in constrained workspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10086)
*João P. L. Morais,Luciano C. A. Pimenta,Marcelo A. Santos,Guilherme V. Raffo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种确保单元间相互可见性的栅格分解算法，结合KSP-SOCP优化方法，在路径规划中平衡计算效率与解质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为在优化问题中嵌入路径可行性验证提供简化框架，解决传统方法在计算复杂度和内存消耗方面的限制。

Method: 1. 提出二进制占用栅格的单元分解算法，确保每个单元至少与一个相邻单元完全可见；2. 在框架内构建SOCP和MISOCP优化问题；3. 提出KSP-SOCP方法，结合Yen的k最短路径算法与SOCP。

Result: 1. 分解算法能有效划分9个城市样工作空间；2. KSP-SOCP相比标准SOCP获得更优解，同时避免MISOCP的计算负担；3. KSP-SOCP在时间性能上与MISOCP相当，但内存需求更低。

Conclusion: 所提分解算法为路径可行性验证提供了有效框架，KSP-SOCP方法在大规模问题中表现出良好的计算效率与内存平衡。

Abstract: This paper proposes a cell decomposition algorithm for binary occupancy grids that ensures mutual complete visibility from each cell to at least one adjacent cell. This decomposition establishes a simplified framework for verifying path feasibility that can be easily embedded in optimization problems. To illustrate its utility, we formulate both second-order cone programs (SOCP) and their mixed-integer variant (MISOCP) within the proposed framework. Furthermore, we propose the KSP-SOCP method, which combines Yen's k-shortest path algorithm with the SOCP, achieving improved solutions compared to a standard SOCP approach while avoiding the computational burden of MISOCP. The cell decomposition algorithm, KSP-SOCP, and MISOCP approaches were evaluated in 9 city-like workspaces. The decomposition efficiently partitioned each map, enabling both optimization methods to compute feasible paths. The proposed KSP-SOCP achieved time performance comparable to the MISOCP while requiring less memory, making it highly suitable for large-scale problems.

</details>


### [382] [Retrieve-then-Steer: Online Success Memory for Test-Time Adaptation of Generative VLAs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10094)
*Jianchao Zhao,Huoren Yang,Hu Yusong,Yuyang Gao,Qiguan Ou,Cong Wan,SongLin Dong,Zhiheng Ma,Yihong Gong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于成功记忆引导的测试时适应框架，让冻结的VLA模型能够重用成功经验，在持续部署中提升闭环可靠性和任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在独立零样本测试中表现良好，但在实际持续部署环境中，闭环可靠性会下降。虽然机器人经常在相同或缓慢变化的环境中重复操作，成功执行的经验能提供环境验证的可靠行为模式，但现有方法没有利用这些测试时成功经验。

Method: 提出在线成功记忆引导的测试时适应框架：1）部署时存储进度校准的成功观察-动作片段到长期记忆；2）推理时检索状态相关的动作块，通过轨迹级一致性过滤不一致候选；3）聚合为精英动作先验；4）引入置信度自适应先验引导，将精英先验注入流匹配动作采样器的中间状态，根据检索置信度调整引导强度。

Result: 模拟和真实世界实验表明，该方法提高了任务成功率和闭环稳定性，特别是在长视野和多阶段任务中，实现了轻量级、非参数化的测试时适应，无需参数更新。

Conclusion: 提出的"检索-引导"机制使冻结的VLA模型能够利用环境特定的成功经验，同时保持观察条件的生成细化，有效提升了在持续部署环境中的可靠性和适应性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models show strong potential for general-purpose robotic manipulation, yet their closed-loop reliability often degrades under local deployment conditions. Existing evaluations typically treat test episodes as independent zero-shot trials. However, real robots often operate repeatedly in the same or slowly changing environments, where successful executions provide environment-verified evidence of reliable behavior patterns. We study this persistent-deployment setting, asking whether a partially competent frozen VLA can improve its reliability by reusing its successful test-time experience. We propose an online success-memory guided test-time adaptation framework for generative VLAs. During deployment, the robot stores progress-calibrated successful observation-action segments in a long-term memory. At inference, it retrieves state-relevant action chunks, filters inconsistent candidates via trajectory-level consistency, and aggregates them into an elite action prior. To incorporate this prior into action generation, we introduce confidence-adaptive prior guidance, which injects the elite prior into an intermediate state of the flow-matching action sampler and adjusts the guidance strength based on retrieval confidence. This design allows the frozen VLA to exploit environment-specific successful experience while preserving observation-conditioned generative refinement. This retrieve-then-steer mechanism enables lightweight, non-parametric test-time adaptation without requiring parameter updates. Simulation and real-world experiments show improved task success and closed-loop stability, especially in long-horizon and multi-stage tasks.

</details>


### [383] [Plan in Sandbox, Navigate in Open Worlds: Learning Physics-Grounded Abstracted Experience for Embodied Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10118)
*Zhixuan Shen,Jiawei Du,Ziyu Guo,Han Luo,Lilan Peng,Joey Tianyi Zhou,Haonan Luo,Tianrui Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SAGE框架通过物理约束的语义抽象环境进行智能体学习，显著提升具身导航性能，在A-EQA上达到53.21%的LLM匹配成功率，比基线提升9.7%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在具身导航中受限于开放世界视觉与机器人控制数据的对齐不足，而依赖逼真模拟器又限制了学习策略的迁移性

Method: 提出SAGE框架，包含三个阶段：1) Genesis：构建多样化的物理约束语义环境；2) Evolution：通过强化学习提炼经验，采用非对称自适应裁剪机制稳定更新；3) Navigation：将抽象策略桥接到开放世界控制

Result: 在A-EQA数据集上达到53.21%的LLM匹配成功率，比基线提升9.7%，并在物理室内机器人部署中显示出良好的迁移性

Conclusion: SAGE通过物理约束的语义抽象学习框架，显著提升了具身导航性能，证明了在简化物理抽象中进行学习对现实世界部署的有效性

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated exceptional general reasoning capabilities. However, their performance in embodied navigation remains hindered by a scarcity of aligned open-world vision and robot control data. Despite simulators providing a cost-effective alternative for data collection, the inherent reliance on photorealistic simulations often limits the transferability of learned policies. To this end, we propose \textit{\textbf{S}andbox-\textbf{A}bstracted \textbf{G}rounded \textbf{E}xperience} (\textbf{\textit{SAGE}}), a framework that enables agents to learn within a physics-grounded semantic abstraction rather than a photorealistic simulation, mimicking the human capacity for mental simulation where plans are rehearsed in simplified physics abstractions before execution. \textit{SAGE} system operates via three synergistic phases: (1) \textit{Genesis}: constructing diverse, physics-constrained semantic environments to bootstrap experience; (2) \textit{Evolution}: distilling experiences through Reinforcement Learning (RL), utilizing a novel asymmetric adaptive clipping mechanism to stabilize updates; (3) \textit{Navigation}: bridging the abstract policy to open-world control. We demonstrate that \textit{SAGE} significantly improves planner-assisted embodied navigation, achieving a 53.21\% LLM-Match Success Rate on A-EQA (+9.7\% over baseline), while showing encouraging transfer to physical indoor robot deployment.

</details>


### [384] [Data-Asymmetric Latent Imagination and Reranking for 3D Robotic Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10166)
*Lianghao Luo,Xizhou Bu,Ruyan Liu,Qingqiu Huang,Chufeng Tang,Xiaoshuai Hao,Hongbo Wang,Wei Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DALI-R 是一个用于3D机器人模仿学习的框架，通过潜在世界模型和任务完成评分器，利用混合质量轨迹提升决策能力，无需额外高质量演示数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人模仿学习通常假设能获得最优演示，但实际数据收集常产生次优、探索性甚至失败的轨迹。丢弃这些数据会浪费关于环境动态和失败模式的宝贵信息，而这些信息本可用于改进决策。

Method: 提出 DALI-R（数据不对称潜在想象和重排框架），包含：1）学习3D点云上的潜在世界模型用于想象推演；2）任务完成评分器对候选动作块进行重排，从而改进决策，无需额外高质量演示。使用扩散和高效流匹配策略实现 DALI-R。

Result: 在 Adroit 和 MetaWorld 基准测试中，DALI-R 在两种3D基础策略上平均提升了 6.8% 的成功率，同时推理开销增加不到 0.7 倍。

Conclusion: DALI-R 能够有效利用混合质量轨迹，显著提升3D机器人模仿学习的性能，且计算开销可控，为从次优数据中学习提供了实用框架。

Abstract: Robotic imitation learning typically assumes access to optimal demonstrations, yet real-world data collection often yields suboptimal, exploratory, or even failed trajectories. Discarding such data wastes valuable information about environment dynamics and failure modes, which can instead be leveraged to improve decision-making. While 3D policies reduce reliance on high-quality demonstrations through strong spatial generalization, they still require large-scale data to achieve high task success. To address this, we propose DALI-R, a Data-Asymmetric Latent Imagination and Reranking framework for 3D robotic imitation learning from mixed-quality trajectories. It learns a Latent World Model over 3D point clouds for imagined rollouts and a Task Completion Scorer that reranks candidate action chunks, improving decision-making without additional high-quality demonstrations. We instantiate DALI-R with both diffusion and efficient flow-matching policies and evaluate it on Adroit and MetaWorld benchmarks. Across the two evaluated 3D base policies, DALI-R achieves an average $6.8$\% improvement in success rate while incurring less than $0.7\times$ additional inference overhead.

</details>


### [385] [HeteroGenManip: Generalizable Manipulation For Heterogeneous Object Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10201)
*Zhenhao Shen,Zeming Yang,Yue Chen,Yuran Wang,Shengqiang Xu,Mingleyang Li,Hao Dong,Ruihai Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HeteroGenManip是一个用于机器人跨类型物体操作的两阶段框架，通过解耦初始抓取和复杂交互执行，利用多个专用基础模型实现更好的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决机器人跨类型物体操作中的两个关键挑战：1) 接触点定位（"在哪里操作"）和 2) 后续交互轨迹规划（"如何操作"）。现有方法采用端到端学习模糊了这两个阶段的区别，导致长时任务中错误累积，且依赖单一统一模型无法捕捉异构物体所需的类别特定特征。

Method: 提出HeteroGenManip框架，包含两个阶段：1) Foundation-Correspondence-Guided Grasp模块利用结构先验对齐初始接触状态，减少抓取姿态不确定性；2) Multi-Foundation-Model Diffusion Policy (MFMDP)将物体路由到类别专用基础模型，通过双流交叉注意力机制整合细粒度几何信息和高度可变的部分特征。

Result: 在模拟任务中实现了31%的平均性能提升（广泛类型设置），在四种不同交互类型的真实世界任务中获得了36.7%的性能增益。框架展示了鲁棒的类别内形状和姿态泛化能力。

Conclusion: HeteroGenManip通过解耦抓取和交互执行，并利用多个类别专用基础模型，有效解决了跨类型物体操作中的挑战，在模拟和真实世界任务中都取得了显著性能改进。

Abstract: Generalizable manipulation involving cross-type object interactions is a critical yet challenging capability in robotics. To reliably accomplish such tasks, robots must address two fundamental challenges: ``where to manipulate'' (contact point localization) and ``how to manipulate'' (subsequent interaction trajectory planning). Existing foundation-model-based approaches often adopt end-to-end learning that obscures the distinction between these stages, exacerbating error accumulation in long-horizon tasks. Furthermore, they typically rely on a single uniform model, which fails to capture the diverse, category-specific features required for heterogeneous objects. To overcome these limitations, we propose HeteroGenManip, a task-conditioned, two-stage framework designed to decouple initial grasp from complex interaction execution. First, Foundation-Correspondence-Guided Grasp module leverages structural priors to align the initial contact state, thereby significantly reducing the pose uncertainty of grasping. Subsequently, Multi-Foundation-Model Diffusion Policy (MFMDP) routes objects to category-specialized foundation models, integrating fine-grained geometric information with highly-variable part features via a dual-stream cross-attention mechanism. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that HeteroGenManip achieves robust intra-category shape and pose generalization. The framework achieves an average 31\% performance improvement in simulation tasks with broad type setting, alongside a 36.7\% gain across four real-world tasks with different interaction types.

</details>


### [386] [Nano-U: Efficient Terrain Segmentation for Tiny Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10210)
*Federico Pizzolato,Francesco Pasti,Nicola Bellotto*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发了用于低成本微控制器的完整二进制地形分割框架，包括超小型网络Nano-U、量化感知蒸馏训练方法，以及基于编译器的部署方案，在资源受限设备上实现高效地形分割。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前最先进的地形分割模型无法满足微控制器的内存和计算限制，限制了在小型机器人平台上的可扩展部署。需要解决低成本机器人平台上的感知能力瓶颈。

Method: 设计了Nano-U超小型二进制分割网络（仅数千参数），采用量化感知蒸馏（QAD）训练方法结合知识蒸馏和量化感知训练，通过MicroFlow编译器在ESP32-S3微控制器上部署量化模型。

Result: 量化模型在Botanic Garden数据集上表现优异，在自定义农业数据集TinyAgri上也表现良好。在ESP32-S3上实现了最小内存占用和低延迟，证明了在低成本机器人平台上的可行性。

Conclusion: 提出的完整框架为低成本机器人平台提供了可行且节能的感知解决方案，通过编译器优化执行消除了解释器开销和动态内存分配，适合资源受限的微控制器部署。

Abstract: Terrain segmentation is a fundamental capability for autonomous mobile robots operating in unstructured outdoor environments. However, state-of-the-art models are incompatible with the memory and compute constraints typical of microcontrollers, limiting scalable deployment in small robotics platforms. To address this gap, we develop a complete framework for robust binary terrain segmentation on a low-cost microcontroller. At the core of our approach we design Nano-U, a highly compact binary segmentation network with a few thousand parameters. To compensate for the network's minimal capacity, we train Nano-U via Quantization-Aware Distillation (QAD), combining knowledge distillation and quantization-aware training. This allows the final quantized model to achieve excellent results on the Botanic Garden dataset and to perform very well on TinyAgri, a custom agricultural field dataset with more challenging scenes. We deploy the quantized Nano-U on a commodity microcontroller by extending MicroFlow, a compiler-based inference engine for TinyML implemented in Rust. By eliminating interpreter overhead and dynamic memory allocation, the quantized model executes on an ESP32-S3 with a minimal memory footprint and low latency. This compiler-based execution demonstrates a viable and energy-efficient solution for perception on low-cost robotic platforms.

</details>


### [387] [Learning Point Cloud Geometry as a Statistical Manifold: Theory and Practice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10456)
*Jinwoo Lee,Jiwoo Kim,Woojae Shin,Giseop Kim,Hyondong Oh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文提出了POLI（Point-to-Ellipsoid）方法，通过将点云局部几何建模为高斯分布统计流形，实现无监督的几何估计，提升机器人感知任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LiDAR获取的点云存在稀疏性和非均匀性，导致几何推理困难且降低下游感知性能。现有方法依赖手工统计或监督学习，存在可扩展性有限或需要大量标注数据的问题。

Method: 将局部几何建模为高斯分布诱导的统计流形，每个点关联一个捕获局部几何结构的高斯分布。提出POLI深度神经估计器，以自监督方式学习从点云观测到基础几何的映射。

Result: POLI能够实现准确鲁棒的几何估计，在多种机器人感知任务中持续提升性能，且无需修改现有架构即可集成到感知流程中。

Conclusion: 通过统计流形建模点云几何，POLI提供了一种无需标注数据的自监督几何估计方法，有效解决了点云稀疏性和非均匀性问题，提升了机器人感知任务的性能。

Abstract: Point clouds are a fundamental representation for robotic perception tasks such as localization, mapping, and object pose estimation. However, LiDAR-acquired point clouds are inherently sparse and non-uniform, providing incomplete observations of the underlying scene geometry. This makes reliable geometric reasoning challenging and degrades downstream perception performance. Existing approaches attempt to compensate for these limitations by estimating local geometry, but often rely on hand-crafted statistics or end-to-end supervised learning, which can suffer from limited scalability or require large amounts of accurately labeled data. To address these challenges, we explicitly model point cloud geometry under a principled mathematical formulation. We represent local geometry as a statistical manifold induced by a family of Gaussian distributions, where each point is associated with a Gaussian capturing its local geometric structure. Based on this formulation, we introduce Point-to-Ellipsoid (POLI), a deep neural estimator that predicts per-point Gaussian geometry. POLI learns a mapping from point cloud observations to their underlying geometry in a self-supervised manner, removing the need for labeled data while preserving strong geometric inductive biases. The resulting representation integrates seamlessly into existing robotic perception pipelines without architectural modifications. Extensive experiments show that POLI enables accurate and robust geometry estimation and consistently improves performance across diverse robotic perception tasks.

</details>


### [388] [VEGA: Visual Encoder Grounding Alignment for Spatially-Aware Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10485)
*Hao Wang,Xiaobao Wei,Jingyang He,Chengyu Bai,Chun-Kai Fan,Jiajun Cao,Jintao Chen,Ying Li,Shanyu Rong,Ming Lu,Xiaozhu Ju,Jian Tang,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VEGA提出了一种新的视觉编码器对齐框架，通过在视觉编码器输出层直接对齐3D感知特征，提升VLA模型的空间推理能力，无需推理时额外计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型的视觉骨干主要在2D图像数据上预训练，缺乏显式的3D几何监督，导致空间感知能力不足。现有隐式空间对齐方法在LLM级视觉标记上进行对齐，此时空间结构已与语言语义纠缠，限制了泛化性和几何可解释性。

Method: VEGA框架直接对齐VLA视觉编码器的输出与DINOv2-FiT3D的空间感知特征。DINOv2-FiT3D是通过多视角一致的3D高斯泼溅监督微调的模型。对齐通过轻量级投影器实现，使用余弦相似度损失和标准动作预测目标联合训练，推理时丢弃投影器。

Result: 在仿真基准和真实世界操作任务上的大量实验表明，VEGA始终优于现有隐式空间对齐基线，在VLA模型的隐式空间对齐方法中建立了新的最先进水平。

Conclusion: VEGA通过在视觉编码器输出层进行对齐，在语言纠缠发生前实现空间感知，提供了更具可解释性和原则性的对齐目标，显著提升了VLA模型的空间推理能力。

Abstract: Precise spatial reasoning is fundamental to robotic manipulation, yet the visual backbones of current vision-language-action (VLA) models are predominantly pretrained on 2D image data without explicit 3D geometric supervision, resulting in representations that lack accurate spatial awareness. Existing implicit spatial grounding methods partially address this by aligning VLA features with those of 3D-aware foundation models, but they rely on empirical layer search and perform alignment on LLM-level visual tokens where spatial structure has already been entangled with linguistic semantics, limiting both generalizability and geometric interpretability. We propose VEGA (Visual Encoder Grounding Alignment), a simple yet effective framework that directly aligns the output of the VLA's visual encoder with spatially-aware features from DINOv2-FiT3D, a DINOv2 model fine-tuned with multi-view consistent 3D Gaussian Splatting supervision. By performing alignment at the visual encoder output level, VEGA grounds spatial awareness before any linguistic entanglement occurs, offering a more interpretable and principled alignment target. The alignment is implemented via a lightweight projector trained with a cosine similarity loss alongside the standard action prediction objective, and is discarded at inference time, introducing no additional computational overhead. Extensive experiments on simulation benchmark and real-world manipulation tasks demonstrate that VEGA consistently outperforms existing implicit spatial grounding baselines, establishing a new state-of-the-art among implicit spatial grounding methods for VLA models.

</details>


### [389] [Embodied AI in Action: Insights from SAE World Congress 2026 on Safety, Trust, Robotics, and Real-World Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10653)
*Jan-Mou Li,Paul Schmitt,Wei Tong,Majed Mohammed,Akshay Chalana,Arpan Kusari,Edward Griffor*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SAE World Congress 2026专家小组讨论总结：具身AI在自动驾驶、机器人等实际应用中面临安全、信任、治理和可靠性挑战，需要系统化工程方法、全生命周期治理、以人为本设计和标准演进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着具身AI从研究走向实际应用（如自动驾驶汽车、移动机器人、工业机器），这些能够感知、决策和行动的系统带来了新的安全、信任、治理和操作可靠性挑战，需要系统化应对。

Method: 基于SAE World Congress 2026"Embodied AI in Action"专家小组讨论，汇集汽车、机器人、人工智能和安全工程领域的专家观点，总结关键见解和共识。

Result: 专家小组达成广泛共识：具身AI需要作为系统工程挑战来处理，要求工程严谨性、全生命周期治理、以人为本设计和不断演进的标准。长期成功不仅取决于AI能力进步，同样需要安全可信的部署。

Conclusion: 为负责任地采用具身AI，需要系统化方法、工程严谨性、持续治理和标准发展。成功不仅取决于技术能力，更取决于如何安全、可信地部署这些系统。

Abstract: Embodied artificial intelligence is rapidly moving from research into real-world systems such as autonomous vehicles, mobile robots, and industrial machines. As these systems become more capable of perceiving, deciding, and acting in dynamic environments, they also introduce new challenges in safety, trust, governance, and operational reliability. This white paper summarizes key insights from the SAE World Congress 2026 panel session \textit{Embodied AI in Action}, which brought together experts from automotive, robotics, artificial intelligence, and safety engineering. The discussion highlighted the need to treat embodied AI as a systems challenge requiring engineering rigor, lifecycle governance, human-centered design, and evolving standards. The paper provides practical perspectives for executives, policymakers, and technical leaders seeking to adopt embodied AI responsibly. The panel reached broad agreement that long-term success will depend not only on advances in AI capability, but equally on safe and trustworthy deployment.

</details>


### [390] [VRA: Grounding Discrete-Time Joint Acceleration in Voltage-Constrained Actuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10696)
*Lingwei Zhang,Jiaming Wang,Tianlin Zhang,Zhitao Song,Xuanqi Zeng,Weipeng Xia,Zhongyu Li,Yun-hui Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出电压可实现加速度（VRA）作为关节级加速度接口，将运动学加速度与电压约束执行器物理特性结合，确保指令加速度在电压可实现范围内


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散时间关节加速度约束广泛用于强制执行位置和速度限制，但在电压约束的电动执行器下，运动学上允许的加速度可能物理上无法实现，这暴露了执行级抽象的缺失

Method: 提出电压可实现加速度（VRA）作为关节级加速度接口，通过将指令加速度限制在电压可实现约束范围内，将运动学加速度基于电压约束执行器物理特性

Result: 在电动执行器和轮腿四足机器人上的硬件实验表明，VRA消除了无法实现的加速度，恢复了接近约束的一致执行，并减少了约束引起的振荡

Conclusion: VRA通过将运动学加速度与实际电压约束执行器物理特性相结合，提供了一种有效的执行级抽象，能够确保指令加速度在实际硬件中可实现

Abstract: Discrete-time joint acceleration constraints are widely used to enforce position and velocity limits. However, under voltage-constrained electric actuators, kinematically admissible accelerations may be physically unrealizable, exposing a missing execution-level abstraction. We propose Voltage-Realizable Acceleration (VRA), a joint-level acceleration interface that grounds kinematic acceleration in voltage-constrained actuator physics by restricting commanded accelerations to voltage-realizable constraints. Hardware experiments on electric actuators and a wheel-legged quadruped show that VRA removes unrealizable accelerations, restores consistent near-constraint execution, and reduces constraint-induced oscillations.

</details>


### [391] [ObjView-Bench: Rethinking Difficulty and Deployment for Object-Centric View Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10707)
*Sicong Pan,Hao Hu,Xuying Huang,Benno Wingender,Maren Bennewitz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ObjView-Bench 是一个用于评估物体中心视角规划的新框架，将对象复杂度、规划难度、预算假设和可达性约束分离开来，提供更真实的性能评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的物体中心视角规划评估方法往往将对象复杂度、规划难度、预算假设和物理可达性约束混为一谈，导致在理想化评估中得出的结论无法可靠预测真实重建场景下的性能。

Method: 1. 分离视角规划评估的三个核心量：全向自遮挡（对象属性）、观测饱和难度、基于集合覆盖定义的协议相关规划难度；2. 设计面向部署的评估协议，考虑不同预算机制和可达视角约束的影响。

Result: ObjView-Bench 框架能够进行受控数据集构建、分析慢饱和对象，并通过案例研究表明规划难度感知采样可以改进学习型视角规划器。在经典、学习和混合规划器中，该框架显示难度、预算和可达性约束显著改变了方法排名和失败模式。

Conclusion: 该研究提出了一个系统的评估框架，揭示了传统评估方法的局限性，并展示了将难度、预算和可达性约束纳入考虑后，视角规划方法的性能排名会发生显著变化，为更真实的三维重建场景提供了更可靠的评估基准。

Abstract: Object-centric view planning is a core component of active geometric 3D reconstruction in robotics, yet existing evaluations often conflate object complexity, planning difficulty, budget assumptions, and physical reachability constraints. As a result, conclusions drawn from idealized view-planning evaluations may not reliably predict performance under realistic reconstruction settings. We introduce ObjView-Bench, an evaluation framework for rethinking difficulty and deployment in object-centric view planning. First, we disentangle three quantities underlying view-planning evaluation: omnidirectional self-occlusion as an object-side attribute, observation saturation difficulty, and protocol-dependent planning difficulty defined through a set-cover formulation. This separation supports controlled dataset construction, analysis of slow-saturation objects, and a case study showing that planning difficulty-aware sampling can improve learned view planners. Second, we design deployment-oriented evaluation protocols that reveal how budget regimes and reachable-view constraints alter method behavior. Across classical, learned, and hybrid planners, ObjView-Bench shows that difficulty, budget, and reachability constraints substantially change method rankings and failure modes.

</details>


### [392] [MAGS-SLAM: Monocular Multi-Agent Gaussian Splatting SLAM for Geometrically and Photometrically Consistent Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10760)
*Zhihao Cao,Qi Shao,Shuhao Zhai,Jing Zhang,Anh Nguyen,Baoru Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MAGS-SLAM：首个仅使用RGB的多智能体3D高斯溅射SLAM框架，实现协作场景重建，无需深度传感器


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多智能体高斯SLAM大多依赖RGB-D传感器获取度量深度和简化跨智能体对齐，限制了在轻量、低成本或功耗受限机器人平台上的部署。需要一种仅使用RGB的协作3D重建方案。

Method: 每个智能体独立构建局部单目高斯子地图，传输紧凑的子地图摘要而非原始观测或密集地图。框架集成紧凑子地图通信、几何和外观感知的闭环验证、占用感知的高斯融合，以应对单目尺度模糊性。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，MAGS-SLAM实现了与最先进的RGB-D协作高斯SLAM方法相当的跟踪精度和渲染质量，同时仅依赖RGB图像。

Conclusion: MAGS-SLAM首次证明了仅使用RGB图像的多智能体3D高斯SLAM的可行性，为轻量、低成本机器人平台的协作场景重建提供了新方案。

Abstract: Collaborative photorealistic 3D reconstruction from multiple agents enables rapid large-scale scene capture for virtual production and cooperative multi-robot exploration. While recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) SLAM algorithms can generate high-fidelity real-time mapping, most of the existing multi-agent Gaussian SLAM methods still rely on RGB-D sensors to obtain metric depth and simplify cross-agent alignment, which limits the deployment on lightweight, low-cost, or power-constrained robotic platforms. To address this challenge, we propose MAGS-SLAM, the first RGB-only multi-agent 3DGS SLAM framework for collaborative scene reconstruction. Each agent independently builds local monocular Gaussian submaps and transmits compact submap summaries rather than raw observations or dense maps. To facilitate robust collaboration in the presence of monocular scale ambiguity, our framework integrates compact submap communication, geometry- and appearance-aware loop verification, and occupancy-aware Gaussian fusion, enabling coherent global reconstruction without active depth sensors. We further introduce ReplicaMultiagent Plus benchmark for evaluating collaborative Gaussian SLAM. Intensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that MAGS-SLAM achieves competitive tracking accuracy and comparable or superior rendering quality to state-of-the-art RGB-D collaborative Gaussian SLAM methods while relying only RGB images.

</details>


### [393] [ALAM: Algebraically Consistent Latent Transitions for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10819)
*Zuojin Tang,Haoyun Liu,Xinyuan Chang,Changjie Wu,Dongjie Huo,Yandan Yang,Bin Liu,Zhejia Cai,Feng Xiong,Mu Xu,jiachen Luo,De Ma,Zhiheng Ma,Gang Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ALAM是一种从无动作视频中学习代数一致潜在动作模型的方法，通过组合和反转一致性正则化，将时间关系转化为结构监督，提升VLA模型在机器人任务中的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型受限于带标签机器人数据的稀缺，而无动作视频提供了丰富的物理世界变化证据。现有潜在动作模型从视频中提取先验，但重建训练的潜在代码可能不适合策略生成，缺乏与机器人动作一致的结构。

Method: ALAM通过帧三元组学习潜在转移，在重建基础上通过组合和反转一致性进行正则化，鼓励局部可加性转移空间。下游VLA学习中，冻结预训练编码器，将潜在转移序列作为辅助生成目标，与机器人动作在联合流匹配目标下共同生成。

Result: ALAM将可加性和可逆性误差降低25-85倍，改善长期累积重建。在VLA策略中，MetaWorld MT50平均成功率从47.9%提升至85.0%，LIBERO从94.1%提升至98.1%，在真实世界操作任务中也有稳定提升。

Conclusion: ALAM通过代数结构化的潜在转移和联合流匹配的协同作用，显著提升了VLA模型在机器人任务中的性能，为从无动作视频中学习结构化动作表示提供了有效方法。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models remain constrained by the scarcity of action-labeled robot data, whereas action-free videos provide abundant evidence of how the physical world changes. Latent action models offer a promising way to extract such priors from videos, but reconstruction-trained latent codes are not necessarily suitable for policy generation: they may predict future observations while lacking the structure needed to be reused or generated coherently with robot actions. We introduce ALAM (Algebraic Latent Action Model), an Algebraically Consistent Latent Action Model that turns temporal relations in action-free video into structural supervision. Given frame triplets, ALAM learns latent transitions that are grounded by reconstruction while being regularized by composition and reversal consistency, encouraging a locally additive transition space. For downstream VLA learning, we freeze the pretrained encoder and use its latent transition sequences as auxiliary generative targets, co-generated with robot actions under a joint flow-matching objective. This couples structured latent transitions with flow-based policy generation, allowing the policy to exploit ALAM's locally consistent transition geometry without requiring latent-to-action decoding. Representation probes show that ALAM reduces additivity and reversibility errors by 25-85 times over unstructured latent-action baselines and improves long-horizon cumulative reconstruction. When transferred to VLA policies, ALAM raises the average success rate from 47.9% to 85.0% on MetaWorld MT50 and from 94.1% to 98.1% on LIBERO, with consistent gains on real-world manipulation tasks. Ablations further confirm that the strongest improvements arise from the synergy between algebraically structured latent transitions and joint flow matching.

</details>


### [394] [Unified Noise Steering for Efficient Human-Guided VLA Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10821)
*Junjie Lu,Xinyao Qin,Yuhua Jiang,Kaixin Wang,Chuheng Zhang,Bin Liang,Jun Yang,Min Xu,Li Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: UniSteer是一个统一噪声引导框架，通过近似动作到噪声的反演，将人类纠正指导与噪声空间强化学习结合，实现更高效的机器人策略适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于扩散的视觉-语言-动作模型在机器人操作中表现出色，但适应真实世界分布仍然困难。在线机器人强化学习成本高，而噪声空间RL虽然降低了成本，但自主探索效率有限。人类纠正干预可以减少探索负担，但人类指导在动作空间提供，而噪声空间微调需要噪声变量监督，存在不匹配问题。

Method: 提出UniSteer框架：1) 保持预训练的VLA模型固定作为去噪生成器；2) 使用轻量级噪声演员进行噪声空间RL；3) 当人类提供纠正动作时，通过近似动作到噪声的反演，将动作空间指导转换为噪声目标；4) 将转换后的噪声目标作为监督指导，与RL同时优化同一噪声演员。

Result: 在多样化操作任务的真实世界实验中，UniSteer比强大的噪声空间RL和动作空间人机交互基线更高效地适应，在四个真实世界适应任务中，平均66分钟内将成功率从20%提升到90%。

Conclusion: UniSteer成功解决了人类动作空间指导与噪声空间微调之间的不匹配问题，通过统一框架结合人类纠正指导与噪声空间RL，实现了更高效的机器人策略适应，显著减少了真实世界交互需求。

Abstract: Diffusion-based vision-language-action (VLA) models have emerged as strong priors for robotic manipulation, yet adapting them to real-world distributions remains challenging. In particular, on-robot reinforcement learning (RL) is expensive and time-consuming, so effective adaptation depends on efficient policy improvement within a limited budget of real-world interactions. Noise-space RL lowers the cost by keeping the pretrained VLA fixed as a denoising generator while updating only a lightweight actor that predicts the noise. However, its performance is still limited due to inefficient autonomous exploration. Human corrective interventions can reduce this exploration burden, but they are naturally provided in action space, whereas noise-space finetuning requires supervision over noise variables. To address these challenges, we propose UniSteer, a Unified Noise Steering framework that combines human corrective guidance with noise-space RL through approximate action-to-noise inversion. Given a human corrective action, UniSteer inverts the frozen flow-matching decoder to recover a noise target, which provides supervised guidance for the same noise actor that is simultaneously optimized via reinforcement learning. Real-world experiments on diverse manipulation tasks show that UniSteer adapts more efficiently than strong noise-space RL and action-space human-in-the-loop baselines, improving the success rate from 20% to 90% in 66 minutes on average across four real-world adaptation tasks.

</details>


### [395] [Safe Aerial 3D Path Planning for Autonomous UAVs using Magnetic Potential Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10880)
*Haechan Mark Bong,Giovanni Beltrame*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 3DMaxConvNet将2D MaxConvNet扩展到3D，使用卷积自编码器从LiDAR体素网格预测势场，实现快速、无局部极小值的无人机路径规划，相比A*和RRT*大幅提升速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市环境中无人机安全导航需要实时避障路径规划，现有方法存在局部极小值问题或计算效率低，需要一种既能保证全局最优又高效的3D路径规划方法。

Method: 将2D MaxConvNet势场规划器扩展到3D，利用麦克斯韦方程特性避免局部极小值；采用卷积自编码器从101^3体素网格（LiDAR数据）预测障碍物感知势场；在Cosys-AirSim城市环境中进行闭环测试验证。

Result: 在两个不同城市环境（密集夜间城市和郊区）的100次随机闭环试验中实现100%规划成功率；离线规划时路径长度与A*相当，但运行时间从0.155-0.17秒减少到0.087-0.089秒（约1.7-1.95倍加速）；相比RRT*(3k)达到相似路径质量，但运行时间从17.2-17.5秒减少到约0.09秒（约193-201倍加速）。

Conclusion: 3DMaxConvNet成功扩展了2D势场规划器到3D，实现了高效、可靠的无人机路径规划，在保持路径质量的同时显著提升计算效率，适用于城市环境实时导航。

Abstract: Safe autonomous Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle (UAV) navigation in urban environments requires real-time path planning that avoids obstacles. MaxConvNet is a potential-field planner that leverages properties of Maxwell's equations to generate a path to the goal without local minima. We extend the 2D MaxConvNet magnetic field planner to 3D, using a convolutional autoencoder to predict obstacle-aware potential fields from LiDAR-derived 101^3 voxel grids. Evaluation across 100 randomized closed-loop trials in two distinct Cosys-AirSim urban environments, a dense night-time cityscape and a suburban district shows a 100% path planning success rate on both maps without retraining. In offline path planning, 3DMaxConvNet produces path lengths comparable to A* on unseen maps while reducing runtime from 0.155--0.17s to 0.087--0.089s, or about 1.7--1.95 times faster than A*. Against RRT*(3k), 3DMaxConvNet achieves similar path quality while reducing planning runtime from 17.2--17.5s to about 0.09s, which is roughly 193--201 times faster than RRT*(3k).

</details>


### [396] [MDrive: Benchmarking Closed-Loop Cooperative Driving for End-to-End Multi-agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10904)
*Marco Coscoy,Zewei Zhou,Seth Z. Zhao,Henry Wei,Angela Magtoto,Johnson Liu,Rui Song,Walter Zimmer,Zhiyu Huang,Chen Tang,Bolei Zhou,Jiaqi Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MDrive是一个闭环协同驾驶基准，包含225个基于NHTSA预碰撞类型和真实V2X数据集的场景，用于评估多智能体系统在封闭驾驶环境中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有V2X基准存在两个主要问题：开环评估无法捕捉驾驶的闭环本质，而现有闭环评估缺乏行为多样性和交互多样性来反映真实驾驶场景。因此，多智能体系统在闭环驾驶中的实际效益程度尚不明确。

Method: 基于NHTSA预碰撞类型和真实V2X数据集构建了包含225个场景的闭环协同驾驶基准MDrive。该基准提供了场景生成、Real2Sim转换和人机协同仿真的开源工具箱。

Result: 多智能体系统通常优于单智能体系统，但面临两个重要挑战：感知共享虽然增强感知能力，但未必总能转化为更好的规划；协商在简单场景中提升规划性能，但在复杂密集交通场景中反而会损害性能。

Conclusion: MDrive为评估和改进协同驾驶系统的泛化性和鲁棒性建立了可复现的基础，揭示了当前多智能体系统在真实驾驶场景中面临的关键挑战。

Abstract: Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication has emerged as a promising paradigm for autonomous driving, enabling connected agents to share complementary perception information and negotiate with each other to benefit the final planning. Existing V2X benchmarks, however, fall short in two ways: (i) open-loop evaluations fail to capture the inherently closed-loop nature of driving, leading to evaluation gaps, and (ii) current closed-loop evaluations lack behavioral and interactive diversity to reflect real-world driving. Thus, it is still unclear the extent of benefits of multi-agent systems for closed-loop driving. In this paper, we introduce MDrive, a closed-loop cooperative driving benchmark comprising 225 scenarios grounded in both NHTSA pre-crash typologies and real-world V2X datasets. Our benchmark results demonstrate that multi-agent systems are generally better than single-agent counterparts. However, current multi-agent systems still face two important challenges: (i) perception sharing enhances perceptions, but doesn't always translate to better planning; (ii) negotiation improves planning performance but harms it in complex and dense traffic scenarios. MDrive further provides an open-source toolbox for scenario generation, Real2Sim conversion, and human-in-the-loop simulation. Together, MDrive establishes a reproducible foundation for evaluating and improving the generalization and robustness of cooperative driving systems.

</details>


### [397] [RoboMemArena: A Comprehensive and Challenging Robotic Memory Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10921)
*Huashuo Lei,Wenxuan Song,Huarui Zhang,Jieyuan Pei,Jiayi Chen,Haodong Yan,Han Zhao,Pengxiang Ding,Zhipeng Zhang,Lida Huang,Donglin Wang,Yan Wang,Haoang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoboMemArena是一个大规模机器人记忆基准，包含26个任务，平均轨迹长度超过1000步，68.9%的子任务依赖记忆，并支持真实世界评估。PrediMem是一种双系统视觉语言模型，通过高级规划器管理记忆库和预测编码头提升任务动态敏感性，在该基准上表现优于所有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人记忆基准存在以下问题：缺乏多模态记忆形成标注、任务覆盖和结构复杂性有限、仅限于仿真环境而无真实世界评估。这些限制阻碍了机器人记忆系统的全面发展和评估。

Method: 1. RoboMemArena基准构建：利用视觉语言模型设计和组合子任务，通过原子函数生成完整轨迹，提供包括子任务指令和原生关键帧标注在内的记忆相关标注，同时配对真实世界记忆任务支持物理评估。
2. PrediMem模型设计：采用双系统视觉语言模型架构，高级VLM规划器管理包含最近缓冲区和关键帧缓冲区的记忆库，使用预测编码头提高对任务动态的敏感性。

Result: 1. RoboMemArena包含26个任务，平均轨迹长度超过1000步，68.9%的子任务依赖记忆，提供了大规模、结构复杂的记忆基准。
2. PrediMem在RoboMemArena上优于所有基线，实验结果为记忆管理、模型架构和复杂记忆系统的缩放规律提供了深入见解。

Conclusion: RoboMemArena填补了现有机器人记忆基准的空白，为评估机器人记忆系统提供了全面的大规模基准。PrediMem通过双系统架构和预测编码机制有效提升了记忆依赖任务的性能，为复杂记忆系统的设计提供了重要参考。

Abstract: Memory is a critical component of robotic intelligence, as robots must rely on past observations and actions to accomplish long-horizon tasks in partially observable environments. However, existing robotic memory benchmarks still lack multimodal annotations for memory formation, provide limited task coverage and structural complexity, and remain restricted to simulation without real-world evaluation. We address this gap with RoboMemArena, a large-scale benchmark of 26 tasks, with average trajectory lengths exceeding 1,000 steps per task and 68.9% of subtasks being memory-dependent. The generation pipeline leverages a vision-language model (VLM) to design and compose subtasks, generates full trajectories through atomic functions, and provides memory-related annotations, including subtask instructions and native keyframe annotations, while paired real-world memory tasks support physical evaluation. We further design PrediMem, a dual-system VLA in which a high-level VLM planner manages a memory bank with recent and keyframe buffers and uses a predictive coding head to improve sensitivity to task dynamics. Extensive experiments on RoboMemArena show that PrediMem outperforms all baselines and provides insights into memory management, model architecture, and scaling laws for complex memory systems.

</details>


### [398] [PriorVLA: Prior-Preserving Adaptation for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10925)
*Xinyu Guo,Bin Xie,Wei Chai,Xianchi Deng,Tiancai Wang,Zhengxing Wu,Xingyu Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PriorVLA是一个保持预训练先验的视觉-语言-动作模型微调框架，通过冻结的"先验专家"和可训练的"适应专家"实现高效适配，在多个机器人任务上超越全微调和SOTA方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型全微调方法会将广泛的预训练先验偏向狭窄的训练分布模式，导致模型失去泛化能力，特别是在少样本和分布外场景下性能下降

Method: PriorVLA框架包含冻结的"先验专家"作为只读先验源，和可训练的"适应专家"进行下游任务专业化。"专家查询"从预训练VLM获取场景先验，从先验专家获取运动先验，整合到适应专家中以指导适配

Result: 在多个机器人数据集上取得显著性能提升：RoboTwin 2.0-Hard上比pi0.5提升11点，LIBERO上达到99.1%平均成功率；真实世界任务中，标准数据下ID成功率81%、OOD 57%，10样本/任务时ID 48%、OOD 32%，分别超越pi0.5 24和22点

Conclusion: PriorVLA通过分离和保留预训练先验，实现了高效且鲁棒的VLA模型适配，在保持预训练广泛知识的同时实现下游任务专业化，特别在少样本和OOD场景下优势明显

Abstract: Large-scale pretraining has made Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models promising foundations for generalist robot manipulation, yet adapting them to downstream tasks remains necessary. However, the common practice of full fine-tuning treats pretraining as initialization and can shift broad priors toward narrow training-distribution patterns. We propose PriorVLA, a novel framework that preserves pretrained priors and learns to leverage them for effective adaptation. PriorVLA keeps a frozen Prior Expert as a read-only prior source and trains an Adaptation Expert for downstream specialization. Expert Queries capture scene priors from the pretrained VLM and motor priors from the Prior Expert, integrating both into the Adaptation Expert to guide adaptation. Together, PriorVLA updates only 25% of the parameters updated by full fine-tuning. Across RoboTwin 2.0, LIBERO, and real-world tasks, PriorVLA achieves stronger overall performance than full fine-tuning and state-of-the-art VLA baselines, with the largest gains under out-of-distribution (OOD) and few-shot settings. PriorVLA improves over pi0.5 by 11 points on RoboTwin 2.0-Hard and achieves 99.1% average success on LIBERO. Across eight real-world tasks and two embodiments, PriorVLA reaches 81% in-distribution (ID) and 57% OOD success with standard data. With only 10 demonstrations per task, PriorVLA reaches 48% ID and 32% OOD success, surpassing pi0.5 by 24 and 22 points, respectively.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [399] [Reinforcement learning for inverse structural design and rapid laser cutting of kirigami prototypes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08098)
*Milad Yazdani,Shahriar Shalileh,Dena Shahriari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RL-Kirigami：结合最优传输条件流匹配与强化学习的逆向设计框架，用于生成可重构平行四边形四边形剪纸的兼容比例场，实现高精度目标形状匹配和几何可行性约束


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 剪纸是一种有用的形状可编程超材料制造方法，但逆向设计面临困难：部署过程非线性、切割布局必须满足离散兼容性规则、避免重叠，并将目标形状映射到有效设计

Method: 提出RL-Kirigami框架，结合最优传输条件流匹配（OT-CFM）与强化学习，生成兼容比例场；使用行进解码器强制执行全局几何兼容性，采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）将生成器与不可微奖励对齐，包括轮廓匹配、可行性和比例场正则性

Result: 在程序生成的目标形状实例上，预训练OT-CFM先验的单个样本达到94.2% sIoU，优于求解器基线，并将前向模拟器评估从数百次减少到1次；GRPO将精度提高到94.91% sIoU，包含正则性后，将TV(x)从0.95降低到0.81，同时保持94.83% sIoU；生成布局可导出为DXF并在50μm聚合物片材上激光切割，每个部件制造时间约8.0±1.0分钟

Conclusion: 该研究支持在硬几何可行性约束下，为可部署剪纸超材料建立制造感知的逆向设计工作流程

Abstract: Kirigami is an increasingly useful fabrication method to produce shape-programmable metamaterial structures. However, inverse design remains difficult because deployment is nonlinear, and feasible cut layouts must satisfy discrete compatibility rules, avoid overlap, and map one target shape to valid designs. We present RL-Kirigami, an inverse design framework that combines optimal-transport conditional flow matching (OT-CFM) with reinforcement learning to generate compatible ratio fields for compact reconfigurable parallelogram quad kirigami. A marching decoder enforces global geometric compatibility, and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) aligns the generator with nondifferentiable rewards for silhouette matching, feasibility, and ratio-field regularity. Across procedurally generated target shape instances, a single sample from the pretrained OT-CFM prior reached $94.2%$ sIoU and outperformed solver baselines while reducing forward simulator evaluations from hundreds to 1. GRPO improved accuracy to $94.91%$ sIoU and, with regularity included, reduced $\mathrm{TV}(\mathbf{x})$ from 0.95 to 0.81 while maintaining $94.83%$ sIoU. Generated layouts were exported to DXF and laser-cut in $50~μ\mathrm{m}$ polymeric sheets to produce deployable prototypes in $8.0 \pm 1.0$ minutes per part. These results support a manufacturing-aware inverse design workflow for deployable kirigami metamaterials under hard geometric feasibility constraints.

</details>


### [400] [Path-Based Gradient Boosting for Graph-Level Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08102)
*Claudio Meggio,Johan Pensar,Riccardo De Bin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PathBoost是一种用于图级分类和回归的梯度树提升方法，直接从输入图结构学习基于路径的判别性特征，在多个基准数据集上表现优于或媲美图神经网络和图核方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于路径的方法在图机器学习中具有潜力，但现有方法通常针对特定应用且缺乏灵活性。PathBoost旨在扩展先前工作的适用性，使其能处理更广泛的图分类和回归任务。

Method: PathBoost在先前工作基础上引入三个关键扩展：1) 使用逻辑损失的梯度提升适应二分类；2) 通过前缀分解将多个节点和边属性纳入路径特征空间；3) 基于分类属性多样性的自动锚节点选择，无需用户指定路径起点。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上与图神经网络和图核方法相比，PathBoost在一半数据集上获得更好结果，其余数据集上结果相当。在节点数较大的图上表现更优。

Conclusion: 基于路径的提升方法可以与更复杂的黑盒方法竞争，为图机器学习提供了一种可解释且高效的替代方案。

Abstract: We propose PathBoost, a gradient tree boosting method for graph-level classification and regression that learns discriminative path-based features directly from the input graph structure. Building on a previous work, which was tailored to a specific chemistry application, PathBoost introduces three key extensions: (i) adaptation to binary classification through gradient boosting with a logistic loss, (ii) incorporation of multiple node and edge attributes into the path feature space via a prefix-based decomposition, and (iii) automatic anchor node selection based on categorical attribute diversity, eliminating the need for the user to specify the starting point of the considered path features. We compared PathBoost to graph neural networks and graph kernel approaches on several benchmark datasets, obtaining better results in half of them, and comparable results in the rest. PathBoost shows better performances on graphs with larger average node counts. Overall, the results demonstrate that path-based boosting methods can be competitive with more complex black-box approaches.

</details>


### [401] [Distributional Reinforcement Learning via the Cramér Distance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08104)
*Vanya Aziz,Ivo Nowak,E. M. T Hendrix*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: C-DSAC算法将SAC与分布强化学习结合，使用Cramér距离最小化学习价值分布，在复杂机器人任务中超越基准方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索SAC算法在分布强化学习中的应用，通过分布表示状态-动作价值来改进传统SAC的性能

Method: 提出C-DSAC算法：在分布强化学习框架中表示状态-动作价值分布，使用平方Cramér距离作为损失函数进行学习

Result: 在多个机器人基准测试中，C-DSAC性能优于基准SAC和当代分布方法，在复杂环境中优势更明显

Conclusion: C-DSAC通过置信度驱动的Q值更新机制实现更稳定的学习，高方差目标分布导致更保守的模型更新，减少价值高估影响

Abstract: This paper explores the application of the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm within a Distributional Reinforcement Learning setting and introduces an implementation of such algorithm named Cramér-based Distributional Soft Actor-Critic (C-DSAC). The novel approach employs distributional reinforcement learning to represent state-action values, and minimizes the squared Cramér distance for learning the distribution. Empirical results across various robotic benchmarks indicate that our algorithm surpasses the performance of baseline SAC and contemporary distributional methods, with the performance advantage becoming increasingly pronounced in high-complexity environments. To explain the efficiency of the new approach, we conduct an analysis showing that its superior performance is partly due to \textit{confidence-driven} Q-value updates: High-variance target distributions (low confidence in target) lead to more conservative model updates, thereby attenuating the impact of overestimated values. This work deepens the understanding of distributional reinforcement learning, offering insights into the algorithmic mechanisms governing convergence and value estimation.

</details>


### [402] [Geometry-free prediction of inertial lift forces in microfluidic devices using deep learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08109)
*Jesse Ward-Bond,Ali Mashadian,Timothy C. Y. Chan,Edmond W. K. Young*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 开发了一种无需显式几何参数的粒子升力预测神经网络模型，能够有效泛化到未见过的通道几何形状


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统惯性微流体装置模拟需要针对每种通道截面训练独立模型，训练负担重，缺乏泛化能力

Method: 采用新的参数集训练神经网络模型，消除显式几何参数依赖，实现跨通道几何形状的通用预测

Result: 新模型在训练集上表现与现有模型相当，但对未见过的通道几何形状具有显著更好的泛化能力，能准确预测粒子迁移模式

Conclusion: 提出的无显式几何参数升力模型解决了传统方法的泛化限制，能轻松集成到粒子追踪模拟软件中，适用于多种通道设计

Abstract: Inertial microfluidic devices (IMDs) offer low-cost, high-throughput alternative techniques for many traditional particle- (or cell-) manipulation tasks, but simulating them requires being able to predict particle migration, and thus particle lift forces, under a variety of possible channel geometries. Recent work has demonstrated that machine learning models can be used to drastically speed up these numerical simulations, but doing so required training individual models for every unique channel cross-section type (e.g., rectangular, triangular) -- shifting the burden from the simulation step to the training step. In this paper, we develop a novel approach for predicting particle lift forces that contains no explicit geometric parameters. We train a neural network model using a new parameter set and show that while it performs comparably to existing models on channel geometries in the training set, it is able to generalize to unseen channel geometries far more effectively. We show that the lift force model developed herein can be easily transferred to particle tracing simulation software, where it is capable of predicting particle migration patterns consistent with the literature across a variety of channel designs.

</details>


### [403] [BaLoRA: Bayesian Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Scale Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08110)
*Dario Coscia,Sindy Löwe,Max Welling*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BaLoRA：一种贝叶斯扩展的LoRA方法，通过输入自适应的贝叶斯参数化，在保持低计算成本的同时提供不确定性量化并提升预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LoRA的低秩点估计更新限制了表达能力，与全参数微调存在精度差距，且缺乏不确定性量化，限制了其在可靠性要求高的场景中的应用。

Method: 提出BaLoRA，通过新颖的输入自适应贝叶斯参数化LoRA矩阵，在保持参数和计算成本最小化的同时，实现不确定性估计和精度提升。

Result: BaLoRA不仅提供良好校准的不确定性估计，其自适应噪声注入机制还显著提升预测精度，缩小了与全参数微调的差距。在金属有机框架带隙预测任务中，BaLoRA的零样本测试时不确定性估计比训练好的LoRA集成模型更准确地关联模型误差。

Conclusion: BaLoRA在保持LoRA计算效率优势的同时，通过贝叶斯扩展提供了可靠的不确定性量化，并在精度和可靠性方面都取得了显著改进，适用于对可靠性要求高的应用场景。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the standard for fine-tuning large pre-trained models at reduced computational cost. However, its low-rank point-estimate updates limit expressiveness, leave a persistent gap relative to full fine-tuning accuracy, and provide no built-in uncertainty quantification, limiting its applicability in settings where reliability matters as much as accuracy. We introduce BaLoRA, a Bayesian extension of LoRA with a novel input-adaptive Bayesian parameterization of LoRA matrices that adds minimal parameters and compute. Surprisingly, not only does the Bayesian extension yield well-calibrated uncertainty estimates, but the adaptive noise injection underlying our approach also significantly improves prediction accuracy, narrowing the gap with full fine-tuning across both natural language reasoning and vision tasks. When applied to band gap prediction in metal-organic frameworks, BaLoRA produces zero-shot test-time uncertainty estimates that correlate more strongly with model error than a trained ensemble of LoRA models, and improve monotonically with compute without sacrificing accuracy.

</details>


### [404] [TTCD:Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery from Non-Stationary Time Series Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08111)
*Omar Faruque,Sahara Ali,Xue Zheng,Jianwu Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TTCD是一个基于Transformer的端到端时间因果发现框架，能够从非平稳时间序列中学习同期和滞后因果关系，通过重构引导的因果信号蒸馏来减少噪声和虚假相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果发现方法存在局限性：基于约束的方法依赖条件独立性检验，在小样本和复杂分布下性能下降；基于分数的方法需要强统计假设；现有方法难以处理非平稳、非线性、噪声环境下的复杂时间序列因果关系。

Method: 提出Transformer集成时间因果发现框架，包含非平稳特征学习器（整合时域和频域注意力与动态非平稳性分析）和因果结构学习器。关键创新是重构引导的因果信号蒸馏，通过Transformer解码器的重构过程提取关键因果信号，减少噪声和虚假相关性。

Result: 在合成数据、基准数据和真实世界数据集上的实验表明，TTCD在准确性和与领域知识一致性方面持续优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: TTCD为具有挑战性的真实世界环境中的因果发现提供了一种有效的统一解决方案，能够处理非平稳、非线性、噪声时间序列中的复杂因果关系。
