We introduce the \textbf{Multi-Scale Attention Transformer} (\msat{}), a deep learning architecture that encodes spatiotemporal solution histories as token sequences and trains end-to-end via a composite supervised objective with optional physics-informed regularization terms. We conduct a comprehensive empirical evaluation against nine baselines -- including physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), neural operators (FNO, DeepONet, GNOT), and state-space models (Mamba-NO) -- across five benchmark problems from the PINNacle suite, using identical train/test splits and reference data for all methods. \msat{} achieves state-of-the-art generalization on complex geometry problems ($L^2_\mathrm{rel} = 0.0101$ on Heat2D-CG, a $3.7\times$ improvement over FNO) at $34\,\mathrm{s}$ total inference vs.\ $120{,}812\,\mathrm{s}$ for Mamba-NO. Ablation studies over the physics regularization component reveal a precise inductive bias tradeoff: physics priors reduce test error on diffusion-dominated problems but degrade generalization on chaotic and recirculating-flow regimes, directly characterizing the prior misspecification boundary. Approximation error bounds as a function of domain boundary complexity $κ$ provide a theoretical basis for these empirical findings and a principled rule for architecture selection.

</details>


### [477] [Quantile-Coupled Flow Matching for Distributional Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08515)
*Michael Groom,Victor-Alexandru Darvariu,Lars Kunze,James Wilson,Nick Hawes*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlowIQN提出了一种与Wasserstein距离对齐的条件流匹配分布强化学习批评器，通过分位数对齐的流路径解决现有方法的度量不匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的条件流匹配批评器使用任意的源-目标耦合进行训练，其流匹配损失与分布贝尔曼算子所需的p-Wasserstein距离度量不匹配，这违背了分布强化学习的理论基础。

Method: 提出FlowIQN，在每批小样本中对源样本和贝尔曼目标样本进行排序，以近似单调最优传输耦合，用分位数对齐的流路径替换任意配对。还通过快捷模型实现高效推理。

Result: FlowIQN提高了Wasserstein返回分布精度，在多个离线强化学习基准测试中表现出竞争力，并提供了明确的Wasserstein对齐投影保证。

Conclusion: FlowIQN是第一个具有明确Wasserstein对齐投影保证的流匹配分布批评器，为分布强化学习提供了理论基础的CFM批评器，可直接与DRL流程集成。

Abstract: Unlike standard expected-return Reinforcement Learning (RL), Distributional RL (DRL) models the full return distribution, making it better-suited for uncertainty-aware and risk-sensitive decision-making. Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) critics have recently attracted attention for modelling continuous, multi-modal return distributions. Despite this interest, there remains a substantial metric mismatch: DRL theory relies on the distributional Bellman operator being contractive in the $p$-Wasserstein distance, yet existing CFM critics are trained with arbitrary source-target couplings, so their flow-matching losses are not Wasserstein-aligned surrogates for matching Bellman target return distributions. In this work, we address this mismatch by proposing FlowIQN, a CFM critic that sorts source and Bellman target samples within each mini-batch to approximate the monotone optimal transport coupling, replacing arbitrary pairings with quantile-aligned flow paths. We prove that the loss of our quantile-coupled CFM critic yields a Wasserstein-aligned approximate projection compatible with the foundations of DRL. To our knowledge, FlowIQN is the first flow-matching distributional critic with an explicit Wasserstein-aligned projection guarantee. We further extend FlowIQN with shortcut models for efficient inference. Empirical results show that FlowIQN improves Wasserstein return-distribution accuracy over other CFM critics. It also yields competitive performance on offline RL benchmarks across multiple policy extraction methods, providing a theoretically grounded CFM critic that is readily compatible with DRL pipelines. Code: https://github.com/ori-goals/flowIQN.

</details>


### [478] [LLM Wardens: Mitigating Adversarial Persuasion with Third-Party Conversational Oversight](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08321)
*Lennart Wachowiak,Scott D. Blain,David Williams-King,Samuele Marro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究通过实验和模拟发现对抗性LLM能成功操纵用户决策，而引入"看守"LLM监控交互可显著降低操纵成功率，即使看守模型比对抗模型弱也能提供有效保护


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM说服能力增强，需要保护用户免受AI操纵。研究探索对抗性LLM的操纵效果及防御方法

Method: 1)预注册用户研究(N=120)，测试对抗性LLM在四个决策场景中的操纵效果；2)引入"看守"模型实时监控人机交互，检测到操纵时发出非绑定私人建议；3)创建COAX-Bench模拟基准，覆盖14个决策场景，进行16,212次多智能体交互模拟

Result: 对抗性LLM成功操纵用户决策达65.4%；加入看守模型后操纵成功率降至30.4%，对真实交互影响较小(仅降低8.6个百分点)；模拟中对抗LLM成功率达34.7%，看守模型降至12.3%；即使弱于对抗模型的看守也能提供有意义的保护

Conclusion: 看守模型能有效防御LLM操纵，即使模型能力较弱也能提供保护，为监督更强大模型提供了可扩展的监管路径

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly capable of persuasion, which raises the question of how to protect users against manipulation. In a preregistered user study (N=120) across four decision-making scenarios, we find that an adversarial LLM with a hidden goal succeeds in steering users' decisions 65.4% of the time. We then introduce a "warden" model: a secondary LLM that monitors the human-AI interaction trace in real time and issues non-binding, private advisories to the user when it detects manipulation. Adding a warden more than halves the adversary's success rate to 30.4%, with a much smaller (8.6 percentage points) reduction for genuine interactions. To probe the mechanism behind these results, we release COAX-Bench, a simulation benchmark spanning 14 decision-making scenarios, including hiring, voting, and file access. Across 16,212 simulated multi-agent interactions, capable adversarial LLMs achieve their hidden goals in 34.7% of cases, which warden models reduce to 12.3%. Notably, even warden models substantially weaker than the adversary they oversee provide meaningful protection, suggesting a path for scalable oversight of more capable models.

</details>


### [479] [SDG-MoE: Signed Debate Graph Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08322)
*Stepan Kulibaba,Kirill Labzin,Artem Dzhalilov,Roman Pakhomov,Oleg Svidchenko,Alexander Gansnikov,Aleksei Shpilman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SDG-MoE是一种新型稀疏MoE架构，通过有向图交互和迭代审议增强专家间的通信，在保持计算效率的同时提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MoE架构中，专家在路由后独立处理token并加权求和，缺乏专家间的通信互动。本文探索专家间直接交互是否能提升模型性能，特别是通过结构化审议过程。

Method: 提出SDG-MoE架构，包含三个核心组件：1) 支持图A⁺和批判图A⁻两个学习到的交互矩阵；2) 有符号消息传递步骤，在聚合前更新专家表示；3) 基于分歧的Friedkin-Johnsen风格锚定机制，控制审议强度同时防止专家漂移。

Result: 在受控三种子预训练实验中，SDG-MoE在验证困惑度上优于无符号图通信基线和普通MoE，比最强基线提升19.8%。在WikiText-103、C4和Paloma数据集上获得最佳外部困惑度。

Conclusion: SDG-MoE通过结构化审议过程有效增强了专家间通信，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升模型性能，为MoE架构设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Sparse MoE models achieve a good balance between capacity and compute by routing each token to a small subset of experts. However, in most MoE architectures, once a token is routed, the selected experts process it independently and their outputs are combined via a weighted sum. This leaves open whether enabling communication among them could improve performance. While prior work has raised this question, direct interaction among the active routed experts remains underexplored. In this paper, we propose SDG-MoE (Signed Debate Graph Mixture-of-Experts), a novel architecture that adds a lightweight, iterative deliberation step before final aggregation. SDG-MoE introduces three components: (i) two learned interaction matrices over the active experts, a support graph $A^+$ and a critique graph $A^-$, capturing reinforcing and corrective influences; (ii) a signed message-passing step that updates expert representations before aggregation; and (iii) a disagreement-gated Friedkin-Johnsen-style anchoring that controls deliberation strength while preventing expert drift. Together, these enable a structured deliberation process where interaction strength scales with disagreement and specialization is preserved. We also provide a theoretical analysis establishing stability conditions on expert states and showing that deliberation adds only low-order overhead over the active set. In controlled three-seed pretraining experiments, SDG-MoE improves validation perplexity over both an unsigned graph communication baseline and vanilla MoE, outperforming the strongest baseline by 19.8%, and gives the best external perplexity on WikiText-103, C4, and Paloma among the compared systems.

</details>


### [480] [The Reciprocity Gradient](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08323)
*Yue Lin,Pascal Poupart,Shuhui Zhu,Dan Qiao,Wenhao Li,Yuan Liu,Hongyuan Zha,Baoxiang Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出"影响归因问题"作为战略互动中学习代理的核心优化难题，引入"互惠梯度"方法，通过公开观察训练对手策略的私有估计器来反向传播奖励梯度，从而在声誉链上实现解析优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在战略互动中，通信对于维持互惠和合作至关重要。学习代理面临的核心优化难题是"影响归因问题"：代理发出的任何行动或信号都会通过组合分支路径重塑许多第三方的声誉，然后反馈到自身的未来奖励中，迫使代理在选择每个行动时同时考虑所有这些间接渠道。

Method: 引入"互惠梯度"方法，通过公开观察训练对手策略的私有估计器，显式地将奖励梯度反向传播。梯度在声誉链本身上进行解析流动，而不是从采样回报中估计。该方法联合优化行动和评估信号，无需内在奖励或奖励塑形。

Result: 经验上，该方法恢复了接近最优的上下文敏感策略，而基于采样的基准方法则崩溃为恒定输出策略。

Conclusion: 互惠梯度方法有效地解决了战略互动中的影响归因问题，通过在声誉链上进行解析梯度传播，实现了对行动和信号的联合优化，相比传统采样方法具有显著优势。

Abstract: Communication is fundamental to sustaining reciprocity and cooperation in strategic interactions. We identify and formulate the influence attribution problem as the central optimization difficulty inherent in such dynamics for a learning agent: any action or signal the agent emits reshapes the reputations of many third parties along combinatorially branching paths before feeding back into its own future rewards, forcing the agent to account for all of these indirect channels at once when choosing every action. To address this, we introduce the reciprocity gradient, which explicitly backpropagates reward gradients through private estimators of opponents' policies trained from public observations. The gradient flows through the reputation chain itself analytically, rather than being estimated from sampled returns. It jointly optimizes actions and evaluative signals without intrinsic rewards or reward shaping. Empirically, the method recovers near-optimal context-sensitive policies, while sample-based baselines collapse into constant-output policies.

</details>


### [481] [LLM Advertisement based on Neuron Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08326)
*Peiran Yun,Wenxin Xu,Jiayuan Liu,Yihang Zhang,Liang Zeng,Lingkai Kong,Tonghan Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Neuron Auctions，将广告拍卖对象从文本空间转移到LLM内部表示，通过识别品牌特定神经元并设计连续菜单式拍卖机制，平衡广告商收益、平台收入和用户体验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM作为对话代理时，生成式广告成为重要变现策略，但现有方法（如提示注入或固定广告位）破坏语义连贯性，缺乏参数化框架，难以实现严格的机制设计，无法平衡广告商收益、平台收入和用户体验的三难困境。

Method: 利用机制可解释性识别品牌特定的前馈网络神经元，发现竞争品牌在近似正交子空间中激活；基于此定义连续、解耦的干预预算（神经元数量和放大因子）作为可拍卖商品；设计连续菜单式拍卖机制，保证策略证明性并优化平台收入，同时将用户效用惩罚纳入优化目标。

Result: 实验表明Neuron Auctions能有效保持自然对话质量，实现商业激励与用户满意度的最优对齐，动态定价过度激进的干预。

Conclusion: Neuron Auctions通过将拍卖对象转移到LLM内部表示空间，解决了生成式广告的三难困境，提供参数化框架实现独立控制，平衡了广告商、平台和用户三方的利益。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) transition into conversational agents, generative advertising emerges as a crucial monetization strategy. However, embedding advertisements within unstructured LLM outputs introduces a critical trilemma: balancing advertiser payoffs, platform revenue, and user experience. Existing methods, such as prompt injection or rigid position slots, disrupt semantic coherence and lack a parametric framework for independent control, rendering rigorous mechanism design intractable. To bridge this gap, we introduce Neuron Auctions, a novel paradigm that shifts the auction object from the surface text space to the LLM's internal representations. Leveraging mechanistic interpretability, we identify brand-specific feed-forward network (FFN) neurons and demonstrate that competing brands activate within approximately orthogonal subspaces. This near-perfect independence allows us to define continuous, disentangled intervention budgets (specifically, neuron counts and amplification factors) as auctionable commodities. Building on this computational carrier, we design a continuous menu-based auction mechanism that naturally guarantees strategy-proofness and optimizes revenue for the platform. By explicitly incorporating a user utility penalty into the platform's optimization objective, our framework dynamically prices out overly aggressive interventions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Neuron Auctions effectively preserve natural discourse quality while achieving an optimal alignment between commercial incentives and user satisfaction.

</details>


### [482] [Interactive Critique-Revision Training for Reliable Structured LLM Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08327)
*Fei Xu Yu,Zuyuan Zhang,Mahdi Imani,Nathaniel D. Bastian,Tian Lan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DPA-GRPO是一种用于结构化决策任务的双角色训练方法，通过生成器-验证器的对抗游戏，结合安全保证案例机制，提升LLM输出的局部正确性、全局一致性和可审计性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在结构化决策工作流中，LLM输出需要满足局部正确、全局一致且可审计的要求。现有方法依赖启发式辩论、自我博弈或LLM生成的监督，存在二阶保证问题，需要更可靠的训练方法。

Method: 提出DPA-GRPO方法：构建生成器-验证器双角色游戏，验证器可提出安全保证案例（包含声明、论证和证据）或保持沉默。使用配对反事实动作组进行角色特定的KL正则化GRPO更新，通过分析非正则化游戏证明其理论稳定性。

Result: 在TaxCalcBench TY24基准测试中，DPA-GRPO在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B模型上都优于零样本生成和仅生成器RL基线，提高了结构化决策准确性，增强了正确静默接受、减少错误遗漏，并改善校准修订行为。

Conclusion: DPA-GRPO通过双角色对抗训练有效提升结构化决策任务中LLM的可靠性和可审计性，为实际应用中的生成器-验证器协作提供了可行的训练框架。

Abstract: In structured decision-making workflows such as form filling, compliance checking, and maintenance reporting, LLM outputs must be locally correct, globally consistent, and auditable against task-specific rules. Existing refinement methods often rely on heuristic debate, self-play, or LLM-generated supervision, creating a second-order assurance problem. We propose DPA-GRPO (Dual Paired-Action Group-Relative Policy Optimization), a paired-action training method for a two-player generator--verifier game with structured verifier interventions. The generator proposes outputs and may revise them when challenged; the verifier either remains silent or raises a safety assurance case (SAC) containing a claim, argument, and evidence. These SAC/no-SAC and KEEP/REVISE decisions induce paired counterfactual action groups, which DPA-GRPO uses for role-specific KL-regularized GRPO updates. We analyze the unregularized game and show that positive probability on strictly lower-reward intervention or revision actions creates a profitable unilateral deviation. Under standard stochastic-approximation assumptions, DPA-GRPO tracks the corresponding game ODE, whose isolated asymptotically stable limit points are stationary and candidate local equilibria under role-wise local optimality. Experiments on TaxCalcBench TY24 show that DPA-GRPO improves structured decision accuracy over zero-shot generation and generator-only RL baselines across Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B. Training increases correct silent acceptance, reduces missed errors, and improves calibrated revision behavior, indicating gains for both generator and verifier.

</details>


### [483] [P-Flow: Proxy-gradient Flows for Linear Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08328)
*Zehua Jiang,Fenghao Zhu,Xinquan Wang,Chongwen Huang,Zhaoyang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出P-Flow框架，通过代理梯度更新源点来稳定基于流匹配的逆问题求解，避免数值不稳定和计算开销，在极端退化条件下表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于流匹配的生成模型在逆问题中表现出色，但现有方法需要沿展开路径微分，导致数值不稳定和高计算开销

Method: 提出P-Flow框架：1) 使用代理梯度更新源点来稳定重建过程；2) 采用高斯球面投影确保与先验分布的一致性；3) 基于贝叶斯理论和Lipschitz连续性提供理论分析

Result: 在多种修复任务中，P-Flow展现出竞争性性能，特别是在严重不适定条件和高测量噪声等极端退化情况下表现优异

Conclusion: P-Flow通过代理梯度和高斯球面投影，有效解决了基于流匹配的逆问题求解中的数值不稳定和计算开销问题，在极端退化条件下仍能保持良好性能

Abstract: Generative models based on flow matching have emerged as a powerful paradigm for inverse problems, offering straighter trajectories and faster sampling compared to diffusion models. However, existing approaches often necessitate differentiating through unrolled paths, leading to numerical instability and prohibitive computational overhead. To address this, we propose P-Flow, a framework that stabilizes the reconstruction process by leveraging a proxy gradient to update the source point. This approach effectively circumvents the numerical instability and memory overhead of long-chain differentiation. To ensure consistency with the prior distribution, we employ a Gaussian spherical projection motivated by the concentration of measure phenomenon in high-dimensional spaces. We further provide a theoretical analysis for P-Flow based on Bayesian theory and Lipschitz continuity. Experiments across diverse restoration tasks demonstrate that P-Flow delivers competitive performance, especially under extreme degradations such as severely ill-posed conditions and high measurement noise.

</details>


### [484] [CDS4RAG: Cyclic Dual-Sequential Hyperparameter Optimization for RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08333)
*Pengzhou Chen,Tao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CDS4RAG是一个用于优化RAG系统超参数的框架，通过循环双序优化方法区分检索器和生成器的超参数，显著提升生成质量和速度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG系统对检索器和生成器的超参数非常敏感，但现有优化方法效果不佳且收敛慢，因为它们通常将RAG视为黑盒或只优化部分超参数

Method: 提出CDS4RAG框架，采用循环双序优化方法，区分检索器和生成器的超参数，循环交替优化，并设计细粒度的周期内预算分配和跨周期种子加速机制

Result: 在4个基准测试和2个骨干LLM上，CDS4RAG在21/24情况下显著提升基线算法性能，在所有情况下都优于SOTA算法，生成质量提升最高达1.54倍，且有更好的加速效果

Conclusion: CDS4RAG通过循环双序优化方法有效解决了RAG超参数优化问题，是一个算法无关的框架，能够显著提升生成质量和优化速度

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is sensitive to the vast hyperparameters of the retriever and generator, yet optimizing them using given queries is a challenging task due to the complex interactions and expensive evaluation costs. Existing algorithms are ineffective and slow in convergence, since they often treat RAG as a monolithic black box or only optimize partial hyperparameters. In this paper, we propose CDS4RAG, a framework that optimizes the full RAG hyperparameters using given queries via a new cyclic dual-sequential formulation. CDS4RAG is special in the sense that it distinguishes the hyperparameters of the retriever and generator, cyclically optimizing them in turn. Such a paradigm allows us to design fine-grained within-cycle budget provision and expedite the optimization via cross-cycle seeding when optimizing the generator. CDS4RAG is also an algorithm-agnostic framework that can be paired with diverse general algorithms. Through experiments on four common benchmarks and two backbone LLMs, we reveal that CDS4RAG considerably boosts the vanilla algorithms in 21/24 cases while significantly outperforming state-of-the-art algorithms in all cases with up to 1.54x improvements of generation quality and better speedup.

</details>


### [485] [Private Vertical Federated Inference for Time-Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08343)
*Lucas Fenaux,Larris Xie,Aditya Bang,Alex Zhang,Kevin Wilson,Florian Kerschbaum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PPHH-VFL混合架构，将模型头部分为明文公共头和轻量级MPC私有头，通过对抗训练保护隐私，实现高效安全推理，相比端到端MPC加速6个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机构间需要协作进行时间序列数据推理，但隐私保护要求高。MPC提供强隐私保证但成本过高且扩展性差；VFL效率高但存在嵌入层隐私泄露问题。需要一种实用的大规模安全推理方案。

Method: 提出PPHH-VFL混合架构：1) 将模型头部分为明文公共头和轻量级MPC私有头；2) 对公共嵌入应用对抗训练以减轻隐私泄露；3) 小型私有头通过MPC安全保护敏感信息流。

Result: 在高达8600万参数模型上的实验表明：相比端到端MPC加速达6个数量级；相比标准VFL+MPC基线，在WAN中加速达44.4倍，通信成本降低91.2倍（从1.7GB降至19MB/批次），同时分类准确率提升2.50%，回归RMSE降低40.7%。

Conclusion: PPHH-VFL通过混合架构实现了高效、可扩展的安全推理，在保持强隐私保护的同时显著提升了性能，为大规模协作推理提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Institutions may benefit from collaborative inference on time-series data. In settings where privacy is necessary, multi-party computation (MPC) is a straightforward approach to providing strong guarantees, yet it remains prohibitively expensive and scales poorly with modern transformer architectures. Vertical Federated Learning (VFL) offers efficiency but suffers from privacy leakage at the embedding level, and securing the entire VFL model head via MPC remains prohibitively slow and communication-heavy for larger models. To enable practical, secure inference at scale, we propose "Public/Private Hybrid Head-VFL" (PPHH-VFL). This hybrid architecture splits the model head into an efficient plaintext public head and a secure, lightweight MPC private head. By applying adversarial training to the public embeddings, we mitigate privacy leakage; concurrently, the small private head securely preserves the flow of sensitive information needed for high downstream utility. Empirical evaluations on models ranging up to 86 million parameters demonstrate that PPHH-VFL accelerates inference by up to six orders of magnitude compared to end-to-end MPC. Compared to a standard VFL+MPC baseline, our approach scales significantly better, achieving a speedup of up to 44.4x in WAN and a 91.2x reduction in communication costs (dropping from 1.7 GB to 19 MB per batch), while simultaneously improving downstream classification accuracy by 2.50% and regression RMSE by 40.7%.

</details>


### [486] [Convergence Analysis of Newton's Method for Neural Networks in the Overparameterized Limit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08352)
*Konstantin Riedl,Konstantinos Spiliopoulos,Justin Sirignano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文分析了过参数化神经网络中正则化牛顿法的收敛性，证明在无限宽度极限下，训练动态收敛到包含"牛顿神经正切核"的确定性方程，且能实现指数级快速收敛，克服梯度下降的谱偏差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是解决梯度下降训练神经网络时的谱偏差问题，即梯度下降对高频分量收敛缓慢，因为神经正切核的特征值在零处累积。希望通过牛顿法提供更均匀的收敛性能。

Method: 采用正则化牛顿法训练过参数化神经网络，建立理论分析框架，推导训练动态在无限宽度极限下收敛到确定性方程，分析牛顿神经正切核的性质和正则化参数的选择策略。

Result: 证明了在过参数化极限下，神经网络训练动态以概率收敛到包含牛顿神经正切核的确定性方程，提供了明确的收敛速率。在无限宽度极限下，神经网络以指数速度收敛到全局最小值，且收敛在整个频谱上均匀，克服了梯度下降的谱偏差问题。

Conclusion: 正则化牛顿法在过参数化神经网络训练中具有优越的收敛性能，能够均匀收敛于整个频率谱，解决了梯度下降的谱偏差问题，为神经网络优化提供了新的理论依据。

Abstract: A convergence analysis is developed for the regularized Newton method for training neural networks (NNs) in the overparameterized limit. As the number of hidden units tends to infinity, the NN training dynamics converge in probability to the solution of a deterministic limit equation involving a ``Newton neural tangent kernel'' (NNTK). Explicit rates characterizing this convergence are provided and, in the infinite-width limit, we prove that the NN converges exponentially fast to the target data (i.e., a global minimizer with zero loss). We show that this convergence is uniform across the frequency spectrum, addressing the spectral bias inherent in gradient descent. The eigenvalues of the NTK for gradient descent accumulate at zero, leading to slow convergence for target data with high-frequency components. In contrast, the NNTK has uniformly lower bounded eigenvalues if the regularization parameter is selected appropriately, allowing Newton's method to converge more quickly for data with high-frequency components. Mathematical challenges that need to be addressed in our analysis include the implicit parameter update of the Newton method with a potentially indefinite Hessian matrix and the fact that the dimension of this linear system of equations tends to infinity as the NN width grows. This complicates deriving the training dynamics in the overparameterized limit as well as proving the convergence of the finite-width dynamics thereto. The analysis identifies a scaling formula for selecting the regularization parameter, which we show can vanish at a suitable rate as the number of hidden units becomes larger. We prove that, for sufficiently large numbers of hidden units, the regularized Hessian remains positive definite during training and the Newton updates for individual NN parameters converge to zero, showing that the model behaves as a linearization around the initialization.

</details>


### [487] [SWE Atlas: Benchmarking Coding Agents Beyond Issue Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08366)
*Mohit Raghavendra,Soham Dan,Miguel Romero Calvo,Yannis Yiming He,Johannes Baptist Mols,Gautam Anand,Cole McCollum,Edgar Arakelyan,Vijay Bharadwaj,Andrew Park,Jeff Da,MohammadHossein Rezaei,Bing Liu,Brad Kenstler,Yunzhong He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SWE Atlas是一个用于评估编码代理的基准套件，包含代码库问答、测试编写和重构三个软件工程工作流，采用程序化检查和基于量表的评估框架来衡量功能正确性和工程质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软件工程基准主要关注功能正确性，缺乏对工程质量的评估，且任务类别不够全面。SWE Atlas旨在填补这一空白，针对被忽视但实际重要的任务类别，采用更贴近实际使用的任务表述。

Method: 1. 构建包含284个任务的基准套件，涵盖代码库问答（124个）、测试编写（90个）和重构（70个）三个工作流；2. 采用特定类别的综合评估协议；3. 使用不明确指定的、代理式的任务表述；4. 结合程序化检查和基于量表的评估框架，评估测试完整性、重构完整性、可维护性、可重用抽象和代码库卫生等工程质量指标。

Result: GPT-5.4和Opus 4.7表现最佳，而最好的开源模型得分较低。分析表明顶级模型依赖广泛的代码库探索和运行时驱动推理，但即使在顶级模型中，也普遍在微妙边界情况、复杂运行时分析以及遵循软件工程最佳实践方面存在困难。

Conclusion: SWE Atlas提供了一个互补的评估套件，用于衡量编码代理的正确性和工程质量，揭示了现有模型在真实软件工程场景中的局限性，为未来改进指明了方向。

Abstract: We introduce SWE Atlas, a benchmark suite for coding agents spanning three professional software engineering workflows: Codebase Q&A (124 tasks), Test Writing (90 tasks), and Refactoring (70 tasks). SWE Atlas differs from prior SWE benchmarks in three key ways: it targets underrepresented but practically important task categories, uses comprehensive category-specific evaluation protocols, and adopts under-specified, agentic task formulations that better reflect real-world usage. Its evaluation framework combines programmatic checks with rubric-based assessment. This goes beyond functional correctness, evaluating software engineering quality, including test and refactor completeness, maintainability, reusable abstractions, and codebase hygiene. We evaluate a range of frontier and open-weight models on SWE Atlas and find that GPT-5.4 and Opus 4.7 achieve the strongest overall performance, while even the best open-weight models score poorly. Our analysis suggests that top models rely on extensive codebase exploration and runtime-driven reasoning. However, even top models consistently struggle with subtle edge cases, complex runtime analysis, and adherence to software engineering best practices. Overall, SWE Atlas provides a complementary evaluation suite for measuring both correctness and engineering quality in coding agents.

</details>


### [488] [Embedding Dimension Lower Bounds for Universality of Deep Sets and Janossy Pooling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08377)
*Ali Syed,Aditya Nambiar,Jonathan W. Siegel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了Janossy池化（包括Deep Sets）用于点云置换对称神经网络时的泛化能力，特别关注了嵌入维度大小的下界，为Deep Sets提供了最优维度估计，并为k元Janossy池化提供了首个非平凡下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际应用中，将对称性融入神经网络架构很重要。对于由n个d维点组成的点云的置换对称性，Janossy池化是构建不变网络的通用方法，但需要确定保证泛化能力所需的最小嵌入维度。

Method: 使用新颖技术分析Janossy池化架构的泛化能力，特别关注Deep Sets和k元Janossy池化，通过理论分析证明嵌入维度的下界。

Result: 对于Deep Sets，当d>1时，得到了与最优维度相差常数因子的最小维度估计；对于k元Janossy池化（k>1），首次证明了嵌入维度的非平凡下界。

Conclusion: Janossy池化是构建置换对称神经网络的有效方法，但需要足够大的嵌入维度才能保证泛化能力，本文为此提供了重要的理论边界。

Abstract: In many practical applications it is important to build symmetries into neural network architectures. Consider the important case of permutation symmetry on point clouds consisting of $n$ points in $d$ dimensions. In this case the network learns a function on a set of $n$ points in $\mathbb{R}^d$, and a natural paradigm for constructing invariant networks is Janossy pooling, which generalizes the popular Deep Sets architecture. We study the universality of this approach, in particular the important question of how large the embedding dimension must be to guarantee universality of this architecture. Specifically, using a novel technique, we prove new lower bounds on the required size of this embedding dimension. For Deep Sets, this gives the correct minimal dimension up to a constant factor for all $d > 1$. For $k$-ary Janossy pooling, we prove the first non-trivial lower bound on the required embedding dimension when $k > 1$.

</details>


### [489] [Reinforcement Learning for Scalable and Trustworthy Intelligent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08378)
*Guangchen Lan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出通过联邦优化、偏好对齐和上下文安全等方法，解决强化学习在分布式环境中的可扩展性和在大型语言模型中的可信性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习在实际部署中面临两大挑战：1）在分布式环境中需要高效扩展（通信带宽有限、计算异构）；2）在大型语言模型和自主代理中需要与人类偏好对齐并满足安全要求（如隐私保护的信息披露）。

Method: 通过四个互补的贡献：第一部分研究联邦设置下的可扩展强化学习（通信高效和异步联邦优化）；第二部分研究大型语言模型的可信强化学习（偏好对齐和减少上下文不适当的信息披露）。

Result: 该研究在两个方面推进强化学习：一方面通过联邦优化提高可扩展性；另一方面通过偏好对齐和上下文安全提高可信性。

Conclusion: 下一代智能系统需要同时具备高效优化和可信行为，而强化学习为实现这两个目标提供了统一框架。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a powerful paradigm for improving the capability of intelligent systems, but its practical deployment faces two central challenges. First, reinforcement learning must scale efficiently in distributed environments where communication bandwidth is limited and computation is heterogeneous across agents. Second, as reinforcement learning is increasingly used in post-training large language models and autonomous agents, the optimized policies must also be aligned with human preferences and satisfy safety requirements such as privacy-aware information disclosure. This dissertation addresses both challenges through four complementary contributions spanning federated optimization, preference alignment, and contextual safety.
  The first part of the dissertation studies scalable reinforcement learning in federated settings. The second part of the dissertation studies trustworthy reinforcement learning for large language models. Together, these contributions advance reinforcement learning along two complementary dimensions. On the one hand, they make reinforcement learning more scalable through communication-efficient and asynchronous federated optimization. On the other hand, they make reinforcement learning more trustworthy by improving alignment with human preferences and by reducing contextually inappropriate information disclosure in language-based intelligent systems. As a whole, this dissertation argues that the next generation of intelligent systems will require both efficient optimization and trustworthy behavior, and that reinforcement learning provides a unifying framework for addressing both goals.

</details>


### [490] [The Power of Second Order Methods for Sequence Preconditioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08390)
*Annie Marsden,Elad Hazan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种结合通用序列预处理（USP）和Vovk-Azoury-Warmuth（VAW）算法的方法，用于具有长记忆的线性动力系统的序列预测，实现了对数级遗憾（O(log³ T)），突破了传统多项式遗憾的界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统序列预测方法在处理具有长记忆的线性动力系统时，通常只能达到多项式级别的遗憾增长。USP方法虽然能压缩序列记忆需求，但会导致梯度和直径指数级增长，阻碍了获得最优遗憾界限。需要找到一种能充分利用USP内存压缩优势，同时能抵抗指数爆炸的方法。

Method: 结合通用序列预处理（USP）和Vovk-Azoury-Warmuth（VAW）算法。USP将线性动力系统的序列压缩为需要更短记忆的"预处理"序列，而VAW算法则能利用这种内存压缩，同时抵抗预处理序列带来的指数级直径和梯度增长。还扩展了USP的适用性，通过新的复分析界限处理Chebyshev多项式，允许具有常数复参数的更广泛系统。

Result: 证明了USP与VAW算法的结合能够为任何边际稳定的线性动力系统实现O(log³ T)的多对数遗憾，即使在存在非对称隐藏转移矩阵的情况下也是如此。这一结果显著优于传统的多项式遗憾界限。

Conclusion: 通过将USP的序列压缩能力与VAW算法的鲁棒性相结合，该方法在长记忆线性动力系统的序列预测中实现了突破性的性能提升，为这类问题提供了理论上最优的遗憾界限。

Abstract: Sequence prediction methods for dynamical systems with long memory, i.e. marginally stable systems, typically achieve regret that grows polynomially with the hidden dimension of the underlying generative model. Universal Sequence Preconditioning (USP) is a method that compresses any sequence which comes from a linear dynamical system into a "preconditioned" sequence which requires exponentially shorter memory for accurate prediction. However, the preconditioned sequence yields exponentially larger diameters and gradients, hindering USP from unlocking optimal regret bounds. Inspired by the minimum description length principle, we show that the Vovk-Azoury-Warmuth (VAW) algorithm is naturally matched to the USP regime. Indeed, it takes advantage of the memory compression while remaining robust to the exponential explosion of the diameter. We prove that combining USP with VAW achieves astoundingly strong results: for any marginally-stable linear dynamical system, this algorithm achieves polylogarithmic regret $O \left( \log^3 T \right)$ even in the presence of asymmetric hidden transition matrices. Finally, we extend the applicability of USP beyond bounded-spectrum systems by providing new complex-analytic bounds on Chebyshev polynomials, allowing for systems with constant complex arguments.

</details>


### [491] [SACHI: Structured Agent Coordination via Holistic Information Integration in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08391)
*Nikunj Gupta,James Zachary Hare,Jesse Milzman,Rajgopal Kannan,Viktor Prasanna*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SACHI通过图Transformer在智能体协调图上进行内容依赖的消息传递，解决了多智能体强化学习中部分观测下的信息瓶颈问题，在多种协作任务中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体强化学习中存在信息瓶颈：智能体基于局部观测决策，但最优联合行动所需的信息分散在团队中。现有方法要么忽略此瓶颈，要么使用标量混合信号，要么通过学习的通信通道绕过。

Method: 提出SACHI（结构化智能体协调通过整体信息集成），使用图Transformer在智能体协调图上进行卷积，在行动选择前用接收者敏感、内容依赖的队友信号丰富每个智能体的表示。

Result: 在5个协作任务（空间、通信、对抗协调）上评估，SACHI在12个基线方法中始终匹配或超越最佳基线。统计分析（包括置信区间、Friedman排名、性能分析）确认优势具有统计显著性，且不归因于模型容量增加。

Conclusion: 参数匹配消融实验表明，性能提升源于单一架构特性：消息传递算子的内容依赖程度。SACHI通过结构化信息集成有效解决了多智能体协调中的信息瓶颈问题。

Abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning agents that act on partial local observations face a fundamental information bottleneck: the knowledge needed to select jointly optimal actions is scattered across the team, yet each agent must commit to a decision without access to its teammates' observations, intentions, or chosen actions. Existing methods either ignore this bottleneck, compress it into a scalar mixing signal, or route around it with learned communication channels. Framing action coordination as a problem of structured information integration among agents, we propose \textit{structured agent coordination via holistic information integration}, or SACHI, in which graph transformer convolutions over an inter-agent coordination graph enrich each agent's representation with receiver-sensitive, content-dependent signals from teammates prior to action selection. We evaluate SACHI across five cooperative tasks spanning spatial, communicative, and adversarial coordination challenges against twelve baselines. SACHI consistently matches or outperforms the best baseline on every task, and rigorous aggregate statistical analyses, including normalized metrics with bootstrap confidence intervals, Friedman ranking, and performance profiling, confirm that this advantage is statistically significant, robust across environments, and not attributable to increased model capacity. Parameter-matched ablations further trace the source of the gains to a single architectural property: the degree of content-dependence in the message-passing operator.

</details>


### [492] [Geometry-Aware Discretization Error of Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08392)
*Samuel Hurault,Thomas Moreau,Gabriel Peyré*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文分析了扩散模型采样中的离散化误差，推导出在精确得分设置下的一阶渐近展开公式，揭示了误差如何适应数据几何结构，并提出了几何感知的参数优化方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的非渐近分析提供的收敛保证通常过于宽松，对扩散参数不敏感，无法指导实际设计。需要更精确地理解离散化误差如何受数据几何和扩散参数影响

Method: 在精确得分设置下，推导Euler-Maruyama弱离散化和Fréchet离散化误差的一阶渐近展开公式。在数据为高斯分布时，公式变得完全显式，揭示了误差与数据协方差谱的相互作用

Result: 得到了显式公式，显示离散化误差如何通过协方差谱适应数据几何结构，以及这种几何如何与关键扩散参数（包括扩散调度和扩散项系数）相互作用。高斯公式的定性预测在不同几何的扩散采样问题中保持稳健

Conclusion: 通过一阶渐近分析提供了更精确的离散化误差理解，揭示了误差与数据几何的相互作用，为几何感知的参数优化提供了可处理的优化目标，这些见解在不同数据集和任务中保持有效

Abstract: Practical diffusion sampling is a numerical approximation problem: under a fixed inference budget, one must simulate a reverse-time ODE or SDE using only a limited number of denoising steps, so discretization error is often the dominant source of error. Existing non-asymptotic analyses provide convergence guarantees, but are typically too loose and too insensitive to diffusion parameters to guide practical design: broad families of schedules receive the same rates, which depend on coarse worst-case quantities such as the dimension or the drift Lipschitz constant. We take a less ambitious but more informative route. In the exact-score setting, we derive first-order asymptotic expansions of the Euler-Maruyama weak and Fréchet discretization errors. These formulas hold for general smooth reverse diffusions and become fully explicit under Gaussian data. They show how discretization error adapts to the geometry of the data through the covariance spectrum, and how this geometry interacts with key diffusion parameters, including the diffusion schedules and the diffusion-term coefficient. This yields tractable objectives for geometry-aware parameter optimization. Finally, we show that the qualitative predictions of the Gaussian formulas remain robust across diffusion sampling problems with different geometries, including image generation on different datasets and image posterior sampling.

</details>


### [493] [Exploring and Exploiting Stability in Latent Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08398)
*Rania Briq,Michael Kamp,Ohad Fried,Sarel Cohen,Stefan Kesselheim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LFM模型对数据减少和模型容量缩减等扰动具有鲁棒性，这种稳定性源于流匹配目标的内在特性，可用于开发更高效的训练和推理算法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索潜在流匹配（LFM）模型对不同扰动的鲁棒性，并利用这种稳定性来开发更高效的训练和推理方法

Method: 1. 在显著缩减的数据集上训练LFM模型；2. 提出两阶段粗到细方法：使用轻量架构处理流匹配轨迹的第一阶段，高容量架构处理第二阶段；3. 引入三种样本评分准则来识别信息丰富的样本

Result: LFM模型在数据大幅减少时性能无明显下降，训练时间减少，标注工作量降低；两阶段方法实现超过两倍的推理加速，同时生成质量相当的输出

Conclusion: LFM模型的稳定性是其固有特性，可被有效利用来开发更高效的训练和推理算法，实现数据节约和显著的速度提升

Abstract: In this work, we show that Latent Flow-Matching (LFM) models are robust to different types of perturbations, including data reduction and model capacity shrinkage. We characterize this stability by their tendency to generate similar outputs under identical noise seeds. We provide a perspective relating this phenomenon to flow matching theory, which indicates that this stability is inherent to the FM objective. We further exploit this stability to derive practical algorithms for more efficient training and inference. Concretely, first, we show that by training LFM models on significantly reduced datasets, the performance does not degrade perceptually or quantitatively. This yields multiple advantages, such as reducing training time by converging faster under limited compute budget, and alleviating annotation effort when training conditional models. Second, LFM stability under architectural shrinkage gives rise to a two-model coarse-to-fine approach, one using a light-weight architecture for the first phase of the FM trajectory, and one with higher capacity for the second, thereby reducing the inference cost substantially. To determine which samples are informative, we introduce three sample-scoring criteria and evaluate them under standard metrics for generative models. Our results are thoroughly evaluated on multiple datasets, demonstrating the practical advantage of this stability, including data saving and a more than two-fold inference speedup while generating comparable outputs.

</details>


### [494] [Optimal and Scalable MAPF via Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport and Schrödinger Bridges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10917)
*Usman A. Khan,Joseph W. Durham*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文将匿名多智能体路径规划问题转化为一类具有马尔可夫结构的特殊多边际最优输运问题，建立了可行性条件和全幺模性，并引入Schrödinger桥进行概率化处理以降低计算复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多智能体路径规划中大规模问题的计算复杂度挑战，通过建立MMOT框架将组合优化问题转化为可高效求解的线性规划问题。

Method: 将MAPF建模为具有马尔可夫结构的特殊MMOT问题，证明其可简化为多项式规模的线性规划；引入Schrödinger桥进行概率化处理，通过熵正则化和Sinkhorn迭代求解。

Result: 建立了MAPF-MMOT的可行性条件和全幺模性，保证了最优解为整数解；Schrödinger桥方法显著降低了计算复杂度，实验验证了方法的优化性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: MMOT框架为匿名MAPF提供了理论保证和高效算法，Schrödinger桥的概率化处理在大规模问题上实现了近优解和显著的计算复杂度降低。

Abstract: We consider anonymous multi-agent path finding (MAPF) where a set of robots is tasked to travel to a set of targets on a finite, connected graph. We show that MAPF can be cast as a special class of multi-marginal optimal transport (MMOT) problems with an underlying Markovian structure, under which the exponentially large MMOT collapses to a linear program (LP) polynomial in size. Focusing on the anonymous setting, we establish conditions under which the corresponding LP is feasible, totally unimodular, and consequently, yields min-cost, integral $(\{0,1\})$ transports that do not overlap in both space and time. To adapt the approach to large-scale problems, we cast the MAPF-MMOT in a probabilistic framework via Schrödinger bridges. Under standard assumptions, we show that the Schrödinger bridge formulation reduces to an entropic regularization of the corresponding MMOT that admits an iterative Sinkhorn-type solution. The Schrödinger bridge, being a probabilistic framework, provides a shadow (fractional) transport that we use as a template to solve a reduced LP and demonstrate that it results in near-optimal, integral transports at a significant reduction in complexity. Extensive experiments highlight the optimality and scalability of the proposed approaches.

</details>


### [495] [AdamFLIP: Adaptive Momentum Feedback Linearization Optimization for Hard Constrained PINN Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08408)
*Binghang Lu,Runyu Zhang,Changhong Mou,Na Li,Guang Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AdamFLIP方法，将PINN训练重构为等式约束优化问题，通过动量反馈线性化技术结合自适应优化，显著提升PINN的约束满足和求解精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINN使用软惩罚方法，需要手动设置损失权重，导致训练不稳定、对权重敏感、约束满足差等问题。需要一种更鲁棒的硬约束优化方法。

Method: 将PINN训练重构为等式约束优化问题，提出AdamFLIP方法：将约束残差视为受控动力系统输出，计算拉格朗日乘子作为反馈输入，使残差向稳定的线性收缩动力学演化，然后应用Adam风格的一阶和二阶矩自适应到反馈线性化的拉格朗日梯度。

Result: 在多个前向和逆向PDE基准问题上，AdamFLIP一致优于标准软约束PINN和现有最先进的约束优化器。在Navier-Stokes方程基准测试中，相比次优方法，AdamFLIP将预测解的相对L2误差降低了超过三分之二。

Conclusion: AdamFLIP为PINN训练提供了一个有效且计算可扩展的硬约束优化方法框架，结合了原理性约束处理与自适应神经网络优化的可扩展性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide a flexible framework for solving forward and inverse problems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs), but standard PINN training typically relies on soft penalty formulations that combine PDE residuals, data mismatch, and initial/boundary conditions using manually chosen weights. This often leads to ill-conditioning, sensitivity to loss weights, and poor constraint satisfaction. In this work, we reformulate PINN training as an equality-constrained optimization problem and propose a novel Adaptive Momentum Feedback Linearization Optimization for Hard Constrained PINN (AdamFLIP). The key idea is to view the constraint residuals as the output of a controlled dynamical system and to compute the Lagrange multiplier as a feedback input that locally drives these residuals toward stable linear contraction dynamics. AdamFLIP then applies Adam-style first- and second-moment adaptation to the resulting feedback-linearized Lagrangian gradient, combining principled constraint handling with the scalability and robustness of adaptive neural-network optimization. We test AdamFLIP on a range of benchmark forward and inverse PDE problem, and it consistently outperforms both the standard soft-constrained PINN and state-of-the-art constrained optimizers. Specifically, on the Navier--Stokes equations benchmark, AdamFLIP \textbf{reduces relative $L_2$ error by more than two thirds} for the predicted solution compared to the next best method. Our AdamFLIP framework provides an effective and computationally scalable hard constraint optimization method for PINN training.

</details>


### [496] [Variational Inference for Lévy Process-Driven SDEs via Neural Tilting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10934)
*Yaman Kindap,Manfred Opper,Benjamin Dupuis,Umut Simsekli,Tolga Birdal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出神经指数倾斜框架，用于Lévy驱动的随机微分方程变分推断，解决了现有方法无法同时兼顾可扩展性和捕获跳跃结构的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 极端事件和重尾现象的建模对金融、气候科学和安全关键AI等领域至关重要。Lévy过程为捕捉跳跃和重尾提供了自然数学框架，但现有贝叶斯推断方法存在两难：蒙特卡洛方法严谨但缺乏可扩展性，而神经变分推断方法高效但依赖高斯假设，无法捕捉不连续性。

Method: 引入神经指数倾斜框架，通过使用神经网络对Lévy测度进行指数重加权来构建灵活的变分族。该参数化保留了底层过程的跳跃结构，同时保持计算可行性。开发了二次神经参数化以获得闭式归一化，稳定过程的条件下斯表示以促进模拟，以及对称感知的蒙特卡洛估计器以实现可扩展优化。

Result: 在合成和真实世界数据集上，该方法能准确捕捉跳跃动态，并在高斯基变分方法失效的机制中产生可靠的后验推断。

Conclusion: 神经指数倾斜框架为Lévy驱动的SDEs提供了既灵活又计算可行的变分推断方法，成功解决了现有方法在可扩展性和捕捉跳跃结构之间的权衡问题。

Abstract: Modelling extreme events and heavy-tailed phenomena is central to building reliable predictive systems in domains such as finance, climate science, and safety-critical AI. While Lévy processes provide a natural mathematical framework for capturing jumps and heavy tails, Bayesian inference for Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations (SDEs) remains intractable with existing methods: Monte Carlo approaches are rigorous but lack scalability, whereas neural variational inference methods are efficient but rely on Gaussian assumptions that fail to capture discontinuities. We address this tension by introducing a neural exponential tilting framework for variational inference in Lévy-driven SDEs. Our approach constructs a flexible variational family by exponentially reweighting the Lévy measure using neural networks. This parametrization preserves the jump structure of the underlying process while remaining computationally tractable. To enable efficient inference, we develop a quadratic neural parametrization that yields closed-form normalization of the tilted measure, a conditional Gaussian representation for stable processes that facilitates simulation, and symmetry-aware Monte Carlo estimators for scalable optimization. Empirically, we demonstrate that the method accurately captures jump dynamics and yields reliable posterior inference in regimes where Gaussian-based variational approaches fail, on both synthetic and real-world datasets.

</details>


### [497] [Central Limit Theorem for Two-Time-Scale Approximate Distributionally Robust RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08417)
*Shengbo Wang,Zexi Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于一阶展开的近似分布鲁棒强化学习框架，通过均值-方差随机近似算法实现模型无关的单样本学习，解决了DRRL中鲁棒贝尔曼算子非线性和对抗优化计算复杂的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决无模型分布鲁棒强化学习中的两个核心难题：鲁棒贝尔曼算子的非线性导致单样本贝尔曼更新有偏，以及鲁棒性背后的对抗优化计算成本高昂。

Method: 采用KL散度模糊集的小模糊度机制，基于相关鲁棒函数的一阶展开提出近似DRRL框架。提出均值-方差随机近似算法，通过提升随机近似动态和双时间尺度设计实现单样本更新。

Result: 证明了MVSA算法的收敛性和中心极限定理，主要迭代在规范n^{-1/2}尺度上满足中心极限定理，并明确表征了渐近协方差。通过数值实验验证了理论发现。

Conclusion: 所提出的近似DRRL框架成功移除了对抗优化，同时在一阶精度上保持准确，为无模型分布鲁棒强化学习提供了一种有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Designing model-free algorithms for distributionally robust reinforcement learning (DRRL) poses fundamental challenges. The robust Bellman operator is nonlinear in the transition kernel, which makes one-sample Bellman updates biased, while the adversarial optimization underlying robustness makes robust evaluation computationally demanding. To address these difficulties, we consider the natural small-ambiguity regime under Kullback--Leibler ambiguity sets and propose an approximate DRRL framework based on a first-order expansion of the relevant robust functional. This yields an approximate robust Bellman equation that removes the adversarial optimization while remaining first-order accurate in the ambiguity radius. To learn the fixed point of this approximate equation, we propose Mean-Variance Stochastic Approximation (MVSA), a model-free algorithm that uses only one-sample updates. This is achieved via a lifted stochastic approximation dynamics and a two-time-scale design. We then prove convergence and a central limit theorem for MVSA: its main iterate satisfies a central limit theorem at the canonical $n^{-1/2}$ scale, with explicitly characterized asymptotic covariances. Finally, we validate our theoretical findings with a numerical experiment.

</details>


### [498] [Generalized Wasserstein Flow Matching: Transport Plans, Everywhere, All at Once](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08424)
*Moritz Piening,Richard Duong,Gabriele Steidl*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Wasserstein-on-Wasserstein (WoW) 空间的流匹配框架，用于概率测度上的概率测度的生成建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流匹配已成为生成建模的灵活高效框架，但现有方法主要处理概率测度之间的确定性传输。本文旨在将流匹配扩展到概率测度上的概率测度空间，即WoW空间，以统一和扩展点云和集合生成等现有方法。

Method: 提出WoW流匹配框架，利用嵌套Wasserstein几何，通过耦合的外部和内部传输计划实现元测度流。为降低WoW传输的高计算成本，提出了基于切片和线性Wasserstein距离的可扩展近似方法，实现高效训练并促进数值稳定的近似直线轨迹。

Result: 建立了一个原则性的WoW流匹配框架，能够统一处理点云和集合生成问题，同时通过近似方法显著降低了计算成本，实现了高效且理论完备的WoW空间生成建模。

Conclusion: WoW流匹配为概率测度上的概率测度的生成建模提供了一个实用且理论完备的框架，通过嵌套Wasserstein几何和计算效率高的近似方法，扩展了流匹配在更复杂生成任务中的应用。

Abstract: Flow matching has recently emerged as a flexible and efficient framework for generative modelling by learning deterministic transport dynamics between probability measures. In this work, we extend flow matching to the space of probability measures over probability measures, introducing a Wasserstein-on-Wasserstein (WoW) formulation. Leveraging the nested Wasserstein geometry, we show that measures over transport plans naturally induce velocity fields that realize metameasure flows. This yields a principled generalization of Wasserstein flow matching via coupled outer and inner transport plans. To address the substantial computational cost of WoW transport, we propose scalable approximations based on sliced and linear Wasserstein distances, enabling efficient training while promoting numerically stable, near-straight trajectories. Our framework unifies and extends existing approaches to point cloud and set generation, providing a practical and theoretically grounded method for generative modelling in WoW spaces.

</details>


### [499] [A meshfree exterior calculus for generalizable and data-efficient learning of physics from point clouds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08436)
*Benjamin D. Shaffer,Brooks Kinch,M. Ani Hsieh,Nathaniel Trask*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MEEC-Net：一种基于点云的无网格外微积分方法，通过单次稀疏Schur补求解构建虚拟节点和边测度，实现结构保持的物理描述，可在不同分辨率、几何形状和物理参数间迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统结构保持离散化需要网格生成步骤，限制了在复杂几何和不同分辨率间的应用。MEEC旨在消除网格生成需求，直接建立几何与物理的联系，实现跨几何和参数的物理描述迁移。

Method: 通过单次稀疏Schur补求解为ε-ball图配备虚拟节点和边测度，构建满足精确离散守恒的无网格外微分解。MEEC-Net在SO(d)不变局部框架中学习共享的边通量定律，使同一核能在任何点云上产生兼容通量。

Result: 在五个经典PDE基准测试中，MEEC-Net的分布外误差比基线神经算子方法低1-2个数量级。在SimJEB结构支架基准测试中，使用更少训练几何就能达到竞争性误差。证明了单解训练可迁移到未见几何、边界条件和物理参数。

Conclusion: MEEC提供了一种无网格、结构保持的离散化框架，通过几何无关的误差界解释从少量样本中观察到的迁移能力，为跨几何和参数的物理建模提供了高效的数据驱动方法。

Abstract: We introduce a meshfree exterior calculus (MEEC) for learning structure-preserving descriptions of physics on point clouds, and use it to build MEEC-Net, a data-efficient surrogate that transfers across resolutions, geometries, and physical parameters. MEEC equips an $\varepsilon$-ball graph with virtual node and edge measures via a single sparse Schur complement solve; the resulting complex satisfies discrete conservation exactly, is end-to-end differentiable in the point positions, and exposes a direct geometry-to-physics link without the mesh-generation step required by conventional structure-preserving discretizations. MEEC-Net learns unknown physics as a shared edge-wise flux law in an SO($d$)-invariant local frame, so the same kernel produces compatible fluxes on any point cloud whose features lie in the training range. We prove a solution-error bound that splits into discretization and kernel-approximation terms which is independent of problem geometry, explaining the observed transfer from very few examples. We show that single-solution training transfers to unseen geometries, boundary conditions, and physical parameters. On five canonical PDE benchmarks MEEC-Net achieves 1-2 orders of magnitude lower out-of-distribution error than baseline neural-operator approaches. On the SimJEB structural-bracket benchmark it achieves competitive error while using substantially fewer training geometries.

</details>


### [500] [TARO: Temporal Adversarial Rectification Optimization Using Diffusion Models as Purifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08440)
*Daniel Wesego,Pedram Rooshenas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TARO是一种基于扩散模型的时间对抗校正优化方法，通过在多个去噪尺度上构建时间引导的分数先验，实现从粗到细的对抗净化，平衡全局鲁棒性与语义保留。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型对抗净化方法在自适应攻击下容易失效，而现有优化防御通常依赖单一噪声机制或均匀处理时间步，忽略了粗粒度和细粒度去噪尺度的不同作用。

Method: 提出TARO方法，在推理时从扩散轨迹的多个去噪视图中构建时间引导的分数先验，形成粗到细的残差目标：高噪声专家提供全局平滑结构（降低对抗敏感性），低噪声专家恢复图像特定、类别相关的细节。

Result: TARO在零样本设置下，在多个数据集和自适应威胁模型上提高了鲁棒精度，同时与补充的对抗似然目标兼容以获得进一步的鲁棒性提升。

Conclusion: 通过时间引导的粗到细净化策略，TARO有效平衡了对抗鲁棒性和语义保留，为扩散模型对抗净化提供了更稳健的解决方案。

Abstract: Adversarial purification with diffusion models seeks to project adversarial examples back toward the data manifold, but balancing semantic preservation and robustness against adaptive attacks remains challenging. Recent work shows that standard diffusion purification can fail under adaptive evaluation, while test-time score-based optimization is more resilient. Existing optimization defenses, however, typically rely on a single diffusion noise regime or treat timesteps uniformly, overlooking the distinct roles of coarse and fine denoising scales. We propose Temporal Adversarial Rectification Optimization (TARO), an inference-time purification method that builds a temporally guided score prior from multiple denoising views along the diffusion trajectory. TARO forms a coarse-to-fine residual target: high-noise experts provide globally smoothed structure with reduced adversarial sensitivity, while low-noise experts restore image-specific, class-relevant details. A guidance strength controls this temporal correction, allowing TARO to balance robust global rectification with semantic preservation. Empirically, TARO improves robust accuracy across datasets and adaptive threat models in a zero-shot setting, while remaining compatible with complementary adversarial-likelihood objectives for further robustness gains.

</details>


### [501] [Direct Bethe Free Energy Minimization for Bayesian Neural Ne twork](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08446)
*Pavel Prochazka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出通过直接最小化Bethe自由能来训练贝叶斯神经网络，而非最大化变分下界。该方法在树结构因子图上精确，支持概率与确定性子图混合，通过最后层高斯后验实现解析损失，在单次梯度传递中实现经验贝叶斯优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统变分推断使用ELBO（证据下界）存在结构性Jensen间隙，无法通过变分族选择消除。作者希望开发更精确的贝叶斯神经网络训练框架，避免传统方法中的近似误差。

Method: 提出Bethe损失函数，基于Bethe自由能最小化。将权重后验限制为最后层高斯分布，对高斯似然得到精确边缘似然，对probit似然得到封闭形式。引入Z-一致先验使先验精度可微分，实现权重、协方差和超参数的联合优化。

Result: 在8个UCI回归和12个UCI分类基准测试中，Bethe方法与标准参考方法竞争力相当，且计算成本为单次传递。经验贝叶斯联合优化在几乎所有数据集-变体组合上匹配网格搜索交叉验证性能。

Conclusion: Bethe自由能最小化提供了比ELBO更精确的贝叶斯神经网络训练框架，消除了结构性Jensen间隙，实现了高效的单次传递经验贝叶斯优化，在保持MAP等效推理成本的同时提供闭式预测。

Abstract: We propose training Bayesian neural networks by directly minimizing the Bethe free energy rather than maximizing a variational lower bound. On tree-structured factor graphs the Bethe free energy is exact; deterministic layers drop out of the objective and are trained by standard backpropagation, so the framework accommodates any mixture of probabilistic and deterministic subgraphs without modification. Restricting the weight posterior to a last-layer Gaussian yields analytically tractable losses: for a Gaussian likelihood the Bethe loss equals the exact marginal likelihood, and for a probit likelihood it reduces to a closed form via the probit-Gaussian convolution. Both objectives sit strictly between MAP and the ELBO ($L_\text{MAP} \leq L_\text{Bethe} \leq L_\text{ELBO}$), removing the structural Jensen gap that no choice of variational family can close. The Z-consistent prior formulation makes the prior precision a differentiable parameter, enabling empirical Bayes - joint optimization of weights, covariance, and hyperparameters - in a single gradient pass, with no cross-validation or outer loop. All variants admit a closed-form predictive at MAP-equivalent inference cost, in contrast to ensemble and sampling-based methods. On 8 UCI regression and 12 UCI classification benchmarks evaluated under a single shared hyperparameter regime, Bethe is competitive with standard reference methods at single-pass cost. Independently, joint single-pass empirical Bayes matches grid-search cross-validation of the prior precision on essentially all dataset-variant combinations, eliminating the outer hyperparameter loop without measurable cost. Isolated optimization gaps on a few datasets reflect numerical rather than principled limitations of the framework.

</details>


### [502] [Zero-shot Imitation Learning by Latent Topology Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08450)
*Maxwell J. Jacobson,Yexiang Xue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ZALT是一种模仿学习方法，通过识别潜在枢纽状态、学习枢纽间策略和动态模型，在枢纽拓扑上规划来解决未见过的起点-目标任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模仿学习需要专家演示，但为环境中每个复杂任务收集演示成本高。现有方法在解决长时程任务时，小错误会在长轨迹上累积，使得零样本适应新任务不可靠。

Method: ZALT识别轨迹收敛或发散的潜在枢纽状态，学习枢纽间转移的策略和动态模型，在枢纽拓扑上规划以完成新任务。

Result: 在复杂3D迷宫环境中，ZALT在未见任务上达到55%的零样本成功率，而最强基线方法仅为6%。

Conclusion: 通过枢纽拓扑使演示行为可组合，并将长任务压缩为抽象转移序列，ZALT能够实现零样本适应，在未见任务上表现优异。

Abstract: Imitation learning is effective for training agents when expert demonstrations are available, but collecting demonstrations for every complex task in an environment is costly. We study the long-horizon, goal-conditioned setting where a fixed demonstration dataset contains useful behavior, but not complete examples for every task the agent must solve. Existing imitation learning methods can learn strong policies from demonstrations, but when solving long-horizon tasks, small errors accumulate over long primitive-action trajectories and make zero-shot adaptation to new tasks unreliable. We introduce Zero-shot Agents from Latent Topologies (ZALT), an imitation-learning method that solves unseen start-goal tasks beyond those demonstrated during training. ZALT identifies latent hub states where trajectories converge or diverge, learns policies and a dynamics model over hub-to-hub transitions, and plans over the hub topology to complete new tasks. This topology makes demonstrated behaviors explicitly composable while compressing long tasks into shorter sequences of abstract transitions -- combined, these enable ZALT to perform zero-shot adaptation. In a complex 3D maze environment, ZALT achieves 55% zero-shot success on unseen tasks, compared to 6% for the strongest baseline.

</details>


### [503] [RubiConv -- Efficient Boundary-Respecting Convolutions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08451)
*Linda Friso,Annie Marsden,Xinyi Chen,Arushi Gupta,Peter Bartlett,Mark Braverman,Elad Hazan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RubiConV提出了一种新型算法，用于在打包序列上执行硬件高效、边界尊重的卷积，解决了标准FFT算法在文档打包场景下的效率问题，使长卷积模型的理论效率在大规模实际数据打包中得以实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卷积架构作为Transformer的替代方案在序列建模中表现出色，其理论优势是通过FFT改善序列长度复杂度。但在实际大规模训练中，当数据从不同来源打包成单个序列以提高硬件效率时，标准FFT算法无法适应文档打包需求，现有解决方案存在严重低效问题，限制了卷积架构的实际性能。

Method: 提出RubiConV算法，这是一种用于在打包序列上执行硬件高效、边界尊重的卷积的新方法。该算法专门设计用于处理文档打包场景，克服了标准FFT算法在该环境下的局限性。

Result: 广泛实验表明，RubiConV相比注意力机制和标准基于FFT的基线方法都实现了显著的速度提升，使长卷积模型的理论效率在大规模真实世界数据打包中成为实际现实。

Conclusion: RubiConV解决了卷积架构在实际数据打包中的关键效率障碍，将长卷积模型的理论效率优势转化为实际的性能提升，为大尺度真实世界应用提供了可行的卷积解决方案。

Abstract: Convolutional architectures have emerged as powerful alternatives to Transformers for sequence modeling. The primary advantage is that they offer improved theoretical sequence length complexity by leveraging the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT). However, this theoretical improvement does not always meaningfully land in practice. One critical obstacle is that applying standard FFTs is not amenable to the large-scale training pipeline wherein data is packed from different sources into a single sequence for hardware efficiency. Indeed, standard FFT algorithms are not easily amenable to document packing. Existing workarounds suffer from severe inefficiencies, crippling the practical performance of convolutional architectures. We close this gap with RubiConv, a novel algorithm for performing hardware-efficient, boundary-respecting convolutions on packed sequences. Extensive experiments show that RubiConv achieves significant speedups over both attention and standard FFT-based baselines. This work makes the theoretical efficiency of long convolutional models a practical reality for large-scale, real-world data packing.

</details>


### [504] [Sink vs. diagonal patterns as mechanisms for attention switch and oversmoothing prevention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08453)
*Peter Súkeník,Cristina López Amado,Christoph H. Lampert,Marco Mondelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了注意力机制中的sink和diagonal pattern作为注意力开关和抗过度平滑机制的作用，分析了它们的几何条件、表示能力，以及为什么预训练transformer倾向于选择sink而不是diagonal pattern。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对注意力机制中sink（汇聚点）和diagonal pattern（对角模式）在防止注意力过度平滑方面的作用理解有限。论文旨在深入分析这些机制如何作为注意力开关，并解释为什么实际transformer模型倾向于使用sink而不是diagonal pattern来防止过度平滑。

Method: 1. 分析sink可表示的几何条件，证明sink嵌入需要与所有其他嵌入对齐；2. 细化sink在防止过度平滑中的作用，比较稠密和稀疏注意力的平滑程度；3. 证明sink与硬注意力开关的等价性；4. 通过允许token自通信来放松硬注意力开关，定量比较sink和diagonal pattern的表示成本。

Result: 1. 确定了sink可表示的几何对齐条件；2. 实证验证了稠密注意力比稀疏注意力更容易导致过度平滑的条件；3. 证明了sink与硬注意力开关的等价性；4. 定量分析表明sink比diagonal pattern的表示成本更低，这解释了为什么预训练transformer更倾向于使用sink。

Conclusion: 论文通过对sink和diagonal pattern的系统分析，揭示了它们作为注意力开关和抗过度平滑机制的作用。研究发现sink具有更低的表示成本，这解释了为什么实际transformer模型选择sink而不是diagonal pattern。这项工作填补了过度平滑预防需求与sink提供能力之间的理论差距，并阐明了当token通信不必要时注意力层如何像MLP一样工作。

Abstract: This paper studies the role of sinks and diagonal patterns as attention switch and anti-oversmoothing mechanisms. We analyze geometric conditions under which sinks can be represented, showing a necessary alignment between the embedding of the sink and all other embeddings. Next, we refine the current understanding of the role of sinks in oversmoothing prevention: we specify the conditions under which dense attention provably smooths more than sparse attention, and empirically verify that such conditions are often satisfied in practice. We further prove an equivalence between sinks and hard attention switch, in which the output of the attention is identically 0. Finally, we relax the hard attention switch by allowing token self-communication: we provide a quantitative comparison of the costs of representing sinks vs.\ diagonal patterns, showing why sinks are favored in pretrained transformers. The introduction and analysis of diagonal patterns and the generalization of the attention switch close the gap between what oversmoothing prevention requires and what sinks provide, while also establishing when and why attention layers act like MLPs if token communication is not necessary.

</details>


### [505] [Recovering Physical Dynamics from Discrete Observations via Intrinsic Differential Consistency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08454)
*Yuxiang Luo,Andrew Perrault*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Symmetry Rupture方法，用半群性质作为全局约束训练时间条件割线速度场，通过对称性破裂作为正则化和推理指导，实现自适应步长选择，在PDE基准上显著减少误差和计算量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从离散观测恢复连续时间动力学很困难，因为局部监督（如逐点回归目标、导数近似或方程残差）在观测间隔增大时会失去保真度。需要全局结构约束来确保动力学的一致性。

Method: 训练时间条件割线速度场，引入对称性破裂（Symmetry Rupture）作为半群性质的偏差度量。该偏差作为训练正则化器，将假设空间限制为跨时间尺度一致组合的流；作为推理预言机，让求解器选择能保持内部一致性的最大步长。

Result: 在扩散反应基准测试中，时间信息推理下滚出RMSE减少87%，比Neural ODE基线少用5倍函数评估。在直接自回归设置中，自适应求解器根据局部几何复杂度分配计算，在三个PDE基准中的两个上保持最低滚出RMSE，而基线要么发散，要么需要多一个数量级的函数评估才能保持稳定。

Conclusion: 对称性破裂作为全局结构约束比局部监督更有效，能够训练出跨时间尺度一致的动力学模型，并通过自适应步长选择在保持精度的同时显著减少计算成本。

Abstract: Recovering continuous-time dynamics from discrete observations is difficult because local supervision (e.g., pointwise regression targets, derivative approximations, or equation residuals) loses fidelity as the observation interval grows. We replace local supervision with a global structural constraint: any flow representing autonomous dynamics must satisfy the semi-group property under time translation. We train a time-conditioned secant velocity field whose deviation from this property, which we call Symmetry Rupture, serves two purposes. As a training regularizer, it confines the hypothesis space to flows that compose consistently across temporal scales. As an inference oracle, it lets the solver select the largest step size that preserves internal consistency, replacing the local truncation error that conventional adaptive solvers depend on. On the diffusion-reaction benchmark under time-informed inference, our method reduces rollout RMSE by 87\% while using 5x fewer function evaluations than a Neural ODE baseline. In the more demanding direct auto-regressive setting, where the model must predict distant future frames without intermediate temporal cues, our adaptive solver allocates compute based on local geometric complexity -- maintaining the lowest rollout RMSE on two of three PDE benchmarks while baselines either diverge or require up to an order of magnitude more function evaluations to remain stable.

</details>


### [506] [CUDABeaver: Benchmarking LLM-Based Automated CUDA Debugging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08455)
*Shiyang Li,Haoyang Chen,Mattia Fazzini,Caiwen Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一个名为CUDABEAVER的CUDA调试基准测试，用于评估LLM修复CUDA程序的能力，关注性能保留而非简单的测试通过。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CUDA程序调试具有挑战性，因为故障通常涉及硬件行为、编译器决策、内存层次结构和异步执行之间的复杂交互。当前的LLM评估往往只关注代码能否通过测试，忽略了修复后的性能退化问题，导致模型可能通过简化优化结构来通过测试，但牺牲了性能。

Method: 提出了CUDABEAVER基准测试，包含来自LLM生成的CUDA代码的真实故障工作空间。每个任务提供损坏的候选代码、本地构建/测试命令、原始错误证据和单个可编辑文件。同时提出了pass@k(M,C,A)评估指标，明确考虑修复器M、语料库C和协议轴A，特别强调性能保留要求。

Result: 在213个任务和7个前沿LLM上的实验表明，协议感知评估能更真实反映CUDA调试能力：当性能损失容忍度高时，修复器表现较好，但即使稍微严格的性能要求也会显著降低成功率，分数变化可达40个百分点。

Conclusion: CUDABEAVER基准测试和pass@k(M,C,A)评估指标为CUDA调试提供了更真实的评估框架，强调性能保留的重要性，揭示了当前LLM在保持CUDA优化结构方面的局限性。

Abstract: Debugging CUDA programs has long been challenging because failures often arise from subtle interactions among hardware behavior, compiler decisions, memory hierarchy, and asynchronous execution. More importantly, with the rapid expansion of GPU usage across scientific computing, machine learning, graphics, and systems workloads, CUDA debugging has become more challenging than ever. Current evaluations of LLM-based CUDA programming largely miss this setting: a model can pass correctness tests with repair by degeneration, simplifying the CUDA code into a safer but slower program that abandons the original optimization structure. We introduce CUDABEAVER, a benchmark for CUDA debugging from real failing workspaces produced during LLM-based CUDA generation. Each task provides the broken candidate, native build/test commands, raw error evidence, and a single editable file. CUDABEAVER evaluates whether a fixer truly repairs the failing CUDA code or merely finds a slower test-passing replacement, reporting results by failure category, debugging trajectory, stagnation mode, and performance preservation. We further propose pass@k(M,C,A), a protocol-conditional CUDA debugging metric by making the fixer M, corpus C, and protocol axes Aexplicit. Using this metric across 213 tasks and seven frontier LLMs, we show that protocol-aware evaluation gives a more faithful view of CUDA debugging ability: when performance-loss tolerance is high, fixers appear much stronger, but even a minor stricter performance requirement can sharply reduce measured success, shifting scores by up to 40 percentage points.

</details>


### [507] [Neurally-plausible radial basis kernels using distributed Fourier embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08458)
*Jakeb Chouinard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文分析了径向基核在空间语义指针神经可塑性框架中的实现，并证明基于网格细胞类表示是实现径向基核的最佳方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要建立连贯、连续的空间表示，将物理和感知现象整合到单一表示空间中，径向基核为实现这种分布式表示提供了途径。

Method: 在神经可塑性的空间语义指针框架中分析和表征可实现的径向基核，分析基于网格细胞类表示的先前径向基核工作。

Result: 证明网格细胞类表示能够实现径向基核，并且是实现径向基核的最佳方法。

Conclusion: 基于网格细胞的表示是实现径向基核的有效且最优的神经可塑性方法，为构建连续空间表示提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Coherent, continuous spatial representations are critical for synthesizing physical and perceptual phenomena into a single representational space. Radial basis kernels provide a path forward for this type of distributed representation. In this work, we aim to characterize and analyze common radial basis kernels realizable in the neurally-plausible framework of spatial semantic pointers. Further, we analyze previous radial basis kernel work based on grid cell-like representations and demonstrate that such representations are both capable of and optimal for realizing radial basis kernels.

</details>


### [508] [The Geometric Structure of Models Learning Sparse Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08464)
*Thomas Walker,T. Mitchell Roddenberry,Ahmed Imtiaz Humayun,Randall Balestriero,Richard Baraniuk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出正常对齐（normal alignment）概念，证明正常对齐分类器能在稀疏数据下优化训练目标并获得最大局部鲁棒性，并开发了GrokAlign正则化策略和RFAM模型来提升训练动态和对抗鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流形假设通常用于解释机器学习如何克服维度诅咒，但它只适用于数据密集采样或存在低维流形的情况。论文旨在研究稀疏数据下模型成功的原因，并探索如何利用这种机制改进机器学习。

Method: 提出正常对齐概念，证明正常对齐分类器在范数约束下最小化训练目标；对于连续分段仿射深度网络，正常对齐表现为网络诱导的power diagram划分中的质心对齐；开发GrokAlign正则化策略主动诱导正常对齐；将正常对齐原理应用于递归特征机器，提出递归特征对齐机器。

Result: GrokAlign显著加速了与grokking现象相关的深度网络的训练动态；RFAM在表格数据上比RFM表现出更强的对抗鲁棒性；理论证明正常对齐分类器在稀疏数据下具有最优性能。

Conclusion: 正常对齐是模型在稀疏数据下成功的关键几何特性，通过主动诱导正常对齐可以改进机器学习模型的训练效率和鲁棒性，为理解深度学习在非流形假设条件下的表现提供了新视角。

Abstract: The manifold hypothesis (MH) is often used to explain how machine learning can overcome the curse of dimensionality. However, the MH is only applicable in regimes where the training data provides a sufficiently dense sample of the underlying low-dimensional data manifold, or where such a low-dimensional manifold is conceivably present. We describe the regimes where the MH is not applicable as sparse. In this paper, we demonstrate that models succeed in the sparse regime by exploiting a highly structured local geometry, a property we formalize as normal alignment. We prove that normal-aligned classifiers -- whose input-output Jacobians are rank-one and align perfectly with the training data -- minimize the training objective under norm constraints and achieve maximal local robustness under a non-zero Jacobian constraint. For continuous piecewise-affine deep networks, normal alignment manifests geometrically as centroid alignment within the network's induced power diagram partition and results from the feature-learning regime. Motivated by these theoretical insights, we introduce GrokAlign, a regularization strategy that actively induces normal alignment. We demonstrate that GrokAlign significantly accelerates the training dynamics of deep networks relevant to the grokking phenomenon. Furthermore, we apply the principle of normal alignment to Recursive Feature Machines (RFMs) to introduce Recursive Feature Alignment Machines (RFAMs). We show that RFAMs exhibit greater adversarial robustness compared to RFMs when trained on tabular data.

</details>


### [509] [CUDAHercules: Benchmarking Hardware-Aware Expert-level CUDA Optimization for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08467)
*Shiyang Li,Zijian Zhang,Guangyan Sun,Yuebo Luo,Winson Chen,Yanzhi Wang,Mingyi Hong,Caiwen Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CUDAHercules基准测试显示，即使最先进的代码生成模型（如Claude-Opus-4.6和GPT-5.4）在生成专家级、架构感知的CUDA优化代码方面仍存在显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在自动CUDA编程方面显示出潜力，但即使是当前最强的编码模型也难以达到专家级的架构感知优化水平，需要建立基准来评估生成的CUDA代码与人类专家SOTA系统之间的差距。

Method: 引入CUDAHercules基准测试，涵盖从单核函数、模块级算子、完整应用到未解决挑战任务的全范围评估，支持Ampere、Hopper和Blackwell GPU架构，并通过领域特定语义验证器对端到端任务进行约束。

Result: 评估显示可运行CUDA代码与专家CUDA工程之间存在巨大差距：模型生成的代码通常能编译并通过测试，但很少能恢复达到专家性能所需的优化策略。应用语义进一步降低成功率，迭代或工具增强的反馈虽能改善正确性，但往往趋向于缓慢的备用实现。

Conclusion: 自动CUDA编程远未完全解决，需要更强的硬件推理能力、更好的工具使用，以及将代码理解与硬件架构基础智能连接起来的训练目标。

Abstract: Large language models show promise for automated CUDA programming, however even the strongest coding models (e.g., Claude-Opus-4.6) may still fall short of expert-level, architecture-aware optimization. We introduce CUDAHercules, a benchmark that evaluates generated CUDA against end-to-end human-expert SOTA systems. It spans single kernels, module-level operators, full applications, and unsolved challenge tasks across Ampere, Hopper, and Blackwell GPUs, with end-to-end tasks gated by domain-specific semantic validators. Evaluating models such as Claude-Opus-4.6 and GPT-5.4 shows a large gap between runnable CUDA and expert CUDA engineering: models often compile and pass tests, but rarely recover the optimization strategies needed to match expert performance. Application semantics further reduce success, and iterative or tool-augmented feedback can improve correctness while drifting toward slow fallback implementations. These results show that automated CUDA programming remains far from fully solved and requires stronger hardware reasoning, better tool use, and training objectives that connect code understanding to hardware architecture-grounded intelligence.

</details>


### [510] [Transformers Can Implement Preconditioned Richardson Iteration for In-Context Gaussian Kernel Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08475)
*Mingsong Yan,Dongyang Li,Charles Kulick,Sui Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文证明标准softmax注意力transformer可以通过实现预条件Richardson迭代来近似高斯核岭回归预测器，为非线性上下文学习提供了收敛性保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对线性上下文学习有较好的机制解释，但对于非线性上下文学习，特别是标准softmax注意力transformer是否能实现具有端到端预测误差保证的收敛求解器仍不清楚。

Method: 通过理论构造单头transformer，使用O(log(1/ε))个块和O(√(N/ε))的MLP宽度，在softmax注意力中产生行归一化的高斯核算子，ReLU MLP层近似标量算术运算，实现预条件Richardson迭代。

Result: 理论证明构造的transformer能在N长度的提示下实现ε精确预测；实验训练GPT-2风格transformer，通过线性探针发现其误差分布与预条件Richardson迭代最为一致。

Conclusion: 标准softmax注意力transformer可以通过实现预条件Richardson迭代机制来完成非线性上下文高斯核回归，揭示了transformer架构中的功能分解。

Abstract: Mechanistic accounts of in-context learning (ICL) have identified iterative algorithms for linear regression and related linear prediction tasks, often using linear or ReLU attention variants. For nonlinear ICL, prior work has related softmax and kernelized attention to functional-gradient-type dynamics, but it remains unclear whether a standard transformer with softmax attention can implement a convergent solver with an end-to-end prediction-error guarantee. In this paper, we study in-context kernel ridge regression (KRR) with Gaussian kernels and show that a standard softmax-attention transformer can approximate the KRR predictor during its forward pass by implementing preconditioned Richardson iteration on the associated kernel linear system. Under bounded-data assumptions, we construct a single-head transformer with $O(\log(1/ε))$ blocks and MLP width $O(\sqrt{N/ε})$ that achieves $ε$-accurate prediction for prompts of length $N$. Our construction reveals a functional decomposition within the transformer architecture: softmax attention produces a row-normalized Gaussian-kernel operator needed for cross-token interactions, while ReLU MLP layers act locally to approximate the intra-token scalar arithmetic required by the update. Empirically, we train GPT-2-style transformers on Gaussian-process regression tasks to further test the preconditioned Richardson interpretation. Through linear probing, we compare the transformer's layer-wise predictions with the step-wise outputs of classical KRR solvers and find that its error profiles align most consistently with preconditioned Richardson iteration. Ablation studies further support this interpretation. Together, our theory and experiments identify preconditioned Richardson iteration as a concrete mechanism that softmax-attention transformers can realize for nonlinear in-context Gaussian-kernel regression.

</details>


### [511] [When Independent Sampling Outperforms Agentic Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08478)
*Yihe Dong,Boris Shigida*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 在固定预算下，对于编程竞赛问题，重复独立采样(k-shot)比智能体推理在准确率-成本和准确率-查询数权衡上表现更好


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在固定计算预算下，如何为竞争性编程任务分配推理时间计算资源，比较不同方法的效率

Method: 评估216个Codeforces问题（Divisions 1-3），比较智能体推理与重复独立采样(k-shot)方法，分析成本与模型调用次数的关系

Result: k-shot方法在准确率-成本和准确率-查询数权衡上始终优于智能体推理，即使智能体框架使用提示缓存，这种差距仍然存在

Conclusion: 对于自包含的算法任务，在现实资源约束下，独立探索比深度智能体推理更有效；固定推理预算时，成本最优的求解器最小化log失败概率每美元

Abstract: We study how to allocate inference-time compute for competitive programming under fixed budgets. Evaluating 216 Codeforces problems across Divisions 1-3, we compare agent-based reasoning with repeated independent sampling (k-shot) as a function of both cost and number of model calls. Across models and difficulty levels, k-shot consistently achieves a better accuracy-cost and accuracy-query tradeoff. This gap persists despite prompt caching in agent frameworks, indicating lower per-call effectiveness. Our results show that, for self-contained algorithmic tasks, independent exploration can outperform deeper agentic reasoning under realistic resource constraints. We also provide a budget-allocation analysis when the inference budget is fixed, and prove that a cost-optimal solver minimizes the principled metric log failure likelihood per dollar.

</details>


### [512] [ShifaMind: A Multiplicative Concept Bottleneck for Interpretable ICD-10 Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08482)
*Mohammed Sameer Syed,Xuan Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ShifaMind提出了一种基于Multiplicative Concept Bottleneck的概念基础架构，用于ICD-10自动编码，在保持可解释性的同时达到了与最佳基线相当的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床出院摘要的ICD-10自动编码需要既能在长尾多标签分类任务中准确，又对临床医生可解释的模型。概念瓶颈模型提供了可解释性框架，但将丰富的临床文本表示压缩到狭窄的概念层会限制梯度流动和预测能力。

Method: ShifaMind采用Multiplicative Concept Bottleneck架构，使用学习到的乘法门控机制来处理概念基础表示，同时保留标量概念接口供检查，而不是通过狭窄的概念层进行投影。

Result: 在MIMIC-IV top-50 ICD-10编码任务中，ShifaMind在F1、AUC和排名指标上与最强基线LAAT表现相当，优于五个额外的ICD编码基线，并能提供概念介导的解释。相比容量匹配的Vanilla CBM，在预测性能和可解释性指标上都有显著提升。

Conclusion: 瓶颈设计对概念瓶颈模型的性能至关重要。ShifaMind通过改变瓶颈的形式而非宽度，在保持概念可解释性的同时实现了与最先进模型相当的预测性能，证明了概念基础架构在临床编码任务中的有效性。

Abstract: Automated ICD-10 coding from clinical discharge summaries requires models that are both accurate on long-tailed multi-label classification tasks and interpretable to clinicians. Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) offer a principled framework for interpretability by routing predictions through human-interpretable concepts, but this transparency often comes at a cost: compressing rich clinical text representations into a narrow concept layer can restrict gradient flow and limit predictive capacity. We present ShifaMind, a concept-grounded architecture built around a Multiplicative Concept Bottleneck (MCB), which changes the form, rather than the width, of the bottleneck. Instead of projecting through a narrow concept layer, ShifaMind uses a learned multiplicative gate over a concept-grounded representation while retaining a scalar concept interface for inspection. On MIMIC-IV top-50 ICD-10 coding, ShifaMind achieves performance competitive with LAAT, the strongest baseline, across F1, AUC, and ranking metrics, while outperforming five additional ICD-coding baselines and providing concept-mediated explanations. Its substantial gains over a capacity-matched Vanilla CBM in both predictive performance and interpretability-oriented metrics highlight the importance of the bottleneck design.

</details>


### [513] [NeuralBench: A Unifying Framework to Benchmark NeuroAI Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08495)
*Hubert Banville,Stéphane d'Ascoli,Simon Dahan,Jérémy Rapin,Marlène Careil,Yohann Benchetrit,Jarod Lévy,Saarang Panchavati,Antoine Ratouchniak,Mingfang,Zhang,Elisa Cascardi,Katelyn Begany,Teon Brooks,Jean-Rémi King*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NeuralBench是一个统一的神经影像AI模型基准测试框架，首次发布聚焦EEG，包含36个任务、14个深度学习架构和94个数据集，发现当前基础模型仅略微优于任务特定模型，且许多任务仍极具挑战性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前处理脑电信号的AI模型评估面临挑战：预处理流程、训练方法差异大，下游评估局限于少量任务/数据集，缺乏系统性的统一基准测试框架。

Method: 开发了NeuralBench统一基准测试框架，并发布了NeuralBench-EEG v1.0基准，包含36个EEG任务、14种深度学习架构，在94个通过标准化接口访问的数据集上进行评估。

Result: 1) 当前基础模型仅略微优于任务特定模型；2) 大量任务（如认知解码、临床预测）即使对最佳模型仍极具挑战性；3) 框架已初步扩展到MEG和fMRI数据集和模型。

Conclusion: NeuralBench为神经影像模型提供了可扩展的统一基准测试框架，邀请社区扩展这一开源框架，共同建立神经影像模型的统一基准测试标准。

Abstract: Deep learning and large public datasets have recently catalyzed the proliferation of AI models for processing brain recordings. However, systematically evaluating these models remains a challenge: not only do the preprocessing pipelines, training and finetuning approaches largely vary across studies, but their downstream evaluation is often limited to small sets of tasks and/or datasets. Here, we present NeuralBench: a unified framework for benchmarking AI models of brain activity. We accompany this framework with NeuralBench-EEG v1.0 -- a large EEG benchmark that includes 36 electroencephalography (EEG) tasks and 14 deep learning architectures, and is evaluated on 94 datasets accessed through a standardized interface. This first EEG-focused release already highlights two main findings. First, current foundation models only marginally outperform task-specific models. Second, a large set of tasks (e.g. cognitive decoding, clinical predictions) remain highly challenging, even for the best models. Critically, NeuralBench is designed for the integration of new tasks, datasets, models, and neuroimaging modalities, as illustrated by preliminary extensions to MEG and fMRI datasets and models. Through this white paper, we invite the community to expand this open-source framework and work together toward a unified benchmarking standard for neuroimaging models.

</details>


### [514] [MathConstraint: Automated Generation of Verified Combinatorial Reasoning Instances for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08498)
