### [550] [Classification-Head Bias in Class-Level Machine Unlearning: Diagnosis, Mitigation, and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08730)
*Weidong Zheng,Kongyang Chen,Yuanwei Guo,Yatie Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文揭示了类别级机器遗忘中的偏置主导捷径，发现通过调整分类头偏置项就能实现遗忘，提出了偏置感知机制和新的评估指标来改善这一现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有类别级机器遗忘方法主要关注保留集准确率、遗忘集准确率和遗忘时间等指标，但这些指标无法揭示遗忘的内部机制。研究发现存在偏置主导的捷径：仅通过减少分类头偏置项就能抑制遗忘类别的预测，这可能导致不稳定的偏置分布和潜在的信息泄露。

Method: 首先分析softmax交叉熵训练下分类头偏置的梯度动态，提出BiasShift作为诊断基线。为缓解过度偏置抑制，提出两种偏置感知机制：两阶段偏置梯度反转机制（TS-BGRM）和下界铰链正则化（LB-HR）。还引入三个偏置导向指标来量化偏置依赖性和潜在泄露。

Result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet上的实验表明，所提方法在保持竞争力的遗忘性能的同时，能产生更稳定的偏置分布，有效减少了偏置主导的捷径问题。

Conclusion: 类别级机器遗忘存在偏置主导的捷径问题，仅靠传统评估指标不足以揭示遗忘的内部机制。通过偏置感知机制和新的评估指标，可以改善偏置分布稳定性，为更可靠的机器遗忘提供新视角。

Abstract: Class-level machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specified classes while preserving model utility on retained classes. Existing methods are commonly evaluated by retain-set accuracy, forget-set accuracy, and unlearning time, but these metrics provide limited insight into how forgetting is achieved internally. In this paper, we reveal a bias-dominated shortcut in class-level unlearning: the prediction of forgotten classes can be suppressed by decreasing the corresponding bias terms in the final classification head. We first analyze the gradient dynamics of classification-head biases under softmax cross-entropy training, explaining why retain-set-only optimization tends to reduce the biases of absent classes. Based on this observation, we introduce BiasShift as a diagnostic baseline, showing that simple bias manipulation can satisfy conventional unlearning metrics while leaving abnormal bias patterns that reveal forgotten labels. To mitigate excessive forgotten-class bias suppression, we propose two bias-aware mechanisms, namely Two-Stage Bias Gradient Reversal Mechanism (TS-BGRM) and Lower-Bound Hinge Regularization (LB-HR). We further introduce three bias-oriented metrics, including Bias Stability Coefficient (BSC), Median Bias Gap (MBG), and Minimal Bias Score (MBS), to quantify bias dependence and potential leakage. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet demonstrate that the proposed methods maintain competitive unlearning performance while producing more stable bias distributions. We have released our code at {https://github.com/zwd2024/Beyond-the-Shadow-of-Bias-From-Classification-Head-Bias-to-Parameter-Redistribution}.

</details>


### [551] [Generative Actor-Critic with Soft Bridge Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08733)
*Ke He,Le He,Shunpu Tang,Yafei Wang,Lisheng Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SoftGAC提出了一种新的生成式策略方法，通过结构化桥接过程在预激活空间中定义从基潜在变量到动作潜在变量的随机桥接，实现了可解析处理的最大熵目标，同时保持单次前向传播的低延迟优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成式策略（如扩散和流模型）在最大熵在线强化学习中面临两个主要问题：1）边缘动作密度通常不可得，需要依赖熵边界或近似；2）迭代共享参数采样器增加了推理成本、内存需求和策略优化不稳定性。需要一种既能暴露可处理的最大熵目标，又只需单次前向传播的生成式策略。

Method: 提出SoftGAC（软生成式行动者-评论家），其行动者在预激活空间中定义从固定基潜在变量到终端动作潜在变量的随机桥接。这种结构化桥接允许将最大熵目标提升为可解析处理的路径相对熵目标。在实际有限步实现中，该相对熵精确简化为采样转移控制能量，从而提供原则性的软正则化。使用小步特定的桥接转移保持单次前向传播的轻量性。

Result: 在具有挑战性的连续控制基准测试中，SoftGAC相比强大的生成式策略基线（包括扩散和流匹配策略）获得了更高或相当的回报，同时保持在单次前向传播行动者的低延迟范围内，并在计算-回报权衡中显示出显著改进。

Conclusion: SoftGAC通过结构化桥接过程成功解决了生成式策略在最大熵强化学习中的两个关键障碍，实现了可解析处理的最大熵目标与低延迟单次前向传播的优势结合，在计算效率和性能方面都取得了显著提升。

Abstract: Expressive generative policies such as diffusion and flow models are appealing for MaxEnt online reinforcement learning because of their ability to model multimodal and highly non-Gaussian action distributions. However, training effective soft generative policies faces two obstacles that often arise together. First, marginal action densities are often unavailable, so existing methods typically rely on entropy bounds, heuristic proxies or approximations. Second, iterative shared-parameter samplers raise inference cost and require backpropagation through time over repeated network evaluations, increasing memory cost and destabilizing policy optimization. These obstacles motivate us to seek a generative policy that exposes a tractable MaxEnt objective while requiring only a single sampled actor forward pass for action generation. To this end, we propose soft generative actor-critic (SoftGAC), whose actor defines a stochastic bridge from a fixed base latent to a terminal action latent in pre-tanh space. This structured bridge allows us to lift the MaxEnt objective as an analytically tractable path-wise relative-entropy objective against a high-entropy reference process. In practical finite-step implementation, this relative entropy reduces exactly to sampled transition control energy and thus provides principled soft regularization. Moreover, we keep the single-pass actor lightweight by using small step-specific bridge transitions, each evaluated only once per sampled action, while maintaining a parameter budget comparable to strong actor baselines. Extensive experiments on challenging continuous-control benchmarks show that SoftGAC attains higher or competitive returns than strong generative policy baselines, including diffusion and flow-matching policies, while staying in the low-latency regime of one-pass actors and showing considerable improvements in the compute-return tradeoff.

</details>


### [552] [AdaPreLoRA: Adafactor Preconditioned Low-Rank Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08734)
*Ziyun Liu,Fengmiao Bian,Jian-Feng Cai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出AdaPreLoRA，一种新的LoRA优化器，通过使用Adafactor对角Kronecker预处理器和最小化因子贡献不平衡的闭式解，解决了现有LoRA优化器中因子空间预处理器奇异的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA将权重更新参数化为两个低秩因子的乘积，但生成器映射的Jacobian矩阵JG是秩不足的，导致因子空间预处理器J_G^* F_t J_G奇异，无法唯一地将预处理的W空间方向映射回因子空间更新。现有方法存在设计空间限制，缺乏梯度统计感知的预处理器与闭式因子空间解的配对。

Method: 提出AdaPreLoRA，采用Adafactor对角Kronecker预处理器H_t在W空间，并从得到的因子空间解族中选择最小化H_t加权因子贡献不平衡的元素。该方法在构造上得到最接近预处理W空间方向的LoRA近似。

Result: 在GPT-2 (E2E)、Mistral-7B和Qwen2-7B (GLUE、ARC、GSM8K)以及扩散模型个性化任务上，AdaPreLoRA与代表性LoRA优化器相比具有竞争力或有所提升，同时保持GPU内存峰值在LoRA优化器水平。

Conclusion: AdaPreLoRA填补了LoRA优化器设计空间的空白，通过梯度统计感知的预处理器和闭式因子空间解，在保持内存效率的同时实现了竞争力的性能。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) reparameterizes a weight update as a product of two low-rank factors, but the Jacobian $J_{G}$ of the generator mapping the factors to the weight matrix is rank-deficient, so the factor-space preconditioner $J_{G}^* {F}_t J_{G}$ induced by any ${W}$-space preconditioner ${F}_t$ is singular, and consequently the standard chain rule cannot be uniquely inverted to map a preconditioned ${W}$-space direction back to a factor-space update. We cast existing LoRA optimizers in a unified framework parameterized by two choices: (i) which invertible surrogate for $J_{G}^* {F}_t J_{G}$ to use, and (ii) which ${F}_t$ on ${W}$ to use. Existing methods occupy four families along these axes: factor-space adaptive updates, block-diagonal surrogates for $J_{G}^* J_{G}$, Frobenius-residual pseudoinverse methods, and Riemannian manifold constraint. Within this design space, a gradient-statistics-aware ${F}_t$ paired with a closed-form factor-space solve at ${O}((m+n)r)$ memory remains underexplored. We propose \textbf{AdaPreLoRA}, which fills this gap by adopting the Adafactor diagonal Kronecker preconditioner ${H}_t$ on ${W}$ and selecting from the resulting factor-space solution family the element minimizing an ${H}_t$-weighted imbalance between the two factor contributions; by construction, the resulting factor update is the closest LoRA approximation to the preconditioned ${W}$-space direction under the ${H}_t$-weighted norm. Across GPT-2 (E2E), Mistral-7B and Qwen2-7B (GLUE, ARC, GSM8K), and diffusion-model personalization, AdaPreLoRA is competitive with or improves over a representative set of LoRA optimizers while keeping peak GPU memory at the LoRA optimizer level.

</details>


### [553] [The Extrapolation Cliff in On-Policy Distillation of Near-Deterministic Structured Outputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08737)
*Xin Li,Hao Jiang,Annan Wang,Yichi Zhang,Chau Yuen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OPD（在线蒸馏）中，当奖励外推系数λ>1时，学生模型能在特定领域超越教师，但超过阈值λ*后会破坏结构化输出任务的格式约束。研究推导了λ*的闭式表达式，并通过实验验证其预测准确性，在λ*附近操作可实现参数效率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是理解在线蒸馏中奖励外推系数λ对模型性能的影响机制，特别是找到既能提升性能又不破坏输出格式安全边界的λ阈值，从而实现参数效率更高的模型蒸馏。

Method: 采用单位置伯努利简化推导出λ*的闭式表达式，该阈值由教师模态概率、预热质量和重要性采样裁剪强度三个可测量量决定。扩展到K元列表式JSON任务中，通过三个预注册测试（精细网格悬崖区间、预算扩展测试和小裁剪交叉预测）验证理论预测。

Result: 在Amazon Fashion数据集上，三个预注册测试结果均落在预测区间内，小裁剪值与闭式预测在网格分辨率下匹配。在λ*附近操作时，1.7B参数的Qwen3学生模型能达到与8B参数SFT基线相当的领域内性能，参数效率提升5倍。性能提升主要来自格式保持能力。

Conclusion: 研究成功推导并验证了在线蒸馏中奖励外推系数的安全阈值λ*，该阈值能有效区分格式保持和格式崩溃的训练区域。在λ*附近操作可实现显著的参数效率提升，同时保持输出格式的完整性。悬崖诊断方法独立于评估标准，而性能对等性评估依赖于特定评估器的暴露。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is widely used for LLM post-training. When pushed with a reward-extrapolation coefficient lambda > 1, the student can lift past the teacher in domain, but past a threshold lambda* the same step violates the output contract on structured-output tasks. In a single-position Bernoulli reduction, we derive a closed-form base-relative clip-safety threshold lambda*(p,b,c) determined by three measurable quantities: the teacher modal probability, the warm-start mass, and the importance-sampling clip strength. Above lambda*, the extrapolated fixed point exits the clip-safe region, changing training from format-preserving to format-collapsing. We extend the rule to calibrated K-ary listwise JSON tasks where a single binding equivalence class dominates the output contract and SFT retains parse headroom. On Amazon Fashion, three pre-registered tests--a fine-grid cliff interval, a budget-extension test, and a small-clip cross-prediction--fall within their locked prediction windows, with the small-clip value matching the closed-form prediction below grid resolution. Operating just below lambda*, ListOPD brings a 1.7B Qwen3 student to in-domain parity with an 8B-SFT baseline at one-fifth the parameters. The gain is driven primarily by format adherence: NDCG@1 on parsed outputs remains flat across lambda, while parse validity sharply changes at the predicted boundary. The cliff diagnostic is rubric-independent, whereas the parity claim uses a Gemini-graded rubric and inherits that evaluator's exposure.

</details>


### [554] [SlimQwen: Exploring the Pruning and Distillation in Large MoE Model Pre-training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08738)
*Shengkun Tang,Zekun Wang,Bo Zheng,Liangyu Wang,Rui Men,Siqi Zhang,Xiulong Yuan,Zihan Qiu,Zhiqiang Shen,Dayiheng Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 系统研究了混合专家模型在大规模预训练中的压缩方法，发现剪枝比从头训练效果更好，不同专家压缩方法最终收敛到相似性能，结合知识蒸馏和语言建模损失效果更佳，渐进式剪枝优于一次性压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构化剪枝和知识蒸馏是压缩大语言模型的典型技术，但如何在大规模预训练中应用这些技术，特别是对最近的混合专家模型，仍然不清楚。本研究旨在系统探索MoE模型在大规模预训练中的压缩问题。

Method: 系统研究MoE压缩的三个关键问题：1) 剪枝是否提供比从头训练更好的初始化；2) 专家压缩选择如何影响持续训练后的最终模型；3) 哪种训练策略最有效。提出了部分保留专家合并策略和多令牌预测蒸馏方法。

Result: 1) 剪枝预训练MoE始终优于从头训练目标架构；2) 不同一次性专家压缩方法在大规模持续预训练后收敛到相似性能；3) 知识蒸馏结合语言建模损失优于单独蒸馏，特别是知识密集型任务；4) 渐进式剪枝优于一次性压缩；5) 成功将Qwen3-Next-80A3B压缩到23A2B模型。

Conclusion: 为大规模MoE压缩提供了实用指导：剪枝是更好的初始化策略，渐进式压缩优于一次性压缩，结合知识蒸馏和语言建模损失能获得最佳效果，提出的专家合并和MTP蒸馏方法能有效提升压缩模型性能。

Abstract: Structured pruning and knowledge distillation (KD) are typical techniques for compressing large language models, but it remains unclear how they should be applied at pretraining scale, especially to recent mixture-of-experts (MoE) models. In this work, we systematically study MoE compression in large-scale pretraining, focusing on three key questions: whether pruning provides a better initialization than training from scratch, how expert compression choices affect the final model after continued training, and which training strategy is most effective. We have the following findings: First, across depth, width, and expert compression, pruning a pretrained MoE consistently outperforms training the target architecture from scratch under the same training budget. Second, different one-shot expert compression methods converge to similar final performance after large-scale continual pretraining. Motivated by this, we introduce a simple partial-preservation expert merging strategy that improves downstream performance across most benchmarks. Third, combining KD with the language modeling loss outperforms KD alone, particularly on knowledge-intensive tasks. We further propose multi-token prediction (MTP) distillation, which yields consistent gains. Finally, given the same training tokens, progressive pruning schedules outperform one-shot compression, suggesting that gradual architecture transitions lead to better optimization trajectories. Putting it all together, we compress Qwen3-Next-80A3B to a 23A2B model that retains competitive performance. These results offer practical guidance for efficient MoE compression at scale.

</details>


### [555] [Causal Dimensionality of Transformer Representations: Measurement, Scaling, and Layer Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08740)
*Nilesh Sarkar,Dawar Jyoti Deka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SAE宽度与因果影响存在系统性分离：表征容量增长远大于因果容量增长，存在"表征-因果楔形"现象。因果维度κ是transformer层固有属性，对模型缩放不变，在深度中恒定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏自编码器(SAE)将transformer残差流分解为可解释特征字典，但SAE宽度与对模型输出的因果影响之间的关系尚未被系统表征。需要量化SAE宽度如何影响因果容量。

Method: 引入因果维度κ(L,M,T)，定义为层L处期望雅可比外积的有效秩。通过SAE宽度扫描与归因替换(attribution patching)配对估计κ。在Gemma-2-2B第12层测试7个SAE宽度(16,384到1,048,576特征)，并分析模型缩放、深度变化的影响。

Result: 1. SAE表征容量增长15.6倍时，因果容量仅增长4.35倍，存在"表征-因果楔形"；2. κ估计约1,990，与d_model比值为0.86；3. κ对模型缩放不变：Gemma-2-9B与Gemma-2-2B在相同SAE宽度下产生相同N_causal=328；4. κ在8个网络深度中恒定，而归因阈值从第1层到第23层下降20倍。

Conclusion: κ是transformer层可测量的固有属性：通过SAE宽度亚线性恢复，对模型缩放不变，在网络深度中结构化。五个控制实验确定了κ测量什么和不测量什么，为理解transformer层中因果影响的结构提供了新视角。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) decompose transformer residual streams into interpretable feature dictionaries, yet the relationship between SAE width and causal influence on model output has not been systematically characterised. We introduce causal dimensionality kappa(L, M, T), defined as the effective rank of the expected Jacobian outer product at layer L, and show it can be estimated via the SAE width sweep paired with attribution patching. Across seven SAE widths from 16,384 to 1,048,576 features on Gemma-2-2B layer 12, representational capacity grows 15.6x while causal capacity grows only 4.35x: a robust separation we term the representational-causal wedge. A saturating fit yields kappa-hat approximately 1,990 with kappa-hat / d_model = 0.86 and participation-ratio lower bound kappa_PR approximately 280. Crucially, kappa is invariant to model scaling: Gemma-2-9B and Gemma-2-2B yield identical N_causal = 328 at the same SAE width despite a 3.46x parameter increase (the count is forced to 2% of SAE width by calibration; the substantive empirical claim is shape invariance of the AtP score distribution under matched seq=512 conditions). Across eight network depths kappa is constant while the absolute attribution threshold drops 20x from layer 1 to layer 23. Five controls (architecture invariance, threshold robustness, geometric privilege, synthetic ground-truth recovery, and a four-cell encoder/decoder ablation) pin down what kappa measures and what it does not. Our findings establish kappa as a measurable, model-intrinsic property of transformer layers: sub-linearly recoverable by SAE width, invariant to model scaling, and structured across network depth.

</details>


### [556] [The Global Empirical NTK: Self-Referential Bias and Dimensionality of Gradient Descent Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08746)
*James Hazelden,Laura Driscoll,Eli Shlizerman,Eric Shea-Brown*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出全局经验神经正切核(NTK)的概念，并证明其具有可计算的结构，能解释梯度下降的学习偏好和低秩表示的出现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在有限宽度网络中，NTK通常难以计算，先前研究只能关注受限场景或无限宽度极限。本文旨在研究NTK在各种模型中的结构，揭示其如何影响梯度下降的学习行为。

Method: 将模型状态表述为全局隐式约束的解，将NTK分解为K（参数-状态交互）和P（状态-状态依赖）两个算子的乘积。对于权重类模型，证明了通用Kronecker核定理，显示K具有精确可计算形式。开发了kpflow库，利用随机矩阵自由数值线性代数方法。

Result: NTK具有结构瓶颈，限制其有效秩并产生自参照偏置，使梯度下降优先学习联合隐藏和输入活动的主导模式。对于RNN和transformer，NTK在时空上偏向低秩。模型初始化动态偏置NTK，限制学习能力。

Conclusion: NTK具有可处理的结构，能解释梯度下降对任务解的偏置以及低秩表示的出现。开发的kpflow库使NTK能作为实用度量工具。

Abstract: In training a neural network with gradient descent (GD), each iteration induces a linear operator that governs first-order updates to a model's internal state variables. We define this operator as the Global Empirical Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK). In finite-width networks, the NTK is typically intractable to form, leading prior work to focus on restrictive settings such as tracking outputs only or taking infinite-width limits. Here, we study the structure of the NTK for a range of models. Formulating the model state as the solution to a single global implicit constraint, we derive the NTK as a product of two operators: K, accounting for immediate parameter-to-state interactions, and P, describing internal state-to-state dependencies. For a broad class of weight-based models, including RNNs and transformers, we prove a universal Kronecker-core theorem showing that K admits an exact, computable form given by the Gram matrix of weight-site variables. This core structure reveals that the NTK is structurally bottlenecked, constraining its effective rank and giving rise to a self-referential bias whereby GD preferentially learns within dominant modes of joint hidden and input activity. For recurrent models, we examine the spectrum of the NTK and show when it is biased and low-rank in space or time under the proposed decomposition. We further demonstrate that model dynamics at initialization bias the NTK, restricting learning and preventing task components from being learned effectively. Finally, we show that the NTK associated with a self-attention transformer is likewise structurally constrained to be low-rank. Overall, we show that the NTK possesses tractable structure that explains GD bias toward task solutions and the emergence of low-rank representations. To enable use of the NTK as a practical metric, we build kpflow, a library relying on randomized matrix-free numerical linear algebra.

</details>


### [557] [The Wristband Gaussian Loss: Deterministic, Composable Latents via a Sphere-Interval Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08749)
*Mikhail Parakhin,André M. Carvalho,Patrick Haluptzok*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Wristband Gaussian Loss，一种确定性的批处理损失函数，用于将点嵌入高斯化，无需采样、KL散度项或迭代传输。通过将点映射到方向-半径表示的"腕带"空间，证明该映射在源分布为标准正态时达到均匀分布，并设计了反射核目标函数的两种高效计算方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的高斯化方法通常需要采样、KL散度项或迭代传输过程，计算成本高且存在随机性。作者希望开发一种确定性的批处理损失函数，能够高效地将点嵌入转换为高斯分布，同时保持理论保证和计算效率。

Method: 将每个点x∈ℝ^d映射到"腕带"空间S^{d-1}×[0,1]：方向u=x/‖x‖，半径t=Fχ²_d(‖x‖²)。证明该映射在源分布为标准正态时产生均匀分布。设计了反射核目标函数的两种计算方法：1）最近三图像对截断法(O(N²d))；2）结合角向和径向Mercer模式的谱诺伊曼路径法(O(NdK))。还加入了1D Wasserstein径向项和矩惩罚作为有限样本加速器。

Result: 在轴均匀X基准测试中，Wristband在2D中具有竞争力，在10D中表现最佳。在更难的径向-角向copula伪数据上（高斯径向和角向边际分布正确但存在依赖性），Wristband在10D和128D中均表现最佳。结合可学习键的欧几里得注意力和精确可逆流，构建的确定性高斯自编码器能够实现高斯潜在空间接口，支持独立因子的反事实采样和依赖因子的上下文/残差构造。

Conclusion: Wristband Gaussian Loss提供了一种确定性的高斯化方法，具有理论保证和计算效率。该方法在多种维度下均表现出色，特别是在高维情况下。结合其他组件构建的确定性高斯自编码器为反事实采样和因子分析提供了有效的框架。

Abstract: We present the Wristband Gaussian Loss, a deterministic batch loss for Gaussianizing point embeddings without sampling, KL terms, or iterative transport. Each $x \in \mathbb{R}^d$ is mapped to a direction $u = x/\|x\|$ and a CDF-transformed radius $t = F_{χ^2_d}(\|x\|^2)$ on the wristband $S^{d-1} \times [0,1]$. We prove (and machine-verify in Lean~4) that for $d \ge 2$ the pushforward wristband map equals $σ_{d-1} \otimes \mathrm{Unif}[0,1]$ iff the source is $\mathcal{N}(0, I_d)$, and that the Neumann-reflected wristband repulsion energy is uniquely minimized at the uniform target. We compute this reflected-kernel objective in two ways: a nearest three-image pairwise truncation at $O(N^2 d)$, and a spectral Neumann path joining angular and radial Mercer modes (spherical-harmonic and cosine) at $O(N d K)$, with empirically matched gradients. A 1D Wasserstein radial term and a moment penalty serve as finite-sample accelerators with the same optimum, and Monte-Carlo null calibration turns the components into a single standardized statistic. We evaluate direct point-cloud Gaussianization with a calibrated barycentric $W_2$ score: a deterministic Gaussian reference batch is built by recursive Hungarian averaging, with each method reported as a $z$-score against same-size Gaussian batches. On the axis-uniform X benchmark, Wristband is competitive in 2D and gives the best 10D score. On a harder radial--angular-copula impostor whose Gaussian radial and angular marginals are correct but dependent, Wristband gives the best 10D and 128D scores. Coupled with learnable-key Euclidean attention and exact invertible flows, the resulting Deterministic Gaussian Autoencoder delivers a Gaussian-latent interface for counterfactual sampling with independent factors and a context/residual construction for dependent factors.

</details>


### [558] [Communicating Sound Through Natural Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08750)
*Emanuele Rossi,Emanuele Rodolà*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了词汇声学编码（LAC）框架，使用预训练LLM作为发送和接收代理，通过自然语言传输音频，将音频分析为可解释的声学描述符并编码为英文文本，实现音频的文本化传输和重构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言广泛用于描述和控制音频系统，但很少作为承载音频本身的表示形式。作者希望探索使用自然语言作为音频传输的表示方法，让LLM代理能够通过文本传输和重构音频。

Method: 使用预训练LLM作为发送和接收代理，发送端将输入波形分析为可解释的声学描述符，用量化间隔词汇表进行量化，并编码为英文句子。接收端解析文本回词汇声学约束，通过闭环细化生成波形。将LAC框架化为有限速率有损量化器。

Result: 实验表明，纯文本能够保留可测量的声学结构，同时保持可解释性、可编辑性，并且与LLM介导的通信原生兼容。在短声音和符号音乐传输任务上验证了有效性。

Conclusion: 词汇声学编码框架展示了自然语言可以作为音频传输的有效表示形式，在词汇量、传输速率和保真度之间存在权衡关系，为LLM介导的音频通信提供了新方法。

Abstract: Natural language is widely used to describe, prompt, and control audio systems, but rarely serves as the representation carrying audio itself. We introduce lexical acoustic coding (LAC), a framework in which pre-trained LLM sender and receiver agents transmit sound through natural language. Under fixed system prompts, the agents write their own analysis and synthesis code, communicating only through a lexical sentence, shared vocabulary, and optional symbolic music structure. The sender analyzes an input waveform into interpretable, non-learned acoustic descriptors, quantizes each with a feature-specific interval vocabulary, and verbalizes the lexical code as English. The receiver parses the sentence back into lexical-acoustic constraints and renders a waveform through closed-loop refinement. The transmitted text serves as both a rich caption and as the transport representation itself. We frame LAC as a finite-rate lossy quantizer, exposing trade-offs between vocabulary size, rate, and fidelity. Experiments on short sounds and symbolic music transfer show that plain text preserves measurable acoustic structure while remaining interpretable, editable, and native to LLM-mediated communication.

</details>


### [559] [LAQuant: A Simple Overhead-free Large Reasoning Model Quantization by Layer-wise Lookahead Loss](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08755)
*Euntae Choi,Sumin Song,Sungjoo Yoo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LAQuant是一种层感知权重量化方法，通过推理域校准和一层的超前损失，解决了长解码推理任务中量化精度下降的问题，在保持KV缓存保真度的同时实现了显著的解码加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型在长自回归解码时，每个token的解码成本成为主要部署问题。标准量化方法（包括最先进的端到端QAT）在长解码推理基准上会损失精度，尽管它们保持了困惑度和短解码精度。这主要是由于KV缓存保真度保持和Hessian子空间对齐问题。

Method: 提出LookAhead Quantization (LAQuant)，一种层感知权重量化方法，结合推理域校准和一层的超前损失。该方法通过隐式跨层协同适应来保持下一层残差流，解决了KV缓存保真度保持和Hessian子空间对齐问题，且无需在线转换开销。

Result: 在Qwen3-4B模型上，使用W3G128量化，LAQuant在AIME25 Pass@1指标上比ParoQuant提高了15.11pp（在相同校准条件下比ParoQuant++提高1.93pp），同时在RTX A6000上实现了3.42倍解码加速，而ParoQuant只有3.01倍加速。

Conclusion: LAQuant通过针对长解码推理任务的特点设计量化方法，有效解决了现有量化方法在推理任务上的精度损失问题，在保持KV缓存保真度的同时实现了显著的性能提升和解码加速。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) reach competition-level math and coding accuracy via long autoregressive decoding, making per-token decoding cost a primary deployment concern. Weight quantization is the standard tool for acceleration, but representative recipes -- including state-of-the-art end-to-end (E2E) QAT -- lose accuracy on long-decoding reasoning benchmarks despite preserving perplexity and short-decode accuracy. Through a systematic gradient-direction analysis, we identify two factors driving this gap: (i) KV-cache fidelity preservation under the QAT loss, which E2E supervision attenuates via the softmax Fisher metric; and (ii) Hessian-subspace alignment between calibration data and the deployment distribution. We propose LookAhead Quantization (LAQuant), a layer-wise weight-only QAT method that addresses both factors without online-transform overhead by combining reasoning-domain calibration with a one-layer lookahead loss whose implicit cross-layer co-adaptation preserves the next-layer residual stream. For Qwen3-4B under W3G128 quantization, LAQuant improves AIME25 Pass@1 over ParoQuant by 15.11pp (1.93pp over ParoQuant++ at matched calibration) while achieving a 3.42x decoding speedup over FP16 on RTX A6000, compared with ParoQuant's 3.01x.

</details>


### [560] [MDL-GBG: A Non-parametric and Interpretable Granular-Ball Generation Method for Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08759)
*Zeqiang Xian,Caihui Liu,Yong Zhang,Wenjing Qiu,Duoqian Miao,Witold Pedrycz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于最小描述长度的颗粒球生成方法MDL-GBG，将颗粒球生成转化为局部模型选择问题，通过比较三种候选解释选择描述长度最短的模型，实现无参数、可解释的聚类颗粒球生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有颗粒球生成方法主要依赖手工设计的质量度量和启发式分裂/停止准则，这削弱了聚类中局部生成决策的透明度，需要一种更透明、可解释的颗粒球生成方法。

Method: 将颗粒球生成重新定义为最小描述长度原则下的局部模型选择问题，为每个颗粒球比较三种候选解释：单球模型、双球模型和核心球加残差模型，选择描述长度最短的模型，统一了球保留、分裂和残差剥离，并引入残差重新分配机制。

Result: 在20个UCI数据集上的实验表明，MDL-GBG生成的稳定颗粒球为聚类提供了极具竞争力的上游表示，MDL-GBG+AC在ARI、ACC和NMI指标上获得了最佳平均排名。

Conclusion: MDL-GBG为传统启发式颗粒球生成策略提供了有效且可解释的替代方案，通过最小描述长度原则统一了颗粒球生成决策，提高了透明度和解释性。

Abstract: Existing granular-ball generation methods are still mainly driven by handcrafted quality measures and heuristic splitting or stopping criteria, which weakens the transparency of local generation decisions in clustering. To address this issue, this paper proposes Minimum Description Length based Granular-Ball Generation (MDL-GBG), a non-parametric and interpretable granular-ball generation method for clustering. MDL-GBG reformulates granular-ball generation as a local model selection problem under the Minimum Description Length principle. For each granular ball, three candidate explanations are compared, namely a single-ball model, a two-ball model, and a core-ball-plus-residual model, and the model with the shortest description length is selected. In this way, ball retention, splitting, and residual peeling are unified within a common coding-theoretic framework. A residual reassignment mechanism is further introduced to globally re-evaluate peeled-off boundary samples after stable granular-balls are formed. Experiments on 20 UCI datasets show that the stable granular-balls generated by MDL-GBG provide a highly competitive upstream representation for clustering, with MDL-GBG+AC achieving the best overall average ranks in ARI, ACC, and NMI among the compared methods. These results demonstrate that MDL-GBG offers an effective and interpretable alternative to conventional heuristic granular-ball generation strategies.

</details>


### [561] [FedGMI: Generative Model-Driven Federated Learning for Probabilistic Mixture Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08760)
*Qijun Hou,Yuchen Shi,Pingyi Fan,Khaled B. Letaief*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FedGMI是一个联邦学习框架，利用变分自编码器(VAEs)作为生成密度估计器来建模客户端数据分布的混合概率结构，实现结构化个性化，平衡协作学习与个性化需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统联邦学习面临数据异质性挑战，聚类联邦学习(CFL)受限于簇内异质性，个性化联邦学习(PFL)忽略客户端间的结构相似性。需要一种方法既能利用客户端间的相似性，又能实现个性化建模。

Method: 提出FedGMI框架，将每个客户端的数据分布建模为多个共享固有分布的凸组合。使用VAEs作为生成密度估计器来表示这些固有分布，并推断客户端本地数据分布的混合成分，实现结构化个性化。

Result: 实验表明FedGMI能有效表征和区分固有分布，准确估计混合比例，并在通信成本约束下保持稳健性能。

Conclusion: FedGMI通过概率混合建模客户端数据分布，利用VAEs实现结构化个性化，在保持协作学习优势的同时解决数据异质性问题，是联邦学习领域一个有前景的方法。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) facilitates collaborative model training across decentralized clients while preserving data privacy by avoiding raw data exchange. Despite its potential, FL performance is often compromised by data heterogeneity across clients. To address this, Clustered Federated Learning (CFL) groups clients with similar data distributions to improve model performance, but constrained by intra-cluster heterogeneity. Conversely, Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) tailors models to individual clients, but usually neglects the underlying structural similarities among clients. In this work, we investigate a probabilistic mixture (PM) scenario, where each client's local data distribution is modeled as a convex combination of several shared inherent distributions. To effectively model this structure, we propose FedGMI, a framework that utilizes Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) as generative density estimators to represent these inherent distributions and infer the mixture components of clients' local data distributions. This approach enables structured personalization without sacrificing the benefits of collaborative learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedGMI effectively characterizes and discriminate the inherent distributions, as well as accurately estimates mixture proportions. Furthermore, FedGMI maintains robust performance even under communication cost constraints.

</details>


### [562] [Anchoring the Eigengap: Cross-Modal Spectral Stabilization for Sample-Efficient Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08764)
*Nikhil J. Dhinagar,Vidhi Chhatbar,Chirag Jagad,Pavithra Senthilkumar,Sophia I. Thomopoulos,Mahir H. Khan,Sook-Lei Liew,the ENIGMA-Stroke Recovery Working Group,Paul M. Thompson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种谱理论来解释低数据医学影像中深度视觉模型的性能下降，指出这不仅是过拟合问题，更是由有限样本噪声导致的谱塌陷。通过截断马氏能量和可恢复维度K(N)来量化模型性能，并证明多模态学习能通过谱稳定化提升数据效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学影像等低数据场景中，深度视觉模型性能急剧下降。传统解释归因于过拟合，但作者认为这源于更根本的几何问题：有限样本噪声破坏了嵌入协方差矩阵的特征结构，导致谱塌陷，限制了可恢复的信号模式数量。

Method: 1. 开发了有限样本表示学习的谱理论，量化可恢复维度K(N) - 从N个样本中能稳定估计的特征模式数量；2. 使用扰动理论和集中不等式证明，只有特征值超过噪声底限的特征模式是可靠的；3. 提出截断马氏能量作为分类性能指标；4. 在幂律谱模型下，用截断黎曼ζ函数近似该能量；5. 分析多模态学习如何通过低秩约束实现谱稳定化。

Result: 1. 理论分析表明只有特征值超过√(D/N)的特征模式能稳定恢复；2. 在MNIST和多疾病神经影像数据集上验证了多模态训练能保持更稳定的特征模式，改善类别分离；3. 即使单模态模型能达到相近的少样本准确率，多模态模型仍能维持更好的谱结构；4. 截断马氏能量和K(N)能有效诊断编码器质量；5. 提出基于ζ函数的谱滤波方法提升数据效率。

Conclusion: 谱塌陷是低数据学习的基本瓶颈。多模态学习通过谱稳定化机制抑制噪声主导方向，保持特征间隙，从而提升可恢复维度K(N)。截断马氏能量和K(N)提供了诊断编码器质量的理论框架，基于ζ函数的谱滤波为提升数据效率提供了原则性方法。

Abstract: Deep vision models degrade sharply in low-data regimes, particularly in medical imaging where labeled samples are scarce. We show this arises not merely from overfitting but from a geometric failure: finite-sample noise corrupts the embedding covariance, collapsing the eigengap and limiting the number of recoverable signal-bearing modes. We develop a spectral theory of finite-sample representation learning that quantifies the recoverable dimension K(N), the number of eigenmodes that can be stably estimated from N samples. Using perturbation theory and concentration bounds, we show that only modes with eigenvalues above the noise floor $\|\hatΣ - Σ\|_{\mathrm{op}} \sim \sqrt{D/N}$ are reliable, yielding a truncated Mahalanobis energy that governs classification performance. Under a power-law spectral model, this energy can be approximated by a truncated Riemann zeta function, linking eigenvalue decay to data efficiency and AUC. Within this framework, multimodal learning acts as spectral stabilization: vision-language models impose low-rank constraints that suppress noise-dominated directions and preserve the eigengap, increasing K(N) under data scarcity. Across MNIST and multi-disease neuroimaging, we show that multimodal training maintains more stable modes and improves class separation, even when unimodal models achieve comparable few-shot accuracy. These results identify spectral collapse as a fundamental bottleneck in low-data learning. We use truncated Mahalanobis energy and K(N) to diagnose encoder quality, and introduce zeta-based spectral filtering as a principled approach to improve data efficiency.

</details>


### [563] [Unlearners Can Lie: Evaluating and Improving Honesty in LLM Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08765)
*Renjie Gu,Jiazhen Du,Yihua Zhang,Sijia Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了大语言模型遗忘学习中的"诚实性"概念，并开发了评估指标ReVa方法提升遗忘后模型的诚实表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型遗忘学习方法存在幻觉、生成异常序列和行为不一致等问题，这些行为与不诚实相关，因此需要研究遗忘学习中的诚实性问题。

Method: 提出了遗忘学习诚实性的正式定义，包含保留知识的效用和诚实性，以及有效遗忘同时让模型承认其局限性。开发了评估指标套件，并提出了ReVa方法，通过特征随机化遗忘模型的对齐微调来提升诚实性。

Result: 评估了3个主流家族的9种方法，发现所有现有方法都无法满足诚实性标准。ReVa方法在遗忘集问答任务中经过两轮交互后达到最高拒绝率，性能接近第二佳方法的两倍，同时还能提升保留集的诚实性。

Conclusion: 当前大语言模型遗忘学习方法普遍存在诚实性问题，提出的ReVa方法能显著提升模型在遗忘学习中的诚实表现。

Abstract: Unlearning in large language models (LLMs) aims to remove harmful training data while preserving overall utility. However, we find that existing methods often hallucinate, generate abnormal token sequences, or behave inconsistently, raising safety and trust concerns. According to prior literature on LLM honesty, such behaviors are often associated with dishonesty. This motivates us to investigate the notion of honesty in the context of model unlearning. We propose a formal definition of unlearning honesty, which includes: (1) preserving both utility and honesty on retained knowledge, and (2) ensuring effective forgetting while encouraging the model to acknowledge its limitations and respond consistently to questions related to forgotten knowledge. To systematically evaluate the honesty of unlearning, we introduce a suite of metrics that cover utility, honesty on the retained set, effectiveness of forgetting, rejection rate and refusal stability in Q&A and MCQ settings. Evaluating 9 methods across 3 mainstream families shows that all current methods fail to meet these standards. After experimental and theoretical analyses, we present ReVa, a representation-alignment procedure that fine-tunes feature-randomized unlearned models to better acknowledge forgotten knowledge. On Q&A tasks from the forget set, ReVa achieves the highest rejection rate after two rounds of interaction, nearly doubling the performance of the second-best method. Remarkably, It also improves honesty on the retained set. We release our data and code at https://github.com/renjiegu.

</details>


### [564] [PRIM: Meta-Learned Bayesian Root Cause Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08786)
*Christopher Lohse,Anish Dhir,Amadou Ba,Bradley Eck,Marco Ruffini,Jonas Wahl*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRIM是一种基于元学习的因果根因分析方法，通过贝叶斯推理在合成因果模型先验上实现零样本推断，无需显式统计测试或测试时模型拟合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂系统中的根因分析面临三大挑战：多变量间的错误传播、需要因果结构知识、测试时推理计算成本高。现有方法需要先验因果图知识或计算开销大。

Method: 提出PRIM方法：1）将RCA框架化为贝叶斯推理任务，在合成因果模型先验上边缘化结构不确定性；2）使用MACE变换器神经过程，联合关注观测样本、异常样本和节点因果结构；3）遵循先验拟合网络的模拟元学习范式，实现零样本推断。

Result: 在合成基准和两个真实基准数据集(PetShop和CausRCA)上，PRIM与需要先验因果图的方法表现相当，优于无图方法；零样本推断时间仅需17毫秒（支持最多100个变量）；轻量级微调可进一步提升性能。

Conclusion: PRIM通过元学习和贝叶斯推理框架，解决了RCA中的结构不确定性和计算效率问题，实现了快速、准确的零样本根因分析，在保持竞争力的同时降低了结构知识依赖。

Abstract: Root cause analysis (RCA) in complex systems is challenging due to error propagation across multiple variables, the need for structural causal knowledge, and the computational cost of inference at test time. We introduce PRIM (Prior-fitted Root cause Identification with Meta-learning), a causal meta-learning approach that frames RCA as a Bayesian inference task over a synthetic prior of causal models. By marginalising out structural uncertainty, PRIM implicitly identifies changes in the data-generating mechanism between baseline and anomalous periods. In doing so, PRIM infers distributional differences without explicit statistical testing, and implicitly learns causal structure without model fitting at test time. Following the simulation-based meta-learning paradigm of prior-fitted networks, PRIM uses a Model-Averaged Causal Estimation (MACE) transformer neural process that jointly attends over observational and anomalous samples and the causal structure of nodes, enabling zero-shot inference in 17,ms for systems with up to 100 variables. Across synthetic benchmarks and two realistic benchmark datasets, PetShop and CausRCA, PRIM is competitive with methods that are aware of the system's causal graphical structure a priori while outperforming graph-unaware methods on several tasks. Lightweight fine-tuning to specific domains and data dynamics improves performance further.

</details>


### [565] [Deterministic Decomposition of Stochastic Generative Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08794)
*Xingyu Song,Yuan Mei,Naoya Takeishi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了桥匹配（Bridge Matching）框架，通过输运-渗透分解将随机生成过程中的确定性速度场分解为输运分量和渗透分量，实现可解释和可控的采样。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有随机生成模型将漂移和扩散效应压缩到单个有效场中，模糊了确定性演化和随机波动的不同作用。需要一种分解方法能够清晰分离确定性输运和扩散诱导的随机效应。

Method: 提出输运-渗透分解：b_t = u_t + d_t，其中u_t控制边缘概率输运，d_t捕获扩散诱导的渗透效应。基于此分解提出桥匹配框架，通过边缘和条件两种公式学习分解后的生成动态。

Result: 在生成建模实验中，通过重新组合学习到的分量b_t = u_t + λ_d d_t，证明该分解能够通过调整输运中的渗透贡献来实现可解释和可控的采样。

Conclusion: 输运-渗透分解提供了一种将随机生成过程中的确定性速度场分解为输运和渗透分量的自然方法，桥匹配框架能够学习这种分解，为生成建模提供了更好的可解释性和可控性。

Abstract: Modern generative models can be understood as probability transport from a simple base distribution to a target data distribution. Deterministic transport models offer tractable velocity-field parameterizations, whereas stochastic generative models capture richer density evolution through drift and diffusion. Yet when stochastic dynamics are described through deterministic velocity fields, the effects of drift and diffusion are often compressed into a single effective field, obscuring the distinct roles of deterministic evolution and stochastic fluctuation. In this work, we show that the deterministic field \(b_t\) of a stochastic generative process admits a natural transport--osmotic decomposition that separates deterministic transport from stochastic, diffusion-induced effects: \(b_t = u_t + d_t\), where \(u_t\) governs marginal probability transport and \(d_t\) captures an osmotic effect induced by diffusion and determined by the marginal score. Based on this decomposition, we propose Bridge Matching, a flow-based framework for learning decomposed generative dynamics through both marginal and conditional formulations. In generative modeling experiments, we recombine the learned components as \(b_t = u_t + λ_d d_t\), showing that the proposed decomposition enables interpretable and controllable sampling by adjusting the osmotic contribution in probability transport.

</details>


### [566] [Data-driven transport modelling without overfit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08801)
*Peter Vanya,Katarína Šimková,Rastislav Farkaš*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于交通计数数据驱动的交通建模方法，替代传统依赖复杂社会经济调查的模型，提供可解释的模型权重和可控的复杂度提升路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统宏观交通建模依赖昂贵且易有偏差的社会经济调查数据，现有数值优化框架难以解释且容易过拟合，需要一种基于现代易获取的交通计数数据的新方法。

Method: 提出基于交通计数的数据驱动建模方案，使用可解释的模型权重，提供可控的增加模型复杂度和精度的路径，并在多个示例中验证。

Result: 在多个玩具模型和实际案例中验证了该方法的有效性，并展示了如何扩展到包含公共交通的多模式交通系统。

Conclusion: 基于交通计数的数据驱动方法为宏观交通建模提供了更经济、可靠且可解释的替代方案，能够有效支持基础设施规划和政策评估。

Abstract: Macroscopic transport modelling aims to predict traffic flows after proposed public policy interventions, such as a new road or railway section or a temporary road closure. As such, it is a vital step in infrastructure planning and development. Traditionally, building a transport model has relied on complex understanding of socio-economic characteristics of the population requiring expensive data collection via surveys, which are prone to biases. Previous numerical frameworks to optimize transport models to fit observed traffic flows are not easily-interpretable and can lead to overfit. We present here an alternative: a data-driven modelling protocol with objective function based on traffic counts, which can be nowadays cheaply and reliably obtained; explainable model weights; and a controlled path to increase model complexity and accuracy. We demonstrate our approach on several toy and realistic examples, and suggest ways to generalize to multimodal systems including public transport.

</details>


### [567] [Compressed Video Aggregator: Content-driven Module for Efficient Micro-Video Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08810)
*Yang Xiao,Huiyuan Chen,Kaiyuan Deng,Chao Jiang,Zinan Ling,Ruimeng Ye,Xiaolong Ma,Bo Hui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CVA 是一个轻量级的微视频推荐模块，通过解耦视频信息与偏好学习，聚合冻结的视觉基础模型嵌入，无需交叉注意力投影进行潜在推理，为推荐系统生成紧凑的视频嵌入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频推荐方法在帧数冗余和采样过于粗糙的问题，导致训练时间和GPU内存消耗大。需要一种轻量级方法能有效聚合视频信息，同时减少计算开销。

Method: 提出CVA模块：1）使用冻结的视觉基础模型嵌入；2）通过潜在推理聚合视频信息，避免交叉注意力投影；3）基于CLIP和标题重新选择关键帧以减少冗余。

Result: 在MicroLens和Short-Video数据集上，CVA在保持性能一致提升的同时，大幅减少了训练时间和GPU内存消耗（数量级减少）。重新选择的关键帧能进一步提升所有方法（包括CVA）的性能。

Conclusion: CVA提供了一种高效轻量的视频推荐解决方案，通过解耦视频信息聚合与偏好学习，显著降低计算成本。重新选择关键帧是提升视频推荐性能的有效策略，并探讨了错误标题对方法的影响。

Abstract: We propose Compressed Video Aggregator (CVA), a lightweight micro-video recommendation module that decouples video information from preference learning. It aggregates frozen VFM embeddings, and uses latent reasoning without cross-attention projection, producing compact video embeddings for recommenders. Due to the redundancy in the frame count of the original benchmark and its overly coarse sampling, we used titles to re-select key frames based on CLIP. Experiments on MicroLens and Short-Video show consistent gains with orders-of-magnitude reductions in training time and GPU memory, and re-selected frames can further enhance the performance of all methods, including CVA. Furthermore, we also discussed the impact of several scenarios involving erroneous titles on our method. Code will be released soon.

</details>


### [568] [AgentSlimming: Towards Efficient and Cost-Aware Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08813)
*Yulang Chen,Haoxuan Peng,Jinyan Liu,Zichen Wen,Dongrui Liu,Linfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AgentSlimming是一个用于图结构多智能体工作流的即插即用压缩框架，通过智能剪枝和量化技术减少冗余智能体，降低令牌消耗高达78.9%且性能几乎不降


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的多智能体系统虽然能处理复杂任务，但手动设计最优通信拓扑耗时耗力，而自动扩展方法又会导致结构臃肿、智能体冗余，造成令牌消耗过高的问题

Method: 1. 通过混合机制估计每个智能体的重要性评分；2. 移除冗余智能体或用低成本智能体替换；3. 使用基于基准的接受规则验证每个操作，防止性能崩溃

Result: 实验表明AgentSlimming平均减少令牌消耗高达78.9%，性能下降可忽略，有时甚至能提高准确性，在成本和质量之间实现了强帕累托最优权衡

Conclusion: AgentSlimming为多智能体系统提供了一种有效的压缩框架，解决了通信拓扑设计中的冗余问题，在保持性能的同时显著降低了计算成本

Abstract: Large Language Model-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in complex tasks. However, manually designing optimal communication topologies is labor-intensive, while automated expansion methods often result in bloated structures with redundant agents, leading to excessive token consumption. To address this problem, we introduce \textbf{AgentSlimming}, a plug-and-play compression framework for graph-structured multi-agent workflows. Motivated by pruning and quantization in neural networks, AgentSlimming compresses workflows by first estimating the importance score of each agent with a hybrid mechanism, and then removes redundant agents or replaces them with low-cost ones, where each operation is validated using a baseline-anchored acceptance rule to prevent performance collapse. Experiments show that AgentSlimming reduces average token cost by up to 78.9\% with negligible performance degradation, and sometimes even improves accuracy, achieving a strong Pareto-optimal trade-off between cost and quality. \textit{Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/CitrusYL/AgentSlimming

</details>


### [569] [MicroFuse: Protein-to-Genome Expert Fusion for Microbial Operon Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08815)
*Seungik Cho*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MicroFuse是一个融合蛋白质结构和基因组上下文信息的专家混合框架，用于预测微生物操纵子共成员关系，在OG-Operon100K基准测试中表现优于单模态和简单拼接方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预测微生物操纵子共成员关系需要整合蛋白质分子特性和基因组上下文两种互补信号。现有方法简单拼接这两种模态，忽略了它们之间可能存在的生物学一致性或冲突关系，特别是在蛋白质相似性具有误导性但基因组布局显示独立调控的情况下。

Method: 提出MicroFuse框架：使用ProstT5获取结构感知的蛋白质表示，Bacformer获取基因组上下文表示，通过四专家混合模块（蛋白质、基因组上下文、一致性、冲突专家）和软路由机制进行融合。训练结合二元交叉熵、对称跨模态InfoNCE对齐和基于分歧的监督对比损失。

Result: 在OG-Operon100K基准测试中，MicroFuse在AUROC、AUPRC、mAP和mAR指标上均优于ProstT5-only、Bacformer-only和Concat MLP基线。消融实验显示跨模态对比对齐是主要贡献，在蛋白质序列具有冲突的困难子集上提升最大。

Conclusion: MicroFuse通过显式建模蛋白质身份与基因组上下文之间的生物学一致性和冲突关系，有效解决了微生物操纵子预测中的多模态融合挑战，特别是在生物模糊情况下表现突出。

Abstract: Predicting microbial operon co-membership requires integrating two complementary biological signals: protein-scale molecular identity and genome-context organization. While recent biological foundation models provide powerful representations of each view independently, naive concatenation of these modalities ignores a key biological property -- protein identity and genomic context may agree when adjacent genes form a coherent functional module, or conflict when sequence similarity is misleading but genomic layout indicates independent regulation. We present MicroFuse, a protein-to-genome expert fusion framework that integrates structure-aware protein representations from ProstT5 with genome-context representations from Bacformer through a four-expert Mixture-of-Experts module (protein, genome-context, agreement, and conflict experts) with a learned soft router. Training combines binary cross-entropy with symmetric cross-modal InfoNCE alignment and disagreement-weighted supervised contrastive shaping. We further construct OG-Operon100K, a 100,000-pair scaffold-level benchmark from the OMG metagenomic corpus with biologically grounded positive and negative criteria. On OG-Operon100K, MicroFuse achieves the strongest AUROC, AUPRC, mAP, and mAR among ProstT5-only, Bacformer-only, and Concat MLP baselines. Ablations identify cross-modal contrastive alignment as the dominant component, and a hard sequence-conflict subset reveals MicroFuse's largest gains precisely in biologically ambiguous cases where protein identity alone is misleading.

</details>


### [570] [Inpainting physics: self-supervised learning for context-driven fluid simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08832)
*Jonas Weidner,Yeray Martin-Ruisanchez,Daniel Rückert,Benedikt Wiestler,Julian Suk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 将稳态计算流体力学推理重新构建为图像修复问题，通过自监督学习流场先验，仅需边界条件作为推理时的约束，实现边界条件变化和局部几何编辑的适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统神经代理模型将CFD训练为前向算子，将几何和边界条件映射到解场，这限制了模型在边界条件变化或局部几何修改时的重用性。

Method: 提出将稳态CFD推理重新构建为图像修复问题：学习速度场的自监督先验，在推理时通过固定已知区域（如入口、出口或先前模拟中未变化的区域）施加边界约束。为扩展到大型3D网格，引入局部邻域标记器将高分辨率速度场表示为紧凑的空间潜在标记，并训练潜在流匹配和掩码自编码器模型。

Result: 在颅内动脉瘤血流动力学中，该方法从稀疏边界上下文重建完整速度场，在边界条件和数据集偏移下优于监督神经代理模型，并支持通过重用未变化的模拟上下文进行局部几何编辑。

Conclusion: 将CFD推理视为上下文条件图像修复，可将神经代理模型从任务特定的预测器转变为可重用的流先验。

Abstract: Neural surrogate models for computational fluid dynamics (CFD) are typically trained as forward operators that map explicit problem specifications, such as geometry and boundary conditions, to solution fields. This ties the model to the conditioning variables seen during training and limits reuse under boundary-condition shifts or local geometry changes. We propose to reformulate steady CFD inference as an inpainting problem: instead of training on explicit boundary conditions, we learn a self-supervised prior over velocity fields and impose boundary constraints only during inference by fixing known regions such as inlet, outlet or unchanged regions from previous simulations. To scale this idea to large 3D meshes, we introduce a local neighbourhood tokeniser that represents high-resolution velocity fields as compact spatial latent tokens and train latent flow-matching and masked-autoencoder models on these tokens. On intracranial aneurysm hemodynamics, our method reconstructs full velocity fields from sparse boundary context, outperforms supervised neural surrogates under boundary-condition and dataset shift and enables local geometry editing by reusing unchanged simulation context. These results suggest that viewing CFD inference as context-conditioned inpainting can turn neural surrogates from task-specific predictors into reusable flow priors.

</details>


### [571] [Controlling Transient Amplification Improves Long-horizon Rollouts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08856)
*Adeel Pervez,Francesco Locatello*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种称为"可交换性正则化"的方法，通过惩罚雅可比矩阵的非正规性和非交换性来改善自回归神经模拟器的长期预测能力，减少长期推演时的误差漂移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归神经模拟器在短期物理系统预测中已能与经典求解器媲美，但在长期推演时准确性会迅速下降。作者发现这是由于推演轨迹上扰动的瞬态放大机制导致的，即使系统整体是渐近稳定的，非正规和非交换的雅可比矩阵也会导致误差漂移。

Method: 提出可交换性正则化方法，包含两个惩罚项：1) 减少单个雅可比矩阵的正规性缺陷；2) 减少不同步骤间雅可比矩阵交换子范数。这些惩罚通过雅可比-向量乘积估计，在推理时不增加计算成本。还提出了传播子界限来量化近似可交换性和正规性下的推演误差。

Result: 在合成和真实设置的1D和2D时空数据上，使用可交换性正则化的UNet和FNO变体实现了数千步的长期推演。在ERA5数据上改进了FourCastNet气候预测，且无需新数据。特别在分布外场景下效果显著：训练几百步轨迹的模型能在基线下发散的初始条件下，保持数千步推演的分布内性能。

Conclusion: 可交换性正则化通过减少雅可比矩阵的非正规性和非交换性，有效缓解了自回归神经模拟器的长期推演误差漂移问题，在合成和真实物理系统预测中均表现出优越的长期稳定性。

Abstract: Autoregressive neural simulators now match classical solvers on short-horizon prediction of physical systems, yet their accuracy degrades rapidly when rolled out over long horizons. In this work, we identify transient amplification of perturbations around rollout trajectories as a structural mechanism driving rollout error. Using a linearization analysis we show that when the Jacobians along an autoregressive trajectory are non-normal and non-commuting, the model amplifies errors transiently, resulting in model rollout drift even when the overall system is asymptotically stable. Building on the analysis, we propose commutativity regularization: a combination of two penalties designed to reduce the normality defect of individual Jacobians and the commutator norm of Jacobians across steps. The penalties are estimated with Jacobian-vector products and have no inference-time cost. We show a propagator bound that quantifies rollout error under approximate commutativity and normality. We evaluate UNet and FNO variants with commutativity regularization on 1D and 2D spatio-temporal data in synthetic and real settings, showing successful long-horizon rollouts over thousands of steps. Further, we show that the method improves FourCastNet climate forecasts on ERA5 without using any new data. The gain is most pronounced out-of-distribution: trained on trajectories of a few hundred steps, regularized models remain in-distribution for thousands of rollout steps on initial conditions where baselines diverge.

</details>


### [572] [RareCP: Regime-Aware Retrieval for Efficient Conformal Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08857)
*Manuel Heurich,Maximilian Granz,Tim Landgraf*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RareCP是一种用于时间序列预测的自适应共形预测方法，通过混合余弦注意力专家学习局部校准表示，分离误差分布的平稳漂移和不同误差机制，提高预测区间效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共形预测方法在时间依赖、数据漂移和异质误差行为下效率较低，通常只更新错误覆盖率或学习无约束校准权重，未能明确分离误差分布的平滑漂移和共存的多个误差机制这两个非平稳性的核心来源。

Method: RareCP采用混合余弦注意力专家学习局部校准表示，每个专家捕获不同的误差机制；紧凑超网络调整核参数以跟踪时间漂移；对新预测上下文检索最相关的k个校准示例，分配相似性权重，在它们的符号残差上形成加权共形分位数，产生不对称预测区间。

Result: 在GIFT-Eval基准测试中，RareCP相比最近共形基线和基础模型不确定性估计，提高了区间效率，同时保持经验覆盖率。消融研究证实了特定机制专家、漂移自适应核、稀疏检索和教师锚定都对最终性能有贡献。

Conclusion: RareCP通过分离误差分布的平滑漂移和不同误差机制，提供了一种有效的自适应共形时间序列预测方法，在保持覆盖率的同时提高了预测区间的效率。

Abstract: Recent advances in uncertainty quantification for time series forecasting show that conformal prediction can provide reliable prediction intervals, yet standard conformal methods are often inefficient under temporal dependence, drift, and heterogeneous error behavior. Existing methods typically either update miscoverage rates over time or learn unconstrained calibration weights, without explicitly separating two central sources of nonstationarity: smoothly drifting error distributions and co-existing distinct error regimes. We introduce RareCP, a regime-aware retrieval method for adaptive conformal time series prediction. RareCP learns local calibration representations through a mixture of cosine-attention experts that each capture distinct error regimes, while a compact hypernetwork adapts the kernel parameters to track temporal drift. Given a new forecasting context, RareCP retrieves the top-k most relevant calibration examples, assigns similarity weights, and forms a weighted conformal quantile over their signed residuals, yielding asymmetric prediction intervals. The adaptive kernel is trained using a smooth interval score objective, with a parameter-space anchor to a lightweight teacher kernel to preserve stable local representations. On the GIFT-Eval benchmark, RareCP improves interval efficiency over recent conformal baselines and foundation model uncertainty estimates while maintaining empirical coverage. Ablations confirm that regime-specific experts, drift-adaptive kernels, sparse retrieval, and teacher anchoring each contribute to the final performance.

</details>


### [573] [BubbleSpec: Turning Long-Tail Bubbles into Speculative Rollout Drafts for Synchronous Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08862)
*Yuhang Xu,Kaibin Tian,Yang Tian,Zhice Yang,Yifeng Yu,Yan Li,Shengzhong Liu,Fan Wu,Guihai Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BubbleSpec是一种新颖的RL训练框架，利用数据并行中的"气泡"空闲时间预生成后续步骤的rollout结果，实现加速而不破坏RL算法的同步性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RL在提升大语言模型性能时面临效率瓶颈，特别是在长上下文场景中，数据并行中的长尾气泡导致快速GPU等待慢速GPU，造成资源浪费。

Method: 提出BubbleSpec框架，不试图消除气泡，而是利用快速rank的空闲时间窗口预生成后续步骤的rollout结果，作为推测解码的草稿，保持数学精确性。

Result: 评估显示BubbleSpec减少50%的解码步骤，将rollout吞吐量提升高达1.8倍，且从训练开始就能提供即时加速。

Conclusion: BubbleSpec在保持RL算法严格同步性质的同时加速训练，与各种RL框架和策略无缝兼容，是解决RL训练效率瓶颈的有效方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has become a cornerstone for improving the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, its rollout phase constitutes a significant efficiency bottleneck, mainly arising from the long-tail bubbles across data parallel ranks, particularly in long-context scenarios where faster GPUs remain idle while waiting for stragglers. Existing solutions, such as partial rollout or asynchronous RL, mitigate these bubbles by compromising the algorithm's strict synchronous nature. Instead, we propose BubbleSpec, a novel framework that accelerates RL rollouts while strictly keeping the mathematical exactness. Instead of attempting to eliminate bubbles, BubbleSpec exploits them. We exploit the idle time windows of faster ranks to pre-generate rollout results for subsequent steps, serving as drafts for speculative decoding. Unlike prior speculative methods that rely on historical epoch similarity and warm-ups, BubbleSpec is agnostic to dataset size and provides immediate acceleration from the onset of training. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that BubbleSpec reduces decoding steps by 50% and increases rollout throughput by up to 1.8x. Critically, BubbleSpec is seamlessly compatible with various RL frameworks and strategies as it sustains the strict synchronous property of RL algorithms.

</details>


### [574] [Higher-Order Equilibrium Tracking for EM-Compressible Online Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08864)
*ZhiMing Li,Yue Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种在线潜变量模型估计框架，将在线估计分解为当前运行统计量的冻结批处理均衡和跟踪滞后，证明了批处理到在线的转移定理，并引入了EM可压缩性概念。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准在线EM和随机逼近分析主要研究收敛于总体参数，通常没有在有限时间范围内将经验批处理最优解与在线跟踪误差分离开来。需要一种框架来分解在线估计，并理解在线估计如何继承批处理统计特性。

Method: 将在线估计问题重新定义为跟踪移动的经验均衡。将在线估计分解为当前运行统计量的冻结批处理均衡和跟踪滞后。提出m阶均衡-jet预测器与ν阶冻结校正器组合，实现局部跟踪速率O(T^{-ν(m+1)})。形式化EM可压缩性和EM-jet^R可压缩性作为结构条件。

Result: 证明了批处理到在线的转移定理：如果∥e_T∥_{L^2} = o(T^{-1/2})，在线估计器继承批处理中心极限定理和尖锐的一阶风险常数。在潜在线性高斯协方差估计中实例化该理论，一阶方案在压缩的d×d统计量上运行，具有明确的有限样本风险包络和认证的重启规则。

Conclusion: 该框架为在线潜变量模型估计提供了新的理论视角，通过均衡流形和跟踪滞后的分解，使得在线估计能够继承批处理的统计特性，并在特定模型中实现了高效的计算和理论保证。

Abstract: We study online estimation in latent-variable models by recasting the problem as tracking a moving empirical equilibrium. Standard online EM and stochastic approximation analyses primarily study convergence toward the population parameter and typically do not isolate the empirical batch optimum from the online tracking error at finite horizon. Our framework decomposes the online estimate into the frozen batch equilibrium at the current running statistic and a tracking lag that captures the algorithm's delay behind this moving target. We prove a batch-to-online transfer theorem: provided $\lVert e_T \rVert_{L^{2}} = o(T^{-1/2})$, the online estimator inherits the batch central limit theorem and the sharp first-order risk constant. Our key observation is that the empirical optimum evolves on a smooth equilibrium manifold indexed by the running statistic. An $m$-th order equilibrium-jet predictor combined with an order-$ν$ frozen corrector yields localized tracking rates $O(T^{-ν(m+1)})$. We formalize EM-compressibility and EM-jet$^R$-compressibility as the structural conditions that make the equilibrium response and the Newton corrector evaluable from a retained streaming statistic. The theory is instantiated in latent linear Gaussian covariance estimation, where the first-order scheme operates on a compressed $d \times d$ statistic with explicit finite-sample risk envelopes and a certified restart rule.

</details>


### [575] [TopoGeoScore: A Self-Supervised Source-Only Geometric Framework for OOD Checkpoint Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08870)
*Farid Hazratian,Ali Zia,Hien Duy Nguyen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TopoGeoScore：一种仅使用源域表示的源域几何评分器，用于无标签的OOD检查点选择，通过提取拓扑几何特征学习自监督评分，无需目标域样本或标签。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在目标域标签不可用时，OOD鲁棒性难以评估。现有方法需要目标域样本或标签，但实际部署前可能无法获取。因此需要一种仅依赖源域表示的无标签检查点选择方法。

Method: 提出TopoGeoScore：1) 从源嵌入构建类条件互k近邻图；2) 提取三个可解释信号：用于全局类流形复杂性的扭转启发的约化拉普拉斯对数行列式、用于局部邻域规则性的Ollivier-Ricci曲率、用于碎片化连接/环路/全局-局部不一致性的高阶拓扑摘要；3) 通过自监督目标学习非负线性评分，强制几何保持嵌入视图的不变性和结构破坏视图的分离。

Result: 在CIFAR-based corruption/分布偏移基准、ImageNet-C、MNLI→HANS转移和OGBN-Arxiv上的实验表明，源表示包含可测量的全局-局部-拓扑鲁棒性证据，支持在分布偏移下部署前的实际检查点选择。

Conclusion: 源域表示确实包含可量化的几何拓扑证据来评估模型鲁棒性。TopoGeoScore提供了一种无需目标域样本或标签的实用检查点选择方法，在分布偏移下部署前具有实际价值。

Abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness is difficult to diagnose when target-domain labels are unavailable. We consider a more restrictive source-only variant of unsupervised accuracy estimation: selecting robust checkpoints using only source-domain representations, with no target samples or target labels. We propose \textbf{TopoGeoScore}, a source-only geometric scorer for label-free OOD checkpoint selection. Given a trained checkpoint, we construct class-conditional mutual $k$-nearest-neighbour graphs from source embeddings and extract three interpretable signals: a torsion-inspired reduced Laplacian log-determinant for global class-manifold complexity, Ollivier--Ricci curvature for local neighbourhood regularity, and higher-order topological summaries for fragmented connectivity, loops, and global--local inconsistency. Instead of fixing their weights by hand, TopoGeoScore learns a non-negative linear score through a self-supervised objective that enforces invariance under approximately geometry-preserving embedding views and separation from structure-breaking views. The score remains interpretable and uses no target-domain samples or labels. Results across CIFAR-based corruption and distribution-shift benchmarks, ImageNet-C, MNLI$\to$HANS transfer, and OGBN-Arxiv suggest that source representations contain measurable global--local--topological evidence of robustness, supporting practical checkpoint selection before deployment under distribution shift.

</details>


### [576] [CoDistill-GRPO: A Co-Distillation Recipe for Efficient Group Relative Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08873)
*Soo Min Kwon,Ziteng Sun,Ananda Theertha Suresh,Himanshu Jain,Sanjiv Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CoDistill-GRPO：一种协同蒸馏算法，通过大模型和小模型相互学习来改进推理能力，无需依赖外部大模型，显著提升小模型性能并降低大模型训练成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO算法在提升小模型推理能力时因奖励稀疏而效果不佳，现有方法依赖外部大模型提供提示或密集奖励，但这需要额外训练大模型且增加训练时间。需要一种无需外部大模型、能同时提升大小模型性能的解决方案。

Method: 提出CoDistill-GRPO协同蒸馏算法，同时训练大模型和小模型：小模型使用基于策略的知识蒸馏奖励学习大模型的分布；大模型则使用小模型生成的轨迹进行重要性重加权更新，减少轨迹生成的计算开销。

Result: 在数学基准测试中，CoDistill-GRPO显著提升小模型性能：Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B在Minerva数据集上比基础模型提升11.6个百分点，比标准GRPO提升6.0个百分点。大模型（Qwen2.5-Math-7B）使用小模型轨迹训练仍能达到接近标准GRPO的性能，同时获得约18%的加速。

Conclusion: CoDistill-GRPO是一种高效且成本效益高的替代方案，既能显著提升小模型推理能力，又能降低大模型训练成本，无需依赖外部大模型，为语言模型推理优化提供了新途径。

Abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has emerged as a powerful algorithm for improving the reasoning capabilities of language models, but often fails to improve small models due to sparse rewards on difficult tasks. Existing works mitigate this issue by leveraging a larger model, either to provide hints for rollouts or to provide dense reward signals through knowledge distillation (KD). However, this assumes the existence of such an oracle, and training one can significantly increase total training time. In this work, we propose CoDistill-GRPO, a co-distillation algorithm that simultaneously trains a large and a small model by maximizing carefully designed GRPO objectives. The two models learn from each other: the small model uses an on-policy KD reward to learn from the large model's distribution, while the large model is updated using rollouts generated by the small model with importance reweighting, reducing the computational overhead of rollout generation. We show that CoDistill-GRPO substantially improves small model performance over standard GRPO on mathematical benchmarks across both Qwen and Llama models. Specifically, with Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B, we observe an accuracy increase of over 11.6 percentage points over the base model and an additional 6.0 percentage points over GRPO on the Minerva dataset. Interestingly, the larger model (Qwen2.5-Math-7B) trained with CoDistill-GRPO nearly matches standard GRPO performance despite training on small-model rollouts. This highlights CoDistill-GRPO as a cost-effective alternative to GRPO for larger models, yielding an approximate 18% speedup, which may be of independent interest.

</details>


### [577] [OTora: A Unified Red Teaming Framework for Reasoning-Level Denial-of-Service in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08876)
*Xinyu Li,Ronghui Mu,Lin Li,Tianjin Huang,Gaojie Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OTora是一个针对LLM代理的推理级拒绝服务攻击框架，通过诱导目标工具调用和生成代理感知的推理负载，在保持任务正确性的同时大幅增加推理深度和延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM作为自主代理部署执行工具增强的多步骤任务，延迟成为关键因素。目前被忽视的威胁是推理级拒绝服务攻击，攻击者可以在保持任务正确性的同时，通过增加代理的推理深度或工具使用预算来降低可用性。

Method: OTora采用两阶段红队框架：第一阶段通过插入感知评分和动态目标协同进化优化对抗性触发器，诱导目标工具调用；第二阶段通过ICL引导的遗传搜索生成代理感知的推理负载，放大过度思考同时保持正确任务结果。

Result: 在基于LLaMA-70B和GPT-OSS-120B等模型的WebShop、Email和OS代理上，OTora实现了高达10倍的推理token增加和数量级的延迟减慢，同时保持接近基准的任务准确率。

Conclusion: OTora首次实例化了针对LLM代理的推理级拒绝服务攻击，揭示了这一被忽视的安全威胁，并讨论了通过检测和约束异常推理和延迟峰值来缓解攻击的策略。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents that execute tool-augmented, multi-step tasks, where latency is a critical factor for real-world applications. Yet an overlooked threat is Reasoning-Level Denial-of-Service (R-DoS), in which an attacker preserves task correctness but degrades availability by inflating an agent's reasoning depth or tool-use budget. We introduce OTora, the first unified, two-stage red-teaming framework for instantiating R-DoS attacks. Stage I optimizes an adversarial trigger that induces targeted tool invocations using insertion-aware scoring and dynamic target co-evolution, supporting both black-box and white-box settings. Stage II generates agent-aware reasoning payloads via an ICL-guided genetic search that amplifies overthinking while maintaining correct task outcomes. Across WebShop, Email, and OS agents built on multiple backbone models such as LLaMA-70B and GPT-OSS-120B, OTora achieves up to 10 times increases in reasoning tokens and order-of-magnitude latency slowdowns, all while preserving near-baseline task accuracy. Finally, we discuss mitigation strategies for detecting and constraining abnormal reasoning and latency spikes. The code is available at https://github.com/llm2409/OTora.

</details>


### [578] [Discrete Flow Matching: Convergence Guarantees Under Minimal Assumptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08882)
*Le-Tuyet-Nhi Pham,Giovanni Conforti,Zhenjie Ren,Alain Durmus*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究离散流匹配（DFM）的理论保证，在Z_m^d上推导非渐近误差界，放松了传统分数假设，改进了对词汇大小m和维度d的依赖关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散流匹配（DFM）作为生成模型的新兴框架，缺乏理论保证。先前工作多基于分数假设，本文旨在建立更宽松假设下的非渐近误差界，改进对词汇大小和维度的依赖。

Method: 研究Z_m^d上的两种离散流匹配模型，通过时间离散化采样，推导早期停止版本在KL散度下的非渐近界，以及在总变差距离下对真实目标分布的收敛保证。

Result: 建立了仅依赖近似误差假设的非渐近误差界，放松了传统分数假设，获得了对词汇大小m和维度d的改进依赖关系，包括早期停止版本的KL散度界和总变差距离收敛保证。

Conclusion: 本文为离散流匹配提供了严格的理论基础，通过更宽松的假设和更好的参数依赖关系，推进了离散生成模型的理论分析框架。

Abstract: Flow Matching has recently emerged as a popular class of generative models for simulating a target distribution $μ_1$ from samples drawn from a source distribution $μ_0$. This framework relies on a fixed coupling between $μ_0$ and $μ_1$, and on a deterministic or stochastic bridge to define an interpolating process between the two distributions. The time marginals of this process can then be approximately sampled by estimating the transition rates, or more generally the generator, of its Markovian projection. This framework has recently been extended to the case of discrete source and target distributions, under the name Discrete Flow Matching (DFM). However, theoretical guarantees for such models remain scarce. In this paper, we study two DFM models on $\mathbb{Z}_m^d = \{0,\ldots,m-1\}^d$, sampled through time discretization, and derive non-asymptotic associated bounds for both of them. In contrast to previous work, we establish non-asymptotic bounds in Kullback--Leibler divergence for the early-stopped version of the target distribution. We also derive explicit convergence guarantees in total variation distance with respect to the true target distribution. Importantly, these bounds rely only on an approximation error assumption, relaxing standard score assumptions used in earlier works, while also yielding improved dependence on the vocabulary size $m$ and the dimension $d$.

</details>


### [579] [Compact SO(3) Equivariant Atomistic Foundation Models via Structural Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08885)
*Chen Wang,Siyu Hu,Guangming Tan,Weile Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种针对SO(3)等变原子基础模型的结构化剪枝方法，在保持旋转对称性的同时大幅降低计算成本，实现精度与效率的平衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SO(3)等变图神经网络在原子基础模型中表现出色，但其高阶张量运算计算成本高昂，导致模型精度与推理效率之间存在难以调和的矛盾

Method: 提出结构化剪枝方法，沿通道和阶数维度对SO(3)等变原子基础模型进行剪枝，将不可约表示作为完整块进行保留或移除，从而保持SO(3)等变性

Result: 剪枝后模型在显著降低推理成本的同时，精度高于独立训练的小模型；压缩后的MACE-MP和MACE-OFF模型参数减少1.5-4倍，预训练计算量减少2.5-4倍；在下游应用中，微调剪枝模型比从头训练任务特定模型减少70.1%能量误差和34.4%力误差

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了SO(3)等变原子基础模型的精度-效率权衡问题，可推广到其他SO(3)等变架构，并能与量化和知识蒸馏技术结合获得进一步增益

Abstract: SO(3) equivariant graph neural networks have become the dominant paradigm for atomistic foundation models, achieving high accuracy and data efficiency by building rotational symmetry directly into the architecture. Yet the computational cost of their higher-order tensor operations creates a tough trade-off between model accuracy and inference efficiency. In this paper, we propose a structural pruning method for SO(3) equivariant atomistic foundation models to bridge this accuracy-efficiency gap. The pruning is applied along the channel and order dimensions, with each irreducible representation kept or removed as a complete block, thereby retaining SO(3) equivariance. Starting from a large checkpoint, the pruned model substantially reduces the inference cost while retaining higher accuracy than an independently trained small model. The pruned MACE-MP model outperforms the official from-scratch trained small model on 7 of 9 metrics on the Matbench Discovery leaderboard. In terms of efficiency, compressed MACE-MP and MACE-OFF models contain 1.5$\times$ to 4$\times$ fewer parameters and require 2.5$\times$ to 4$\times$ less pre-training compute than training a small model from scratch. For downstream applications, fine-tuning the pruned model reduces energy and force errors by 70.1% and 34.4% compared to training task-specific models from scratch across eight representative downstream datasets. We demonstrate that the method generalizes to other SO(3) equivariant architectures (SevenNet, eSCN) and can be combined with quantization and knowledge distillation for further gains.

</details>


### [580] [Machine Learning Research Has Outpaced Its Communication Norms and NeurIPS Should Act](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08889)
*Ajay Mandyam Rangarajan,Jeyashree Krishnan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文分析了NeurIPS论文的可读性趋势，发现其可读性不断下降，同时提出七项写作标准以改善这一状况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习研究呈指数增长，但其交流规范未能跟上。作者认为NeurIPS应采用明确、可衡量的写作标准，以提升论文的可读性和传播效果。

Method: 分析了280万篇arXiv论文（1991-2025）、24,772篇NeurIPS论文（1987-2024）和2450万篇PubMed论文（1990-2025），应用了经典可读性评分、Hohmann写作风格套件（包括煽动性语言）、首字母缩略词密度和复用率、LLM作为可读性评判协议，以及OpenAlex和Semantic Scholar的引用数据。

Result: 发现了四个主要模式：1）NeurIPS摘要可读性持续下降，煽动性语言增加；2）标题首字母缩略词密度显著增长，且大多使用频率低；3）可读性更高的论文往往获得更多引用；4）LLM评分与经典可读性指标存在分歧。

Conclusion: 为优化人类读者体验，提出NeurIPS 2027可试行的七项标准：首字母缩略词预算、人类可读性阈值、更严格的引用标准、独立视觉元素、通俗语言摘要、预注册首字母缩略词词汇表、开源审计工具。

Abstract: Machine learning research has grown exponentially while its communication norms have not. We argue NeurIPS should adopt explicit, measurable writing standards. We analyze 2.8 million arXiv papers (1991-2025), 24,772 NeurIPS papers (1987-2024), and 24.5 million PubMed papers (1990-2025), applying classical readability scores, the Hohmann writing style suite (including sensational language), acronym density and reuse, an LLM as judge readability protocol, and citations from OpenAlex and Semantic Scholar. Four patterns emerge. First, NeurIPS abstracts score harder to read on every classical readability metric: Flesch Reading Ease falls from about 24 in 1987 to 13 in 2024, and sensational language rises by about 50 percent in NeurIPS abstracts between 2015 and 2024. Second, acronym density in NeurIPS titles has grown from 0.33 per 100 words in 1987 to 3.21 in 2024, and about 89 percent of NeurIPS acronyms are used fewer than ten times, ten points above the science-wide baseline. Third, more readable NeurIPS papers tend to receive more citations, suggesting readability and impact are correlated and that less readable papers risk remaining fragmented. LLM as judge scores rate NeurIPS abstracts as roughly stable from 1987 to 2022, with early signs of improvement thereafter, a pattern that disagrees with every classical readability metric and raises a design question for enforcement: is the target reader a human or an LLM? Lastly, NeurIPS volume has grown roughly 50-fold between 1987 and 2024. Assuming the goal is to optimise for human readers, we propose seven standards NeurIPS could pilot at NeurIPS 2027: an acronym budget with a venue-approved term list, a human readability threshold, stricter citation standards, standalone visual elements, a plain language summary, a pre-registered acronym glossary, and open source audit tooling.

</details>


### [581] [Bilinear autoencoders find interpretable manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08891)
*Thomas Dooms,Ward Gauderis,Geraint Wiggins,Jose Oramas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用二次潜在变量（通过双线性自编码器实现）来捕捉神经网络中跨越流形的概念，挑战了标准的线性表示假设，并提供了无监督的流形发现工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前稀疏自编码器等线性方法无法捕捉跨越流形的概念，需要进行后处理分析。论文旨在解决这一局限性，探索非线性但数学上可处理的潜在表示。

Method: 使用双线性自编码器实现二次潜在变量，将激活分解为低秩二次形式，在权重空间中线性组合，并允许输入无关的几何分析。

Result: 实验显示多维几何结构普遍存在，复合潜在变量能很好地捕捉这些结构，系统性地改善了语言模型的重建误差。不同几何先验的自编码器恢复相同的输入子空间，尽管其字典条目不同。

Conclusion: 该研究是朝着非线性但数学上可处理的潜在表示迈出的一步，这些表示的组合具有表达性和可解释性。双线性自编码器可作为无监督的流形发现工具。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders have become a standard tool for uncovering interpretable latent representations in neural networks. Yet salient concepts often span manifolds that current linear methods cannot capture without post hoc analysis. This paper uses quadratic latents to close this gap: we implement these with bilinear autoencoders, which decompose activations into low-rank quadratic forms, compose linearly in weight space, and admit input-independent geometric analysis. This qualitative difference in what concepts quadratic latents can detect challenges the standard linear representation hypothesis. Our experiments and visualisations show that multi-dimensional geometries are highly prevalent and that composite latents capture them well, systematically improving reconstruction error in language models. Furthermore, we show that autoencoders with varying geometric priors recover the same input subspace despite their dictionary entries being distinct. Practically, these models serve as an unsupervised tool for manifold discovery, which we demonstrate through an interactive online visualizer for Qwen 3.5. This is a step toward nonlinear but mathematically tractable latent representations whose composition is expressive and interpretable by design.

</details>


### [582] [Shapley Regression for Rare Disease Diagnosis Support: a case study on APDS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08897)
*Safa Alsaidi,Tomás Brogueira,Nizar Mahlaoui,Marc Vincent,Guilherme Pelegrina,Nicolas Garcelon,Adrien Coulet,Miguel Couceiro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Shapley回归模型，结合博弈论与逻辑回归，用于从电子健康记录中检测APDS相关表型模式，平衡预测能力与可解释性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: APDS是一种罕见遗传免疫疾病，症状高度异质且与其他疾病重叠，导致诊断延迟。传统线性评分系统无法捕捉复杂症状交互，而深度学习模型缺乏可解释性，需要一种既能建模症状共现又能保持透明度的新方法

Method: 提出Shapley回归，用k-可加合作博弈替代线性预测器，显式建模症状共现，同时保持逻辑回归的透明性和凸性。使用l2正则化的2-可加模型在预测能力和噪声鲁棒性之间取得最佳平衡

Result: 在8个公共生物医学数据集上验证了方法的有效性，并在222名患者的真实队列中准确区分APDS病例与匹配对照，确认了已知APDS相关表型，并探索了症状间的成对交互作用，得到临床专家验证

Conclusion: Shapley回归为APDS等罕见疾病的早期识别提供了一种数据驱动、可解释的方法，能够捕捉复杂症状交互同时保持模型透明度，有助于临床决策支持

Abstract: Activated PI3K8 Syndrome (APDS) is a rare genetic immune disorder caused by variants in PIK3CD or PIK3R1, with highly heterogeneous symptoms that often delay diagnosis. Early recognition is hampered by overlapping clinical presentations and limited clinician awareness, motivating systematic, data-driven approaches to detect APDS-associated phenotypic patterns in routine electronic health records. Traditional linear scoring systems cannot capture complex symptom interactions, while deep learning models, though expressive, often lack interpretability. To bridge this gap, we propose Shapley regression, a novel game-theoretic model replacing the linear predictor with a k-additive cooperative game, explicitly modeling co-occurrence of symptoms while maintaining the transparency and convexity of logistic regression. We carry out an empirical study of our lightweight method on eight public biomedical datasets, showing that a 2-additive model with $l_{2}$ regularization achieves an optimal trade-off between predictive power and noise robustness. We also apply it to a real-world cohort of 222 patients, on which Shapley regression accurately distinguished APDS cases from matched controls, confirming and validating phenotypes known to be associated with APDS, and facilitating the exploration of pairwise interactions between symptoms, validated by clinical experts.

</details>


### [583] [Non-Monotonic Latency in Apple MPS Decoding: KV Cache Interactions and Execution Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08913)
*Willy Fitra Hendria*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 在Apple MPS后端中发现了自回归推理的意外非单调延迟行为，特定解码配置下延迟会突然增加高达21倍，而CPU和NVIDIA T4则表现平滑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统假设自回归推理延迟随解码长度可预测地扩展，且KV缓存被普遍认为是加速解码的优化技术。然而本文发现Apple MPS后端存在异常的非单调延迟行为，这揭示了硬件平台对推理性能的重要影响。

Method: 使用多个Transformer模型家族（GPT-2、BLOOM和OPT）在Apple MPS后端进行实验，观察不同解码配置下的延迟变化。通过控制实验排除了内存压力或预填充成本的影响，并与CPU和NVIDIA T4（CUDA）的平滑表现进行对比。

Result: 在特定解码预算区间内观察到高达21倍的延迟峰值，随后在邻近配置下恢复。这些异常与后端执行动态相关，而CPU和NVIDIA T4在相同条件下表现出平滑的单调扩展。

Conclusion: 研究强调了自回归推理中硬件感知评估的重要性，并警告不要依赖聚合的解码预算基准测试，因为性能可能在邻近配置间不连续变化。

Abstract: Autoregressive inference is typically assumed to scale predictably with decoding length, and key-value (KV) caching is widely regarded as a universally beneficial optimization for accelerating decoding. In this work, we identify unexpected non-monotonic latency behavior in the Apple MPS backend, where latency changes abruptly across nearby decoding configurations. Using transformer models from multiple families (GPT-2, BLOOM, and OPT), we observe latency spikes of up to 21x within specific decoding-budget intervals, followed by recovery at neighboring configurations. Controlled experiments show that these anomalies are not explained by memory pressure or prefill cost, but are instead consistent with backend execution dynamics, while CPU and NVIDIA T4 (CUDA) exhibit smooth monotonic scaling under identical conditions. Our findings highlight the importance of hardware-aware evaluation for autoregressive inference and caution against relying on aggregated decoding-budget benchmarks, as performance can vary discontinuously across nearby configurations.

</details>


### [584] [Transformer autoencoder with local attention for sparse and irregular time series with application on risk estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08914)
*Panteleimon Rodis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于局部注意力Transformer自编码器的稀疏不规则时间序列风险估计框架，用于电力系统非技术损失检测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电力系统中的非技术损失（主要是窃电）带来重大经济和运营挑战。由于现实世界数据收集的稀疏性和不规则性，传统方法难以有效捕捉长期依赖关系和处理此类数据特征。

Method: 提出基于Transformer自编码器的框架，结合局部注意力机制，利用Transformer的强大模式识别能力，辅以传统数据清洗和归一化方法，有效捕捉稀疏不规则序列中的相关模式。

Result: 在希腊电力系统非技术损失风险估计的实际案例中，该方法能产生高度判别性的潜在特征，相比现有先进方法实现更一致的风险估计，达到高召回率和精确率。

Conclusion: 该框架为不规则时间序列数据集中的风险检测提供了鲁棒有效的工具，特别适用于稀疏和不规则数据收集场景。

Abstract: This paper introduces a framework specifically designed for sparse and irregular time series {risk estimation}. It is based on a Transformer Autoencoder with local attention, which leverages the powerful pattern identification capabilities of transformers complemented by traditional data cleaning and normalization methods. It efficiently captures relevant patterns within irregular sequences suffering from sparse data collection, benefiting from the discriminative ability of the local attention mechanism. The proposed framework is applied to a real-world case study, on the risk estimation of non-technical losses in electrical power systems in a wide area in Greece. Non-technical losses in electrical power systems, primarily stemming from electricity theft, pose significant economic and operational challenges. Detecting these anomalies is particularly challenging due to the inherent sparse and irregular nature of real-world data collection practices. Traditional risk estimation methods struggle with effectively capturing long-range dependencies and robustly handling such data characteristics. We demonstrate that our approach effectively yields highly discriminative latent features, which results in more consistent risk estimation compared with existing state-of-the-art and widely used methods. It achieves high recall and precision, meeting the critical objectives of the problem. As such, our solution offers a robust and effective tool for risk detection in irregular time series datasets.

</details>


### [585] [Physics-Informed Neural PDE Solvers via Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08915)
*Hanru Bai,Yuncheng Zhou,Difan Zou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow，一种基于连续积分约束的PDE求解器，通过将生成式ODE求解器MeanFlow扩展到时空域，实现可控积分长度的高效预测和良好泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法（如PINNs和神经算子）在求解PDE时存在局限性：要么依赖点态残差而忽略积分视角，要么依赖预离散化的时间网格，难以捕捉物理系统的连续积分本质。

Method: 将MeanFlow从生成式ODE求解器扩展到PDE求解，用物理PDE算子替换生成速度场，将多步数值积分转化为可控积分长度的高效预测。关键创新是将原始MeanFlow约束从时间域扩展到时空域，耦合时间演化与空间一致性。

Result: 在基准测试中，该方法在精度和推理效率上优于代表性基线方法。提出的积分约束使其在分布外初始条件和不同空间分辨率上具有优秀的泛化能力。

Conclusion: Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow提供了一个统一框架，能够自然处理时间依赖和稳态PDE，通过连续积分约束实现了高效、准确且泛化能力强的PDE求解。

Abstract: Deep learning paradigms, such as PINNs and neural operators, have significantly advanced the solving of PDEs. However, they often struggle to capture the continuous integral nature of physical systems, relying either on pointwise residuals that ignore the integral perspective or on pre-discretized temporal grids.
