Drawing inspiration from MeanFlow, a continuous-time integrator recently developed to efficiently solve generative ODEs, we introduce Spatio-Temporal MeanFlow, which functions as a novel PDE solver learning the finite-interval evolution of physical states. By substituting the generative velocity field with the physical PDE operator, we transform multi-step numerical integration into an efficient prediction with a freely controllable integration length. Crucially, we extend the original MeanFlow constraint from the temporal to the spatio-temporal domain, coupling time evolution with spatial consistency. This yields a unified framework naturally accommodating both time-dependent and stationary PDEs. Comprehensive experiments on benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves superior accuracy and inference efficiency over representative baselines. Furthermore, the proposed integral constraint enables excellent generalization to out-of-distribution initial conditions and varying spatial resolutions.

</details>


### [586] [When and Why Grouping Attention Heads Accelerates Muon Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08933)
*Hongtao Zhang,Wenjie Zhou,Wei Chen,Xueqi Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究Muon优化器在多头注意力中的最佳应用粒度：全矩阵、头级别还是头组级别，提出Group Muon方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon优化器对矩阵更新进行正交化，但多头注意力天然在头级别操作，这种粒度不匹配引发Muon应应用于全注意力投影、单个头还是中间头组的问题

Method: 通过一步下降比较全矩阵Muon和分组Muon，分析权衡关系，提出Group Muon方法，将头组大小和分组规则作为优化器超参数

Result: 分析揭示了分组白化增益与分组诱导范数成本之间的权衡，在GPT-2 Small上FineWeb训练中，适当分组比全QKV Muon和完全头级MuonSplit有更好的验证损失

Conclusion: Group Muon通过将头组大小和分组规则作为超参数，在多头注意力中实现了比全矩阵和完全头级方法更好的优化效果

Abstract: Muon orthogonalizes matrix updates, but multi-head attention naturally operates at the level of heads. This granularity mismatch raises the question of whether Muon should be applied to the full attention projection, to individual heads, or to intermediate head groups. We study this question through a one-step descent comparison between full-matrix Muon and group-wise Muon. Our analysis reveals a trade-off between the \textbf{group-wise whitening gain} from group-wise updates and the \textbf{grouping-induced norm cost}, an additional update-norm cost caused by replacing full-matrix whitening with group-wise whitening. Motivated by this trade-off, we propose \textbf{Group Muon}, which treats head group size and grouping rule as optimizer hyperparameters. On GPT-2 Small trained on FineWeb, appropriate grouping improves validation loss over both full-QKV Muon and fully head-wise MuonSplit.

</details>


### [587] [From Mechanistic to Compositional Interpretability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08934)
*Ward Gauderis,Thomas Dooms,Steven T. Holmer,Kola Ayonrinde,Geraint A. Wiggins*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出组合可解释性框架，通过范畴论将模型分解与行为关联，引入忠实性和复杂度衡量解释质量，证明压缩细化能产生更简洁的人类对齐解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机制可解释性缺乏形式化框架，无法客观验证、比较或组合解释，需要建立可测量的理论基础。

Method: 基于范畴论和组合性原则，引入组合解释作为语法和语义映射对，提出忠实性和复杂度衡量指标，引入压缩细化方法在不改变功能前提下简化模型结构。

Result: 证明了简洁性准则，表明语法压缩理论上能保证更简洁的人类对齐解释，并将现有机制方法定位为细化子类。

Conclusion: 该框架为自动发现和评估机制解释提供了可测量、可优化的基础，解释了为什么现有方法的压缩启发式倾向于与人类可解释性对齐。

Abstract: Mechanistic interpretability aims to explain neural model behaviour by reverse-engineering learned computational structure into human-understandable components. Without a formal framework, however, mechanistic explanations cannot be objectively verified, compared, or composed. We introduce compositional interpretability, a category-theoretic framework grounded in the principles of compositionality and minimum description length. Compositional interpretations are pairs of syntactic and semantic mappings that must commute to enforce consistency between a model's decomposition and its observed behaviour. We deconstruct explanation quality into measures of faithfulness and complexity to cast interpretability as a constrained optimisation problem, and introduce compressive refinement to systematically restructure models into simpler parts without altering their function. Finally, we prove a parsimony criterion under which syntactic compression theoretically guarantees more concise, human-aligned explanations. Our framework situates prominent mechanistic methods as subclasses of refinement, and clarifies why their compressibility heuristics tend to align with human interpretability. Our work provides a measurable, optimisable foundation for automating the discovery and evaluation of mechanistic explanations.

</details>


### [588] [A Single Deep Preference-Conditioned Policy for Learning Pareto Coverage Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08946)
*Akihiro Kubo,Kosuke Nakanishi,Shin Ishii*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了偏好条件下的多目标强化学习，使用平滑Tchebycheff标量化方法，证明了偏好与帕累托最优回报向量之间的唯一性和连续性，并提出了CMDPI算法实现高效优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在非线性标量化下，偏好与解之间的对应关系缺乏唯一性和连续性的理论保证，这限制了多目标强化学习中偏好扫描的有效性和帕累托前沿的密集覆盖。

Method: 使用平滑Tchebycheff标量化作为单调效用函数，在占用测度上形式化问题，提出Concave Mirror Descent Policy Iteration (CMDPI)算法，该算法可解释为带KL正则化的MDP求解，并实现为深度actor-critic算法。

Result: 证明了在温和条件下，每个偏好诱导唯一的帕累托最优回报向量，且该向量对偏好具有Lipschitz连续性；CMDPI算法达到O(1/k)的目标次优性率；在8个MO-Gymnasium任务中取得最佳平均超体积排名和强期望效用性能。

Conclusion: 为偏好扫描提供了理论基础，CMDPI算法通过保持先前策略正则化实现了跨偏好的策略连续性，在离散和连续控制任务中都表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Preference-conditioned multi-objective reinforcement learning aims to learn a single policy that captures trade-offs across preferences, but under nonlinear scalarization the uniqueness and continuity of the preference-to-solution correspondence remain unclear. We study this problem in tabular multi-objective Markov decision processes (MDPs) using smooth Tchebycheff scalarization as a monotone utility. Under mild interior conditions on the preference set, we prove that each preference induces a unique Pareto-optimal return vector and that this vector depends Lipschitz-continuously on the preference, providing a principled foundation for preference sweeping toward dense Pareto-front coverage. To compute these targets, we formulate the problem over occupancy measures and derive Concave Mirror Descent Policy Iteration (CMDPI), which achieves an $O(1/k)$ objective-suboptimality rate. We further show that each update is equivalent to solving a Kullback-Leibler-regularized MDP with the previous policy as reference, yielding a policy-iteration interpretation and finite-iterate policy continuity across preferences. We instantiate the update as a deep actor-critic algorithm preserving previous-policy regularization. On eight MO-Gymnasium tasks, it achieves the best average hypervolume rank among recent baselines and strong expected-utility performance. Continuous-control experiments indicate gains beyond the discrete-action setting.

</details>


### [589] [Muon-OGD: Muon-based Spectral Orthogonal Gradient Projection for LLM Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08949)
*Binghang Lu,Zheyuan Deng,Runyu Zhang,Bing Hu,Yunhan Zhao,Yuan Tian,Changhong Mou,Guang Lin,Xiaomin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Muon-OGD方法，将Muon优化器的谱范数几何与正交投影约束结合，用于LLM持续学习，缓解灾难性遗忘问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于投影的持续学习方法使用Frobenius范数进行参数更新，但Muon优化器的成功表明谱范数几何可能更适合矩阵型LLM参数，需要探索更有效的更新几何。

Method: 提出Muon-OGD框架，将每个更新公式化为谱范数约束的优化问题，通过双重迭代和Newton-Schulz矩阵符号近似高效求解，应用正交化动量更新避免与先前任务相关的受保护方向。

Result: 在标准持续学习基准、TRACE以及特定领域（编程-数学-医学）课程上，Muon-OGD在编码器-解码器和仅解码器架构上均优于顺序微调和竞争的正交梯度基线方法，同时保持计算可扩展性。

Conclusion: 谱范数感知的更新几何为LLM持续学习提供了实用有效的替代Frobenius范数投影的方法，改善了稳定性与可塑性之间的权衡。

Abstract: A central challenge in continual learning for large language models (LLMs) is catastrophic forgetting, where adapting to new tasks can substantially degrade performance on previously learned ones. Existing projection-based methods mitigate such interference by restricting parameter updates to subspaces that are orthogonal to directions associated with past tasks. However, these methods are typically formulated under Euclidean parameter geometry, with update magnitudes and projections governed by the Frobenius norm. The recent empirical success of the Muon optimizer, which applies orthogonalized matrix updates and admits a spectral-norm interpretation, suggests that Frobenius geometry may not be the most effective choice for matrix-valued LLM parameters. Motivated by this observation, we propose Muon-OGD, a spectral-norm-aware continual learning framework that integrates Muon-style operator-norm geometry with orthogonal projection constraints. Our method formulates each update as a spectral-norm-constrained optimization problem with linear non-interference constraints, and solves it efficiently through dual iterations and Newton--Schulz matrix-sign approximations. By applying orthogonalized momentum updates that avoid protected directions associated with prior tasks, Muon-OGD aims to improve the stability--plasticity trade-off in sequential LLM adaptation. We evaluate the proposed method on standard continual learning benchmarks, TRACE, and domain-specific Coding--Math--Medical curricula using both encoder--decoder and decoder-only architectures. Empirically, Muon-OGD consistently improves over sequential fine-tuning and competitive orthogonal-gradient baselines, while remaining computationally scalable. These results suggest that spectral-norm-aware update geometry provides a practical and effective alternative to Frobenius-norm projection for continual learning in LLMs.

</details>


### [590] [MolWorld: Molecule World Models for Actionable Molecular Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08954)
*Yang Qiao,Bo Pan,Hao-Wei Pang,Peter Zhiping Zhang,Liying Zhang,Liang Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MolWorld：一个分子世界模型引导的框架，通过扩展分子转移图进行可操作的分子优化，强调结构可达性而非仅预测高分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 药物发现中的分子优化通常只追求高预测评分，但实际应用中需要可操作的候选分子——能够通过有效的局部结构变换从已知分子到达，从而在化学系列中作为合理的修订。现有方法未明确建模这种可达性。

Method: 将可操作的分子优化定义为分子转移图的顺序扩展，其中节点为分子，边编码有效的局部变换。提出MolWorld框架，将当前分子转移图视为演化搜索状态，每轮迭代：选择局部锚点上下文、生成条件候选分子、评估性质、使用学习的世界模型更新演化分子世界（保留可接受候选并插入图中），扩展后的分子世界指导后续优化。

Result: 在性质优化和基于对接的任务上，MolWorld发现了高性质分子，同时保持显著更强的结构连通性，支持可操作和顺序的分子设计。

Conclusion: MolWorld通过显式建模分子间的可达性，实现了既高效又具实际合成可行性的分子优化，为药物发现中的可操作设计提供了新框架。

Abstract: Molecular optimization in drug discovery aims to discover molecules with improved target properties, but practical lead optimization often requires more than high predicted scores. A useful candidate should also be actionable: it should be reachable from known molecules through valid local structural transformations, so that it can be interpreted as a plausible revision within an evolving chemical series. Existing de novo and single-molecule optimization methods do not explicitly model such reachability, especially when both the target molecules and the intermediate molecules connecting them to known compounds are unknown. In this work, we formulate actionable molecular optimization as sequential expansion of a molecule-transfer graph, where nodes are molecules and edges encode valid local transformations. We propose MolWorld, a molecule world model-guided framework that treats the current molecule-transfer graph as an evolving search state. At each iteration, MolWorld selects local anchor contexts, generates candidate molecules conditioned on these contexts, evaluates their properties, and uses a learned world model to update the evolving molecule world by retaining admissible candidates and inserting them into the molecule-transfer graph. The expanded molecule world then guides subsequent optimization. Experiments on property optimization and docking-based tasks show that MolWorld discovers high-property molecules while maintaining substantially stronger structural connectivity, supporting actionable and sequential molecular design.

</details>


### [591] [Outlier detection for patient monitoring and alerting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08955)
*Miloš Hauskrecht,Iyad Batal,Michal Valko,Shyam Visweswaran,Gregory F. Cooper,Gilles Clermont*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于电子健康记录数据，开发异常患者管理决策检测方法，通过专家评估验证其有效性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 假设与历史患者管理决策显著不同的决策可能存在错误，值得生成警报进行提醒

Method: 使用4486名心脏术后患者的EHR数据，基于数据驱动方法检测异常决策，生成222个警报并由专家小组评估

Result: 真警报率在25%到66%之间，其中最强异常值对应的真警报率达到66%

Conclusion: 基于异常值检测的警报方法在多种患者管理操作中显示出有前景的真警报率，支持研究假设

Abstract: We develop and evaluate a data-driven approach for detecting unusual (anomalous) patient-management decisions using past patient cases stored in electronic health records (EHRs). Our hypothesis is that a patient-management decision that is unusual with respect to past patient care may be due to an error and that it is worthwhile to generate an alert if such a decision is encountered. We evaluate this hypothesis using data obtained from EHRs of 4486 post-cardiac surgical patients and a subset of 222 alerts generated from the data. We base the evaluation on the opinions of a panel of experts. The results of the study support our hypothesis that the outlier-based alerting can lead to promising true alert rates. We observed true alert rates that ranged from 25\% to 66\% for a variety of patient-management actions, with 66\% corresponding to the strongest outliers.

</details>


### [592] [Learning predictive models for combinations of heterogeneous proteomic data sources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08958)
*Michal Valko,Richard Pelikan,Miloš Hauskrecht*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究评估了两种蛋白质表达测量技术（全样本质谱分析和多重蛋白阵列）在胰腺癌研究中的个体和组合效用，发现传统分类模型在组合异构数据集时效果不佳，提出了一类模型融合方法以最大化组合效益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着测量人体蛋白质混合物表达水平的技术增多，需要评估这些技术生成数据的个体和组合效用，以更好地用于疾病检测和理解。

Method: 研究两种数据源：全样本质谱分析和多重蛋白阵列。在胰腺癌研究数据上学习和测试多种分类模型，分析个体和组合效用。针对异构数据集组合问题，提出并研究了一类模型融合方法。

Result: 研究发现，在单一数据集上表现良好的分类模型，在组合两个异构数据集时效果不佳。这表明需要专门的方法来处理这种异构数据组合问题。

Conclusion: 需要专门的模型融合方法来处理异构蛋白质表达数据集的组合问题，以充分利用不同技术的数据优势，提高疾病分类性能。

Abstract: Multiple technologies that measure expression levels of protein mixtures in the human body offer a potential for detection and understanding the disease. The recent increase of these technologies prompts researchers to evaluate the individual and combined utility of data generated by the technologies. In this work, we study two data sources to measure the expression of protein mixtures in the human body: whole-sample MS profiling and multiplexed protein arrays. We investigate the individual and combined utility of these technologies by learning and testing a variety of classification models on the data from a pancreatic cancer study. We show that for the combination of these two (heterogeneous) datasets, classification models that work well on one of them individually fail on the combination of the two datasets. We study and propose a class of model fusion methods that acknowledge the differences and try to reap most of the benefits from their combination.

</details>


### [593] [Trustworthy AI: Ensuring Reliability and Accountability from Models to Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08964)
*Carol Xuan Long*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一套基于信息论、优化和统计学习的算法，用于确保机器学习系统的可靠性和问责制，包括减少传统ML模型偏差、解决预测多重性、为生成式AI添加水印，以及评估自主LLM代理在多智能体环境中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器学习系统从预测模型发展到生成模型和自主代理，可信AI的格局发生了变化。需要开发理论上有保证的算法来确保ML系统的可靠性和问责制，包括缓解偏见、减少任意决策、确保内容来源以及评估自主环境中的LLM驱动代理。

Method: 1. 针对传统ML模型的偏见和任意性：引入基于核的方法实现跨复杂子群体的多准确性；开发方法解决预测多重性问题。2. 针对生成式AI的问责制：通过水印技术确保LLM的可追溯性，利用最优传输和编码理论推导最优水印策略。3. 针对自主LLM代理评估：构建首个完全由LLM驱动的供应链模拟器，评估LLM代理在多智能体环境中的表现。

Result: 1. 水印方法在语言生成和编码任务中实现了卓越的检测-质量权衡。2. LLM代理在供应链模拟中表现出显著性能优势，优于人类团队，成本降低高达67%，但同时也引入了系统性风险，包括代价高昂的尾部事件。

Conclusion: 该论文为机器学习系统的可靠性和问责制提供了理论基础和实用工具，涵盖从传统ML到生成式AI和自主代理的多个层面。研究既展示了LLM代理的显著优势，也揭示了其带来的系统性风险，为可信AI的发展提供了重要见解。

Abstract: In this thesis, we develop algorithms with theoretical guarantees for ensuring reliability and accountability of Machine Learning (ML) systems. As ML systems evolve from predictive models to generative models and autonomous agents, the landscape of trustworthy AI has shifted. This thesis introduces tools grounded in information theory, optimization, and statistical learning to mitigate bias, reduce arbitrary decisions, ensure content provenance, and evaluate LLM-driven agents in autonomous settings. Towards mitigating bias and arbitrariness in traditional ML models, we introduce a kernel-based method to achieve multiaccuracy across complex subpopulations that traditional demographic categories may overlook. We also develop methods to address predictive multiplicity, where equally accurate models yield conflicting individual predictions. We ensure the accountability in generative AI through watermarking large language models (LLMs). We characterize the information-theoretic trade-off between watermark detection and text distortion and derive optimal watermarking strategies by leveraging optimal transport and coding theory. Empirical evaluations show our watermarks achieve a superior detection-quality tradeoff across language generation and coding tasks. Finally, we evaluate autonomous LLM agents in multi-agent environments through the first simulator of a fully LLM-driven supply chain. LLM agents offer significant performance gains, outperforming human teams and reducing costs by up to 67%, but also introduce systemic risks, including costly tail events.

</details>


### [594] [VORT: Adaptive Power-Law Memory for NLP Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08966)
*Nabil Mlaiki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出VORT（变阶保持变换器），通过可学习的分数阶幂律保持核解决标准Transformer中远程依赖建模的指数衰减问题，使用SOE分解实现高效计算，并建立了理论保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Transformer对远程标记的影响施加了近指数衰减，这与自然语言中长程依赖的幂律结构相冲突，需要新的架构来更好地建模长程依赖关系。

Method: 引入VORT架构，每个标记分配可学习的分数阶α_i∈[δ,1]，使用Grünwald-Letnikov幂律保持核，通过SOE分解（高斯-拉格朗日求积法）近似计算，实现O(Sd_v)每步的马尔可夫递归。

Result: 建立了四个理论结果：SOE近似定理的几何收敛率、[δ,1]区间上的量化边界、L^2能量论证（α>1/2时误差下界）、梯度可塑性规则的线性收敛。合成实验验证了架构优势。

Conclusion: VORT通过分数阶幂律保持核有效解决了Transformer中长程依赖建模问题，提供了理论保证和高效实现，在合成任务中展示了优于标准Transformer的架构优势。

Abstract: Standard Transformers impose near-exponential decay on the influence of distant tokens, conflicting with the power-law structure of long-range dependencies in natural language. We introduce the \emph{Variable-Order Retention Transformer} (\VORT{}), a memory architecture in which each ingested token is assigned a learnable fractional order α_i\in[δ,1] that governs a Grünwald--Letnikov power-law retention kernel. Because the fractional weighted sum is non-Markovian, we approximate it through a sum-of-exponentials (SOE) decomposition computed by Gauss--Laguerre quadrature on a Laplace-type integral representation of the kernel weights. Each exponential component admits a one-step Markovian recurrence at O(Sd_v) per step, where S=O(\log(T/\varepsilon)) terms suffice for \varepsilon-uniform accuracy on horizon [1,T]. Retrieval is keyed and associative via a linear-attention accumulator with an exact O(KSd_φd_v) -per-step recurrence. Four results are established: (i) an SOE approximation theorem with geometric convergence rate from the analyticity of the integrand after a log-change of variables; (ii) a quantisation bound valid on [δ,1] with correct analysis near α=0; (iii) a direct L^2 energy argument (Proposition) showing that for α>1/2 any mixture with fixed minimum decay rate Λ>0 incurs L^2([1,T]) error at least N_α(T)-C(Λ)\to\infty, with the Λ-dependence made explicit; and (iv) linear convergence of a gradient plasticity rule under the Polyak--Łojasiewicz condition. Two synthetic experiments confirm the architectural advantage: a Zipf-distributed retrieval benchmark and an entity label-copy task with uniform lag distribution, the latter ruling out prior-matching as an explanation for the power-law kernel's advantage.

</details>


### [595] [Muon Does Not Converge on Convex Lipschitz Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08980)
*Tetiana Parshakova,Ahmed Khaled,Michael Crawshaw,Guillaume Garrigos,Robert M. Gower*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Muon及其变体在深度学习任务中表现出色，但现有收敛分析依赖光滑性假设。本文质疑凸Lipschitz函数类是否适合理解Muon，结论是否定的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑传统的凸Lipschitz函数模型是否适合理解Muon优化器的性能，因为现有收敛分析都依赖光滑性假设，而实践中Muon等优化器在凸Lipschitz函数类中应用广泛。

Method: 1. 理论分析Muon在凸Lipschitz函数类上的收敛性；2. 证明无论学习率调度如何选择，Muon都不收敛；3. 展示误差反馈可以恢复Muon及所有非欧几里得次梯度方法的收敛性；4. 在图像分类(CIFAR-10)和语言建模(nanoGPT)任务中验证误差反馈对Muon性能的影响。

Result: 1. Muon在凸Lipschitz函数类上不收敛；2. 误差反馈可以恢复收敛性，但在实际任务中会降低性能；3. 在CIFAR-10和FineWeb-Edu 10B数据集上的实验显示误差反馈会恶化Muon的表现。

Conclusion: 凸Lipschitz理论虽然在实际深度学习方法设计中有重要地位，但不适合用于理解Muon。Muon的成功可能来自该模型缺乏的结构特性，最可能与光滑性有关。

Abstract: Muon and its variants have shown strong empirical performance in a variety of deep learning tasks. Existing convergence analyses of Muon rely on smoothness assumptions, though arguably the most successful function class for developing deep learning methods (such as AdaGrad, Shampoo, Schedule-Free and more) has been the class of convex and Lipschitz functions. In this paper we question whether the classical convex Lipschitz model is a useful one for understanding Muon.
  Our answer is no. We show that Muon does not converge on the class of convex and Lipschitz functions, regardless of the choice of learning rate schedule. We also show that error feedback restores convergence of Muon and all the non-Euclidean subgradient methods with momentum. However, this theoretical fix using error feedback degrades the performance of Muon in
  two representative settings for image classification (CIFAR-10) and language modeling (nanoGPT on FineWeb-Edu 10B). Our conclusion is that convex Lipschitz theory, despite having a prominent role in the design of practical methods for deep learning, is not the most suited one for Muon. This suggests that Muon's success must come from structure absent from this model, most plausibly related to smoothness.

</details>


### [596] [PMCTS: Particle Monte Carlo Tree Search for Principled Parallelized Inference Time Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08982)
*Yaniv Oren,Viliam Vadocz,Joery A. de Vries,Wendelin Böhmer,Matthijs T. J. Spaan,Hendrik Baier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了Particle MCTS (PMCTS)，这是第一个适用于神经网络评估且能保持策略改进保证的原则性并行MCTS算法，在并行计算下扩展性良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCTS在现实应用中越来越受欢迎，但由于其搜索的顺序性和确定性，使用并行计算扩展运行时仍然是一个主要挑战。

Method: 引入Particle MCTS (PMCTS)，这是一种基于粒子的并行MCTS算法，能够适应神经网络评估并保持形式化的策略改进保证。

Result: PMCTS在并行计算下扩展性良好，在不同领域显著优于流行的启发式基线方法。

Conclusion: PMCTS是第一个具有原则性并行化能力且能保持策略改进保证的MCTS算法，为解决MCTS并行计算扩展问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a widely used approach for policy improvement through search with increasing popularity for real world applications. Due to the sequential and deterministic nature of its search, runtime-scaling of MCTS with parallel compute remains a major challenge. We introduce Particle MCTS (PMCTS), to our knowledge the first principled parallel MCTS algorithm which is suited for neural network evaluations and can preserve formal policy improvement guarantees. Empirically, PMCTS scales well with parallel compute and significantly outperforms the popular heuristic-based baselines across domains.

</details>


### [597] [Benchmarking Compositional Generalisation for Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08988)
*Amir Masoud Nourollah,Irtaza Khalid,Stefano Leoni,Steven Schockaert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个评估机器学习原子间势能模型组合泛化能力的基准测试，发现当前最先进模型在未见分子上的误差比分布内样本高一个数量级，即使预训练模型也难以解决组合泛化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器学习原子间势能模型虽然能高精度估计原子间力，但尚不清楚它们是否能真正泛化到未见分子。需要评估这些模型是学习了化学的组合结构（理解分子片段及其组合如何决定性质），还是仅仅在训练样本中进行插值。

Method: 提出了一个包含四个任务的基准测试，每个任务都要求某种形式的组合泛化。在任务中，模型在训练期间未见的分子上进行测试，但训练数据的选择使得学习到基础物理原理的模型应该能够泛化到测试样本。

Result: 实证分析表明，这些任务对当前最先进的模型极具挑战性。在分布外样本上的误差通常比分布内样本高一个数量级，即使使用在数百万分子上预训练的基础模型也是如此。

Conclusion: 机器学习原子间势能模型在组合泛化方面存在显著局限性，当前模型主要学习插值而非真正的化学组合结构。需要开发能够更好捕捉化学基础物理原理的模型。

Abstract: Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials play a fundamental role in computational chemistry and materials science, enabling applications from molecular dynamics simulations to drug design and materials discovery. While recent approaches can estimate inter-atomic forces with high precision, it remains unclear to what extent they can generalise to previously unseen molecules. Do they learn the compositional structure of chemistry, capturing how molecular fragments and their combinations determine properties, or do they primarily learn to interpolate patterns that are specific to the training examples? To address this question, we propose a benchmark consisting of four tasks that require some form of compositional generalisation. In each task, models are tested on molecules that were unseen during training, but the training data is chosen such that generalisation to the test examples should be feasible for models that learn the underlying physical principles. Our empirical analysis shows that the considered tasks are highly challenging for state-of-the-art models, with errors on out-of-distribution examples often an order of magnitude higher than on in-distribution examples, even when using foundation models that have been pre-trained on millions of molecules.

</details>


### [598] [When More Parameters Hurt: Foundation Model Priors Amplify Worst-Client Disparity Under Extreme Federated Heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08992)
*Kiran Naseer,Umar Shoaib*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基础模型在联邦学习极端异构环境下可能损害弱势客户性能，形成"FM公平性悖论"


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究社区普遍认为大规模预训练能提升联邦学习性能，但作者发现这种强大先验在极端异构环境下可能损害最弱势客户

Method: 通过联邦文本分类对照实验，比较TextCNN和DistilBERT+LoRA在不同异构程度下的最差客户准确率

Result: 极端标签倾斜时，大模型表现更差；中等异构时，大模型几乎消除差距。加权聚合方法无法解决该差异

Conclusion: 在医疗、教育等高风险联邦场景部署基础模型前，需要开发专门保护少数客户的机制

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is increasingly used to fine-tune foundation models (FMs) on distributed private data. The community largely assumes that large-scale pretraining serves as a 'rising tide that lifts all boats' in federated settings. However, our experiments reveal that these powerful priors can hinder rather than help the most disadvantaged clients under extreme heterogeneity. Through controlled experiments on federated text classification, we compare worst-client accuracy between TextCNN (2.7M parameters) and DistilBERT with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA, 66M parameters) across four Non-IID heterogeneity levels. Under extreme label skew (alpha = 0.1), DistilBERT+LoRA produces a worst-client accuracy gap of 50.1% -- 56% larger than TextCNN's 32.2% gap, despite having 25x more parameters and extensive pretraining. Under moderate heterogeneity (alpha >= 0.5), the pattern reverses: the FM nearly eliminates the gap. We call this the FM Fairness Paradox. We further show that an inverse-weighted LoRA aggregation method (FedAvgW) does not resolve the disparity, suggesting aggregation reweighting alone may be insufficient. Our results highlight the need for mechanisms that explicitly protect minority clients before deploying foundation models in high-stakes federated contexts such as healthcare and education.

</details>


### [599] [Machine Learning-Based Graph Simplification for Symbolic Accelerators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08996)
*Tiffany Yu,Rye Stahle-Smith,Darssan Eswaramoorthi,Rasha Karakchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AutoSlim是一个基于机器学习的框架，通过数据驱动方法对自动机图进行剪枝，用于硬件加速器优化，可减少FPGA资源使用达40%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于图的加速器在符号数据处理应用中广泛使用，但存在内存使用过多和冗余图结构导致的效率低下问题。

Method: 使用机器学习方法，从先前的图执行中提取特征，采用随机森林分类器识别并移除低影响的节点和边，包括验证步骤确保剪枝后的功能等价性。

Result: 在非确定性有限自动机覆盖架构(NAPOLY+)上应用时，AutoSlim减少FPGA资源使用达40%，同时提高了吞吐量和能效。

Conclusion: AutoSlim框架为硬件优化和安全领域提供了有前景的方向，通过数据驱动的图剪枝方法有效解决了加速器资源效率问题。

Abstract: Graph-based accelerators have been widely adopted in symbolic data processing applications such as genomics, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence. However, these systems often suffer from excessive memory usage and inefficiencies stemming from redundant graph structures. We present AutoSlim, a machine learning-based framework that leverages data-driven methods to prune automata graphs for hardware accelerators. Using features extracted from prior graph executions and a Random Forest classifier, AutoSlim identifies and removes low-impact nodes and edges. When applied to a Non-deterministic Finite Automata overlay architecture (NAPOLY+), AutoSlim reduces FPGA resource usage by up to 40%, with corresponding improvements in throughput and power efficiency. The framework includes a verification step to ensure functional equivalence after pruning and suggests promising directions for both hardware optimization and security.

</details>


### [600] [Non-Parametric Rehearsal Learning via Conditional Mean Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08999)
*Wen-Bo Du,Tian-Zuo Wang,Han-Jia Ye,Zhi-Hua Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出首个非参数化排练学习方法，用于避免不期望的未来结果，无需假设数据生成过程的特定函数形式，使用核方法处理非线性系统和非加性噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有排练学习方法依赖线性系统或加性噪声等限制性参数假设，限制了实际应用性。需要开发非参数化方法以处理更复杂的现实场景。

Method: 使用核方法将AUF目标重构为统一表示，分离期望性建模和行动引起的分布变化。采用平滑Probit代理处理期望性指标的不连续性，通过条件均值嵌入捕捉行动引起的变化，并开发基于核岭回归的嵌套估计器。

Result: 方法自然适应非线性系统和非加性噪声，在合成和半合成基准测试中证明了方法的有效性和灵活性，提供了近似误差界和一致性保证。

Conclusion: 提出的非参数化排练学习方法突破了现有方法的参数限制，为处理更复杂的避免不期望未来问题提供了有效且灵活的框架。

Abstract: In machine learning, a critical class of decision-related problems concerns preventing predicted undesirable outcomes, referred to as the \textit{avoiding undesired future} (AUF) problem. To address this, the \textit{rehearsal learning} framework has been proposed to model influence relations for effective decisions. However, existing rehearsal methods rely on restrictive parametric assumptions such as linear systems or additive noise, limiting their practical applicability. In this paper, we propose the first non-parametric rehearsal learning approach for AUF without assuming specific functional forms of data generation processes. Specifically, we use kernel machinery to reformulate the AUF objective into a unified representation that disentangles desirability modeling from action-induced distributional changes. To handle the discontinuity of desirability indicator, we present a smooth Probit surrogate and provide an approximation error bound. Meanwhile, we capture the action-induced changes via conditional mean embeddings, and develop a kernel ridge regression based nested estimator for AUF objective with consistency guarantees. Such a formulation naturally accommodates nonlinear systems and non-additive noise, and empirical results on synthetic and real-data-derived semi-synthetic benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of our approach.

</details>


### [601] [Relative Kinetic Utility for Reasoning-Aware Structural Pruning in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09008)
*Tianhao Qian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了Relative Kinetic Utility（RKU），一种基于交替梯度流的理论框架，通过轻量级曲率感知归一化来识别和保留CoT推理中的关键结构路径，解决了传统幅度剪枝在稀疏度40%时出现的推理崩溃问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Chain-of-Thought（CoT）提示显著提升了大型语言模型的推理能力，但生成的长序列导致严重的推理延迟和KV缓存内存瓶颈。现有的幅度剪枝方法过度关注离散交叉熵目标，陷入"幅度陷阱"——优先保留高频、低信息的语法标记，在稀疏度达到40%时导致推理能力崩溃。

Method: 提出Relative Kinetic Utility（RKU）框架，将离散剪枝提升为基于交替梯度流（AGF）的深度流形上的连续动力学积分。通过Fisher迹归一化进行修改，RKU作为轻量级曲率感知归一化方法，能够隔离"动力学尖峰"——负责高曲率逻辑路由的基本结构路径。

Result: 在Qwen-2.5-7B和LLaMA-3-8B模型上的实验表明，RKU在40%稀疏度的高稀疏度区域显著提升了性能。在GSM8K上达到13.34%的准确率，优于最强基线，并在分布外评估中更好地保留了推理相关表示。

Conclusion: RKU通过识别和保留CoT推理中的关键结构路径，有效克服了传统剪枝方法在高稀疏度下出现的推理崩溃问题，为缓解LLM推理延迟和内存瓶颈提供了硬件感知的解决方案。

Abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting symbolized a huge improvement of reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, scaling up test-time computation yields extensive CoT sequences, introducing severe inference latency and key-value (KV) cache memory bottlenecks. While structural pruning offers a fundamental, hardware-aware solution to alleviate static parameter burdens, existing magnitude-based methods may cut off the neurons of CoT: by over-indexing on discrete cross-entropy objectives, these heuristics fall into a \textit{magnitude trap}: they prioritize high-frequency, low-information syntactic tokens and trigger a disappointing reasoning collapse at high sparsities (e.g., 40\%). To overcome this topological phase transition, we propose \textsc{Relative Kinetic Utility} (RKU), a novel theoretical framework that elevates discrete pruning to a continuous kinetic integral over the depth manifold of the model based on Alternating Gradient Flow(AGF). By modifying it with Fisher trace normalization, RKU acts as a lightweight curvature-aware normalization to isolate \textit{kinetic spikes} -- the fundamental structural pathways responsible for high-curvature logical routing. Extensive experiments on Qwen-2.5-7B and LLaMA-3-8B improves performance in the high-sparsity regime around 40\%. RKU attains 13.34\% accuracy on GSM8K at 40\% sparsity, outperforming the strongest baseline, and appears to better preserve reasoning-relevant representations under out-of-distribution evaluation.

</details>


### [602] [Large Language Models for Sequential Decision-Making: Improving In-Context Learning via Supervised Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09009)
*Minmin Zhang,Sina Aghaei,Soroush Saghafian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了LLM在序列决策任务中的上下文学习能力，通过在MDPs、POMDPs和APOMDPs环境中对预训练LLM进行监督微调，使其能够从离线轨迹中学习策略，显著提升了决策性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然LLM在上下文学习方面表现出色，但在序列决策领域的潜力尚未充分探索。研究旨在探索LLM在MDPs、POMDPs和APOMDPs等序列决策环境中的上下文学习能力，利用离线数据赋予LLM决策能力，这在医疗等离线数据丰富的领域具有重要价值。

Method: 对预训练LLM进行监督微调，使其能够直接从离线、专家标注的轨迹中执行少样本决策。理论分析聚焦于线性MDPs，将微调的注意力层解释为从上下文数据中隐式估计最优Q函数，并推导出诱导策略的端到端次优性边界。

Result: 在合成MDP、POMDP和APOMDP环境中，微调后的LLM相比仅使用上下文学习和随机基线方法，获得了显著更小的最优性差距，特别是在长时程、部分可观测和模型模糊的环境中表现尤为突出。

Conclusion: 监督微调为预训练LLM提供了从离线数据中获得序列决策能力的有效途径，这在离线数据丰富的领域（如医疗）具有重要优势，证明了LLM在序列决策任务中的实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable in-context learning (ICL) capabilities, yet their potential for sequential decision-making remains underexplored. In this paper, we study the ICL capabilities of LLMs in sequential decision-making settings, including Markov Decision Processes (MDPs), Partially Observable MDPs (POMDPs), and Ambiguous POMDPs (APOMDPs). We fine-tune pretrained LLMs to perform few-shot decision-making directly from offline, oracle-labeled trajectories. Our framework enables flexible imitation of policies through supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Theoretically, we focus on linear MDPs and interpret a fine-tuned attention layer as implicitly estimating optimal Q-functions from in-context data. Building on this interpretation, we derive an end-to-end suboptimality bound for the induced policy that separates the in-context estimation error from the training-length bias. Empirically, across synthetic MDP, POMDP, and APOMDP settings, we find that fine-tuned LLMs achieve substantially smaller optimality gaps than in-context-only and random baselines, with especially large gains in longer-horizon, partially observed, and model-ambiguous environments. Together, these results show that supervised fine-tuning provides an effective route to endowing pretrained LLMs with sequential decision-making capabilities from offline data, which is an important advantage in domains such as healthcare where offline data are abundant.

</details>


### [603] [A Geometric Perspective on Next-Token Prediction in Large Language Models: Three Emerging Phases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09011)
*Gianfranco Lombardo,Giuseppe Trimigno,Stefano Cagnoni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究使用表示透镜作为几何诊断工具，分析大语言模型中预测信息在不同层的几何结构演化，识别出三个几何阶段：种子多路复用、提升覆盖和焦点收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是理解大语言模型中预测信息在层间的几何结构如何演化，而不是简单地关注每层的预测内容。通过几何诊断工具探究预测信息在残差流中的位置和演化轨迹。

Method: 使用表示透镜（学习到的仿射映射）作为几何诊断工具，在每层定义预测读出子空间（残差流的主导k维奇异子空间），在格拉斯曼流形上跟踪其轨迹，分析相似性剖面。在Qwen2.5和OLMo2两个家族的8个模型（1B-32B）上进行实验。

Result: 发现三个几何阶段：1）种子多路复用阶段：前馈记忆和注意力层以特定比例在叠加中播种候选集；2）提升覆盖阶段：更新覆盖现有子空间以集中候选分布而不扩展秩；3）焦点收敛阶段：高能量低秩更新将获胜者写入与解嵌入方向对齐的形式。阶段1和3随模型深度增长缓慢，阶段2线性扩展，更深LLM的额外容量主要被候选消歧吸收。

Conclusion: 大语言模型中的预测信息演化呈现清晰的几何阶段结构，更新近似正交于残差流，不同阶段通过有效秩的变化区分。模型深度增加主要扩展中间阶段的候选消歧能力，揭示了LLM内部信息处理的几何机制。

Abstract: We investigate the geometry of predictive information across the layers of large language models (LLMs). We repurpose representation lenses-learned affine maps trained to predict the next token from intermediate residual streams-as geometric diagnostic tools. Rather than asking what the model predicts at each layer, we ask where predictive information resides and how it evolves across depth. We define at each layer a predictive readout subspace as the dominant k-dimensional singular subspace of such a map on the d-dimensional residual stream (where k is a resolution parameter), and track its trajectory on the Grassmann manifold as a similarity profile across layers. The profile is well described by unimodal distributions exhibiting a rise, near-plateau, and descent; varying k from 1% to 50% of d traces a Pareto frontier between visibility and energy retention, yet the same structure emerges at all scales. Across eight models from two families (Qwen2.5 and OLMo2, 1B-32B), we identify three geometric phases. Updates are approximately orthogonal to the residual stream throughout; what distinguishes the phases is their effect on the effective rank, which expands, stabilizes, and concentrates. In the first, Seeding Multiplexing, feed-forward memories and attention layers seed a candidate set in superposition in family-specific proportions, with the final token rising as leading candidate from 20% to 35% of positions across this phase. In the second, Hoisting Overriding, updates override existing subspaces to concentrate the candidate distribution without expanding the rank. In the third, Focal Convergence, high-energy low-rank updates write the winner into a form aligned with the unembedding direction. Phases 1 and 3 grow slowly with model depth, while Phase 2 expands linearly. The additional capacity of deeper LLMs is largely absorbed by candidate disambiguation.

</details>


### [604] [Diagnosing and Mitigating Domain Shift in Permission-Based Android Malware Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09028)
*Md Rafid Islam*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于权限的Android恶意软件检测器存在严重的跨域泛化问题，不同数据集间性能差异显著，特征重要性不稳定，需要混合训练策略来提升实际部署效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于机器学习的Android恶意软件检测器在实际部署中经常因域偏移而失效，即在一个数据源上训练的模型在其他来源的应用上性能大幅下降。本研究旨在系统评估权限基检测器在跨域条件下的泛化能力和可解释性。

Method: 使用两个互补数据集（PerMalDroid和NATICUSdroid）和五种集成分类器，首先建立域内基线，然后量化跨域性能下降。通过可解释AI分析特征分布和重要性，并进行消融研究验证特征集对泛化的影响。最后提出并验证基于共同特征交集的混合训练策略。

Result: 域内检测准确率超过92%，但跨域存在严重不对称性能下降：PerMalDroid训练的模型在NATICUSdroid上达到86%准确率，但反向仅73%。特征分析显示双峰分布和不稳定的特征重要性，不同域依赖不同数据集特定的权限。混合训练策略成功恢复跨域性能，在PerMalDroid上达到88%准确率，在NATICUSdroid上保持97%。

Conclusion: 域特定伪影比特征缺失对泛化影响更大，特征重要性在跨域条件下高度不稳定。基于共同特征交集的混合训练策略能有效提升跨域性能，为实际部署权限基Android恶意软件检测器提供了实用路径。

Abstract: Machine learning-based Android malware detectors often fail in real-world deployment due to domain shift, where models trained on one data source perform poorly on applications from another. This paper presents a comprehensive study on the generalizability and interpretability of permission-based detectors under cross-domain conditions. Using two complementary datasets (PerMalDroid and NATICUSdroid) and five ensemble classifiers, we first establish an intra-domain baseline, where models achieve over 92% accuracy, and then quantify a severe asymmetric performance drop. While models trained on PerMalDroid generalize well to NATICUSdroid (86% accuracy), the reverse direction sees a drastic drop to 73% accuracy. Explainable AI analysis reveals bimodal feature distributions and shows that feature importance is highly unstable, with key permissions losing or gaining influence across domains. The predictive feature sets for different domains are fundamentally mismatched, as models rely on different, dataset-specific permissions. Most importantly, an ablation study demonstrates that for most models, training on a noisy feature set leads to poor generalization, confirming that domain-specific artifacts are a greater obstacle than missing features. To mitigate this, we validate a hybrid training strategy based on the intersection of common features and successfully recover cross-domain performance, achieving 88% accuracy on PerMalDroid and maintaining 97% on NATICUSdroid. These findings highlight the importance of explainable, cross-domain-robust malware detection systems and provide a practical pathway toward improving real-world deployment of permission-based Android malware detectors.

</details>


### [605] [Spherical Boltzmann machines: a solvable theory of learning and generation in energy-based models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09031)
*Thomas Tulinski,Simona Cocco,Rémi Monasson,Jorge Fernandez-De-Cossio-Diaz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过可解的球形玻尔兹曼机模型，在随机矩阵理论和动力学平均场理论框架下，揭示了能量基模型训练过程中的相变级联现象及其与生成特性的联系


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 能量基模型作为灵活生成架构，其学习和生成特性尚不明确，需要系统理论分析来理解训练动态和模型行为

Method: 使用球形玻尔兹曼机作为可解模型，结合随机矩阵理论和动力学平均场理论，求解训练动态方程、计算贝叶斯证据、分析相变级联现象

Result: 发现训练过程中和超参数变化时的相变级联，这些相变与耦合矩阵主模式与数据的对齐和凝聚相关；揭示了采样温度调节、正则化强度的双下降、调温后验效应等生成现象

Conclusion: 球形玻尔兹曼机的分析为理解能量基模型提供了理论框架，所发现的现象在标准生成架构中也普遍存在，为模型设计和优化提供了理论指导

Abstract: Energy-based models (EBMs) are flexible generative architectures inspired by statistical physics, but their learning and generative properties remain poorly understood. Here, we analyze a solvable EBM in the high-dimensional limit: the spherical Boltzmann machine (SBM). Combining tools from random matrix theory and dynamical mean-field theory, we: solve exact equations describing the training dynamics of the SBM; compute the Bayesian evidence, which acts as a partition function in parameter space and encodes global properties of the trained model; and uncover cascades of phase transitions that occur both during training and as a function of hyperparameters, related to successive alignment and condensation of the top modes of the coupling matrix to the data. We connect these transitions to sampling-time generative phenomena in a teacher-student scenario, including: sampling temperature tuning, double descent as a function of regularization strength, tempered posterior effects, and out-of-equilibrium effects during training that induce biases in the trained model. We provide numerical evidence demonstrating that all these phenomena appear in standard generative architectures, beyond the SBM.

</details>


### [606] [Accelerating Zeroth-Order Spectral Optimization with Partial Orthogonalization from Power Iteration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09034)
*Jiahe Chen,Ziye Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出ZO-MOPI方法，通过部分正交化和流式幂迭代加速大语言模型的零阶优化，在保持精度的同时提升1.5-4倍收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零阶优化方法通过低维子空间搜索减少方差，但未充分利用优化几何结构。Muon等谱优化器在隐层训练中表现优异，但在零阶设置中，由于梯度估计噪声大，完全正交化效果不佳。

Method: 提出部分正交化方法，用更快、更集中的幂迭代替代Muon中的牛顿-舒尔茨过程，仅放大主导谱方向。采用流式幂迭代变体，通过动量投影约束搜索子空间，降低梯度方差。

Result: 在OPT-13B模型上，相比当前SOTA算法ZO-Muon，在SuperGlue数据集上实现1.5-4倍收敛加速。在不同模型中，相比MeZO、LOZO、ZO-Muon等强基线，以更少时间达到竞争性最终精度。

Conclusion: ZO-MOPI通过部分正交化和流式幂迭代，有效解决了零阶优化中梯度估计噪声问题，在保持精度的同时显著提升收敛速度，适用于边缘设备上的大语言模型微调。

Abstract: Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization has become increasingly popular and important in fine-tuning large language models (LLMs), especially on edge devices due to its ability to adjust the model to local data without the need for memory-intensive back-propagation. Recent works try to reduce ZO variance through low-dimensional subspace search, but subspace restriction alone leaves key optimization geometry under-exploited, motivating additional acceleration. In this work, we focus on the hidden layer training problem in which spectral optimizers like Muon outperform AdamW due to its ability to exploit weak spectral directions by orthogonalization. However, we have discovered that unlike in the first-order setting, full orthogonalization works poorly in the ZO setting since the gradient estimates are highly noisy and unreliable. To address this issue, we propose a key approach we call partial orthogonalization. To do so, we replace the iconic Newton-Schulz procedure in Muon with the faster, more concentrated power-iteration method so that it only amplifies dominant spectral directions. Furthermore, to improve the efficiency and generalization of the algorithm, we adopted a streaming variant of power-iteration that requires low variance in gradients, which was achieved through constraining our search inside a subspace obtained through the projection of momentum, echoing recent advances. Experiments on LLM fine-tuning show that our method can achieve from 1.5x to 4x the convergence speed of ZO-Muon, the current SOTA algorithm, across SuperGlue datasets in the OPT-13B model. Across different models, we also reach competitive final accuracies with less time in most cases compared with strong ZO baselines such as MeZO, LOZO and ZO-Muon. Code is available at https://github.com/MOFA-LAB/ZO-MOPI.git.

</details>


### [607] [PACT: Peak-Aware Cross-Attention Graph Transformers for Efficient Storm-Surge Emulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09036)
*Zesheng Liu,Doyup Kwon,Ning Lin,Maryam Rahnemoonfar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PACT模型，这是一个基于交叉注意力的图Transformer，用于从大气强迫场高效预测站点级风暴潮，通过峰值感知学习策略更好地捕捉极端事件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统高保真流体动力学模型计算成本过高，无法满足大规模场景集合和快速评估需求，需要开发高效的风暴潮预测方法。

Method: PACT将每个强迫补丁表示为图，用GraphSAGE编码空间结构，使用学习的站点查询通过交叉注意力聚合节点信息。Transformer编码器建模时间依赖性，水平查询解码器生成多步预测。引入峰值感知学习策略，包括辅助峰值感知头和定制训练目标。

Result: 在美国东北海岸多个潮汐站上，PACT在RMSE和MAE上优于基线时空图神经网络。诊断显示在再分析和大多数CMIP6数据集上具有改进的峰值保真度和尾部保持能力。计算高效，训练后生成完整冬季季节轨迹仅需约3.5秒。

Conclusion: PACT是高效的风暴潮预测模型，在CMIP6家族内迁移良好，但从再分析迁移到气候模型强迫时性能显著下降，揭示了再分析-GCM差距。

Abstract: Accurate and efficient storm-surge emulation is essential for coastal hazard assessment, yet high-fidelity hydrodynamic models remain too expensive for large scenario ensembles and rapid evaluation under heterogeneous climate forcings. We present PACT, a peak-aware cross-attention graph transformer for efficient station-level storm-surge prediction from atmospheric forcing fields. PACT represents each forcing patch as a graph, encodes spatial structure with GraphSAGE, and uses a learned station query to aggregate node information through cross-attention rather than uniform pooling. A Transformer encoder models temporal dependence across the forcing history, and a horizon-query decoder generates lead-specific forecasts from a shared temporal memory. To better capture extreme events, we introduce a peak-aware learning strategy that couples a lightweight auxiliary peak-aware head with a tailored training objective, including a tail-focused loss on peak-dominated samples and a horizon-wise slope regularizer to encourage coherent multi-step evolution. Across multiple tide-gauge stations along the US Northeast coast, PACT outperforms a strong spatio-temporal graph neural network baseline in both RMSE and MAE. Diagnostics show improved peak fidelity and tail preservation for reanalysis and most CMIP6 datasets. PACT is also computationally efficient, requiring about 3.5~s to generate a full winter-season surge trajectory for one year after training. Under distribution shift across five CMIP6 forcings, PACT transfers well within the CMIP6 family but degrades markedly when transferring from reanalysis to climate-model forcings, highlighting a persistent reanalysis--GCM gap.

</details>


### [608] [Predicting Plasticity in Deep Continual Learning: A Theoretical Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09044)
*Jiuqi Wang,Jayanth Srinivasa,Claire Chen,Shuze Daniel Liu,Ali Payani,Shangtong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文质疑现有可塑性诊断指标的有效性，提出新的"优化准备度"指标，证明其能更好预测神经网络在持续学习中的可训练性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度持续学习中神经网络会失去适应新任务的能力（可塑性损失）。现有可塑性诊断指标（如表示秩、神经正切核秩）的有效性受到质疑，需要更可靠的指标来预测网络的未来优化增益。

Method: 首先通过理论反例证明现有诊断指标的局限性，然后提出新的"优化准备度"指标，该指标结合梯度强度和梯度可靠性，并证明其在标准平滑假设下能够下界一步优化增益。

Result: 在Slowly-Changing Regression和Permuted MNIST等常用深度持续学习设置中，优化准备度比现有诊断指标更可靠地按可训练性排序检查点，即使使用更少的样本。

Conclusion: 优化准备度是一个理论上有保证、实践中有效的可塑性预测指标，能更好地评估神经网络在持续学习中的未来优化能力。

Abstract: Deep continual learning requires models to adapt to new tasks without retraining from scratch. However, neural networks can lose their ability to adapt to new tasks after training on previous ones, a phenomenon known as loss of plasticity. There have been several explanations and diagnostics proposed for plasticity loss. Motivated by the philosophy that "all models are wrong, but some are useful", we ask: can existing diagnostics predict a neural network's plasticity? In this work, we take a practical view to interpret plasticity as trainability, i.e., a neural network's future optimization gain on a target task. We first take a theoretical approach, showing, by constructing a few counterexamples, that some widely adopted diagnostics of plasticity, including representation rank and neural tangent kernel rank, can fail to predict the loss of trainability in both regression and classification settings. We instead propose a novel metric, called optimization readiness, which combines gradient strength and gradient reliability. We prove that optimization readiness lower bounds one-step optimization gain under standard smoothness assumptions, providing a theoretical guarantee for its predictive power. Empirically, we show that across commonly used deep continual learning settings, such as Slowly-Changing Regression and Permuted MNIST, optimization readiness more reliably ranks checkpoints by trainability than prior diagnostics, even with substantially fewer samples.

</details>


### [609] [FactoryNet: A Large-Scale Dataset toward Industrial Time-Series Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09081)
*Karim Othman,Jonas Petersen,Matei Ignuta-Ciuncanu,Riccardo Maggioni,Camilla Mazzoleni,Federico Martelli,Philipp Petersen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了首个工业时间序列通用预训练语料库FactoryNet，包含5100万个数据点，涵盖6种设备形态的2.3万个端到端任务执行，采用统一的S-E-F-C模式实现跨设备零样本迁移和高效异常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业时间序列数据缺乏统一的预训练语料库，现有方法难以实现跨设备形态的零样本迁移和参数高效的异常检测，阻碍了工业基础模型的发展。

Method: 提出FactoryNet语料库，包含5100万个数据点（1.33万真实、0.98万合成），采用新颖的S-E-F-C（设定点-努力-反馈-上下文）模式统一表示各种驱动系统，涵盖27种标注异常类型和健康基线。

Result: 跨设备迁移实验显示模型在评估的源-目标对上具有公平的迁移能力；仅使用24个模式对齐信号就能实现与高维基线相当的异常检测性能。

Conclusion: FactoryNet作为不断增长的多设备形态数据集，为工业基础模型的发展提供了重要资源，统一的S-E-F-C模式有效支持跨设备零样本迁移和参数高效异常检测。

Abstract: We introduce the first universal pretraining corpus for industrial time-series data: FactoryNet. 51M datapoints across 23k end-to-end task executions (13.3k real, 9.8k synthetic) on six embodiments, unified by a shared schema that enables robust zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer and highly parameter-efficient anomaly detection. We introduce a novel schema: Setpoint, Effort, Feedback, Context (S-E-F-C) underlying the whole pipeline that maps any actuated system into a common representational frame. The corpus spans 27 annotated anomaly types alongside healthy baselines and counterfactual pairs across robotic manipulation and machining domains. Cross-embodiment transfer experiments yield positive results: under bias-aware metrics our model demonstrates fair cross-embodiment transfer capabilities on the evaluated source-target pair, while 24 schema-aligned signals achieves competitive anomaly detection performance compared to high-dimensional baselines. We release FactoryNet as a growing, multi-embodiment dataset to drive progress toward industrial foundation models.

</details>


### [610] [A Tale of Two Problems: Multi-Task Bilevel Learning Meets Equality Constrained Multi-Objective Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09094)
*Zhiyao Zhang,Myeung Suk Oh,Zhen Qin,Jiaxiang Li,Xin Zhang,Jia Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文首次将双层优化扩展到多任务设置，并放宽了下层强凸性假设，提出了一种新的加权切比雪夫惩罚算法，在有限时间内收敛到KKT帕累托平稳点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双层优化研究大多局限于单任务设置，且依赖于下层强凸性假设，这限制了其在现代复杂机器学习问题中的应用。需要将双层优化扩展到多任务设置并放宽假设条件。

Method: 将具有下层一般凸性的多任务双层学习问题重新表述为等式约束多目标优化问题，提出新的KKT帕累托平稳性收敛准则，并设计了加权切比雪夫惩罚算法。

Result: 提出的WC-penalty算法在确定性和随机设置下均能以$O(ST^{-\frac{1}{2}})$的有限时间收敛率达到KKT帕累托平稳性，其中S为目标数量，T为总迭代次数。

Conclusion: 该研究成功将双层优化扩展到多任务设置，建立了多任务双层学习与等式约束多目标优化之间的理论联系，为复杂机器学习问题提供了新的优化框架。

Abstract: In recent years, bilevel optimization (BLO) has attracted significant attention for its broad applications in machine learning. However, most existing works on BLO remain confined to the single-task setting and rely on the lower-level strong convexity assumption, which significantly restricts their applicability to modern machine learning problems of growing complexity. In this paper, we make the first attempt to extend BLO to the multi-task setting under a relaxed lower-level general convexity (LLGC) assumption. To this end, we reformulate the multi-task bilevel learning (MTBL) problem with LLGC into an equality constrained multi-objective optimization (ECMO) problem. However, ECMO itself is a new problem that has not yet been studied in the literature. To address this gap, we first establish a new Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT)-based Pareto stationarity as the convergence criterion for ECMO algorithm design. Based on this foundation, we propose a weighted Chebyshev (WC)-penalty algorithm that achieves a finite-time convergence rate of $O(ST^{-\frac{1}{2})$ to KKT-based Pareto stationarity in both deterministic and stochastic settings, where $S$ denotes the number of objectives, and $T$ is the total iterations. Moreover, by varying the preference vector over the $S$-dimensional simplex, our WC-penalty method systematically explores the Pareto front. Finally, solutions to the ECMO problem translate directly into solutions for the original MTBL problem, thereby closing the loop between these two foundational optimization frameworks.

</details>


### [611] [Bridging Spectral Operator Learning and U-Net Hierarchies: SpectraNet for Stable Autoregressive PDE Surrogates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09096)
*Enrique Hernández Noguera,Md Meftahul Ferdaus,Elias Ioup,Mahdi Abdelguerfi,Julian Simeonov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SpectraNet是一种结合谱卷积和U-Net层次结构的自回归神经算子，通过残差目标谱块和半群一致性损失，在时间依赖PDE求解中实现了更好的稳定性和准确性，同时保持轻量级参数和高效计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子在处理时间依赖PDE时存在结构冲突：谱架构（如FNO）因一步Lipschitz常数导致指数级误差增长，而分层U-Net算子则牺牲了分辨率不变性以获取多尺度细节。需要一种能兼顾稳定性和精度的新架构。

Method: 提出SpectraNet，将截断谱卷积组合到U-Net层次结构中，使用残差目标谱块和半群一致性损失训练。残差目标参数化避免了稳定性爆炸，改为线性漂移，谱路径参数数量与网格大小无关。

Result: 在Navier-Stokes nu=1e-5 64x64测试中达到相对L2误差0.0822，参数2.04M，比FNO少2.33倍且误差低20%。在跨PDE比较中赢得5/6任务。在128^2分辨率下提升至0.0724，而FNO退化至0.3080。自由推演在T=100时保持稳定，CPU运行时间低于200ms。

Conclusion: SpectraNet在轻量级（≤5M参数，<200ms CPU）Pareto前沿上表现优异，平衡了稳定性、精度和计算效率，为时间依赖PDE求解提供了有效的神经算子解决方案。

Abstract: Neural operators for time-dependent PDEs face a structural tension: spectral architectures (FNO and descendants) inherit exponential rollout-error growth from their one-step Lipschitz constant, while hierarchical U-Net operators trade resolution invariance for multi-scale detail. We introduce SpectraNet, an autoregressive neural operator that composes truncated spectral convolutions inside a U-Net hierarchy with a Residual-Target Spectral Block trained under a Semigroup-Consistency Loss. The residual-target parametrization replaces L^T stability blow-up with linear T*delta drift, and the spectral path's parameter count is Theta(L w^2 M^2), independent of grid N. Under a single unified protocol against 16 published neural-operator baselines on Navier-Stokes nu=1e-5 at 64x64, SpectraNet reaches test relative L2 = 0.0822 at 2.04M parameters -- 2.33x fewer than canonical FNO at ~20% lower error -- and wins five of six rows in a cross-PDE comparison against FNO (NS at nu in {1e-4, 1e-3}, PDEBench Shallow-Water 2D and Diffusion-Reaction, with the Active-Matter row going to FNO inside its seed spread). Trained from scratch at native 128^2 under the same protocol, SpectraNet improves to 0.0724 while FNO regresses to 0.3080. Free rollout stays bounded for T=100 where FNO diverges across all 200 test trajectories. On consumer CPU at B=1, SpectraNet runs sub-200ms while the full-attention Transformer that wins raw L2 pays ~60x latency; we do not claim to beat that Transformer on raw L2, only to dominate the lightweight (<=5M parameter, sub-200ms CPU) Pareto frontier. Source code: https://github.com/Enrikkk/spectranet

</details>


### [612] [Contextual Plackett-Luce: An Efficient Neural Model for Probabilistic Sequence Selection under Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09112)
*Noam Mizrachi,Nadav Har-Tuv,Shai Shalev-Shwartz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL)模型，结合并行评分和顺序选择，解决结构化预测中的多模态输出问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构化预测任务中，输入往往对应多个有效输出，但监督信号只提供单个样本，导致多模态目标分布与训练信号不匹配

Method: 扩展经典Plackett-Luce模型，采用Ising风格参数化（一元和成对交互项），先并行构建概率选择模型参数，再进行轻量级自回归选择过程

Result: 在多模态路径预测和代表性子集选择任务中，CPL相比强并行基线在结构一致性和模糊监督下的鲁棒性方面表现更好

Conclusion: CPL通过解耦并行评分和顺序选择，在保持表达力的同时实现高效计算，有效处理结构化选择中的多模态不确定性

Abstract: Selecting a coherent sequence or subset of elements is a fundamental problem in structured prediction, arising in tasks such as detection, trajectory forecasting, and representative subset selection. In many such settings, the target is inherently ambiguous: each input admits multiple valid outputs, while supervision provides only a single sampled instance. This induces a mismatch between the underlying multi-modal target distribution and the observed training signal. We propose Contextual Plackett-Luce (CPL), a structured probabilistic model for sequence selection that extends the classical Plackett-Luce model to a context-dependent setting following an Ising-style parameterization with unary and pairwise interaction terms. CPL can be viewed as a hybrid between fully autoregressive prediction and parallel sequence selection: autoregressive models effectively capture uncertainty but are computationally expensive on modern parallel hardware such as GPUs, while parallel methods are efficient but struggle to represent multi-modal dependencies. CPL combines the strengths of both by constructing the parameters of a probabilistic selection model in a fully parallel manner, followed by a lightweight autoregressive selection process in which each step applies incremental updates to contextual logits. This decoupling of parallel scoring and sequential selection enables efficient computation without sacrificing expressivity. We evaluate CPL on two structured selection tasks: multi-modal path prediction and representative subset selection. CPL achieves improved structural consistency and robustness under ambiguous supervision compared to strong parallel baselines.

</details>


### [613] [Personalized Alignment Revisited: The Necessity and Sufficiency of User Diversity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09119)
*Enoch Hyunwook Kang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Error


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Error

Method: Error

Result: Error

Conclusion: Error

Abstract: Personalized alignment aims to adapt large language models to heterogeneous user preferences, yet the precise theoretical conditions for its statistical efficiency have not been formally established. This paper characterizes the conditions under which personalized alignment achieves O(1) online regret and log(1/epsilon) offline sample complexity. We show that these optimal rates depend on a specific user-diversity condition: the population of user-specific heads must span the latent reward directions that can alter the optimal response. We prove that this condition is both necessary and sufficient. When it holds, simple greedy algorithms achieve benchmark efficiency; when it fails, every learner in a natural admissible class incurs at least logarithmic regret. Our results identify user diversity as the fundamental driver of personalized identifiability.

</details>


### [614] [A Communication-Theoretic Framework for LLM Agents: Cost-Aware Adaptive Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09121)
*Hamed Omidvar,Vahideh Akhlaghi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文将LLM在温度T下的采样视为离散随机信道，基于通信理论建立了一个统一框架来分析各种可靠性技术，并提出了一个成本感知的路由器来优化质量-成本权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的智能体使用的各种可靠性技术（如重试、多数投票、自一致性）是并行发展的，缺乏统一的分析框架。论文旨在建立一个基于通信理论的共同框架来整合这些技术。

Method: 将LLM在温度T下的采样建模为香农编码理论中的离散随机信道，将现有可靠性技术映射到六种经典可靠性算子。提出了一个成本感知的语义最近邻路由器，通过单一拉格朗日旋钮在质量-成本前沿上进行优化。

Result: 在6个信道配置和69个困难任务上的实验表明，没有固定的模型-技术-预算选择占主导地位。在300个MMLU、GSM8K和HumanEval的困难任务上，路由器占据了完整的经验帕累托前沿：在相同质量下，归一化成本降低约56%；在相同成本下，质量提升约7%（相对于单次解码提升26%）。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明，应该将这些可靠性技术整合到一个基于信道编码的可调层中，通过每任务分配来优化质量-成本权衡。

Abstract: Agents built on large language models (LLMs) rely on a range of reliability techniques, including retry, majority voting, and self-consistency, that have been developed in parallel rather than within a common analytical framework. We observe that an LLM sampled at temperature $T$ is a discrete stochastic channel $p(y \mid x)$ in the sense of Shannon's coding theory, and use this identity as the entry point for such a framework grounded in communication theory. Each of these techniques is a special case of one of six classical reliability operators: diversity combining, hybrid retransmission, iterative generator-critic decoding, rateless sampling, structured redundant verification, and difficulty-adaptive routing. Within the framework we give two closed-form results: a noise-variance threshold above which uniform averaging beats quality-weighted averaging, and a contractivity criterion for generator-critic refinement, consistent with a contractive-to-divergent transition we observe between 3B- and 14B-parameter models. We further introduce a cost-aware semantic-nearest-neighbor router whose single Lagrangian knob traverses the quality-cost frontier without retraining. Across six channel configurations spanning local and cloud models on 69 hard tasks, no fixed model-technique-budget choice dominates, motivating per-task allocation. On a 300-item hard split of MMLU, GSM8K, and HumanEval, our router occupies the full empirical Pareto frontier: at matched quality, its normalized cost is ${\approx}56$\% lower than the strongest fixed technique; at matched normalized cost, it improves quality by ${\approx}7$\% ($26$\% over single-shot decoding). These results argue for consolidating these reliability techniques into a single tunable layer informed by channel coding.

</details>


### [615] [Cosine-Gated Adam-Decay: Drop-In Staleness-Aware Outer Optimization for Decoupled DiLoCo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09126)
*Vatsal Shah,Jiahao Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了CGAD（Cosine Gated Adam Decay），一种简单、即插即用的、年龄感知的外层优化器，用于异步分布式低通信系统，通过指数衰减和余弦门控机制处理延迟梯度，在Llama风格语言模型预训练中表现稳定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 异步分布式低通信（DiLoCo）系统可能接收多个外层轮次前计算的伪梯度，但标准的Nesterov外层优化器没有明确根据更新年龄调整更新，这使得外层动量缓冲在大控制延迟下变得脆弱。需要一种年龄感知的优化器来稳定异步训练。

Method: 提出CGAD，在伪梯度进入Adam的第一和第二动量缓冲之前，用$σ(τ) = γ(τ) e^{-ατ}$进行缩放：指数项模拟信息衰减，余弦门$γ(τ)$平滑地将超过选定截止点的贡献归零。CGAD在$τ=0$时退化为普通Adam，添加两个可跨尺度转移的默认超参数，并通过每片段年龄感知变体（PA-CGAD）扩展到部分同步调度器。

Result: 理论证明：对于平滑非凸目标上的理想化门控自适应更新，获得了非渐进收敛界，其陈旧性偏差项仅依赖于$α$，而不是实际最大延迟$τ_{\max}$；而异步动量SGD的标准分析带有$τ_{\max}^2$因子。实证：在25M、1B和7B参数的Llama风格语言模型预训练中，CGAD在控制延迟下稳定训练。余弦截止作为尺度保险：最接近的基线Adam Decay在25M时具有竞争力，但其在$τ=8$时的种子间标准差从25M到7B增长了27倍，使其单次风险超过机会水平损失，而CGAD的仍远低于该水平。

Conclusion: CGAD是一种有效的年龄感知外层优化器，能够稳定异步分布式训练，特别是在大规模模型上，通过指数衰减和余弦门控机制处理延迟梯度，优于标准Nesterov方法和无截止的Adam Decay。

Abstract: Asynchronous DiLoCo systems may receive pseudo-gradients computed several outer rounds earlier, yet the standard Nesterov outer optimizer does not explicitly condition its update on per-update age. This can make the outer momentum buffer brittle under large controlled delays. We propose Cosine Gated Adam Decay (CGAD), a simple, drop-in, age-aware outer optimizer that scales each incoming pseudo-gradient by $σ(τ) = γ(τ) e^{-ατ}$ before it enters Adam's first- and second-moment buffers; the exponential models information decay and the cosine gate $γ(τ)$ smoothly zeroes contributions past a chosen cutoff. CGAD reduces to plain Adam at $τ=0$, adds two hyperparameters whose defaults transfer across scales, and extends to partial-sync schedulers via a per-fragment age-aware variant (PA-CGAD). For an idealized gated-adaptive update on smooth non convex objectives, we prove a non-asymptotic convergence bound whose staleness-bias term depends on $α$ alone, rather than on the realized maximum delay $τ_{\max}$; standard analyses of asynchronous momentum-SGD instead carry a $τ_{\max}^2$ factor. Empirically, on Llama style language model pretraining at 25M, 1B, and 7B parameters, CGAD trains stably across the controlled delays we sweep. The cosine cutoff acts as scale insurance: the closest baseline, Adam Decay (CGAD without the cutoff), is competitive at 25M but its seed-to-seed $σ$ at $τ=8$ grows 27x from 25M to 7B, pushing its single-shot risk (mean + $σ$) above the chance-level loss while CGAD's stays well below. The published Nesterov recipe is the least stable method on the full sweep.

</details>


### [616] [Evaluating Federated Learning approaches for mammography under breast density heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09137)
*Gonzalo Iñaki Quintana,Franco Martin Di Maria,Laurence Vancamberg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究评估了乳腺密度异质性对联邦学习在乳腺X线摄影图像分类中的影响，发现FedAvg等FL方法在强异质性设置下表现与集中训练相当，支持FL在真实临床工作流中的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 乳腺密度是影响乳腺X线摄影解读的关键因素，也是多中心数据集异质性的主要来源。这种异质性给跨机构协作机器学习（特别是联邦学习）带来了挑战。本研究旨在评估乳腺密度引起的异质性对FL在乳腺X线摄影图像分类中的影响，并评估常见FL算法在真实临床环境中的鲁棒性。

Method: 研究在两个场景下进行实验：1）强异质性设置，每个参与站点仅贡献低密度或高密度病例（基于BI-RADS密度评分）；2）基于人群的设置，模拟白人和亚洲人群的乳腺密度分布。在强异质性设置中评估两种配置：2客户端（病例分为BI-RADS A-B和C-D）和4客户端（每个站点仅包含单一BI-RADS密度病例）。比较三种FL方法（FedAvg、FedProx、SCAFFOLD）与集中训练、本地训练和朴素聚合方法（包括集成和权重平均）。

Result: 在所有场景中，FL实现了与集中训练相当的性能，而本地模型和朴素聚合方法在强异质性存在时表现不佳。值得注意的是，FedAvg实现了与集中训练相当或超越的准确率，展示了其对乳腺密度引起的数据不平衡的韧性，无需专门的异质性缓解算法。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明FL能够解决乳腺密度相关的异质性问题，支持其在真实世界乳腺X线摄影工作流中的可行性。FedAvg的鲁棒性突显了FL广泛临床部署的潜力，能够在保持数据隐私的同时实现协作模型开发。

Abstract: Breast density is a key factor that influences mammography interpretation and is a major source of heterogeneity in multicenter datasets. Such heterogeneity poses challenges for collaborative machine learning across institutions, particularly in Federated Learning. This study aims to evaluate the impact of breast density-induced heterogeneity on FL for mammography image classification and to assess the robustness of common FL algorithms in realistic clinical settings. We conducted experiments under two scenarios: (1) a strongly heterogeneous setting where each participating site contributed exclusively low- or high-density cases, based on the BI-RADS density score, and (2) a population-based setting simulating breast density distributions in White and Asian populations. For the strongly heterogeneous setting, we evaluated two configurations: one with 2 clients, where the cases were grouped as BI-RADS A-B and C-D, and one with 4 clients, where each site contained cases of a single BI-RADS density. We compared three FL methods (FedAvg, FedProx, SCAFFOLD) against centralized training, local-only training, and naive aggregation approaches, including ensembling and weight averaging. Across both scenarios, FL achieved performance comparable to centralized training, while local models and naive aggregation approaches underperformed in the presence of strong heterogeneity. Notably, FedAvg achieved accuracy on par with or exceeding centralized training, demonstrating resilience to breast density-induced data imbalance without requiring specialized heterogeneity mitigation algorithms. These findings show that FL can address breast density-related heterogeneity, supporting its feasibility for real-world mammography workflows. The demonstrated robustness of FedAvg underscores the potential for broad clinical deployment of FL, enabling collaborative model development while maintaining data privacy.

</details>


### [617] [FedVSSAM: Mitigating Flatness Incompatibility in Sharpness-Aware Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09144)
*Bingnan Xiao,Yuan Gao,Bingcong Li,Wei Ni,Xin Wang,Tony Q. S. Quek*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FedVSSAM 提出一种方差抑制的锐度感知优化方法，解决联邦学习中数据异构导致的平坦性不兼容问题，提升全局模型泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在数据异构的联邦学习中，传统的SAM方法会导致局部平坦区域与全局目标偏好的平坦区域不兼容，这种平坦性不兼容问题限制了全局模型的训练和泛化改进。

Method: 提出FedVSSAM，构建方差抑制的调整方向，在局部平坦性搜索、局部下降和全局更新中一致使用该方向，将扰动和更新方向锚定到更稳定的全局方向。

Result: 建立了FedVSSAM的非凸收敛保证，证明调整方向与全局梯度的均方偏差得到有效控制。实验表明FedVSSAM能缓解平坦性不兼容，在多种FL设置中优于基线方法。

Conclusion: FedVSSAM通过方差抑制的锐度感知优化有效解决联邦学习中的平坦性不兼容问题，提升全局模型的泛化性能。

Abstract: Sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) is an effective method for improving the generalization of federated learning (FL) by steering local training toward flat minima. Under data heterogeneity, however, device-side SAM searches for locally flat basins that are incompatible with the flat region preferred by the global objective. We identify this structural failure mode as flatness incompatibility, which explains why improving local flatness alone may provide limited training and generalization improvement for the global model. We reveal that flatness incompatibility arises from data heterogeneity and the friendly adversary phenomenon, and is further amplified by local updates and partial device participation. To mitigate this issue, we propose Federated Learning with variance-suppressed sharpness-aware minimization (FedVSSAM), which constructs a variance-suppressed adjusted direction and uses it consistently in local flatness search, local descent, and global update. FedVSSAM anchors both perturbation and update directions to a more stable global direction, instead of correcting only an isolated local perturbation. We establish non-convex convergence guarantees of FedVSSAM and prove that the mean-square deviation between the adjusted direction and the global gradient is effectively controlled. Experiments demonstrate that FedVSSAM mitigates flatness incompatibility and outperforms the baselines across diverse FL settings.

</details>


### [618] [AlphaExploitem: Going Beyond the Nash Equilibrium in Poker by Learning to Exploit Suboptimal Play](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09150)
*Vlad Murgoci,Matthijs Spaan,Yaniv Oren*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AlphaExploitem是一个基于AlphaHoldem的强化学习扑克智能体，它通过分层Transformer编码器和多样化对手池训练，能够有效利用对手的次优策略，同时在面对纳什均衡对手时保持性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在扑克等不完全信息博弈中，纳什均衡策略通常过于保守。为了最大化效用，智能体需要能够识别并利用对手的次优策略，而不仅仅是遵循纳什均衡。

Method: 1. 基于AlphaHoldem竞争性RL扑克智能体进行扩展
2. 引入分层Transformer编码器，能够对先前玩过的牌局进行推理
3. 修改训练过程，包含多样化的可被利用对手池
4. 在两种标准不完全信息博弈基准上进行训练和评估

Result: 1. AlphaExploitem成功利用分布内外对手的弱策略
2. 在利用次优对手的同时，不会损失对纳什均衡对手的性能
3. 实现了超越纳什均衡的效用最大化

Conclusion: AlphaExploitem展示了在不完全信息博弈中有效利用对手次优策略的能力，通过分层Transformer架构和多样化对手训练，实现了超越纳什均衡的博弈性能。

Abstract: Poker is an imperfect information game that has served as a long-standing benchmark for decision-making under uncertainty. To maximize utility beyond the Nash equilibrium, an agent can deviate from Nash-equilibrium policies to exploit suboptimal play. We introduce AlphaExploitem, which extends the competitive RL poker agent AlphaHoldem by using a hierarchical transformer encoder that enables reasoning over previously played hands and modifying the training procedure with the inclusion of a diverse pool of exploitable opponents to facilitate learning to exploit. We train and evaluate AlphaExploitem on two standard benchmarks for imperfect-information games. Empirically, AlphaExploitem successfully exploits weak play by both in- and out-of-distribution opponents, without losing performance against NE opponents.

</details>


### [619] [Predicting Large Model Test Losses with a Noisy Quadratic System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09154)
*Chuning Li,Chris J. Maddison*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个预测模型，能够根据模型大小(N)、批次大小(B)和权重更新次数(K)来估计大模型的预训练损失，这是首个能处理变化批次大小的损失预测模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于启发式法则的模型配置优化方法越来越复杂，需要一种更精确的损失预测模型来替代，特别是在处理变化批次大小和资源约束条件下找到最优的N、B、K配置。

Method: 开发了一个预测模型，使用模型大小(N)、批次大小(B)和权重更新次数(K)作为输入来预测预训练损失，该模型能够处理变化的批次大小。

Result: 该模型在预测外推计算预算（高达1000倍）下的损失方面优于Chinchilla的损失模型；在实验中发现模型选择的配置接近真实最优配置。

Conclusion: 损失预测模型比基于启发式法则的方法更优，能够在明确的时间、内存和计算资源约束下找到接近最优的N、B、K配置。

Abstract: We introduce a predictive model that estimates the pre-training loss of large models from model size (N), batch size (B) and number of weight updates (K). This is the first loss prediction model that can handle changing batch size. The model outperforms Chinchilla's loss model, a model of the test loss using the batch size and number of tokens, in terms of projecting the loss at extrapolated compute budgets (up to 1000 folds). A natural use of the model is to find optimal N, B, K configurations under explicit and compound resource constraints like time, memory and compute. In our experiments, the model-selected configurations are close to ground-truth optimal. Our work advocates for loss prediction as a better alternative to heuristic-based laws, which are growing in complexity. The implementation is available on https://github.com/chuningxdy/Noisy-Quadratic-System.

</details>


### [620] [Revisiting Mixture Policies in Entropy-Regularized Actor-Critic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09157)
*Jiamin He,Samuel Neumann,Jincheng Mei,Adam White,Martha White*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于混合策略的边际重参数化（MRP）估计器，解决了混合策略缺乏低方差重参数化技巧的问题，使混合策略从理论好奇变为实用工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合策略在理论上比单峰策略在连续动作强化学习中更具灵活性，但实际应用中这种复杂性并未带来明显优势。混合策略在大多数最先进算法中缺失，核心问题是缺乏低方差的重参数化技巧，而高斯策略却享有这一优势。

Method: 提出边际重参数化（MRP）估计器，为混合策略提供低方差的重参数化方法。通过理论证明MRP比标准的似然比（LR）方法具有更低的方差。

Result: 在Gym MuJoCo、DeepMind Control Suite和MetaWorld上的实验表明，MRP混合策略显著优于LR混合策略，并与高斯策略达到相当（有时更好）的性能。在某些情况下，MRP混合策略展现出明显的经验优势。

Conclusion: MRP混合策略从理论好奇转变为实用工具，为混合策略的实际应用提供了清晰的权衡理解，解决了混合策略在连续动作强化学习中的实际应用障碍。

Abstract: Mixture policies theoretically offer greater flexibility than unimodal policies in continuous action reinforcement learning, but the practical benefits of this complexity remain elusive. Mixture policies are notably absent from most state-of-the-art algorithms, raising a fundamental question: Is the added representational overhead useful? We show that increased flexibility can theoretically enhance solution quality and entropy robustness. Yet standard algorithms like SAC do not leverage these advantages. A core issue is the lack of a low-variance reparameterization trick for mixtures, a luxury Gaussian policies enjoy. We propose a marginalized reparameterization (MRP) estimator to address this, proving it offers lower variance than the standard likelihood-ratio (LR) approach. Our experiments across Gym MuJoCo, DeepMind Control Suite, and MetaWorld show that MRP mixture policies significantly outperform their LR ones, and reach parity (sometimes better) with Gaussian counterparts. In addition, we do find several cases where MRP mixture policies exhibit clear empirical advantages. In this paper, we provide a clearer understanding of the trade-offs involved, elevating MRP mixture policies from theoretical curiosity to a practical tool.

</details>


### [621] [Objective-Specific Privileged Bases via Full-Prefix Matryoshka Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09160)
*Arghamitra Talukder,Philippe Chlenski,Itsik Pe'er*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了Matryoshka表示学习(MRL)如何诱导任务对齐的优先基，与基于方差或正则化诱导的排序不同，证明在线性设置中MRL能恢复有序主方向，且维度大小反映信息量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究表示学习中的旋转不变性问题：学习到的表示通常对旋转变换保持不变，导致各个维度不可识别且可互换。需要探索MRL如何诱导任务对齐的优先基，这与基于方差或正则化诱导的排序不同。

Method: 在线性设置中证明全前缀MRL能够恢复有序主方向，并且可以使用共享统计量高效计算。通过实证研究展示MRL产生一致的任务对齐的每维度结构。

Result: MRL产生与任务信号对齐的每维度结构，其中坐标大小反映信息量。在线性设置中，全前缀MRL能够恢复有序主方向，且计算效率高。

Conclusion: Matryoshka表示学习能够诱导任务对齐的优先基，提供一种与基于方差或正则化方法不同的维度排序方式，其中维度大小直接反映其对任务的信息量。

Abstract: Learned representations are often invariant to rotational transformations, leaving individual dimensions non-identifiable and interchangeable. We study how Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) induces a task-aligned privileged basis distinct from variance-based or regularizer-induced orderings. In the linear setting, we prove that full-prefix MRL recovers the ordered principal directions, and can be computed efficiently using shared statistics. Empirically, we demonstrate that MRL yields consistent per-dimension structure aligned with task signal, where coordinate magnitude reflects informativeness.

</details>


### [622] [Sparse Layers are Critical to Scaling Looped Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09165)
*Ryan Lee,Jacob Biloki,Edward J. Hu,Jonathan May*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 循环语言模型通过深度共享层减少内存成本，但缩放不如标准transformer。研究发现循环MoE模型比标准基线缩放更好，而密集循环模型则不行。循环模型在早期退出点有更好的计算-质量权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究循环语言模型的缩放特性，探索如何通过循环结构和专家混合（MoE）设计来提升模型性能，同时减少内存和推理成本。

Method: 比较标准transformer、MoE transformer、带循环和不带循环的模型，分析路由分化和早期退出的影响。特别关注循环MoE模型中不同专家在共享层上的激活模式。

Result: 1）循环MoE模型比标准基线缩放更好，而密集循环模型不行；2）循环模型在循环边界处有更好的计算-质量权衡，因为每个循环结束时产生最终输出的相同层提供了更好的退出点。

Conclusion: 循环MoE模型结合早期退出策略不仅能超越标准transformer的缩放性能，还能在保持质量的同时显著节省内存和推理成本，为循环模型提供了明确的发展方向。

Abstract: Looped language models repeat a set of transformer layers through depth, reducing memory costs and providing natural early-exit points at loop boundaries. However, looped models do not scale as favorably as standard transformers with unique layers. We compare standard and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) transformers, with and without looping, and find two main results. First, we find Looped-MoE models scale better than the standard baseline while dense looped models do not. We trace this to routing divergence between loops: in Looped-MoE models, different experts are activated on each pass through the same shared layers, recovering expressivity without additional parameters. Our second finding is that looped models have better compute-quality trade-offs with early exits than standard models. Because each loop ends with the same layers that produce the final output, loop boundaries are superior exit points, as confirmed by earlier output convergence at these points. In sum, we provide a clear direction for scaling looped models: a Looped-MoE model with early exits can not only beat standard transformers at scale, but also enable significant memory and inference savings with minimal degradation in quality.

</details>


### [623] [Prediction Bottlenecks Don't Discover Causal Structure (But Here's What They Actually Do)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09169)
*Ankit Hemant Lade,Sai Krishna Jasti,Indar Kumar,Aman Chadha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过系统性的基准测试，发现Mamba模型声称能恢复Granger因果结构的说法并不成立，线性瓶颈和传统方法表现更好，干预优势主要是样本量混淆，最终贡献在于建立了一个可重复的因果发现验证基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证Mamba状态空间模型通过简单读出矩阵S=|W_out W_in|能否真正恢复Granger因果结构，并建立系统性的验证基准来检验这类因果发现方法的有效性。

Method: 构建了一个可重复的证伪基准，包括标准化的合成生成器（VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe风格）、三种干预语义（do(X=c)、软噪声、随机强制）、三个真实数据集的边来源卡片，以及规模匹配的控制组。通过五个阶段系统验证因果发现方法的有效性。

Result: 方法层面的主张不成立：(1)简单线性瓶颈表现相当或更好；(2)在合成基准上调优的Lasso优于瓶颈，在Lorenz-96（唯一有明确真实基准的）上传统方法PCMCI和Granger领先；(3)干预优势约60%是样本量混淆，残余优势在标准干预下消失；(4)残余优势在传统二元Granger中也能重现，说明是方法无关的。

Conclusion: Mamba模型恢复Granger因果结构的主张未能通过系统验证，但建立了一个有价值的因果发现验证基准，每个验证阶段都成为该基准的控制组，为未来因果发现方法评估提供了可靠工具。

Abstract: A Mamba state-space model trained only for next-step prediction appears to recover Granger-causal structure through a simple readout $S = |W_{out} W_{in}|$, with early experiments suggesting the phenomenon generalized across architectures and benefited from interventional data at $p < 10^{-5}$. We package the protocol used to test that claim -- standardized synthetic generators (VAR/Lorenz/CauseMe-style), three intervention semantics ($do(X=c)$, soft-noise, random-forcing), edge-provenance cards on three real datasets, and size-matched control arms -- as a reusable falsification benchmark, and walk the claim through it in five stages.
