We demonstrate the effectiveness of uPRM across diverse scenarios: (i) uPRM achieves up to 15% absolute accuracy improvements over the LLM-as-a-Judge in identifying first erroneous steps on the ProcessBench dataset; (ii) as a verifier for test-time scaling, uPRM performs comparably to supervised PRMs and outperforms the majority voting baseline by up to 6.9%, and (iii) when used as a reward signal in reinforcement learning, uPRM enables more robust policy optimization throughout training compared to a supervised PRM trained using ground-truth labels. Overall, our results open a path toward scalable reward modeling for complex reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [772] [jNO: A JAX Library for Neural Operator and Foundation Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10159)
*Leon Armbruster,Rathan Ramesh,Georg Kruse,Christopher Straub*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: jNO是一个JAX原生的神经算子和基础模型库，支持数据驱动和物理信息训练的统一框架，通过符号追踪系统实现灵活的训练流程编译


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子库通常将数据驱动和物理信息训练分离，导致用户在不同训练模式间切换时需要重构代码。jNO旨在提供统一的框架，让用户能在算子回归、网格感知残差评估和PDE约束训练之间无缝切换

Method: 核心设计是基于JAX的符号追踪系统，将域、模型调用、残差、监督损失和诊断等元素用统一的符号语言表示，并编译为单一优化流程。支持多模型组合、参数级细粒度控制、超参数调优和JAX原生工作流

Result: 开发了jNO库，实现了统一的训练框架，支持灵活的模型组合和训练配置，代码库已在GitHub开源

Conclusion: jNO为神经算子和PDE基础模型提供了统一的JAX原生框架，简化了不同训练模式间的切换，支持复杂模型组合和细粒度控制，有望推动相关领域的发展

Abstract: jNO (jax Neural Operators) is a JAX-native library for neural operators and foundation models with unified support for both data-driven and physics-informed training. Its core design is a tracing system in which domains, model calls, residuals, supervised losses, and diagnostics are written in one symbolic language and compiled into one optimization pipeline. This allows users to move between operator regression, mesh-aware residual evaluation, and PDE-constrained training without restructuring the surrounding code. jNO also supports multi-model compositions, fine-grained control at parameter level (model, optimizer, and learning rate), hyperparameter tuning, and JAX-native workflows for translated PDE foundation-model families. The source repository is available at https://github.com/FhG-IISB/jNO.

</details>


### [773] [OUIDecay: Adaptive Layer-wise Weight Decay for CNNs Using Online Activation Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10161)
*Alberto Fernández-Hernández,Jose I. Mestre,Cristian Pérez-Corral,Manuel F. Dolz,Jose Duato,Enrique S. Quintana-Ortí*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出OUIDecay，一种基于激活模式的层间自适应权重衰减调度器，通过过拟合-欠拟合指示器动态调整各层权重衰减强度，优于固定衰减和基于梯度的自适应方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前权重衰减通常作为固定系数应用于所有层，忽略了不同层可能具有不同的结构动态，需要不同的正则化强度。

Method: 提出OUIDecay方法，使用基于批次的轻量级过拟合-欠拟合指示器在线监控每层的结构行为，并定期相对于网络中其他层重新调整其权重衰减。该方法基于激活模式提取功能信息，无需验证数据。

Result: 在EfficientNet-B0、ResNet50、DenseNet121和MobileNetV2等网络上的实验表明，OUIDecay在8个评估设置中的7个取得了最佳平均最佳验证损失，优于固定衰减和梯度自适应方法。

Conclusion: 激活驱动的权重衰减自适应是一种实用有效的替代方案，既能保持方法轻量级适合在线使用，又优于传统方法。

Abstract: Weight decay remains one of the most widely used regularization mechanisms for training convolutional neural networks, yet it is still commonly applied as a fixed coefficient shared by all layers throughout training. This uniform treatment ignores that different layers may follow different structural dynamics and therefore may require different regularization strengths. In this work, we propose OUIDecay, an adaptive layer-wise and time-dependent weight decay scheduler for CNNs driven by the Overfitting-Underfitting Indicator (OUI), an activation-based metric previously shown to provide early information about regularization quality. OUIDecay uses a lightweight batch-based formulation of OUI to monitor the structural behavior of each layer online and periodically rescales its weight decay relative to the other layers in the network. Unlike gradient-based adaptive decay methods, our approach relies on functional information extracted from activation patterns and does not require validation data. Experiments on EfficientNet-B0 with Stanford Cars, ResNet50 with Food101, DenseNet121 with CIFAR100, and MobileNetV2 with CIFAR10 show that OUIDecay achieves the best mean best-validation-loss in 7 out of 8 evaluated settings. These results indicate that activation-driven weight decay adaptation is a practical and effective alternative to fixed decay and gradient-based adaptive decay, while keeping the method lightweight and suitable for online use.

</details>


### [774] [Hyperparameter Transfer for Dense Associative Memories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10164)
*Roi Holtzman,Dmitry Krotov,Boris Hanin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文为稠密联想记忆模型开发了超参数迁移方法，解决了权重共享和特殊激活函数带来的挑战，并提出了从小模型到大规模模型的超参数迁移方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的超参数迁移方法主要针对前馈网络，而稠密联想记忆模型具有层间和层内权重共享、使用快速峰值激活函数等特点，使得现有方法难以适用，因此需要开发专门针对该模型类的超参数迁移方法。

Method: 为稠密联想记忆模型开发超参数迁移方法，推导出从小模型调优的超参数迁移到大规模模型的具体方案，并验证理论结果与实验数据的一致性。

Result: 理论推导与实证结果表现出良好的一致性，验证了所提出的超参数迁移方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文首次为稠密联想记忆模型开发了超参数迁移方法，成功解决了权重共享和特殊激活函数带来的挑战，为这类模型的大规模训练提供了实用的超参数迁移方案。

Abstract: Dense Associative Memory (DenseAM) is a promising family of AI architectures that is represented by a neural network performing temporal dynamics on an energy landscape. While hyperparameter transfer methods are well-studied for feed-forward networks, these methods have not been developed for settings in which weights are shared across layers and within the layer, which is common in DenseAMs. Additionally, DenseAMs utilize rapidly peaking activation functions that are rarely used in feed-forward architectures. The confluence of these aspects makes DenseAM a challenging framework for using existing methods for hyperparameter transfer. Our work initiates the development of hyperparameter transfer methods for this class of models. We derive explicit prescriptions for how the hyperparameters tuned on small models can be transferred to models trained at scale. We demonstrate excellent agreement between these theoretical findings and empirical results.

</details>


### [775] [Balancing Efficiency and Fairness in Traffic Light Control through Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10170)
*Matteo Cederle,Giacomo Scatto,Gian Antonio Susto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合公平考量的深度强化学习智能体，用于交通信号灯控制，同时优化车辆和行人流量，相比传统系统更具适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统交通信号灯控制系统难以适应动态条件，且通常只关注车辆流量，忽略了行人需求，导致效率低下和公平性问题。

Method: 采用深度强化学习智能体，在控制策略中显式整合车辆和行人流量的公平性考量，根据实时需求动态平衡两种交通流。

Result: 实验结果表明，该智能体能有效减少交通拥堵，同时确保车辆和行人两类道路使用者的公平服务。

Conclusion: 本研究为智慧城市中的智能交通管理提供了实用且适应性强的解决方案，为实现更高效、包容的城市交通铺平了道路。

Abstract: Urban traffic congestion presents a significant challenge for modern cities, which impacts mobility and sustainability. Traditional traffic light control systems often fail to adapt to dynamic conditions, leading to inefficiencies. This paper proposes a novel deep reinforcement learning agent for traffic light control that addresses this limitation by explicitly integrating fairness considerations for both vehicular and pedestrian traffic. Unlike prior work, our approach dynamically balances these flows based on real-time demand, moving beyond systems focused solely on vehicles. Experimental results demonstrate that our agent effectively reduces congestion while ensuring equitable service for both the categories of road users. This research contributes to a practical and adaptable solution for intelligent traffic management within the framework of smart cities, paving the way for more efficient and inclusive urban mobility.

</details>


### [776] [One-Step Graph-Structured Neural Flows for Irregular Multivariate Time Series Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10179)
*Mengzhou Gao,Kaiwei Wang,Pengfei Jiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GSNF通过引入两种辅助轨迹自监督策略来增强图结构神经流中的变量间交互学习，在保持高效性的同时提升了多变量时间序列分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经流方法虽然能高效建模不规则多变量时间序列，但通常将变量视为独立处理，忽略了变量间的交互作用。同时，其一步映射的特性使得交互建模变得困难，因为缺乏学习过程中的迭代细化。

Method: 提出一步图结构神经流（GSNF），引入两种辅助轨迹自监督策略：1）通过重新初始化实现交互感知的轨迹生成，诱导轨迹发散以暴露图诱导的交互，并提供了发散的理论下界；2）利用流的可逆性实现反向时间轨迹生成，通过前后向一致性正则化图学习。

Result: 在五个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，GSNF实现了最先进的分类性能，同时在训练时间和内存使用方面具有高度竞争力。

Conclusion: GSNF通过创新的自监督策略有效解决了神经流中变量交互建模的挑战，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了多变量时间序列建模的性能。

Abstract: Neural Flows efficiently model irregular multivariate time series by directly learning ODE solution trajectories with neural networks, bypassing step-by-step numerical solvers. Despite their efficiency, many existing approaches treat variables independently, leaving inter-variable interactions underexplored. Moreover, their one-step mapping makes interaction modeling inherently challenging, as it removes the iterative refinement of interactions during learning. To address this challenge, we propose one-step Graph-Structured Neural Flows (GSNF), which introduce two auxiliary-trajectory self-supervision strategies to strengthen interaction learning: (i) interaction-aware trajectory generation via re-initialization, which induces trajectory divergence to expose graph-induced interactions, with a theoretically derived lower bound on divergence; and (ii) reverse-time trajectory generation, which enforces forward-backward consistency to regularize graph learning, enabled by flow invertibility. Experiments on five real-world datasets show that GSNF achieves state-of-the-art classification performance with highly competitive training time and memory usage.

</details>


### [777] [Fix the Loss, Not the Radius: Rethinking the Adversarial Perturbation of Sharpness-Aware Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10183)
*Jinping Wang,Qinhan Liu,Zhiwu Xie,Zhiqiang Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LE-SAM通过固定损失空间预算而非参数空间半径来改进SAM，将优化重点从梯度范数主导转向曲率主导，在多个基准测试中实现了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAM及其变体主要依赖一阶线性化代理，而平坦最小值本质上是二阶（曲率）概念。传统SAM固定参数空间半径的方法存在梯度范数主导学习信号的局限性，需要更直接地处理曲率信息。

Method: 提出Loss-Equated SAM (LE-SAM)，通过固定损失空间预算来反转传统SAM机制，有效消除梯度范数主导的学习信号，将优化转向曲率主导项。

Result: LE-SAM在各种基准测试和任务中表现出强大的泛化能力，始终优于SAM及其变体，实现了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: LE-SAM通过将优化重点从参数空间半径转向损失空间预算，更直接地处理曲率信息，从而改进了平坦最小值搜索机制，为模型泛化提供了更有效的优化方法。

Abstract: Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) improves generalization by minimizing the worst-case loss within a fixed parameter-space radius neighborhood. SAM and its variants mainly rely on a first-order linearized surrogate, while flat minima are inherently a second-order (curvature) notion.We revisit this mismatch and propose Loss-Equated SAM (LE-SAM), which inverts the traditional SAM mechanism that fixed perturbation radius with a fixed loss-space budget,effectively removing gradient-norm-dominated learning signals and shifting optimization toward curvature-dominated terms. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks and tasks demonstrate the strong generalization ability of LESAM that consistently outperforms SAM and even its variants, achieving the state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [778] [ProteinOPD: Towards Effective and Efficient Preference Alignment for Protein Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10189)
*Yulin Zhang,He Cao,Zihao Jiang,Chenyi Zi,Zhipeng Zhou,Zijing Liu,Yu Li,Jia Li,Ziqi Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ProteinOPD：基于On-Policy Distillation的多目标偏好对齐框架，用于蛋白质设计，在保持设计性的同时平衡多个偏好目标


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 蛋白质语言模型能够生成可设计性高的蛋白质序列，偏好对齐可以引导设计朝向期望的功能和特性。但现有方法常导致灾难性遗忘，损害基础设计性，且难以平衡多个竞争目标。

Method: 提出ProteinOPD框架：将预训练蛋白质语言模型适配为偏好特定的教师模型，通过token-level On-Policy Distillation将知识蒸馏到共享学生模型中。学生模型在自身轨迹上进行对齐，采用加权教师的归一化几何共识，确保冲突下的有界优化。

Result: 实验表明ProteinOPD在目标偏好目标上取得显著提升，同时不损害设计性，相比基于RL的对齐方法训练速度提升8倍。

Conclusion: ProteinOPD有效解决了多目标偏好对齐中的灾难性遗忘问题，能够平衡多个竞争目标并保持预训练模型的设计能力，为蛋白质设计提供了高效的多目标对齐框架。

Abstract: Designing proteins with desired functions or properties represents a core goal in synthetic biology and drug discovery. Recent advances in protein language models (PLMs) have enabled the generation of highly designable protein sequences, while preference alignment provides a promising way to steer designs toward desired functions and properties. Nevertheless, they often trigger catastrophic forgetting of pretrained knowledge, degrading basic designability and failing to balance multiple competing objectives. To address these issues, we draw inspiration from On-Policy Distillation (OPD), an advanced post-training method renowned for mitigating catastrophic forgetting through its mode-seeking nature. In this work, we propose ProteinOPD, a multi-objective preference alignment framework that can effectively balance multiple preference objectives while maintaining the inherent designability of PLMs. ProteinOPD adapts a pretrained PLM into preference-specific teachers and distills their knowledge into a shared student via token-level OPD on the student's own trajectories. During this process, the student is aligned to a unique normalized geometric consensus of weighted teachers while ensuring bounded optimization under conflicts. This bridges the gap for OPD in multi-objective/teacher alignment. Extensive experiments show that ProteinOPD achieves substantial gains on target preference objectives without compromising the designability, with an 8x training speedup over RL-based alignment competitors.

</details>


### [779] [Breaking the Reward Barrier: Accelerating Tree-of-Thought Reasoning via Speculative Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10195)
*Shuzhang Zhong,Haochen Huang,Shengxuan Qiu,Pengfei Zuo,Runsheng Wang,Meng Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPEX通过投机推理路径选择、跨查询预算分配和自适应提前终止技术，打破Tree-of-Thought推理中的奖励同步瓶颈，实现1.2-3倍加速，结合投机解码可达4.1倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Tree-of-Thought推理存在奖励依赖障碍——由顺序奖励引导探索导致的同步瓶颈，限制了搜索并行性并引入显著延迟。现有针对线性Chain-of-Thought推理的优化无法解决此问题，导致ToT推理效率未被充分探索。

Method: 提出SPEX系统，包含三个关键技术：(1) 查询内投机路径选择：预测并扩展ToT中高潜力的分支；(2) 跨查询预算分配：动态平衡跨查询的投机资源分配；(3) 自适应提前终止：对偏斜搜索树进行深度和冗余分支剪枝。

Result: 在SGLang框架上实现SPEX，在不同ToT算法和LLM上评估。实验显示SPEX为不同ToT推理算法带来1.2-3倍加速。与token级投机解码结合时，累计加速可达4.1倍。消融研究确认了各项技术的贡献。

Conclusion: SPEX代表了高效可扩展ToT推理的重要进展，解锁了LLM高性能推理时扩展所需的并行性，打破了奖励同步障碍。

Abstract: Tree-of-Thought (ToT) reasoning structures Large Language Model (LLM) inference as a tree-based search, demonstrating strong potential for solving complex mathematical and programming tasks. However, its efficiency is constrained by the reward dependency barrier -- a synchronization bottleneck caused by sequential reward-guided exploration that limits search parallelism and introduces substantial latency. Prior system optimizations, mainly designed for linear Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, cannot address these challenges, leaving the efficiency of ToT underexplored.
  To enhance ToT reasoning efficiency, we observe that the reasoning paths can be explored speculatively to break the reward synchronization barrier. Therefore, in this paper, we propose SPEX and introduce three key techniques: (i) intra-query speculative path selection to predict and expand high-potential branches of ToT, (ii) inter-query budget allocation to balance speculative resource allocation across queries dynamically, and (iii) adaptive early termination to prune deep and redundant branches for a skewed search tree.
  We implement SPEX on top of the SGLang framework and evaluate it across diverse ToT algorithms and LLMs. Extensive experiments show that SPEX achieves $1.2 \sim 3 \times$ speedup for different ToT reasoning algorithms. Moreover, SPEX synergizes with token-level speculative decoding, achieving cumulative speedups of up to $4.1\times$. Ablation studies further confirm the contributions of each technique. Overall, SPEX represents a significant step toward efficient and scalable ToT reasoning, unlocking the parallelism required for high-performance inference-time scaling for LLMs.

</details>


### [780] [Many Needles in a Haystack: Active Hit Discovery for Perturbation Experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10196)
*Andrea Rubbi,Arpit Merchant,Samuel Ogden,Amir Akbarnejad,Pietro Liò,Sattar Vakili,Mo Lotfollahi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出 Probability-of-Hit 获取函数，用于高通量基因扰动实验中的命中发现，通过后验概率对候选进行排序，直接针对阈值超过，在合成和真实生物学数据集上表现优于基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高通量基因扰动实验预算有限，纯探索策略统计效率低，而贝叶斯优化方法针对单一全局最优，过度开发主导模式而忽略其他高值区域。需要一种能有效发现多个超过预定阈值扰动的策略。

Method: 将命中发现形式化为顺序实验设计问题，提出 Probability-of-Hit 获取函数，根据候选成为命中的后验概率进行排序，直接针对阈值超过进行优化。

Result: 证明了该方法的渐近最优性，在合成基准测试和真实生物学免疫学数据集上表现出色，在 Schmidt IL-2 数据集上比基线提高 6.4%。

Conclusion: Probability-of-Hit 方法为高通量基因扰动实验提供了一种有效的命中发现策略，直接针对阈值超过进行优化，在有限预算下能发现更多有效扰动。

Abstract: High-throughput gene perturbation experiments can test several genetic interventions in parallel, yet experimental budgets remain limited. A central goal is hit discovery: identifying as many perturbations as possible whose phenotypic effect exceeds a predefined threshold. Pure exploration strategies are statistically inefficient, wasting budget on low-value regions. Bayesian optimization methods offer a principled alternative but target a single global optimum, over-exploiting dominant modes while neglecting other high-value regions. We formalize hit discovery as a sequential experimental design problem and propose Probability-of-Hit, an acquisition function that directly targets threshold exceedance by ranking candidates according to their posterior probability of being a hit. We prove asymptotic optimality of this approach and demonstrate strong empirical performance on both synthetic benchmarks and real biological immunology datasets, including up to 6.4% improvement over baselines on the Schmidt IL-2 dataset.

</details>


### [781] [Empty SPACE: Cross-Attention Sparsity for Concept Erasure in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10198)
*Nicola Novello,Andrea M. Tonello*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPACE是一种针对大型文本到图像扩散模型的概念擦除方法，通过稀疏交叉注意力机制有效移除特定概念，相比密集基线方法具有更好的擦除效果和内存效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的封闭式概念擦除方法在处理较小模型（如Stable Diffusion 1.5）时有效，但在扩展到更大模型（如Stable Diffusion XL）时效果下降。需要一种能在大型架构中保持擦除效果的高效方法。

Method: SPACE（稀疏交叉注意力概念擦除）通过迭代修改模型的交叉注意力参数，使用封闭式更新同时诱导稀疏性和擦除目标概念。该方法将概念映射集中到低维子空间，实现比密集基线更好的擦除效果。

Result: 实验结果显示SPACE在擦除效果和对抗性提示的鲁棒性方面均有改进。同时实现了80%-90%的交叉注意力稀疏度，将修改参数的存储需求减少了70%，具有显著的内存效率。

Conclusion: SPACE是一种高效的概念擦除方法，特别适用于大型文本到图像扩散模型，在保持擦除效果的同时显著减少了存储需求，为解决模型生成版权和不当内容问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Erasing specific concepts from text-to-image diffusion models is essential for avoiding the generation of copyrighted and explicit content. Closed-form concept erasure methods offer a fast alternative to backpropagation-based techniques, but they become less effective when scaling from smaller models such as Stable Diffusion 1.5 to larger models like Stable Diffusion XL. To maintain erasure effectiveness in these larger-scale architectures, we propose SParse cross-Attention-based Concept Erasure (SPACE). SPACE iteratively modifies the cross-attention parameters of a model with a closed-form update that jointly induces sparsity and erases target concepts. By concentrating the concept mapping to a lower-dimensional subspace, SPACE achieves superior erasure efficacy compared to dense baselines. Extensive experimental results show improvements in erasure effectiveness and robustness against adversarial prompts. Furthermore, SPACE achieves 80\%-90\% cross-attention sparsity, reducing the storage requirements for saving the modified parameters by 70\%, demonstrating its memory efficiency.

</details>


### [782] [Task-Aware Calibration: Provably Optimal Decoding in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10202)
*Tim Tomov,Dominik Fuchsgruber,Rajeev Verma,Stephan Günnemann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了任务校准（task calibration）方法，通过将LLM的自由形式输出映射到任务相关的潜在空间（如类别标签、整数、集合等），在潜在结构上校准模型预测分布，从而改善解码质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM解码通常依赖模型的预测分布生成输出，但模型预测分布与真实生成分布之间的不对齐会导致实际决策次优。虽然校准模型输出分布是自然解决方案，但在组合爆炸的自由形式语言层面进行校准是病态问题。

Method: 提出任务校准范式，将自由形式输出解释为语义有意义的潜在结构（如离散类别标签、整数或集合），在任务诱导的潜在空间中校准模型预测分布。应用决策理论结果证明，在任务校准后的潜在分布上执行最小贝叶斯风险（MBR）解码是最优解码策略。

Result: 任务校准方法在不同任务和基线模型上一致改善了生成质量。还提出了任务校准误差（TCE）作为应用感知的校准度量，量化了由于校准不足导致的额外损失。

Conclusion: 任务校准能够在各种任务和应用中实现更可靠的模型决策，通过将校准问题从组合爆炸的语言空间转移到语义有意义的潜在空间，解决了LLM校准的难题。

Abstract: LLM decoding often relies on the model's predictive distribution to generate an output. Consequently, misalignment with respect to the true generating distribution leads to suboptimal decisions in practice. While a natural solution is to calibrate the model's output distribution, for LLMs, this is ill-posed at the combinatorially vast level of free-form language. We address this by building on the insight that in many tasks, these free-form outputs can be interpreted in a semantically meaningful latent structure, for example, discrete class labels, integers, or sets. We introduce task calibration as a paradigm to calibrate the model's predictive distribution in the task-induced latent space. We apply a decision-theoretic result to show that Minimum Bayes Risk (MBR) decoding on the task-calibrated latent distribution is the optimal decoding strategy on latent model beliefs. Empirically, it consistently improves generation quality across different tasks and baselines. We also introduce Task Calibration Error (TCE), an application-aware calibration metric that quantifies the excess loss due to miscalibration. Our work demonstrates that task calibration enables more reliable model decisions across various tasks and applications.

</details>


### [783] [Unveiling High-Probability Generalization in Decentralized SGD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10205)
*Jiahuan Wang,Ping Luo,Ziqing Wen,Dongsheng Li,Tao Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种针对去中心化随机梯度下降(D-SGD)的高概率学习理论，旨在达到最优的$\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{mn}}\log (1/δ)\right)$泛化界，填补了传统SGD与D-SGD在高概率保证方面的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有D-SGD泛化研究主要关注期望结果，其速率限制在$\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{δ\sqrt{mn}}\right)$，而传统SGD的最优高概率泛化界为$\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{n}}\log (1/δ)\right)$。当$m=1$时，D-SGD退化为传统SGD，这揭示了两者在高概率保证方面的差距，需要建立D-SGD的高概率学习理论。

Method: 使用分布式学习中较弱的点式一致稳定性概念（而非传统的一致稳定性），在凸、强凸和非凸三种设置下分析D-SGD的泛化界。对于非凸情况（仅存在局部最小值），提供了基于梯度度量的高概率结果，并推导了优化误差和超额风险界。同时考虑了通信开销，在时变框架下分析了局部模型的泛化界。

Result: 建立了D-SGD的高概率学习理论，达到了最优的$\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{mn}}\log (1/δ)\right)$泛化速率，填补了SGD与D-SGD在高概率保证方面的差距。在凸、强凸和非凸设置下都获得了改进的泛化界，并为非凸情况提供了梯度度量的高概率结果。

Conclusion: 该研究成功填补了传统SGD与D-SGD在高概率泛化保证方面的理论差距，为去中心化随机梯度下降提供了更优的高概率学习理论框架，同时考虑了实际分布式学习中的通信开销和时变特性，为大规模分布式学习提供了更可靠的理论基础。

Abstract: Decentralized stochastic gradient descent (D-SGD) is an efficient method for large-scale distributed learning. Existing generalization studies mainly address expected results, achieving rates limited to $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{δ\sqrt{mn}}\right)$, where $δ$ is the confidence parameter, $m$ the number of workers, and $n$ the sample size. When $m=1$, D-SGD reduces to traditional SGD, whose optimal high-probability generalization bound is $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{n}}\log (1/δ)\right)$. This discrepancy reveals a gap between high-probability guarantees for SGD and those for D-SGD. To close this, we develop a high-probability learning theory for D-SGD, aiming for the optimal $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{mn}}\log (1/δ)\right)$ rate. We refine bounds for D-SGD using pointwise uniform stability in distributed learning-a weaker notion than uniform stability-and analyze them across convex, strongly convex, and non-convex settings. We also provide high-probability results for gradient-based measures in non-convex cases where only local minima exist, and derive optimization error and excess risk bounds. Finally, accounting for communication overhead, we analyze generalization bounds for local models within time-varying frameworks.

</details>


### [784] [FORGE: Fragment-Oriented Ranking and Generation for Context-Aware Molecular Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10230)
*Qingchuan Zhang,He Cao,Hao Li,Yanjun Shao,Zhiyuan Liu,Shihang Wang,Shufang Xie,Shenghua Gao,Xinwu Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FORGE是一个两阶段分子优化框架，通过上下文感知的局部编辑而非自然语言提示，利用自动挖掘的已验证编辑对，在保持分子相似性的同时改善分子性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于语言模型的方法依赖自然语言提示，存在数据扩展瓶颈、化学幻觉问题，且忽略了片段效应的强上下文依赖性。

Method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段在完整分子上下文中根据性质贡献对候选片段进行排序，注入化学先验；第二阶段生成明确的片段替换。基于0.6B语言模型，通过上下文演示适应未知黑盒目标。

Result: 在Prompt-MolOpt、PMO-1k和ChemCoTBench基准测试中，FORGE始终优于先前方法，包括更大的语言模型和图方法。

Conclusion: 明确的片段级监督是比自然语言训练更易获取、可扩展且无幻觉的替代方案，为分子优化提供了更有效的方法。

Abstract: Molecular optimization seeks to improve a molecule through small structural edits while preserving similarity to the starting compound. Recent language-model approaches typically treat this task as prompt-conditioned sequence generation. However, relying on natural language introduces an inherent data-scaling bottleneck, often leads to chemical hallucinations, and ignores the strong context dependence of fragment effects. We present FORGE, a two-stage framework that reformulates molecular optimization as context-aware local editing. By utilizing automatically mined, verified low-to-high edit pairs instead of expensive human text annotations, Stage 1 ranks candidate fragments by their property contribution under the full molecular context to inject chemical prior, and Stage 2 generates explicit fragment replacements. Built on a compact 0.6B language model, FORGE further adapts to unseen black-box objectives through in-context demonstrations. Across Prompt-MolOpt, PMO-1k and ChemCoTBench, FORGE consistently outperforms prior methods, including substantially larger language models and graph methods. These results highlight the value of explicit fragment-level supervision as a more easily obtainable, scalable, and hallucination-less alternative to natural language training.

</details>


### [785] [When Does Non-Uniform Replay Matter in Reinforcement Learning?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10236)
*Michal Korniak,Mikołaj Czarnecki,Yarden As,Piotr Miłoś,Pieter Abbeel,Michal Nauman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 非均匀经验回放的有效性取决于三个因素：回放量、期望新近度和采样分布熵，在回放量低时最有益，高熵采样很重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代离线策略强化学习通常使用均匀经验回放，但不清楚何时以及为何非均匀回放能改进这一基线。需要澄清非均匀回放何时有益，并为现代离线策略RL提供实用的回放设计指导。

Method: 通过截断几何回放（Truncated Geometric replay）策略，偏向采样最近的经验，同时保持高熵和可忽略的计算开销。

Result: 在低回放量情况下显著提高样本效率，在高回放量情况下仍保持竞争力。在三个现代算法和五个RL基准套件的大规模并行模拟、单任务和多任务设置中验证有效。

Conclusion: 阐明了非均匀经验回放何时有益的关键因素，并提出了简单有效的截断几何回放策略，为现代离线策略RL的回放设计提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Modern off-policy reinforcement learning algorithms often rely on simple uniform replay sampling and it remains unclear when and why non-uniform replay improves over this strong baseline. Across diverse RL settings, we show that the effectiveness of non-uniform replay is governed by three factors: replay volume, the number of replayed transitions per environment step; expected recency, how recent sampled transitions are; and the entropy of the replay sampling distribution. Our main contribution is clarifying when non-uniform replay is beneficial and providing practical guidance for replay design in modern off-policy RL. Namely, we find that non-uniform replay is most beneficial when replay volume is low, and that high-entropy sampling is important even at comparable expected recency. Motivated by these findings, we adopt a simple Truncated Geometric replay that biases sampling toward recent experience while preserving high entropy and incurring negligible computational overhead. Across large-scale parallel simulation, single-task, and multi-task settings, including three modern algorithms evaluated on five RL benchmark suites, this replay sampling strategy improves sample efficiency in low-volume regimes while remaining competitive when replay volume is high.

</details>


### [786] [The Benefits of Temporal Correlations: SGD Learns k-Juntas from Random Walks Efficiently](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10237)
*Elisabetta Cornacchia,Dan Mikulincer,Elchanan Mossel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究时间相关性如何使稀疏学习问题（布尔k-juntas）对基于梯度的方法变得可高效学习，通过随机游走采样和时差损失实现线性样本复杂度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 布尔k-juntas作为典型稀疏学习问题，在独立均匀采样下对梯度方法存在障碍，研究时间相关性是否能改变这一局面

Method: 使用超立方体上的懒惰随机游走生成样本，采用两层ReLU网络，通过stylized-SGD和时差损失（比较连续样本间的目标与预测增量）进行训练

Result: 对于固定k，样本复杂度在环境维度d上基本为线性；而使用标准凸逐点损失的大批量梯度方法无法从时间相关性中获得相同优势

Conclusion: 时间相关性可以显著改善梯度方法在稀疏学习问题上的表现，但需要特定的训练策略（时差损失）才能充分利用这种优势

Abstract: We study how temporal correlations in the data can make certain sparse learning problems efficiently learnable by gradient-based methods. Our focus is on Boolean k-juntas, a canonical sparse learning problem known to pose barriers for gradient-based methods under independent uniform samples. We show that this picture changes when the samples are generated by a lazy random walk on the hypercube. In this setting, the temporal dependencies can be exploited by a two-layer ReLU network trained using stylized-SGD with a temporal-difference loss, which compares target and predicted increments across consecutive samples. For every fixed k, the resulting sample complexity is essentially linear in the ambient dimension d. By contrast, we show that for large-batch gradient methods using standard convex pointwise losses, temporal correlations do not provide the same advantage.

</details>


### [787] [When Normality Shifts: Risk-Aware Test-Time Adaptation for Unsupervised Tabular Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10242)
*Wei Huang,Hezhe Qiao,Kailai Zhang,Zaisheng Ye,Yu-Ming Shang,Xiangling Fu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RTTAD提出了一种风险感知的测试时自适应方法用于无监督表格异常检测，通过协同双阶段机制解决正常性偏移问题，在训练阶段捕获多级表示建立正常先验，在测试阶段使用测试时对比学习模块有选择地更新模型，同时约束异常样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督表格异常检测方法在训练数据有限、多样性不足时，无法完全表征正常模式。测试时自适应方法虽然提供补救，但孤立地关注测试时优化，忽略了与训练阶段学习的协同作用，且对未标记测试数据的无差别适应会导致异常污染，限制模型的判别能力。

Method: RTTAD采用协同两阶段机制：1）训练阶段：通过协作双任务学习捕获多级表示，建立鲁棒的正常先验；2）测试阶段：使用测试时对比学习模块，明确考虑自适应风险，选择性地使用高置信度伪正常样本更新模型，同时约束异常样本，并融入k近邻对比目标来细化嵌入分布。

Result: 在15个表格数据集上的广泛实验表明，RTTAD实现了最先进的整体检测性能。

Conclusion: RTTAD通过协同训练和测试阶段，以及风险感知的自适应策略，有效解决了正常性偏移和异常污染问题，提升了无监督表格异常检测的判别能力。

Abstract: Unsupervised tabular anomaly detection methods typically learn feature patterns from normal samples during training and subsequently identify samples that deviate from these patterns as anomalies during testing. However, in practical scenarios, the limited scale and diversity of training data often lead to an incomplete characterization of normal patterns. While test-time adaptation offers a remedy, its isolated focus on test-time optimization ignores the critical synergy with training-phase learning. Furthermore, indiscriminate adaptation to unlabeled test data inevitably triggers anomaly contamination, preventing the model from fully realizing its discriminative capability between normal and anomalous samples. To address these issues, we propose RTTAD, a Risk-aware Test-time adaptation method for unsupervised Tabular Anomaly Detection. RTTAD holistically tackles normality shifts via a synergistic two-stage mechanism. During training, collaborative dual-task learning captures multi-level representations to establish a robust normal prior. During testing, a Test-Time Contrastive Learning (TTCL) module explicitly accounts for adaptation risk by selectively updating the model using high-confidence pseudo-normal samples while constraining anomalous ones. Additionally, TTCL incorporates a k-nearest neighbor-based contrastive objective to refine embedding distributions, thereby further enhancing the model's discriminative capacity. Extensive experiments on 15 tabular datasets demonstrate that RTTAD achieves state-of-the-art overall detection performance.

</details>


### [788] [Teaching LLMs to See Graphs: Unifying Text and Structural Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10247)
*Dario Vajda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GTLM是一种新颖的图变换器语言模型，通过注入图感知注意力偏置，让预训练LLM能够原生处理图拓扑结构，仅增加0.015%参数，在多项任务上超越或匹配7B参数SOTA模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖GNN编码器将丰富文本属性压缩为单一标记，造成语义瓶颈。需要让LLM能够原生处理图结构数据，同时保持参数效率。

Method: 提出GTLM架构，通过向LLM注意力模块直接注入图感知注意力偏置，实现图拓扑的原生处理。该方法保持节点置换等变性，并与预训练基础模型完全向后兼容。

Result: 1B参数的GTLM在标准文本属性图基准上匹配或超越7B参数SOTA模型，在GraphQA上显著超越基线。注意力头隐式学习消息传递模拟，在算法任务上表现优越。

Conclusion: GTLM实现了LLM中真正的算法推理，为下一代GraphRAG和关系深度学习提供了可扩展基础，是处理图结构数据的范式转变。

Abstract: Using Large Language Models (LLMs) to process graph-structured data is an active research area, yet current state-of-the-art approaches typically rely on multi-step pipelines with Graph Neural Network (GNN) encoders that compress rich textual attributes into solitary tokens, creating a significant semantic bottleneck. In this paper, we introduce the Graph Transformer Language Model (GTLM), a novel architecture that enables pretrained LLMs to natively process graph topologies while entirely eliminating this compressive bottleneck. GTLM is exceptionally parameter-efficient: by injecting graph-aware attention biases directly into the LLM's attention modules, it introduces only 0.015% additional parameters relative to the base model. We theoretically prove that our bidirectional attention prefix preserves node permutation equivariance while maintaining exact backward compatibility with the pretrained base model. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that a 1B-parameter GTLM matches or exceeds the performance of 7B-parameter state-of-the-art models on standard Text-Attributed Graph benchmarks, while significantly surpassing baselines on GraphQA. Finally, we demonstrate that GTLM attention heads implicitly learn to simulate message passing, explaining its superior performance on algorithmic tasks. This paradigm shift enables true algorithmic reasoning within LLMs and provides a scalable foundation for next-generation GraphRAG and relational deep learning.

</details>


### [789] [DP-LAC: Lightweight Adaptive Clipping for Differentially Private Federated Fine-tuning of Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10272)
*Haaris Mehmood,Jie Xu,Karthikeyan Saravanan,Rogier Van Dalen,Mete Ozay*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了DP-LAC方法，通过私有直方图估计优化差分隐私联邦学习中的梯度裁剪阈值，无需额外隐私预算或超参数调整，在多个数据集上实现了6.6%的平均准确率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习（FL）虽然能在边缘设备上协作训练大语言模型并保持用户数据本地化，但仍会通过客户端提供的梯度暴露敏感信息。差分隐私随机梯度下降（DP-SGD）通过裁剪和添加噪声来缓解此风险，但现有自适应裁剪方法需要繁琐的超参数调整，这会消耗隐私预算。

Method: 提出DP-LAC方法：首先使用私有直方图估计在最优值的一个数量级内初始化裁剪阈值，然后在训练过程中自适应调整该阈值，整个过程不消耗额外隐私预算或引入新超参数。

Result: 实验结果显示，DP-LAC优于最先进的自适应裁剪方法和普通DP-SGD，在多个数据集上实现了平均6.6%的准确率提升。

Conclusion: DP-LAC提供了一种高效、无需额外隐私预算的自适应裁剪方法，显著提升了差分隐私联邦学习的性能，解决了现有方法中超参数调整消耗隐私预算的问题。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables the collaborative training of large-scale language models (LLMs) across edge devices while keeping user data on-device. However, FL still exposes sensitive information through client-provided gradients. Differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DP-SGD) mitigates this risk by clipping each client's contribution to a threshold $C$ and adding noise proportional to $C$. Existing adaptive clipping techniques dynamically adjust $C$ but demand tedious hyperparameter tuning, which can erode the privacy budget. In this paper, we introduce DP-LAC, a method that first estimates an initial clipping threshold within an order of magnitude of the optimum using private histogram estimation, and then adapts this threshold during training without consuming additional privacy budget or introducing new hyperparameters. Empirical results show that DP-LAC outperforms both state-of-the-art adaptive clipping methods and vanilla DP-SGD, achieving an average accuracy gain of $6.6\%$.

</details>


### [790] [Generalization Error Bounds for Picard-Type Operator Learning in Nonlinear Parabolic PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10277)
*Koichi Taniguchi,Sho Sonoda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究基于Duhamel-Picard迭代的非线性抛物型PDE算子学习，提出了Picard型算子学习的理论框架，证明了增加Picard深度可减少截断误差而不导致估计误差无限增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PDE算子学习需要离散化不变性和反映PDE特定结构，但现有方法在如何将这种结构编码到模型架构、假设类或学习过程中缺乏理论指导。

Method: 将Picard迭代表述为抽象状态转移模型，建立Picard型算子学习的理论框架，推导实现无关的泛化误差界，将实现误差与Picard迭代诱导的抽象状态转移模型的估计误差分离。

Result: 理论分析表明增加Picard深度可减少Picard截断误差，而不会导致基于熵的估计误差无限增长。通过在同一学习到的局部模型上连续时间块滚动，可扩展到长时间预测。

Conclusion: Picard迭代为非线性抛物型PDE的算子学习提供了理论框架，通过Picard型傅里叶神经算子在环面上的非线性热方程验证了理论的有效性。

Abstract: Operator learning for partial differential equations (PDEs) aims to learn solution operators on infinite-dimensional function spaces from finite-resolution data. In this setting, it is important for the learned model to be discretization-invariant, or resolution-robust, and to reflect PDE-specific structure. It is therefore natural to ask how such structure should be encoded in the model architecture, hypothesis class, or learning procedure. In this paper, we study operator learning for solution operators of nonlinear parabolic PDEs based on Duhamel--Picard iteration. We formulate Picard iteration as an abstract state-transition model and present a theoretical framework for Picard-type operator learning. We derive implementation-agnostic generalization error bounds that separate the implementation error from the estimation error associated with the abstract state-transition model induced by Picard iteration. A key consequence is that increasing the Picard depth reduces the Picard truncation error without causing an unbounded growth of the entropy-based estimation error. We also extend the analysis to long-time prediction by rolling out the same learned local model over successive time blocks. Finally, we illustrate the theory for nonlinear heat equations on the torus using a Picard-type Fourier neural operator as a concrete implementation.

</details>


### [791] [Predictive Radiomics for Evaluation of Cancer Immune SignaturE in Glioblastoma: the PRECISE-GBM study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10278)
*Prajwal Ghimire,Junjie Li,Liu Yaou,Marc Modat,Thomas Booth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究通过多中心回顾性分析开发了基于影像组学的生物标志物，用于无创预测IDH野生型胶质母细胞瘤中的M0巨噬细胞亚型免疫特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 胶质母细胞瘤需要有效的患者分层策略。影像基因组学可以识别基因组表型的影像学生物标志物，这些标志物可能补充患者分层方法，特别是针对免疫治疗。

Method: 回顾性多中心研究，使用TCGA-GBM等多个公开数据集。从MRI中提取影像组学特征，使用嵌套交叉验证LASSO进行特征选择。基于支持向量机和集成模型训练17个免疫和细胞特异性评分分类器，在三个独立数据集上进行验证。

Result: 纳入176名患者。特征选择后获得形状、一阶和高阶影像组学特征。预测巨噬细胞亚型免疫特征的模型在三个独立验证集上表现出稳定的平均性能（平衡准确率0.67，精确度0.89），集成模型优于支持向量机。

Conclusion: 影像基因组学模型能够无创预测IDH野生型胶质母细胞瘤中的M0巨噬细胞亚型免疫特征。这些生物标志物有潜力在前瞻性胶质母细胞瘤临床试验中用于患者免疫治疗分层。

Abstract: Background: Radiogenomics allows identification of radiological biomarkers for genomic phenotypes. In glioblastoma, these biomarkers could potentially complement patient stratification strategies. We aim to develop and analytically validate radiological biomarkers that capture immune cell signatures within IDH-wildtype glioblastoma microenvironment using radiogenomic analysis.
  Methods: This was a retrospective multicenter study using curated open-access anonymized imaging and genomic data from TCGA-GBM, CPTAC, IvyGAP, REMBRANDT and CGGA datasets. Imaging data consisted of MRI-based radiomic features extracted from necrotic core, enhancing and edema regions of deep learning-based auto-segmented tumors. Radiomic feature selections were performed using nested cross-validated LASSO. Support vector machine and ensemble models were trained using seventeen immune and cell-specific score labels extracted from deconvoluted transcriptomic data using pan-cancer and glioblastoma immune signature matrices as reference standards. Seventeen classifier models trained in three cross-cohort strategies were validated on three held-out datasets assessing stability and generalizability.
  Results: One-hundred-and-seventy-six patients were included in the study. The immune-related radiomic signatures obtained after feature selection were shape, first order and higher order radiomic features. Models predicting macrophage subtype immune signature showed stable mean performance on balanced accuracy (0.67) and precision (0.89) metrics for three independent holdout datasets with ensemble model outperforming support vector machine model.
  Conclusion: Radiogenomic models non-invasively predicted the macrophage subtype M0 immune signature in IDH-wildtype glioblastoma. These biomarkers have the potential to stratify patients for immunotherapy within prospective glioblastoma clinical trials.

</details>


### [792] [DeepLog: A Software Framework for Modular Neurosymbolic AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10279)
*Robin Manhaeve,Stefano Colamonaco,Vincent Derkinderen,Rik Adriaensen,Lucas Van Praet,Luc De Raedt,Giuseppe Marra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DeepLog 是一个统一的神经符号框架，将逻辑与深度学习集成在标准 PyTorch 工作流中，作为通用后端支持多种神经符号范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经符号系统通常专注于特定范式，缺乏统一框架，限制了开发者的灵活性和可扩展性。需要降低机器学习从业者使用逻辑的门槛，同时为神经符号开发者提供高性能原型平台。

Method: 将多样化的神经符号语言视为高级规范，通过自动编译将其优化为算术电路。将逻辑作为可组合模块集成到 PyTorch 工作流中。

Result: DeepLog 能够模拟多种神经符号系统，提供统一的开发框架。通过优化编译提高性能，同时保持与现有深度学习生态的兼容性。

Conclusion: DeepLog 成功构建了通用神经符号后端，降低了逻辑与深度学习融合的门槛，为神经符号社区提供了共享的高性能基础架构。

Abstract: DeepLog is an operational neurosymbolic framework that unifies logic and deep learning within standard PyTorch workflows. While existing neurosymbolic systems focus on a particular paradigm and semantics, DeepLog serves as a universal backend that can emulate many systems in the neurosymbolic alphabet soup. By treating diverse neurosymbolic languages as high-level specifications, the DeepLog software automatically compiles them into optimized arithmetic circuits. This design lowers the barrier for machine learning practitioners by treating logic as composable modules, while providing neurosymbolic developers with a shared, high-performance basis for prototyping new integration strategies. The code is available here: https://github.com/ML-KULeuven/deeplog

</details>


### [793] [BROS: Bias-Corrected Randomized Subspaces for Memory-Efficient Single-Loop Bilevel Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10288)
*Hengrui Zhang,Boao Kong,Engao Zhang,Kun Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BROS 是一种内存高效的单层随机双层优化方法，通过随机子空间更新和Rademacher双探针校正，在保持与精确方法相同收敛速度的同时，将峰值内存降低达44.9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有随机双层优化方法存在严重内存压力或缺乏有竞争力的收敛保证。精确单层SBO方法对大型下层神经网络造成严重内存压力，而内存高效的代理SBO方法在标准假设下缺乏有竞争力的收敛保证。

Method: BROS在随机子空间中进行下层和辅助更新，采用Rademacher双探针校正来恢复无偏的Hessian-作用估计器。这是一种单层SBO方法，通过子空间技术降低内存需求。

Result: BROS在保持与MA-SOBA相同的O(ε^{-2})样本复杂度的同时，在超数据清洗、数据混合学习、超表示学习和ViT样本重加权等任务中，将峰值内存降低达44.9%，且性能与全空间基线相当。

Conclusion: BROS提供了一种内存高效的随机双层优化解决方案，在保持理论收敛保证的同时显著减少内存使用，为深度学习中的超参数学习、数据重加权等应用提供了实用工具。

Abstract: Stochastic bilevel optimization (SBO) has become a standard framework for hyperparameter learning, data reweighting, representation learning, and data-mixture optimization in deep learning. Existing exact single-loop SBO methods and memory-efficient surrogate SBO methods either create severe memory pressure for large lower-level neural networks or lack competitive convergence guarantees under standard assumptions. In this paper, we propose BROS, a memory-efficient single-loop SBO method with the same convergence rate order as exact single-loop SBO methods. BROS performs lower and auxiliary updates in randomized subspaces with a Rademacher bi-probe correction that recovers an unbiased Hessian-action estimator. We prove that BROS preserves the $\mathcal O(\varepsilon^{-2})$ sample complexity of MA-SOBA for finding an $\varepsilon$-stationary point under only standard assumptions. Experiments on hyper-data cleaning, data-mixture learning, hyper-representation learning, and ViT sample reweighting show that BROS reduces peak memory by up to 44.9% while closely matching full-space baseline performance.

</details>


### [794] [Sample-Mean Anchored Thompson Sampling for Offline-to-Online Learning with Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10289)
*Bochao Li,Yao Fu,Wei Chen,Fang Kong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Anchor-TS算法，通过中位数锚定规则结合离线与在线数据，解决离线到在线学习中的分布偏移问题，安全地利用离线数据加速在线学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线到在线学习面临分布偏移挑战。现有方法主要依赖UCB类算法，而Thompson采样(TS)虽在贝叶斯框架下天然适合此场景，但其后验样本不保证对真实臂均值的乐观性，使得混合数据构建的指数难以比较和使用。

Method: 提出sample-mean anchored TS (Anchor-TS)算法，引入基于中位数的锚定规则：将臂指数定义为在线后验样本、混合后验样本和在线样本均值的中位数。该规则通过减轻次优臂的高估和最优臂的低估来系统校正分布偏移引起的偏差。

Result: 建立了理论保证，证明算法能安全利用离线数据加速在线学习，并量化了分布偏移程度和离线数据大小对遗憾减少的影响。大量实验表明算法在基准测试中持续优于基线方法。

Conclusion: Anchor-TS通过中位数锚定规则有效解决了TS在离线到在线学习中的分布偏移问题，既能利用离线信息获得更准确估计，又能系统校正偏差，实现了安全高效的离线数据利用。

Abstract: Offline-to-online learning aims to improve online decision-making by leveraging offline logged data. A central challenge in this setting is the distribution shift between offline and online environments. While some existing works attempt to leverage shifted offline data, they largely rely on UCB-type algorithms. Thompson sampling (TS) represents another canonical class of bandit algorithms, well known for its strong empirical performance and naturally suited to offline-to-online learning through its Bayesian formulation. However, unlike UCB indices, posterior samples in TS are not guaranteed to be optimistic with respect to the true arm means. This makes indices constructed from purely online and hybrid data difficult to compare and complicates their use. To address this issue, we propose sample-mean anchored TS (Anchor-TS), which introduces a novel median-based anchoring rule that defines the arm index as the median of an online posterior sample, a hybrid posterior sample, and the online sample mean. The median anchoring systematically corrects bias induced by distribution shift by mitigating over-estimation for suboptimal arms and under-estimation for optimal arms, while exploiting offline information to obtain more accurate estimates when the shift is small. We establish theoretical guarantees showing that the proposed algorithm safely leverages offline data to accelerate online learning, and quantifying how the degree of distribution shift and the size of offline data affect the resulting regret reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements of our algorithm over baselines.

</details>


### [795] [LeapTS: Rethinking Time Series Forecasting as Adaptive Multi-Horizon Scheduling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10292)
*Sheng Pan,Ming Jin,Bo Du,Shirui Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LeapTS将时间序列预测重构为预测范围内的动态调度过程，通过分层控制器和神经控制微分方程实现多级决策，显著提升预测性能并加速推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测模型大多将预测视为从历史到目标范围的固定映射，导致未来时间点之间的时间解耦，限制了模型在预测过程中适应动态上下文的能力。

Method: LeapTS框架将预测重构为动态调度过程：1) 分层控制器动态选择每个步骤的最佳预测尺度和前进长度；2) 神经控制微分方程驱动的连续时间状态演化。控制更新机制将不规则时间动态与离散调度反馈显式耦合。

Result: 在真实世界和合成数据集上的评估显示，LeapTS将整体预测性能提升至少7.4%，同时相比代表性的Transformer模型实现2.6倍到5.3倍的推理加速。通过追踪调度轨迹，模型能够自主适应非平稳动态。

Conclusion: LeapTS通过将时间序列预测重构为动态调度过程，解决了现有模型的时间解耦问题，显著提升了预测性能和效率，并能自主适应非平稳动态。

Abstract: Time series forecasting serves as an essential tool for many real-world applications, supporting tasks such as resource optimization and decision-making. Despite significant architectural advancements, most modern models still treat forecasting task as a fixed mapping from history to target horizons. This induces temporal decoupling across future time points and limits the model's ability to adapt to the evolving context as forecasting progresses. In this work, we present LeapTS, a novel framework that reformulates time series forecasting as a dynamic scheduling process over the prediction horizon. Specifically, LeapTS organizes the forecasting process into multi-level decisions using: (1) the hierarchical controller to dynamically select the optimal prediction scale and advancement length at each step, and (2) continuous-time state evolution driven by neural controlled differential equations. Within this process, the controlled update mechanism explicitly couples the irregular temporal dynamics with discrete scheduling feedback. Extensive evaluations on both real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that LeapTS improves overall forecasting performance by at least 7.4% while achieving a 2.6$\times$ to 5.3$\times$ inference speedup over representative Transformer-based models. Furthermore, by explicitly tracing the scheduling trajectories, we reveal how the model autonomously adapts its forecasting behavior to capture non-stationary dynamics.

</details>


### [796] [Robust Probabilistic Shielding for Safe Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10293)
*Maris F. L. Galesloot,Thomas Rhemrev,Nils Jansen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 将屏蔽机制引入离线强化学习，在策略改进过程中提供安全保证，同时提升平均和最差情况性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习中存在两个关键挑战：性能保证和安全保证。现有方法如安全策略改进（SPI）提供性能保证，但缺乏安全保证；而屏蔽机制在安全RL中提供安全保证。本文旨在将这两种范式结合，为离线RL提供既安全又高性能的解决方案。

Method: 将屏蔽机制扩展到离线强化学习，仅依赖可用数据集和安全状态知识。在策略改进步骤中应用屏蔽，通过限制动作空间到可证明安全的动作，保证策略安全。开发了屏蔽SPI方法，在离线数据集上训练时确保安全约束。

Result: 实验结果表明，屏蔽SPI在性能上优于未屏蔽的SPI，特别是在低数据情况下，能够同时提升平均性能和最差情况性能，同时保证策略安全。

Conclusion: 通过将屏蔽机制与安全策略改进结合，成功为离线强化学习提供了安全保证，同时提升了策略性能，特别是在数据受限的情况下表现出更好的鲁棒性。

Abstract: In offline reinforcement learning (RL), we learn policies from fixed datasets without environment interaction. The major challenges are to provide guarantees on the (1) performance and (2) safety of the resulting policy. A technique called safe policy improvement (SPI) provides a performance guarantee: with high probability, the new policy outperforms a given baseline policy, which is assumed to be safe. Orthogonally, in the context of safe RL, a shield provides a safety guarantee by restricting the action space to those actions that are provably safe with respect to a given safety-relevant model. We integrate these paradigms by extending shielding to offline RL, relying solely on the available dataset and knowledge of safe and unsafe states. Then, we shield the policy improvement steps, guaranteeing, with high probability, a safe policy. Experimental results demonstrate that shielded SPI outperforms its unshielded counterpart, improving both average and worst-case performance, particularly in low-data regimes.

</details>


### [797] [Set Prediction for Next-Day Active Fire Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10298)
*Yuchen Bai,Georgios Athanasiou,Xin Yu,Diogenis Antonopoulos,Ioannis Papoutsis,Stijn Hantson,Nuno Carvalhais*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WISP 将次日野火预测重新定义为点集预测，通过匈牙利匹配和不对称分类-定位加权训练，在375米网格上预测固定大小的未来活跃火点中心排名集，相比传统方法能更直接表示局部火灾事件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习方法通常预测公里尺度每日网格的野火危险或概率，这对区域预警有用，但不能直接表示局部火灾事件。需要更精确的次日活跃火灾预测来支持早期预警、灾害响应、风险评估和碳排放估算。

Method: 提出Wildfire Ignition Set Predictor (WISP)，将次日活跃火灾预测重新定义为点集预测。模型使用48小时协变量（气象、卫星植被产品、静态土地和火灾历史），在375米网格上预测固定大小的未来活跃火点中心排名集。采用匈牙利匹配进行端到端训练，使用不对称分类-定位加权解决分类分数在分配、排名和查询激活中的冲突角色。

Result: 在覆盖全球火灾区域的测试集上，最佳WISP变体达到38.2%的平均精度（AP）用于排名火点中心检测，覆盖53.4%的火灾集群质量（按火辐射功率加权），并将54.1%的观测集群定位在5公里范围内。

Conclusion: 稀疏集预测是高分率野火预测的可行表述，为这一领域未来工作提供了基准。WISP在直接表示局部火灾事件方面优于传统方法。

Abstract: Accurate next-day active fire forecasts can support early warning, disaster response, forest risk assessment, and downstream estimation of fire-related carbon emissions. Existing machine learning approaches to wildfire forecasting typically predict wildfire danger or fire probability on kilometre-scale daily grids, which is useful for regional warning but does not directly represent localized fire events. We propose Wildfire Ignition Set Predictor (WISP), a query-based model that reformulates next-day active fire forecasting as point-set prediction. From 48 hours of covariates including meteorology, satellite vegetation products, static land, and fire history, WISP predicts a fixed-size ranked set of future active fire cluster centres on a 375 m grid across globally distributed regions. The model is trained end-to-end with Hungarian matching; to address the conflicting roles of the classification score in assignment, ranking, and query activation, we use asymmetric classification-localization weighting in matching and loss. We further construct a globally distributed, hourly, multi-source benchmark for this task. On a held-out test set spanning fire regions worldwide, the best WISP variant achieves 38.2% average precision (AP) for ranked fire-centre detections, covers 53.4% of fire cluster mass weighted by fire radiative power (FRP), and localizes 54.1% of observed clusters within 5 km. These results establish sparse set prediction as a viable formulation for high-resolution wildfire forecasting and provide a benchmark for future work in this regime.

</details>


### [798] [Nearly-Optimal Algorithm for Adversarial Kernelized Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10299)
*Shogo Iwazaki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了对抗环境下的核化赌博机（高斯过程赌博机），提出了指数权重算法实现 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$ 的对抗遗憾界，并证明了该界在SE和Matérn核下是最优的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统核化赌博机假设环境是平稳的，但在现实应用中奖励函数可能被对手恶意操纵。本文旨在研究对抗环境下的核化赌博机，设计能够应对任意奖励序列的鲁棒算法。

Method: 采用指数权重算法（Exponential-weight algorithm），利用已知再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）的结构信息。还提出了使用Nyström近似的计算高效变体，以降低计算复杂度。

Result: 指数权重算法实现了 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$ 的对抗遗憾界，其中 $T$ 是总轮数，$γ_T$ 是最大信息增益。对于平方指数核和$ν$-Matérn核，证明了算法独立下界，表明该界在多项式对数因子内是最优的。Nyström近似变体在保持近乎最优遗憾保证的同时显著降低了计算复杂度。

Conclusion: 本文为对抗环境下的核化赌博机提供了首个理论保证，证明了指数权重算法在多项式对数因子内是最优的，并通过Nyström近似实现了计算效率与理论性能的良好平衡。

Abstract: This paper studies kernelized bandits (also known as Gaussian process bandits) in an adversarial environment, where the reward functions in a known reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) may be adversarially chosen at each round. We show that the exponential-weight algorithm achieves $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$ adversarial regret, where $T$ and $γ_T$ denote the number of total rounds and the maximum information gain, respectively. For squared exponential (SE) and $ν$-Matérn kernels, we also show algorithm-independent lower bounds that guarantee the optimality of our algorithm up to polylogarithmic factors. Furthermore, we present a computationally efficient variant of our algorithm using Nyström approximation while maintaining nearly optimal regret guarantees.

</details>


### [799] [Follow the Mean: Reference-Guided Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10302)
*Pedro M. P. Curvo,Maksim Zhdanov,Floor Eijkelboom,Jan-Willem van de Meent*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于流匹配的示例适应控制方法，通过改变参考集来引导预训练模型，无需微调或辅助网络


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可控生成方法通常依赖于微调、辅助网络或测试时搜索，这些方法存在局限性。本文探索流匹配模型的不同控制接口：通过示例进行适应控制

Method: 利用流匹配中确定性插值的速度场由条件端点均值决定的特性，提出两种实现：1) Reference-Mean Guidance：训练免费，从参考库计算闭式端点均值校正，应用于冻结的FLUX.2-klein模型；2) Semi-Parametric Guidance：通过显式均值锚点和学习残差精炼器实现，支持推理时交换参考集

Result: Reference-Mean Guidance能够控制颜色、身份、风格和结构，同时保持提示、种子和权重不变；Semi-Parametric Guidance在AFHQv2上匹配无条件DiT-B/4质量，同时允许推理时交换参考集

Conclusion: 流匹配模型可以通过示例适应实现可控生成，指向更广泛的研究方向：通过数据而非参数更新来适应生成模型

Abstract: Existing approaches to controllable generation typically rely on fine-tuning, auxiliary networks, or test-time search. We show that flow matching admits a different control interface: adaptation through examples. For deterministic interpolants, the velocity field is solely governed by a conditional endpoint mean; shifting this mean shifts the flow itself. This yields a simple principle for controllable generation: steer a pretrained model by changing the reference set it follows. We instantiate this idea in two forms. Reference-Mean Guidance is training-free: it computes a closed-form endpoint-mean correction from a reference bank and applies it to a frozen FLUX.2-klein (4B) model, enabling control of color, identity, style, and structure while keeping the prompt, seed, and weights fixed. Semi-Parametric Guidance amortizes the same idea through an explicit mean anchor and learned residual refiner, matching unconditional DiT-B/4 quality on AFHQv2 while allowing the reference set to be swapped at inference time. These results point to a broader direction: generative models that adapt through data, not parameter updates.

</details>


### [800] [Signature Approach for Contextual Bandits with Nonlinear and Path-dependent Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10313)
*Xin Guo,Grace He,Xinyu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于签名变换的上下文赌博机方法，用于处理非线性、路径依赖的奖励函数，通过签名空间线性化实现高效学习，获得次线性遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上下文赌博机方法难以处理非线性、路径依赖的奖励函数，需要一种既能保持序列结构表达力又能高效学习的方法。

Method: 利用签名的通用非线性特性，将连续路径依赖的奖励泛函近似为签名空间中的线性泛函，提出基于签名的分离上置信界算法DisSigUCB。

Result: 在有限性和非退化假设下，证明了数据相关的次线性遗憾界为\(\tilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{(d+m)KT})\)，在温度传感器监测、睡眠阶段分类和医院护士配置等应用中优于经典线性与核化方法。

Conclusion: 基于签名的变换为处理非线性、路径依赖的上下文赌博机问题提供了有效框架，在理论和实际应用中均表现出优越性能。

Abstract: We study contextual bandits with nonlinear and path-dependent rewards through a novel signature-transform-based approach. Leveraging the universal nonlinearity property of signatures, we approximate continuous path-dependent reward functionals by linear functionals in the signature space. This representation enables the use of efficient linear contextual bandit methods while preserving expressive sequential structure. Building on this framework, we propose \texttt{DisSigUCB}, a signature-based disjoint upper confidence bound (UCB) algorithm. Under boundedness and non-degeneracy assumptions, we prove a high-probability data-dependent sublinear regret bound of order \(\tilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{(d+m)KT})\) where \(d\) is the context dimension and \(m\) is the signature feature dimension. Synthetic experiments and numerical applications on temperature sensor monitoring, sleep-stage classification, and hospital nurse staffing demonstrate that \texttt{DisSigUCB} consistently outperforms classical linear and kernelized contextual bandit baselines in nonlinear and path-dependent settings.

</details>


### [801] [Active Tabular Augmentation via Policy-Guided Diffusion Inpainting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10315)
*Zheyu Zhang,Shuo Yang,Bardh Prenkaj,Gjergji Kasneci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TAP（表格增强策略）通过学习生成什么、何时注入的策略，而非仅关注分布保真度，在数据稀缺情况下显著提升下游模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成式表格增强方法过度关注分布保真度，但保真度高的生成样本并不一定能提升下游学习器的性能。存在"保真度-效用差距"：生成目标追求分布合理性，而增强成功需要注入的样本能降低学习器的评估损失。

Method: TAP结合扩散修复技术和轻量级、学习器条件化的策略，引导生成朝向高效用区域，并通过显式门控和保守窗口化承诺控制安全注入。策略不仅学习如何生成，还学习何时注入什么样本。

Result: 在7个真实世界数据集上，TAP在严重数据稀缺情况下始终优于强生成基线，分类准确率最高提升15.6个百分点，回归RMSE最高降低32%。

Conclusion: 仅关注分布保真度不足以实现有效的表格增强。TAP通过学习生成什么、何时注入的策略，成功弥合保真度-效用差距，为数据稀缺场景提供了有效的增强解决方案。

Abstract: Generative tabular augmentation is appealing in data-scarce domains, yet the prevailing focus on distributional fidelity does not reliably translate into better downstream models. We formalize a fidelity-utility gap: common generative objectives prioritize distributional plausibility, whereas augmentation succeeds only when injected samples reduce the current learner's held-out evaluation loss. This gap motivates learning not just how to generate, but what to generate and when to inject as training evolves. We propose TAP (Tabular Augmentation Policy), which couples diffusion inpainting with a lightweight, learner-conditioned policy to steer generation toward high-utility regions and controls safe injection via explicit gating and conservative windowed commitment. Under severe data scarcity, TAP consistently outperforms strong generative baselines on seven real-world datasets, improving classification accuracy by up to 15.6 percentage points and reducing regression RMSE by up to 32%.

</details>


### [802] [Relations Are Channels: Knowledge Graph Embedding via Kraus Decompositions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10317)
*Sayan Kumar Chaki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了基于Kraus通道结构的KGE理论框架，将关系算子形式化为满足线性、迹保持和完全正性的Kraus通道，并提出了KrausKGE模型，在N-to-N关系上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KGE模型中的关系算子缺乏理论原则性指导，作者识别了三个结构公理（线性、迹保持、完全正性）作为关系算子应满足的基本要求，为KGE模型提供理论基础。

Method: 基于Kraus表示定理，将关系算子形式化为Kraus通道结构；进一步推广到任意度量几何的w-Kraus通道；提出KrausKGE模型，支持1-to-N和N-to-N关系，无需显式路径编码器或实体嵌入范数约束。

Result: KrausKGE在N-to-N关系上持续优于强基线模型，性能增益随关系扇出单调增加，与理论预测一致；首次提出基于经验关系矩阵秩的理论复杂度度量。

Conclusion: 该工作为知识图谱嵌入提供了基于通道理论的统一框架，将现有算子模型作为特例包含，提出的KrausKGE模型在复杂关系建模上具有理论优势和实证效果。

Abstract: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models typically represent each relation as an operator on entity embeddings. In this work, we identify three structural axioms that any principled relation operator must satisfy, linearity, trace preservation, and complete positivity, and show that they characterize a Kraus channel structure via the Kraus representation theorem. The completeness constraint defining this family is equivalent to these axioms, providing a principled foundation rather than an externally imposed condition. Under this formulation, most existing operator-based KGE models are recoverable as special cases with Kraus rank $κ= 1$ under specific embedding choices. We further generalize this characterization to arbitrary metric geometries by introducing \mbox{w-Kraus} channels, which satisfy completeness by construction within their respective spaces. Building on this theory, we propose \textsc{KrausKGE}, a principled KGE model that naturally handles $1$-to-$N$ and $N$-to-$N$ relations, supports $k$-hop reasoning without requiring explicit path encoders, and eliminates the need for norm constraints on entity embeddings. Additionally, our framework yields the first theoretically grounded per-relation complexity measure in the KGE literature, with a provable lower bound in terms of the empirical relation matrix rank. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that \textsc{KrausKGE} consistently outperforms strong baselines on $N$-to-$N$ relations, with performance gains that increase monotonically with relation fan-out, in alignment with theoretical predictions.

</details>


### [803] [PowerStep: Memory-Efficient Adaptive Optimization via $\ell_p$-Norm Steepest Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10335)
*Yao Lu,Dengdong Fan,Shixun Zhang,Yonghong Tian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PowerStep是一种内存高效的优化器，通过非线性变换动量缓冲区实现坐标自适应，无需存储二阶矩统计，在Transformer模型上达到Adam的收敛速度同时减少一半内存。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自适应优化器（如Adam）在训练大规模神经网络时需维护梯度一阶和二阶矩的估计，导致显著的内存开销。需要一种既能保持坐标自适应性又更节省内存的优化方法。

Method: 基于ℓ_p-范数几何下的最速下降法，直接对动量缓冲区应用非线性变换实现坐标自适应。无需存储二阶矩统计，从而减少内存占用。支持与int8量化结合进一步压缩内存。

Result: 理论证明PowerStep在非凸随机优化中达到最优O(1/√T)收敛率。在124M到235B参数的Transformer模型实验中，匹配Adam收敛速度同时减少一半优化器内存。结合int8量化可减少约8倍内存且保持数值稳定。

Conclusion: PowerStep提供了一种原理清晰、可扩展且资源高效的大规模训练替代方案，在保持自适应优化器性能的同时显著降低内存需求。

Abstract: Adaptive optimizers, most notably Adam, have become the default standard for training large-scale neural networks such as Transformers. These methods maintain running estimates of gradient first and second moments, incurring substantial memory overhead. We introduce PowerStep, a memory-efficient optimizer that achieves coordinate-wise adaptivity without storing second-moment statistics. Motivated by steepest descent under an $\ell_p$-norm geometry, we show that applying a nonlinear transform directly to a momentum buffer yields coordinate-wise adaptivity. We prove that PowerStep converges at the optimal $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ rate for non-convex stochastic optimization. Extensive experiments on Transformer models ranging from 124M to 235B parameters demonstrate that PowerStep matches Adam's convergence speed while halving optimizer memory. Furthermore, when combined with aggressive \texttt{int8} quantization, PowerStep remains numerically stable and reduces optimizer memory by $\sim\!8\times$ compared to full-precision Adam. PowerStep thus provides a principled, scalable and resource-efficient alternative for large-scale training. Code is available at https://github.com/yaolubrain/PowerStep.

</details>


### [804] [Foundations of Reliable Inference: Reliability-Efficiency Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10351)
*Jiayi Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出一个统一框架，从两个角度研究如何在保持可靠不确定性量化的同时降低贝叶斯学习计算开销


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可靠推理需要AI模型提供可信的不确定性估计，而不仅仅是准确预测。随着贝叶斯学习的发展，设计标准已从单纯追求可靠性转向同时考虑可靠性和效率的协同设计，即在保持可信不确定性量化的同时减少计算开销。

Method: 从两个视角开发统一框架来研究高效可靠推理问题

Result: 论文提出一个系统性的解决方案框架，旨在平衡贝叶斯学习中的计算效率与不确定性量化可靠性

Conclusion: 该研究为"能否高效执行可靠推理"这一核心问题提供了理论框架，推动了AI模型在保持不确定性量化可信度的同时降低计算成本的发展方向

Abstract: Reliable inference requires that artificial intelligence (AI) models provide trustworthy uncertainty estimates, not merely accurate predictions. Recent advances in Bayesian learning have made significant progress toward this goal, and growing concerns about computational overhead have jointly shifted the design criterion from reliability alone to the co-design of reliability and efficiency, i.e., reducing computational overhead while preserving trustworthy uncertainty quantification. This thesis develops a unified framework from two perspectives to address the central question: can we efficiently perform reliable inference?

</details>


### [805] [DeepLévy: Learning Heavy-Tailed Uncertainty in Highly Volatile Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10364)
*Yang Yang,Du Yin,Hao Xue,Flora Salim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DeepLévy：一种通过特征函数匹配学习Lévy稳定分布混合的神经框架，用于重尾时间序列的概率预测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度概率预测模型在捕捉重尾时间序列中的极端事件方面存在困难，而Lévy稳定分布虽然能建模此类非高斯行为，但其概率密度函数的不可处理性限制了基于似然的传统推断方法。

Method: 通过最小化经验特征函数与参数化特征函数之间的差异，学习Lévy稳定分布的混合模型；采用混合机制自适应学习多个Lévy分量的上下文相关权重和参数，实现灵活的多时间范围不确定性建模。

Result: 在真实和合成数据集上的评估表明，DeepLévy在尾部风险指标上优于最先进的深度概率预测方法，特别是在极端波动条件下表现更优。

Conclusion: DeepLévy通过特征函数匹配有效解决了Lévy稳定分布密度函数不可处理的问题，为建模重尾时间序列中的极端事件提供了一种有效的神经框架。

Abstract: Modeling uncertainty in heavy-tailed time series remains a critical challenge for deep probabilistic forecasting models, which often struggle to capture abrupt, extreme events. While Lévy stable distributions offer a natural framework for modeling such non-Gaussian behaviors, the intractability of their probability density functions severely limits conventional likelihood-based inference. To address this, we introduce DeepLévy, a neural framework that learns mixtures of Lévy stable distributions by minimizing the discrepancy between empirical and parametric characteristic functions. DeepLévy incorporates a mixture mechanism that adaptively learns context-dependent weights and parameters over multiple Lévy components, enabling flexible multi-horizon uncertainty modeling. Evaluations on both real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that DeepLévy outperforms state-of-the-art deep probabilistic forecasting approaches in tail risk metrics, especially under extreme volatility.

</details>


### [806] [PC3D: Zero-Shot Cooperation Across Variable Rosters via Personalized Context Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10377)
*Ahmet Onur Akman,Rafał Kucharski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PC3D是一种通过个性化中央协调上下文蒸馏训练去中心化策略的方法，使智能体能够从局部历史中恢复团队协调上下文并适应不同团队规模


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体强化学习通常假设固定执行团队，但实际部署中团队规模会变化。智能体只能基于局部历史行动，没有执行时通信或在线重训练，因此需要恢复团队上下文并适应不同规模

Method: PC3D（个性化中央协调上下文蒸馏）：训练时，集结构中央教师将活跃团队压缩为协调令牌并个性化到智能体特定上下文，蒸馏到去中心化策略中；执行时，每个智能体从局部历史预测自身上下文并自适应地用于决策

Result: 在三个合作多智能体强化学习基准测试中，PC3D在可见和未见团队规模下均获得比基线更高的回报，消融实验表明这些增益归因于上下文蒸馏和自适应上下文使用

Conclusion: PC3D通过个性化中央协调上下文蒸馏，使去中心化策略能够有效适应变化的团队规模，在无需执行时通信或在线重训练的情况下实现更好的合作性能

Abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning often assumes a fixed execution team, yet many decentralized systems must operate with varying numbers of active agents during deployment. We study this setting under episodic roster variation: each episode is executed by a set of homogeneous agents, with the team size varying across episodes. Agents act only from local histories, without execution-time communication, privileged coordinators, or online retraining. Therefore, effective cooperation requires each agent to recover relevant context about the active team and adapt its behavior accordingly. To this end, we propose PC3D (Personalized Central Coordination Context Distillation), a method for training decentralized policies to recover and use personalized coordination context from local interaction histories. During training, a set-structured centralized teacher compresses the active team into coordination tokens and personalizes them into agent-specific contexts, which are distilled into decentralized policies. At execution, each agent predicts its own context from local history and adaptively uses it to condition decision-making. Across three cooperative MARL benchmarks, PC3D achieves higher returns than the evaluated baselines with both seen and unseen roster sizes, and ablations attribute these gains to both context distillation and adaptive context use.

</details>


### [807] [The Polynomial Counting Capabilities of Message Passing Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10393)
*Marco Sälzer,Pascal Bergsträßer,Anthony W. Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了消息传递神经网络（MPNN）在多项式计数约束下的表达能力，探讨了使用局部和全局均值聚合来扩展分级模态逻辑的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然已有研究证明MPNN能够表达线性算术约束（如阈值计数），但对其在多项式计数约束下的表达能力了解有限。本文旨在探索MPNN超越线性算术的计数能力，特别是使用局部和全局均值聚合来实现扩展的分级模态逻辑。

Method: 主要利用局部和全局均值聚合，研究MPNN表达多项式计数约束的条件。分析了不同图结构和聚合方式（均值、求和、最大值）对表达能力的影响，特别关注树状结构和正则图的特殊情况。

Result: 1. 在温和假设下，全局多项式计数约束可以通过均值MPNN在节点标记图中检查。2. 局部约束检查需要满足以下条件之一：(i)允许求和/最大值聚合且公式无嵌套模态；(ii)仅限制于正则图且公式无嵌套模态。3. 对于具有嵌套模态的公式，可以在树状结构图中通过均值MPNN捕获。

Conclusion: MPNN在多项式计数约束方面具有相当强的表达能力，但需要根据图结构和聚合方式的不同施加适当限制。均值聚合在特定条件下足以表达复杂的计数约束，为扩展分级模态逻辑提供了理论基础。

Abstract: The counting power of Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNN) has been the subject of many recent papers, showing that they can express logic that involves counting up to a threshold or more generally satisfy a linear arithmetic constraint. In this paper, we study the counting capabilities of MPNN beyond linear arithmetic, primarily utilising local and global mean aggregations. In particular, our goal is to tease out conditions required to express extensions of graded modal logic with polynomial counting constraints. We show that global polynomial counting constraints in node-labelled graphs can be checked using mean MPNN under mild assumptions. Checking local constraints is also possible, if we consider formulas with no nested modalities and additionally either (i) permit sum/max aggregations, or (ii) only restrict to regular graphs. We also show how formulas with nested modalities can be captured by mean MPNN over graphs with tree-like structures and similar assumptions.

</details>


### [808] [Causal Explanations from the Geometric Properties of ReLU Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10396)
*Hector Woods,Philippa Ryan,Rob Alexander*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于ReLU神经网络几何结构的方法，直接从网络几何中提取规则生成因果解释，准确反映网络行为，解决了传统可解释方法因使用简化模型而导致的性能下降和准确性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络控制策略难以解释，这给自主系统的安全保证带来挑战。现有可解释AI方法多使用简化模型，虽然可解释但性能显著下降，且不能保证准确反映原始模型的决策过程，无法用于安全保证。

Method: 利用ReLU神经网络的几何特性：ReLU网络对应分段线性函数，将输入空间划分为由n维凸多面体定义的区域。通过这种几何表示，直接从ReLU激活函数神经网络的几何结构中提取规则，生成因果解释。

Result: 该方法能够生成类似于先前工作的因果解释，但由于直接从神经网络几何中提取规则，因此能够准确反映网络的行为，避免了传统简化模型方法的性能下降和准确性问题。

Conclusion: 基于ReLU神经网络几何结构的方法能够提供准确反映原始模型行为的因果解释，为自主系统的安全保证提供了更可靠的可解释性工具。

Abstract: Neural networks have proved an effective means of learning control policies for autonomous systems, but these learned policies are difficult to understand due to the black-box nature of neural networks. This lack of interpretability makes safety assurance for such autonomous systems challenging. The fields of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) and eXplainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) aim to interpret the decision making processes of neural networks and autonomous agents, respectively. In particular, work on causal explanations aims to provide "why" and "why not" explanations for why a model made a given decision. However, most of the work on explainability to date utilises a distilled version of the original model. While this distilled policy is interpretable, it necessarily degrades in performance significantly when compared to the original model, and is not guaranteed to be an accurate reflection of the decision making processes in the original model and as such cannot be used to guarantee its safety. Recent work on understanding the geometry of ReLU neural networks shows that a ReLU network corresponds to a piecewise linear function divided into regions defined by an n-dimensional convex polytope. Through this lens, a neural network can be understood as dividing the input space into distinct regions which apply a single linear function for each output neuron. We show that this geometric representation can be used to generate causal explanations for the network's behaviour similar to previous work, but which extracts rules directly from the geometry of Neural Networks with the ReLU activation function, and is therefore an accurate reflection of the network's behaviour.

</details>


### [809] [Valid Best-Model Identification for LLM Evaluation via Low-Rank Factorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10405)
*Elad Tolochinsky,Yaniv Tenzer,Yaniv Romano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个结合多臂老虎机与低秩预测的框架，通过双重稳健估计器减少模型评估成本，在保证统计有效性的同时准确识别最佳模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在固定基准测试中全面评估所有LLM成本高昂，传统MAB方法虽能减少评估次数，但结合低秩预测的分数可能存在偏差，可能导致识别错误的最佳模型。

Method: 提出结合MAB与廉价预测分数的原则性框架，使用双重稳健估计器估计每个模型性能，利用低秩预测减少方差，构建有效的有限样本置信区间。

Result: 在真实世界基准测试中，该方法显著减少了所需评估次数，在节省计算和成本的同时准确识别出最佳性能模型。

Conclusion: 该框架在保证统计有效性的前提下，成功结合了MAB的序列选择和低秩预测的优势，为LLM评估提供了高效且可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Selecting the best large language model (LLM) for a fixed benchmark is often expensive, since exhaustive evaluation requires running every model on every example. Multi-armed bandit (MAB) algorithms can reduce the number of LLM calls by sequentially selecting the next model-example pair to evaluate, thereby avoiding wasted evaluations on clearly underperforming models. Further savings can be achieved by predicting model scores from the partially observed model-example score matrix using low-rank factorization. However, such predictions are not ground truth: they can be biased and may therefore lead to incorrect identification of the best model. In this work, we propose a principled framework that combines MAB with cheap predicted scores without compromising statistical validity. Specifically, we derive doubly robust estimators of each model's performance that use the low-rank predictions to reduce variance. This enables the construction of valid finite-sample confidence intervals in our setting, where models are selected adaptively and examples are sampled without replacement. Empirical results on real-world benchmarks show that our approach reduces the number of required evaluations, yielding meaningful savings in compute and cost while accurately identifying the best-performing model.

</details>


### [810] [Identified-Set Geometry of Distributional Model Extraction under Top-$K$ Censored API Access](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10407)
*Wenhua Nie,ZiCheng Zhu,Jianan Wu,Binhan Luo,Haoran Zheng,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究现代LLM API仅暴露top-K logit分数并隐藏剩余词汇时，位置分布恢复的限制。发现兼容教师分布构成一个可识别集合，其总变差直径与KL恢复有明确界限。实验显示分层提取能力：top-K蒸馏仅恢复12%私有能力，完整logit蒸馏恢复56%，生成式提取恢复96%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代LLM API通常只暴露top-K logit分数并隐藏剩余词汇，这种访问模式对分布恢复能力的限制尚不明确。需要量化在这种受限访问下，攻击者能够恢复教师模型分布的程度，以及这种限制对能力提取的影响。

Method: 理论分析：建立兼容教师分布的识别集，计算总变差直径；给出KL恢复的可计算二元端点下界和渐近匹配的小模糊上界，扩展到参考感知攻击者。实验验证：在Qwen3数学推理教师模型上进行实验，比较三种提取方法：on-task top-K蒸馏、完整logit蒸馏和生成式提取。

Result: 理论结果：兼容教师分布的总变差直径精确为U_K=(V-K)exp(τ)/(Z_A+(V-K)exp(τ))。KL恢复有明确界限。实验发现：top-K蒸馏仅恢复12%私有能力，完整logit蒸馏恢复56%（尽管KL闭合达99%），生成式提取恢复96%。

Conclusion: top-K审查限制了每个位置的分布恢复，但本身并不能防止能力提取，这揭示了在仅提示logit蒸馏中保真度和迁移能力之间的分离。即使分布恢复有限，攻击者仍能有效提取模型能力。

Abstract: Modern LLM APIs often reveal only top-$K$ logit scores and censor the remaining vocabulary. We study the per-position distribution-recovery limits of this access model. For censoring threshold $τ$, the compatible teacher distributions form an identified set whose total-variation diameter is exactly $U_K=(V-K)\exp(τ)/(Z_A+(V-K)\exp(τ))$, where $Z_A$ is the observed partition function. For KL recovery, we give a computable binary-endpoint lower bound and an asymptotically matching small-ambiguity upper bound, with an extension to reference-aware attackers. Experiments on a Qwen3 math-reasoning teacher reveal a layered extraction hierarchy: on-task top-$K$ distillation recovers 12% of private capability, full-logit distillation recovers 56% despite 99% KL closure, and generation-based extraction recovers 96%. Top-$K$ censoring therefore limits per-position distribution recovery but does not by itself prevent capability extraction, separating fidelity from transfer in prompt-only logit distillation.

</details>


### [811] [Equilibrium Residuals Expose Three Regimes of Matrix-Game Strategic Reasoning in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10410)
*Wenhua Nie,Binhan Luo,Zijie Meng,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang,Ching-Wen Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 大语言模型在博弈论基准测试中表现良好，但一旦移除语义线索，在相同策略计算上就会失败。研究通过程序生成的零和矩阵游戏揭示了这一差距，并提出了改进方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型在博弈论基准测试中依赖语义线索而非真正的策略推理能力，这可能导致评估失真。研究旨在开发能准确衡量模型策略推理能力的评估方法。

Method: 使用程序生成的零和矩阵游戏作为基准，通过匿名化支付矩阵移除语义线索。采用监督微调和可剥削性奖励训练来提升模型性能，并分析可剥削性残差的Lipschitz性质。

Result: 模型在匿名化后的支付矩阵上表现大幅下降（2×2:34%, 3×3:18%, 5×5:2%）。监督微调将5×5-7×7游戏成功率从2%提升至61%，可剥削性奖励训练平均37%但方差大。证明可剥削性残差在支付扰动下是2-Lipschitz连续的。

Conclusion: 程序化评估对于衡量策略推理能力是必要的，可剥削性残差为近似均衡计算提供了一条实际但受格式限制的途径。模型能够解决嵌入在较大矩阵中的小规模游戏，但无法处理密集的大规模游戏。

Abstract: Large language models can score well on named game-theory benchmarks while failing on the same strategic computation once semantic cues are removed. We show this gap with procedurally generated zero-sum matrix games: a model that recognizes familiar games drops to 34%, 18%, and 2% success on anonymous $2{\times}2$, $3{\times}3$, and $5{\times}5$ payoff matrices. The benchmark separates semantic recall, learned approximate Nash computation, and an output-interface bottleneck that limits scale. Training only on $2{\times}2$ and $3{\times}3$ games, supervised fine-tuning raises unseen $5{\times}5$--$7{\times}7$ success from 2% to 61%, while exploitability-reward training averages 37% with high seed variance. We prove that the exploitability residual is $2$-Lipschitz in payoff perturbations, unlike discontinuous vertex-returning LP equilibrium selectors, explaining why residual training can transfer under payoff shifts even when formatting instability limits mean performance. A dominated-action padding experiment provides causal evidence: trained models solve $3{\times}3$ games embedded in much larger matrices, while random-padded controls fail and dense $12{\times}12$ games remain near failure. Procedural evaluation is therefore necessary for measuring strategic reasoning, and residual rewards expose a real but format-limited route to approximate equilibrium computation.

</details>


### [812] [Remember to Forget: Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10414)
*Riccardo Ali,Alessio Borgi,Christopher Irwin,Mario Severino,Pietro Liò*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GAPE（门控自适应位置编码），作为旋转位置编码的即插即用增强模块，通过内容感知的偏置机制解决长序列外推时的注意力退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旋转位置编码在序列长度超出训练范围时，旋转相位会进入分布外区域，导致虚假的长距离对齐、注意力分散和检索性能下降。现有方法往往在局部位置分辨率和长上下文稳定性之间进行权衡，无法完全解决这些问题。

Method: GAPE在保持旋转几何结构的同时，将内容感知偏置直接引入注意力logits。通过查询相关的门控机制压缩无关上下文，通过键相关的门控机制保留重要的远距离token，实现距离抑制与token重要性之间的解耦。

Result: 理论证明保护token保持可访问性，而分配给未保护远距离token的注意力质量随查询门控衰减。实验验证GAPE在合成检索和长上下文基准测试中，相比旋转基线始终产生更尖锐的注意力和更好的长上下文鲁棒性。

Conclusion: GAPE是一种有效的旋转位置编码增强方法，能够在不牺牲局部位置分辨率的情况下，显著提升模型在长序列外推时的注意力质量和长上下文处理能力。

Abstract: Rotary Positional Encoding (RoPE) is widely used in modern large language models. However, when sequences are extended beyond the range seen during training, rotary phases can enter out-of-distribution regimes, leading to spurious long-range alignments, diffuse attention, and degraded retrieval. Existing remedies only partially address these failures, as they often trade local positional resolution for long-context stability. We propose GAPE (Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding), a drop-in augmentation for positional encodings that introduces a content-aware bias directly into the attention logits while preserving the rotary geometry. GAPE decouples distance-based suppression from token importance through a query-dependent gate that contracts irrelevant context and a key-dependent gate that preserves salient distant tokens. We prove that protected tokens remain accessible, while the attention mass assigned to unprotected distant tokens decays as a function of the query gate.
