We further show that GAPE can be implemented within standard scaled dot-product attention. We validate these properties empirically, finding that GAPE consistently yields sharper attention and improved long-context robustness over rotary baselines across both synthetic retrieval and long-context benchmarks.

</details>


### [813] [Real vs. Semi-Simulated: Rethinking Evaluation for Treatment Effect Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10430)
*George Panagopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究通过大规模实证分析发现，因果机器学习中的反事实评估指标与可观测评估指标之间存在不一致性，且半模拟基准的评估结果无法推广到真实数据集，建议研究评估应结合可观测指标和真实数据验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前因果机器学习研究存在评估体系的分歧：方法论研究通常依赖反事实指标和半模拟基准，而实际应用则依赖基于排序或测试结果的可观测指标。这两种评估体系之间的关系尚未得到系统研究。

Method: 采用大规模实证研究方法，在标准半模拟基准数据集家族和真实数据集上评估多种处理效应估计方法。评估方法包括元学习器与多种基础学习器的组合，以及专门的因果机器学习模型。使用应用导向文献中常见的可观测指标和方法论文中常用的反事实指标进行对比评估。

Result: 研究发现两个互补的差距：1）反事实指标无法可靠地恢复可观测指标偏好的估计器，即使在相同的半模拟基准上也是如此；2）在半模拟基准上获得的排名无法迁移到真实数据集。此外，具有强大基础模型的简单元学习器始终具有竞争力，而专门的因果模型表现相对较差。

Conclusion: 因果效应估计研究的进展不应仅通过反事实指标和半模拟基准来评估，而应结合可观测指标和真实数据验证，以弥合方法论研究与实际应用之间的差距。

Abstract: Estimating heterogeneous treatment effects with machine learning has attracted substantial attention in both academic research and industrial practice. However, the two communities often evaluate models under markedly different conditions. Methodological work typically relies on semi-simulated benchmarks and metrics that require counterfactual outcomes, whereas real-world applications rely on observable metrics based on ranking or test outcomes. Despite the well-known gap between methodological progress and practical deployment, the relationship between these evaluation regimes has not been examined systematically. We conduct a large-scale empirical study of treatment effect evaluation across standard semi-simulated benchmark families and real-world datasets. Our benchmark covers meta-learners paired with multiple base learners, as well as specialized causal machine learning models. We evaluate these methods using observable metrics common in application-oriented literature, alongside counterfactual metrics commonly used in methods papers. Our results reveal two complementary gaps. First, counterfactual metrics do not reliably recover the estimators preferred by observable metrics, even on the same semi-simulated benchmarks. Second, rankings obtained on semi-simulated benchmarks do not transfer to real datasets. We further find that simple meta-learners with strong base models are consistently competitive, in contrast to specialized causal models. Overall, our findings suggest that progress in treatment effect estimation research should not be assessed solely through counterfactual metrics and semi-simulated benchmarks, but it would benefit from incorporating observable metrics and real-data validation.

</details>


### [814] [Don't Fix the Basis -- Learn It: Spectral Representation with Adaptive Basis Learning for PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10451)
*Xuxiang Zhao,Angelica I. Aviles-Rivero*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ABLE框架通过学习数据依赖的光谱表示，替代固定全局基函数，提升谱神经算子在处理空间异质性和多尺度PDE问题时的表达能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统谱神经算子使用固定全局基函数，难以有效表示空间异质性和多尺度动力学，限制了其表达能力。

Method: 提出自适应基学习(ABLE)框架，通过学习的辅助密度构建空间自适应Parseval框架，在提升的光谱空间中操作，保持可逆性和O(NlogN)复杂度（基于FFT实现）。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，ABLE相比强基线提升准确性，在梯度急剧变化和多尺度特征的场景中改进最显著。作为现有模型（如U-FNO、HPM）的增强模块，也能进一步提升性能。

Conclusion: 数据驱动的表示选择（而非算子复杂性）是神经算子设计的关键瓶颈。ABLE通过学习基函数本身，为改进PDE学习中的谱方法提供了原则性和高效的框架。

Abstract: Spectral neural operators achieve strong performance for PDE learning, but rely on fixed global bases that limit their ability to represent spatially heterogeneous and multiscale dynamics. We propose Adaptive Basis Learning (ABLE), a framework that learns data-dependent spectral representations instead of relying on predefined bases. ABLE constructs a spatially adaptive Parseval frame via a learned ancillary density, enabling the operator to act in a lifted spectral space while preserving invertibility and maintaining $O(N\log N)$ complexity through FFT-based implementation. This shifts the source of expressivity from spectral coefficients to the representation itself, allowing the model to capture localized structures and non-translation-invariant interactions more efficiently. ABLE integrates seamlessly into existing neural operator architectures as a drop-in replacement for spectral layers. Across a range of benchmarks ABLE improves accuracy over strong baselines, with the largest gains in regimes characterized by sharp gradients and multiscale behavior. Moreover, augmenting existing models (e.g., U-FNO, HPM) with ABLE further enhances their performance, demonstrating its role as a general and complementary spectral refinement. Our results highlight that the data-driven choice of representation, rather than operator complexity alone, is a key bottleneck in neural operator design. By learning the basis itself, ABLE provides a principled and efficient framework for improving spectral methods in PDE learning.

</details>


### [815] [SlimSpec: Low-Rank Draft LM-Head for Accelerated Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10453)
*Anton Plaksin,Sergei Krutikov,Sergei Skvortsov,Alexander Samarin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SlimSpec提出了一种低秩参数化的草稿模型LM-head方法，通过压缩内部表示而非输出，在保持完整词汇表支持的同时，实现4-5倍的加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推测解码技术中，草稿模型的LM-head需要投影到大型词汇表，成为主要计算瓶颈。现有方法通过静态或动态词汇表截断来解决，但带来了额外的复杂性。

Method: SlimSpec采用低秩参数化草稿模型的LM-head，压缩内部表示而非输出，保留完整词汇表支持，最小化训练和推理流程的调整。

Result: 在EAGLE-3草稿模型上，SlimSpec相比标准LM-head架构实现4-5倍加速，同时保持有竞争力的接受长度，在端到端加速方面比现有方法提升8-9%。

Conclusion: SlimSpec是一种高效且易于实现的草稿模型LM-head优化方法，在各种草稿LM-head架构中具有广泛适用性。

Abstract: Speculative decoding speeds up autoregressive generation in Large Language Models (LLMs) through a two-step procedure, where a lightweight draft model proposes tokens which the target model then verifies in a single forward pass. Although the drafter network is small in modern architectures, its LM-head still performs projection to a large vocabulary, becoming one of the major computational bottlenecks. In prior work this issue has been predominantly addressed via static or dynamic vocabulary truncation. Yet mitigating the bottleneck, these methods bring in extra complexity, such as special vocabulary curation, sophisticated inference-time logic or modifications of the training setup. In this paper, we propose SlimSpec, a low-rank parameterization of the drafter's LM-head that compresses the inner representation rather than the output, preserving full vocabulary support. We evaluate our method with EAGLE-3 drafter across three target models and diverse benchmarks in both latency- and throughput-bound inference regimes. SlimSpec achieves $4\text{-}5\times$ acceleration over the standard LM-head architecture while maintaining a competitive acceptance length, surpassing existing methods by up to $8\text{-}9\%$ of the end-to-end speedup. Our method requires minimal adjustments of training and inference pipelines. Combined with the aforementioned speedup improvements, it makes SlimSpec a strong alternative across wide variety of draft LM-head architectures.

</details>


### [816] [AxiomOcean: Forecasting the Three-Dimensional Structure of the Upper Ocean](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10455)
*Sensen Wu,Yifan Chen,Guantao Pu,Xiaoyao Sun,Yijun Chen,Jin Qi,Ming Kong,Keyi Yang,Lichen Xu,Wenguan Wang,Xiaofeng Li,Zhenhong Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AxiomOcean是一个全球AI海洋预报模型，通过显式表示水柱中的垂直层次结构和跨层依赖关系，在三维结构中预测上层海洋的温度、盐度和三维海流，显著提升了短期海洋预报的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 短期海洋预报能力高度依赖于上层海洋的三维结构，但现有AI海洋预报模型往往无法保持这种垂直结构，导致次表层特征过度平滑，在强强迫下物理一致性较弱。

Method: 提出AxiomOcean模型，结合完全三维的编码器-主干-解码器架构与表面大气强迫，联合预测全球1/12°分辨率下至643米深度的上层海洋温度、盐度和三维海流。

Result: 在10天预报中，AxiomOcean在所有变量和预报时效上都优于先进的AI对比模型，将第1天的RMSE降低了约20-35%，同时保持更高的异常相关性。模型能更好地保持涡动能、温度盐度方差，在赤道太平洋、黑潮延伸体和南大洋等区域都表现出优势。

Conclusion: 显式保持上层海洋三维结构可以同时提高AI海洋预报的准确性和物理保真度，为改进AI海洋预测提供了重要方向。

Abstract: Short-term ocean forecast skill depends strongly on the three-dimensional ocean structure of the upper ocean, which governs stratification, subsurface heat storage, and the response of the ocean to atmospheric forcing. However, AI ocean forecasting models often fail to preserve this vertical structure, resulting in over-smoothed subsurface features and weak physical consistency under strong forcing. Here, we present AxiomOcean, a global AI ocean forecasting model that explicitly represents vertical hierarchy and cross-layer dependence within the water column. By combining a fully three-dimensional encoder-backbone-decoder architecture with surface atmospheric forcing, AxiomOcean jointly predicts upper-ocean temperature, salinity, and three-dimensional currents at global 1/12° resolution down to 643 m depth. In 10-day forecasts, AxiomOcean outperforms an advanced AI comparison model across variables and lead times, reducing day-1 RMSE by approximately 20 to 35% while maintaining higher anomaly correlation. The gain is not achieved through excessive smoothing: AxiomOcean better preserves eddy kinetic energy, temperature and salinity variance. Its advantage also extends through the water column and remains evident across the equatorial Pacific, Kuroshio Extension, and Southern Ocean, yielding a more realistic reconstruction of upper-ocean heat content. These results show that explicitly preserving upper-ocean three-dimensional structure can improve both forecast accuracy and physical fidelity in AI ocean prediction.

</details>


### [817] [QT-Net: Rethinking Evaluation of AI Models in Atomic Chemical Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10458)
*Pablo Martínez Crespo,Stefano Ribes,Martin Rahm,Richard Beckmann,Robert S. Jordan,Marisa Gliege,Santiago Miret,Vijay Kris Narasimhan,Rocío Mercado*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于原子环境聚类的分布外评估协议，用于比较E(3)等变与非等变模型在预测原子性质（电子布居和多极矩）上的表现，并引入了QT-Net模型，该模型能有效预测原子性质并提升下游分子性质预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原子性质（如部分电荷、多极矩）包含重要化学信息，可提升下游分子性质预测，但缺乏原子层面的分布外评估协议，使得这些性质作为机器学习目标的评估变得复杂。

Method: 提出基于SOAP描述符的原子环境聚类评估协议，使用5×5交叉验证和Tukey's HSD进行统计严谨的模型比较；引入QT-Net（一种旋转增强的非等变图神经网络），用于预测原子电子布居和多极矩。

Result: QT-Net能有效预测QM9数据集中训练集外原子的性质，这些推断的性质作为输入特征可提升下游分子性质预测性能；QT-Net预测的原子输出计算出的分子偶极矩能恢复QM9的真实值。

Conclusion: 提出的评估协议为原子性质预测提供了严谨的分布外评估框架；QT-Net展示了学习原子拓扑性质作为原子尺度分子机器学习归纳偏置的潜力，所有代码和数据已开源。

Abstract: Atomic properties such as partial charges or multipoles encode chemically meaningful information that can inform downstream molecular property prediction, but their evaluation as machine learning targets has been complicated by the absence of a principled out-of-distribution evaluation protocol at the atomic level. In this work, we propose a held-out evaluation protocol that clusters atomic environments by SOAP descriptors and computes metrics accounting only for cluster labels unseen during training. Following this procedure, we use 5$\times$5 cross-validation and Tukey's HSD to run a statistically rigorous comparison of E(3)-equivariant against non-equivariant, rotationally augmented models for predicting electron populations and multipoles of H, C, N, and O atoms. Building on our results, we introduce the Quantum Topological Neural Network (QT-Net), a rotationally augmented, non-equivariant graph neural network. We show that QT-Net can be used to infer properties of atoms in molecules from QM9 outside our training set, and that these inferred properties can yield improvement when used as input features for downstream molecular property prediction. To further validate the framework, molecular dipole moments computed from QT-Net's per-atom outputs recover the ground-truth values reported in QM9. We release all code and data, including a JAX implementation of QT-Net, to support the broader use of learned QTA properties as inductive biases for atomic-scale molecular machine learning.

</details>


### [818] [Self-Attention as a Covariance Readout: A Unified View of In-Context Learning and Repetition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10466)
*Haoren Xu,Guanhua Fang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过数学分析证明，在平稳、遍历、椭圆输入条件下，softmax注意力机制会收敛到对输入协方差矩阵的线性读取，从而统一解释了大语言模型中的上下文学习和重复生成两种现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型表现出两种看似无关的行为：上下文学习和重复生成。两者都显示出模型似乎将上下文总结为群体级统计量并丢弃了token级细节。本文旨在探究这种"总结与遗忘"现象是否可以从注意力机制本身推导出来。

Method: 在平稳、遍历、椭圆输入假设下，对softmax注意力输出进行数学分析，证明其几乎必然收敛到一个线性读取输入二阶统计量的形式。将此分析应用于上下文线性回归和L层transformer的传播过程。

Result: 1. 对于上下文线性回归，单个softmax头可以实现一步群体梯度下降；通过残差连接堆叠此类头可以实现多步梯度下降。2. 在L层transformer中，该读取机制以参数1/t的速率驱动终端隐藏状态收敛到仅依赖于当前token的确定性函数，使得自回归生成渐近地坍塌为一阶马尔可夫链。

Conclusion: 上下文学习和重复生成现象是同一协方差读取原理的两个方面。注意力机制在长上下文限制下自然地总结并遗忘token级细节，专注于二阶统计量，这为两种看似不同的模型行为提供了统一的数学解释。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit two striking and ostensibly unrelated behaviours: in-context learning (ICL) and repetitive generation. In both, the model behaves as though it had summarised the context into a population-level statistic and discarded token-level detail. We ask whether this ``summarisation and forgetting'' can be derived from the attention mechanism itself, and answer in the affirmative. Under stationary, ergodic and elliptical inputs, the softmax attention output converges almost surely to $Θ_VΣΘ_K^{\top}Θ_Q x_t$, where $Σ$ is the input covariance; the long-context limit is therefore a linear readout of the input's second-order statistics. Two consequences follow. (i) For in-context linear regression, a single softmax head can implement one step of population gradient descent. Stacking such heads with residual connections iterates this update and implements multiple gradient descent steps. (ii) Propagated across an $L$-layer transformer, this readout drives the terminal hidden state at the parametric $1/t$ rate to a deterministic function of the current token alone, so that autoregressive generation collapses asymptotically to a first-order Markov chain whose attracting orbits furnish a structural account of repetition and mode collapse. The two phenomena thus emerge as facets of a single covariance-readout principle.

</details>


### [819] [Can Muon Fine-tune Adam-Pretrained Models?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10468)
*Xingyu Qu,Peigeng Huang,Samuel Horvath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究了从Adam切换到Muon进行微调时的性能下降问题，发现这是由于优化器不匹配导致的隐式偏差差异，并通过LoRA限制更新强度来缓解这种不匹配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数开源模型使用Adam预训练，但在微调时直接切换到Muon会导致性能下降。研究旨在理解这种优化器不匹配的原因并找到缓解方法。

Method: 通过控制实验分析Adam和Muon的隐式偏差差异，提出使用LoRA（低秩适应）来约束模型更新强度，从而减少优化器不匹配的影响。在语言和视觉任务上进行验证。

Result: 实验表明优化器不匹配会破坏预训练知识，且这种破坏与更新强度成正比。LoRA能有效缩小Adam和Muon在微调时的性能差距，对LoRA秩、灾难性遗忘和变体的研究进一步证实了更新强度与不匹配严重性的相关性。

Conclusion: 优化器不匹配会影响微调性能，通过限制更新强度（如使用LoRA）可以有效缓解这一问题。这为理解优化器不匹配的影响和缓解方法提供了新的见解。

Abstract: Muon has emerged as an efficient alternative to Adam for pretraining, yet remains underused for fine-tuning. A key obstacle is that most open models are pretrained with Adam, and naively switching to Muon for fine-tuning leads to degraded performance due to an optimizer mismatch. We investigate this mismatch through controlled experiments and relate it to the distinct implicit biases of Adam and Muon. We provide evidence that the mismatch disrupts pretrained knowledge, and that this disruption scales with update strength. This leads us to hypothesize that constraining updates should mitigate the mismatch. We validate this with LoRA: across language and vision tasks, LoRA reduces the performance gap between Adam and Muon observed under full fine-tuning. Studies on LoRA rank, catastrophic forgetting, and LoRA variants further confirm that mismatch severity correlates with update strength. These results shed light on how optimizer mismatch affects fine-tuning and how it can be mitigated. Our code is available at https://github.com/XingyuQu/muon-finetune.

</details>


### [820] [Formally Verifying Analog Neural Networks Under Process Variations Using Polynomial Zonotopes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10474)
*Yasmine Abu-Haeyeh,Tobias Ladner,Matthias Althoff,Lars Hedrich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于多项式的模拟神经网络模型，用于应对制造工艺变化，并通过多项式zonotopes进行可达性分析来验证电路行为，大幅减少验证时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模拟神经网络虽然功耗低、处理速度快，但由于实现为物理电路，对制造工艺变化高度敏感，导致性能与名义模型偏差大。传统蒙特卡洛模拟耗时且效率低。

Method: 提出多项式模型来模拟工艺变化下的神经元电路性能，使用多项式zonotopes进行可达性分析，对全连接和卷积模拟神经网络进行形式化验证。

Result: 实验在三个数据集上进行，验证方法将验证时间从几天缩短到几秒，同时能包含99%的工艺变化样本，证明方法的高效性和准确性。

Conclusion: 提出的多项式模型和基于多项式zonotopes的可达性分析方法能有效验证模拟神经网络在工艺变化下的行为，大幅提升验证效率，为模拟神经网络的实际应用提供可靠验证手段。

Abstract: Analog neural networks are gaining attention due to their efficiency in terms of power consumption and processing speed. However, since analog neural networks are implemented as physical circuits, they are highly sensitive to manufacturing process variations, which can cause large deviations from the nominal model. We present a polynomial-based model that resembles the performance of the neuron circuit under process variations. Then, we formally verify the behavior of the circuit-level model using reachability analysis with polynomial zonotopes, thus, avoiding conventional, time-consuming Monte Carlo simulations. We evaluate our proposed verification approach on three different datasets, verifying both fully-connected and convolutional analog neural networks. Our experimental results confirm the effectiveness of our verification approach by reducing the verification time from days to seconds while enclosing 99% of the variation samples.

</details>


### [821] [CMKL: Modality-Aware Continual Learning for Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10510)
*Yousef A. Radwan,Yao Li,Qing Qing,Ziqi Xu,Qixin Zhang,Yongcheng Jing,Renqiang Luo,Xikun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CMKL是一个用于生物医学知识图谱的持续学习框架，能同时处理图结构、文本和分子等多模态信息，通过MoE路由和EWC正则化减少灾难性遗忘，在持续生物医学任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法及其持续学习扩展要么假设静态图结构，要么无法有效利用多模态信息，且采用统一的参数正则化，忽略了不同模态在知识图谱演化过程中可能表现出不同的遗忘动态。

Method: 提出CMKL框架，原生编码图结构、文本和分子信息，通过Mixture-of-Experts路由器进行融合，采用EWC正则化和K-means多样性多模态回放缓冲区来保护已学知识。

Result: 在包含10个任务的12.9万实体生物医学持续基准测试中，CMKL在持续实体分类任务上达到AP 0.591，比最强结构基线提高60%，遗忘率接近零；在关系预测任务上达到AP 0.062，与最佳基线相当。

Conclusion: CMKL成功解决了生物医学知识图谱持续学习中的多模态融合和遗忘管理问题，MoE路由机制能有效管理不可及模态，避免强制通过学习瓶颈，为大规模动态多模态知识图谱学习提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Biomedical knowledge graphs are increasingly large, dynamic, and multimodal, driven by rapid advances in biotechnology such as high-throughput sequencing. Machine learning models can infer previously unobserved biomedical relationships and characterize biomedical entities in these graphs, but existing knowledge graph embedding methods and their continual learning extensions either assume static graph structure or fail to exploit multimodal information under evolving data distributions. They also apply uniform regularization across all model parameters, ignoring that different modalities may exhibit distinct forgetting dynamics as the graph evolves. We propose the Continual Multimodal Knowledge Graph Learner (CMKL), a CL framework for biomedical KGs that natively encodes structure, text, and molecules, fuses them through a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) router, and protects previously learned knowledge with standard EWC regularization and a K-means-diverse multimodal replay buffer. We evaluate CMKL on a 129K-entity biomedical continual benchmark with 10 tasks. On continual biomedical entity classification, CMKL reaches AP 0.591 versus 0.370 for the strongest structural baseline, a 60% gain that is driven by access to multimodal features and preserved across the sequence with near-zero forgetting (AF 0.008). On continual relationship prediction, CMKL reaches AP $0.062$, matching Naive Sequential and EWC (0.058) within seed noise and outperforming Joint Training (0.047, p=0.045) and LKGE (0.039). A frozen-text ablation reaches AP 0.136, more than double any jointly trained model, yet that signal is unreachable by margin-ranking gradients: the greedy-modality asymmetry lives at the representation level, not the fusion level, and MoE routing manages it by suppressing the unreachable modality without forcing it through a learned bottleneck. Code: github.com/yradwan147/cmkl-neurips2026

</details>


### [822] [ConfoundingSHAP: Quantifying confounding strength in causal inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10533)
*Marie Brockschmidt,Santo M. A. R. Thies,Maresa Schröder,Dennis Frauen,Valentyn Melnychuk,Maximilian Muschalik,Eyke Hüllermeier,Stefan Feuerriegel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ConfoundingSHAP：一种基于Shapley值的方法，用于评估个体协变量的混杂强度，帮助识别观察性研究中哪些协变量是混杂因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在观察性研究中，处理分配机制未知，难以确定哪些协变量是混杂因素（同时影响治疗决策和结果）。传统SHAP方法用于理解治疗效应异质性，但不适合评估混杂强度。

Method: 提出针对混杂强度评估的Shapley博弈，并使用TabPFN-based估计方法高效评估价值函数，避免对大量调整集进行穷举重新拟合。

Result: 在多个数据集上验证，ConfoundingSHAP能够有效识别驱动混杂的协变量，为因果推断提供更深入的见解。

Conclusion: ConfoundingSHAP是一种实用的方法，能够帮助研究人员识别观察性研究中的混杂变量，从而提高因果推断的可靠性。

Abstract: In causal inference, confounders are variables that influence both treatment decisions and outcomes. However, unlike as in randomized clinical trials, the treatment assignment mechanism in observational studies is not known, and it is thus unclear which covariates act as confounders. Here, we aim to generate insight for causal inference and answer: which of the observed covariates act as confounders? We introduce ConfoundingSHAP, a Shapley-based method for attributing confounding strength to individual covariates. Our contributions are twofold. First, we propose a Shapley game targeted to infer the confounding strength of the covariates. Our resulting Shapley values differ from the standard applications of SHAP explanations on causal targets, such as understanding treatment effect heterogeneity, which are ill-suited for our task. Second, as our task requires evaluating the value function over many adjustment sets, we provide a scalable TabPFN-based estimation that avoids exhaustive refitting. We demonstrate the practical value across various datasets, where ConfoundingSHAP provides informative explanations of which observed covariates drive confounding and thereby helps to provide more insight for causal inference in practice.

</details>


### [823] [HH-SAE: Discovering and Steering Hierarchical Knowledge of Complex Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10536)
*Honghan Wu,Tianyan Wang,Jiacong Mi,Zhoyang Jiang,Yunsoo Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HH-SAE通过三层分解架构解决高维关键任务领域中的特征密度冲突问题，在欺诈检测和临床标签解析中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维关键任务领域中，稀有的语义创新常常被密集的背景上下文所掩盖，这种特征密度冲突问题阻碍了精确发现。

Method: 提出混合层次SAE（HH-SAE），将流形分解为三层嵌套层次：上下文层（L0）、原子层（f1）和组合层（f2）。

Result: 在跨领域欺诈检测中达到0.9156的零样本AUC，能够将临床管理标签"分解"为生理模式，路径消融显示移除上下文减法会导致13.46%的效用崩溃。

Conclusion: HH-SAE通过优先考虑高阶机制创新而非环境代理，在高风险环境中实现了高精度发现，知识引导合成比现有最佳生成器提升9.9%的AUPRC。

Abstract: Rare semantic innovations in high-dimensional, mission-critical domains are often obscured by dense background contexts, a challenge we define as \textit{feature density conflict}. We introduce the \textbf{Hybrid Hierarchical SAE (HH-SAE)} to resolve this by factorizing manifolds into a nested hierarchy of \textbf{Contextual} ($L_0$), \textbf{Atomic} ($f_1$), and \textbf{Compository} ($f_2$) tiers. Evaluating across disparate manifolds, HH-SAE demonstrates superior resolution by \textbf{``fracturing'' administrative clinical labels into physiological modes} and achieving a peak \textbf{cross-domain zero-shot AUC of 0.9156 in fraud detection}. Path ablation confirms the architecture's structural necessity, revealing a 13.46\% utility collapse when contextual subtraction is removed. Finally, knowledge-steered synthesis achieves a +9.9\% AUPRC lift over state-of-the-art generators, proving that HH-SAE effectively prioritizes high-order mechanistic innovation over environmental proxies to enable high-precision discovery in high-stakes environments.

</details>


### [824] [Higher Resolution, Better Generalization: Unlocking Visual Scaling in Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10546)
*Raphael Trumpp,Ömer Veysel Çağatan,Barış Akgün,Marco Caccamo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文挑战了深度强化学习中过度降采样视觉观察的惯例，发现高分辨率输入能显著提升策略学习和泛化能力，但需要合适的架构处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于像素的深度强化学习代理通常使用严重降采样的视觉观察进行训练，这种惯例源于早期基准测试而非基于原则设计。作者认为观测分辨率是一个关键但被忽视的变量。

Method: 通过比较不同分辨率下的性能，分析现有Impala编码器的局限性（参数随分辨率呈二次增长）。提出Impoola架构，使用全局平均池化替代扁平化操作，实现参数数量与分辨率解耦。在Procgen-HD基准上进行实验，并进行梯度显著性分析验证机制。

Result: 在最佳条件下，高分辨率输入使Impoola相比Impala性能提升28%。在需要精确感知小物体或远距离物体的环境中收益最大。梯度分析证实高分辨率下策略具有更空间局部化的视觉注意力。

Conclusion: 挑战了激进的输入降采样惯例，提出分辨率无关的架构是实现可扩展视觉深度强化学习的简单有效路径。发布了Procgen-HD基准的开源代码以促进未来研究。

Abstract: Pixel-based deep reinforcement learning agents are typically trained on heavily downsampled visual observations, a convention inherited from early benchmarks rather than grounded in principled design. In this work, we show that observation resolution is a critical yet overlooked variable for policy learning: higher-resolution inputs can substantially improve both performance and generalization, provided the network architecture can process them effectively. We find that the widely used Impala encoder, which flattens spatial features into a vector, suffers from quadratic parameter growth as resolution increases and fails to leverage the additional visual detail. Replacing this operation with global average pooling, as in the Impoola architecture, decouples parameter count from resolution and yields consistent improvements across resolutions and network widths - at their respective best conditions, visual scaling unlocks a 28 % performance gain for Impoola over Impala. These gains are strongest in environments that require precise perception of small or distant objects, and gradient saliency analysis confirms that the underlying mechanism is a more spatially localized visual attention of the policy at higher resolutions. Our results challenge the prevailing practice of aggressive input downsampling and position resolution-independent architectures as a simple, effective path toward scalable visual deep RL. To facilitate future research on resolution scaling in deep RL, we publicly release the open-source code for the Procgen-HD benchmark: https://github.com/raphajaner/procgen-hd.

</details>


### [825] [PhysEDA: Physics-Aware Learning Framework for Efficient EDA With Manhattan Distance Decay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10547)
*Zetao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PhysEDA提出了一种将物理先验集成到EDA任务中的方法，通过物理结构线性注意力(PSLA)降低计算复杂度，以及基于势的奖励塑形(PBRS)改善稀疏强化学习，在多个EDA场景中显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前EDA任务中使用的学习方法（如注意力机制和强化学习）面临两个瓶颈：1）传统注意力机制的二次复杂度限制了可扩展性；2）数据稀缺导致模型过拟合统计噪声，并放大了与底层物理不符的弱长程相关性。作者观察到EDA任务共享一个物理先验——成对电气和布线相互作用随曼哈顿距离呈指数衰减。

Method: PhysEDA包含两个核心组件：1）物理结构线性注意力(PSLA) - 将可分离的曼哈顿衰减作为乘法偏置融入线性注意力核，将复杂度从二次降低到线性；2）基于势的奖励塑形(PBRS) - 从相同核构建物理势，在稀疏强化学习中提供密集奖励信号，同时通过策略不变性定理保持最优策略。

Result: 在三个EDA场景（去耦电容布局、宏单元布局和IR-drop预测）中，PhysEDA将零样本跨尺度迁移性能提升了56.8%，在100x100网格上实现了14倍推理加速和98.5%内存节省；PBRS在稀疏奖励DPP任务中额外提升了10.8%。

Conclusion: 通过将物理先验作为统一的归纳偏置集成到架构和训练中，PhysEDA有效解决了EDA任务中学习方法的可扩展性和数据稀缺问题，在保持物理一致性的同时显著提升了性能和效率。

Abstract: Electronic design automation (EDA) addresses placement, routing, timing analysis, and power-integrity verification for integrated circuits. Learning methods -- attention (Transformer) and reinforcement learning (RL) -- have recently emerged on EDA tasks, yet face two common bottlenecks: vanilla attention's quadratic complexity limits scaling, and data-scarce models overfit statistical noise and amplify weak long-range correlations against the underlying physics. We observe that EDA tasks share a physical prior -- pairwise electrical and routing interactions decay exponentially along Manhattan distance -- and integrate it as a unified inductive bias into both architecture and training. We propose PhysEDA, comprising two components Physics-Structured Linear Attention (PSLA) folds the separable Manhattan decay into the linear-attention kernel as a multiplicative bias, reducing complexity from quadratic to linear; Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS) constructs a physical potential from the same kernel, providing dense reward signal under sparse RL while preserving the optimal policy via the policy-invariance theorem. Across three EDA scenarios -- decoupling-capacitor placement, macro placement, and IR-drop prediction -- PhysEDA improves zero-shot cross-scale transfer by 56.8% and achieves 14x inference speedup with 98.5% memory savings on 100x100 grids; PBRS adds another 10.8% in sparse-reward DPP.

</details>


### [826] [It's All Connected: Topology-Aware Structural Graph Encoding Improves Performance on Polymer Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10551)
*H. Ibrahim Erdogan,Punith Raviswamy,Nikita Agrawal,Yannik Köster,Stefan Zechel,Ulrich S. Schubert,Ruben Mayer,Christopher Kuenneth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了用于聚合物性质预测的图神经网络新方法，通过分子量分布采样构建链尺度大图，并结合自监督预训练，显著提升玻璃化转变温度预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚合物预测方法仅使用重复单元图，忽略了链尺度形态对关键性质（如玻璃化转变温度）的影响，且标记数据集稀缺、规模小，需要更有效的表示学习方法。

Method: 从Schulz-Zimm分布的分子量分布中采样代表性链，构建编码链尺度拓扑的大图，原子和键使用丰富的化学描述符特征化。在10万个未标记PSMILES字符串上通过掩码图建模预训练GNN编码器，然后在标记数据上微调。

Result: 在381个聚合物数据集上，结合大图构建和预训练的方法将RMSE从基线28.40K降至24.76K，相比预训练重复单元基线（26.08K）误差降低5.1%。去除化学特征后性能大幅下降至36.65K，证明两个组件都至关重要。

Conclusion: 链尺度图构建和自监督预训练对聚合物性质预测都至关重要，两者结合才能实现最佳性能。该方法架构无关，在GINE和GATv2编码器上均有效。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have achieved strong results in molecular property prediction, but polymers present distinct challenges: labeled datasets are scarce and small (typically in the order of hundreds of polymers) due to the need for expensive experimentation, and complex polymer chain distributions influence polymer properties. Established practice in polymer prediction represents polymers solely by graphs of their repeat units, discarding the chain-scale morphology that governs key properties such as the glass transition temperature ($T_g$). In this work, we propose a principled graph construction that addresses this gap. Given a polymer's molecular mass distribution (MMD), we sample representative chains from the Schulz-Zimm distribution and construct representative sets of large graphs encoding chain-scale topology directly, with atoms and bonds featurized using rich chemical descriptors. We further pretrain GNN encoders via masked graph modeling on 100,000 unlabeled PSMILES strings before fine-tuning on labeled data. On a dataset of 381 polymers (180 homopolymers and 201 copolymers), we show that graph construction and self-supervised pretraining are jointly necessary: without pretraining, the large graph method matches the repeat-unit baseline (28.40 K vs. 28.36 K RMSE); with pretraining, it achieves 24.76 K +/- 3.30 K, a 5.1% reduction in mean error over the pretrained repeat-unit baseline (26.08 K +/- 4.20 K, p < 0.001, 30 runs). An ablation removing chemical features degrades performance to 36.65 K, confirming both components are essential. Results are architecture-agnostic, holding for both GINE and GATv2 encoders.

</details>


### [827] [Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10572)
*Marshal Arijona Sinaga,Julien Martinelli,Teemu Turpeinen,Samuel Kaski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OSCBO是一个贝叶斯优化算法，通过在线学习框架自适应平衡GP模型的锐度与校准，在非i.i.d.数据下保持理论保证和实际性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化中GP核超参数需要从序列收集的非独立同分布数据中在线拟合，这可能导致不确定性量化失校准或过于保守，违背了标准BO理论中的固定核假设。

Method: 提出OSCBO算法，将超参数选择建模为约束在线学习问题，自适应平衡GP锐度与校准，同时利用底层在线学习算法的理论保证。

Result: OSCBO在合成和真实世界基准测试中表现优异，在最终简单遗憾方面排名前列，同时保持稳健的累积遗憾行为。

Conclusion: OSCBO通过在线学习框架有效解决了BO中GP超参数自适应选择的挑战，在保持理论保证的同时提升了实际优化性能。

Abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a widely used framework for optimizing expensive black-box functions, commonly based on Gaussian process (GP) surrogate models. Its effectiveness relies on uncertainty quantification that is both sharp (informative) and well-calibrated along the BO trajectory. In practice, GP kernel hyperparameters are unknown and are refit online from sequentially collected (non-i.i.d.) data, which can yield miscalibrated or overly conservative uncertainty and lies outside the fixed-kernel assumptions of standard BO regret theory. We propose Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization (OSCBO), a BO algorithm that adaptively balances GP sharpness and calibration by casting hyperparameter selection as a constrained online-learning problem. We also show that OSCBO preserves sublinear regret bounds by leveraging the theoretical guarantees of the underlying online learning algorithm. Empirically, OSCBO performs competitively across synthetic and real-world benchmarks, ranking among the strongest methods in final simple regret while maintaining robust cumulative-regret behavior.

</details>


### [828] [Controllability in preference-conditioned multi-objective reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10585)
*Pau de las Heras Molins,Beyazit Yalcinkaya,Lasse Peters,David Fridovich-Keil,Georgios Bakirtzis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文指出多目标强化学习中现有评估指标无法有效衡量偏好条件化智能体的可控性，提出了专门针对可控性的补充性评估指标


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多目标强化学习的标准评估指标无法准确衡量智能体对偏好输入变化的敏感性（即可控性），导致偏好条件化智能体可能在标准指标上表现良好但实际上对用户偏好输入不敏感，这破坏了MORL在用户意图和智能体行为之间提供的符号接口

Method: 论文提出了专门设计用于评估偏好条件化智能体可控性的补充性评估指标，以弥补主流MORL评估指标的不足

Result: 通过分析发现，偏好条件化智能体可能在标准MORL指标上得分较高，但对偏好输入变化不敏感，这表明现有评估协议存在缺陷

Conclusion: 需要开发专门针对可控性的评估指标来可靠评估智能体对用户偏好的响应能力，以推动MORL领域在偏好适应方面的进展，特别是在更大和更复杂问题上的应用

Abstract: Multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) allows a user to express preference over outcomes in terms of the relative importance of the objectives, but standard metrics cannot capture whether changes in preference reliably change the agent's behavior in the intended way, a property termed controllability. As a result, preference-conditioned agents can score well on standard MORL metrics while being insensitive to the preference input. If the ability to control agents cannot be reliably assessed, the symbolic interface that MORL provides between user intent and agent behavior is broken. Mainstream MORL metrics alone fail to measure the controllability of preference-conditioned agents, motivating a complementary metric specifically designed to that end. We hope the results spur discussion in the community on existing evaluation protocols to consolidate advances in preference adaptation in MORL to larger and more complex problems.

</details>


### [829] [Fairness vs Performance: Characterizing the Pareto Frontier of Algorithmic Decision Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10604)
*Mieke Wilms,Christoph Heitz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了算法决策系统中的公平性权衡问题，将决策制定视为同时考虑决策者效用和群体公平性的多目标优化问题，发现帕累托前沿由确定性的、针对特定群体的阈值规则组成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设计公平的算法决策系统需要在模型性能和个体公平性之间取得平衡，但当前对可能的权衡空间理解不足。需要从多目标优化的角度研究决策者效用和群体公平性之间的权衡关系。

Method: 将决策制定概念化为多目标优化问题，考虑任意决策者效用函数、任意人口分布和广泛的群体公平性指标。研究帕累托最优决策规则的集合。

Result: 发现帕累托前沿由应用于个体成功概率的确定性、群体特定阈值规则组成。根据使用的公平性指标不同，帕累托前沿可能包含上界阈值规则（偏好成功概率较低的个体）。帕累托前沿的位置仅取决于人口特征、效用函数和公平性分数，与算法的技术设计无关。

Conclusion: 研究结果推广了现有公平性约束分类的最优性定理，扩展到广义公平性指标和原则，以及部分公平性制度。为评估和比较算法决策系统提供了原则性基础，连接了形式公平性研究与法律和伦理要求。

Abstract: Designing fair algorithmic decision systems requires balancing model performance with fairness toward affected individuals: More fairness might require sacrificing some performance and vice versa, yet the space of possible trade-offs is still poorly understood. We investigate fairness in binary prediction-based decision problems by conceptualizing decision making as a multi-objective optimization problem that simultaneously considers decision-maker utility and group fairness. We investigate the set of Pareto-optimal decision rules for arbitrary utility functions for decision maker, arbitrary population distributions, and a wide range of group fairness metrics.
  We find that the Pareto frontier consists of deterministic, group-specific threshold rules applied to individuals' success probability. This complements existing optimality theorems from literature which, for specific fairness constraints, posit lower-bound threshold rules only. However we also show that, depending on the used fairness metric, the Pareto frontier may include upper-bound threshold rules, thus preferring individuals with lower success probabilities. We show that the location of the Pareto frontier depends only on population characteristics, utility functions and fairness score, but not on the technical design of the algorithm - our findings hold for pre-, in-, and post-processing approaches alike.
  Our results generalize existing optimality theorems for fairness-constrained classification and extend them to generalized fairness metrics and fairness principles, and to partial fairness regimes. This paper connects formal fairness research with legal and ethical requirements to search for less discriminatory alternatives, offering a principled foundation for evaluating and comparing algorithmic decision systems.

</details>


### [830] [Hierarchical End-to-End Taylor Bounds for Complete Neural Network Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10621)
*Taha Entesari,Mahyar Fazlyab*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HiTaB验证框架，利用神经网络的二阶光滑性（Hessian及其Lipschitz常数）进行可达性分析，通过层间曲率边界传播实现更紧的安全证书


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络可达性分析方法最多仅利用二阶信息，未能系统性地利用高阶信息，导致边界不够紧凑，需要更精确的验证框架来提升安全证书质量

Method: 开发HiTaB框架，利用二阶光滑性（Hessian及其Lipschitz常数），建立零阶、一阶和二阶边界的统一层次结构，通过层间曲率边界传播高效计算Lipschitz常数，支持ℓ₂和ℓ∞约束输入集

Result: HiTaB是首个实际可用的光滑神经网络可达性分析框架，系统利用曲率Lipschitz连续性，产生更紧凑、信息量更丰富的安全证书，可集成到分支定界验证流程中

Conclusion: 通过利用二阶光滑性信息，HiTaB框架显著提升了神经网络可达性分析的精度，为学习型物理系统提供了更可靠的安全验证方法

Abstract: Reachability analysis of neural networks, which seeks to compute or bound the set of outputs attainable over a given input domain, is central to certifying safety and robustness in learning-enabled physical systems. Since exact reachable set computation is generally intractable, existing methods typically rely on tractable overapproximations. Examining the state of the art for smooth, twice-differentiable networks, we observe that existing approaches exploit at most second-order information and do not systematically leverage higher-order information. In this work, we introduce \textsc{HiTaB}, a novel verification framework that exploits second-order smoothness through both the Hessian, $\nabla^2 f$, and its Lipschitz constant, $L_{\nabla^2 f}$. We further develop a unified hierarchy of zeroth-, first-, and second-order bounds, together with precise conditions under which higher-order approximations yield provable improvements. Our main technical contribution is a compositional procedure for efficiently bounding $L_{\nabla^2 f}$ in deep neural networks via layerwise propagation of curvature bounds. We extend the framework to both $\ell_2$- and $\ell_\infty$-constrained input sets and show how it can be integrated into branch-and-bound verification pipelines. To our knowledge, this is the first practical reachability analysis framework for smooth neural networks that systematically exploits Lipschitz continuity of curvature, leading to tighter and more informative safety certificates.

</details>


### [831] [Composing diffusion priors with explicit physical context via generative Gibbs sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10642)
*Weizhou Wang,Jonathan Weare,Aaron R. Dinner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GG-PA是一种无需训练的方法，结合预训练扩散模型的先验知识和显式物理上下文，通过吉布斯采样在增强状态空间中进行科学采样。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学采样中，目标分布通常依赖于物理上下文，而单一的生成模型无法完全捕捉这些上下文信息。需要一种方法能够结合预训练模型的先验知识和显式物理约束。

Method: 提出GG-PA框架，将部分先验和物理上下文的组合建模为增强状态空间中的联合目标分布推断。推导该联合目标的吉布斯采样器，证明其在扩散时间趋近零时渐近精确，在二次相互作用设置中有限扩散时间下保持精确。引入扩散时间的副本交换加速混合。

Result: 在双阱系统、φ^4晶格模型和原子肽系统上的实验表明，GG-PA能够在不重新训练的情况下，使用部分先验恢复上下文诱导的分布偏移和相互作用系统中的涌现集体行为。

Conclusion: GG-PA为结合预训练生成先验和显式物理上下文提供了一种实用方法，在科学采样中有效处理物理上下文依赖问题。

Abstract: Pretrained diffusion models provide powerful learned priors, but in scientific sampling the target distribution often depends on physical context that is not fully represented by one generative model. We introduce Generative Gibbs for Physics-Aware Sampling (GG-PA), a training-free framework that formulates the composition of learned partial priors and explicit physical context as inference over a joint target distribution in an augmented state space. We derive a Gibbs sampler for this joint target, show that it is asymptotically exact as the diffusion time approaches zero, and prove that in settings with quadratic interactions it remains exact at finite diffusion times. We further introduce replica exchange over diffusion time to accelerate mixing. Experiments on a double-well system, a $φ^4$ lattice model, and atomistic peptide systems show that GG-PA recovers context-induced distribution shifts and emergent collective behavior in interacting systems using partial priors without retraining. These results demonstrate GG-PA as a practical approach for combining pretrained generative priors with explicit physical context.

</details>


### [832] [A Random-Matrix Criterion for Initializing Gated Recurrent Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10650)
*Tommaso Fioratti,Riccardo Marcaccioli,Francesco Casola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文推导了一个简单准则来估计循环神经网络架构的临界权重方差，该准则能准确预测门控RNN在混沌预测任务中达到峰值性能的增益点，并可作为未来初始化方案的设计原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 权重初始化对深度学习和储备池计算至关重要，特别是在储备池计算中，储备池权重固定且决定系统动态的丰富性、稳定性和记忆能力。在无限宽度极限下，有意义的初始化位于随机初始化模型的有效临界点，该相变由权重方差控制，分离有序相和混沌相。需要找到估计临界权重方差的简单准则。

Method: 推导了一个简单准则来估计广泛类别循环架构的临界权重方差gc，并将该准则与门控RNN储备池在混沌预测任务中的性能峰值增益进行比较验证。

Result: 推导的准则能紧密跟踪门控RNN储备池在混沌预测任务中达到峰值性能的增益点，表明该准则能准确预测最佳初始化参数。

Conclusion: 该准则可作为未来初始化方案的设计原则，帮助确定循环神经网络架构的最佳权重初始化参数，从而优化模型性能。

Abstract: Proper weight initialization prior to training has historically been one of the key factors that helped kick off the deep learning revolution. Initialization is even more crucial in "reservoir computing", where the weights of a readout layer are learned linearly while the reservoir weights are fixed and largely determine the richness, stability and memory of the resulting dynamics. In the infinite-width limit it has been shown that meaningful initializations are those sitting at an effective critical point of the randomly initialized model. The phase transition is controlled by the weight variance $g^2$ and separates an ordered phase from a chaotic one where information progressively degrades. Here we derive a simple criterion to estimate the critical $g_c$ for a broad class of recurrent architectures and we show that it closely tracks the gain at which a gated-RNN reservoir achieves peak performance on a chaotic forecasting task. Finally, we argue that our criterion can serve as a design principle for future initialization schemes.

</details>


### [833] [A Recursive Decomposition Framework for Causal Structure Learning in the Presence of Latent Variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10651)
*Zheng Li,Feng Xie,Shenglan Nie,Xichen Guo,Ruxin Wang,Hao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DiCoLa：一个递归分解框架，用于在存在隐变量情况下进行分而治之的因果发现，显著提高计算效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的基于约束的因果发现方法在高维设置下计算代价高昂，且大多数分而治之框架假设因果充分性（无隐变量）。本文旨在将分而治之策略推广到存在隐变量的情况。

Method: 提出了DiCoLa框架，递归地将全局学习任务分解为更小的子问题，并通过重构步骤整合子问题的解来恢复全局因果结构。

Result: 在合成数据上的广泛实验表明，该方法显著提高了多种因果发现算法的计算效率；在真实世界数据集上的实验进一步验证了其实际有效性。

Conclusion: DiCoLa成功将分而治之策略推广到存在隐变量的情况，理论上建立了框架的可靠性和完备性，并显著提升了因果发现的计算效率。

Abstract: Constraint-based causal discovery is widely used for learning causal structures, but heavy reliance on conditional independence (CI) testing makes it computationally expensive in high-dimensional settings. To mitigate this limitation, many divide-and-conquer frameworks have been proposed, but most assume causal sufficiency, i.e., no latent variables. In this paper, we show that divide-and-conquer strategies can be theoretically generalized beyond causal sufficiency to settings with latent variables. Specifically, we propose a recursive decomposition framework, termed DiCoLa, that enables divide-and-conquer causal discovery in the presence of latent variables. It recursively decomposes the global learning task into smaller subproblems and integrates their solutions through a principled reconstruction step to recover the global structure. We theoretically establish the soundness and completeness of the proposed framework. Extensive experiments on synthetic data demonstrate that our approach significantly improves computational efficiency across a range of causal discovery algorithms, while experiments on a real-world dataset further illustrate its practical effectiveness.

</details>


### [834] [Active Learning for Gaussian Process Regression Under Self-Induced Boltzmann Weights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10654)
*Jixiang Qing,Henry Moss,Matthias Sachs*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AB-SID-iVAR方法用于解决目标分布未知且配分函数难处理的主动学习问题，在计算化学等领域有应用


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在计算化学的势能面建模等问题中，目标函数本身会诱导出未知的玻尔兹曼分布，这种自诱导加权带来了独特挑战：目标分布未知且配分函数难以计算

Method: 提出了基于高斯过程的AB-SID-iVAR获取函数，能够以闭式形式近似难处理的贝叶斯目标分布，同时避免配分函数估计，适用于离散和连续输入域；还分析了Thompson采样变体TS-SID-iVAR作为高方差蒙特卡洛方法

Result: 在温和条件下，证明了终端预测误差以高概率趋近于零，提供了更紧的平均情况保证；在合成基准测试和真实世界的势能面建模、药物发现任务中，相比现有方法取得了持续改进

Conclusion: AB-SID-iVAR方法有效解决了目标分布未知且难以处理的主动学习问题，在理论和实际应用中均表现出色，为计算化学等领域的自诱导加权问题提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: We consider the active learning problem where the goal is to learn an unknown function with low prediction error under an unknown Boltzmann distribution induced by the function itself. This self-induced weighting arises naturally in problems such as potential energy surface (PES) modeling in computational chemistry,
  yet poses unique challenges as the target distribution is unknown and its partition function is intractable. We propose \texttt{AB-SID-iVAR}, a Gaussian Process-based acquisition function that approximates the intractable Bayesian target distribution in closed form while avoiding partition function estimation, and is applicable to both discrete and continuous input domains. We also analyze a Thompson sampling alternative (\texttt{TS-SID-iVAR}) as a higher variance Monte Carlo variant. Despite the unknown target, under mild conditions, we establish that the terminal prediction error vanishes with high probability, and provide a tighter average-case guarantee. We demonstrate consistent improvements over existing approaches in this setting on synthetic benchmarks and real-world PES modeling and drug discovery tasks.

</details>


### [835] [BCJR-QAT: A Differentiable Relaxation of Trellis-Coded Weight Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10655)
*Venugopalan Iyengar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BCJR-QAT：一种基于BCJR前向后向算法的量化感知训练方法，通过可微分软码字替代非可微Viterbi argmax，在2比特权重下超越当前QTIP-PTQ前沿，实现更低困惑度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前Trellis-coded量化在2比特后训练量化（QTIP）中表现最佳，但要突破PTQ天花板需要量化感知训练。然而，Trellis上的QAT因Viterbi argmax的非可微性而受阻。

Method: 提出BCJR-QAT方法，用温度T下的BCJR前向后向和积算法替代argmax，生成可微的软码字（Boltzmann期望），在T→0时恢复硬QTIP码。该方法在数学上等同于1D Ising-like自旋链的转移矩阵计算。

Result: 1) 开发融合Triton内核，在单个消费级GPU上实现6.57倍加速；2) 建立漂移预算理论，解释BCJR-QAT何时能逃离QTIP-PTQ Voronoi盆地；3) Llama-3.2-1B在2比特权重下，通过端到端前向KL蒸馏，单层BCJR-QAT比QTIP-PTQ降低0.084困惑度，多层复合效果超加性。

Conclusion: BCJR-QAT通过可微分BCJR算法成功解决了Trellis量化中的非可微问题，在2比特量化下实现了超越当前PTQ前沿的性能，为低比特量化感知训练提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Trellis-coded quantization sets the current 2-bit post-training frontier for LLMs (QTIP), but pushing below the PTQ ceiling requires quantization-aware training, and QAT on a trellis is obstructed by the non-differentiable Viterbi argmax. We introduce BCJR-QAT, a relaxation that replaces the argmax with the BCJR forward-backward sum-product algorithm at temperature $T$, producing a soft codeword equal to the Boltzmann expectation over trellis paths, exactly differentiable, recovering the hard QTIP code as $T \to 0$, and mathematically identical to the transfer-matrix computation for a 1D Ising-like spin chain. We contribute (i) a fused Triton kernel making BCJR tractable on a single consumer GPU ($6.57\times$ speedup, fp32 parity); (ii) a quantitative drift-budget theory of when BCJR-QAT can escape the QTIP-PTQ Voronoi basin, verified across four experiments; and (iii) a positive empirical result on Llama-3.2-1B at 2 bpw under end-to-end forward-KL distillation: with the right schedule (skip the high-$T$ phase to avoid an overshoot we diagnose), single-layer BCJR-QAT beats QTIP-PTQ by $\mathbf{-0.084}$ PPL on WikiText-2, and multi-layer compounding is super-additive.

</details>


### [836] [Why Zeroth-Order Adaptation May Forget Less: A Randomized Shaping Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10658)
*Yao Shu,Jian Mu,Zhongxiang Dai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种新的理论分析框架来解释零阶优化（ZO）在持续学习中的优势，并开发了RISE算法来结合ZO的形状校准和精确一阶梯度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续学习需要在适应新任务时不损害已学能力。现有研究显示零阶优化比一阶下降在低查询情况下保留能力更好，但传统的ZO作为噪声FO估计的观点无法解释这一现象。需要新的理论框架来理解ZO在持续学习中的优势机制。

Method: 提出局部随机梯度塑造分析框架：通过有限差分揭示原始形状，在范数匹配比较下分析保留曲率暴露机制。开发RISE算法，将校准后的ZO形状应用于参数块内的精确FO梯度，实现稳定性-可塑性权衡。

Result: 理论分析表明：ZO的期望形状保留曲率遵循恒等式，保持各向同性保留地板同时收缩各向异性分量。FO-ZO二次遗忘差距显示，当FO方向具有高于平均保留曲率时，ZO能减少平均遗忘。RISE算法通过块状采样提供多个局部塑造方向，分离平均步长损害与集中随机暴露。

Conclusion: 论文提供了理解ZO在持续学习中优势的新理论视角，揭示了随机梯度塑造如何减少FO的保留暴露。RISE算法通过结合ZO形状校准和精确FO梯度，为持续学习提供了有效的稳定性-可塑性权衡方案，块状分析框架为算法应用提供了诊断指导。

Abstract: Continual learning requires new-task adaptation without damaging previously acquired capabilities. Recent forward-pass and zeroth-order (ZO) results show that low-query adaptation may retain better than first-order (FO) descent, but the usual view of ZO as noisy FO estimation does not explain why. We give a local randomized gradient-shaping analysis: finite differences expose a raw shape that is mean-aligned with FO, while the norm-matched comparator fixes the expected squared adaptation norm. Under this controlled comparison, forgetting depends on how the adaptation shape exposes retention curvature. For norm-matched ZO, the expected shaped retention curvature obeys an exact identity that preserves the isotropic retention floor while contracting only the anisotropic component. Projecting this identity onto the incoming gradient yields the observable FO--ZO quadratic forgetting gap: ZO improves mean forgetting precisely when the FO direction has above-average retention curvature, by a query-dependent fraction of that curvature excess. A practical finite-query accounting separates the mean mechanism from one-batch sampling and smoothing perturbations. As an algorithmic transfer, RISE applies the calibrated ZO shape to exact FO gradients inside parameter blocks. Its target is a stability--plasticity tradeoff: randomized shaping may reduce the retention exposure paid by FO, exact gradients remove finite-smoothing bias from finite-difference ZO, and blockwise sampling supplies many local shaping directions after one gradient computation. The blockwise analysis separates mean-step damage from centered random exposure, showing how block-diagonal curvature, cross-block coupling, and local shaping diagnostics specify where this exact-gradient transfer is most likely to be visible.

</details>


### [837] [A Spectral Framework for Closed-Form Relative Density Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10668)
*Francis Bach*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于谱方法的闭式相对对数密度估计框架，适用于线性参数化概率模型（包括非归一化和条件模型），通过KL散度的加权卡方散度积分表示，转化为最小二乘问题，仅需一阶和二阶特征矩即可获得闭式估计器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有相对对数密度估计方法通常需要复杂的优化过程，缺乏闭式解和理论保证。本文旨在为线性参数化概率模型提供一种简单、高效且具有理论保证的闭式估计框架。

Method: 将KL散度表示为加权卡方散度的积分，从而将KL估计转化为一系列最小二乘问题。基于一阶和二阶特征矩推导出显式的谱公式，得到闭式估计器。框架可扩展到多种f-散度，并可与核方法或神经网络特征学习结合。

Result: 推导出仅依赖特征一阶和二阶矩的闭式估计器，证明了估计器的收敛性保证。在合成数据上与基于优化的变分方法（如逻辑回归和softmax回归）进行了实证比较。

Conclusion: 提出了一种简单高效的闭式相对对数密度估计框架，具有理论保证，适用于广泛的概率模型，并可扩展到更复杂的特征表示。

Abstract: We propose a closed-form spectral framework for relative log-density estimation in linearly parameterized probabilistic models, including unnormalized and conditional models. This is achieved by representing the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence as an integral of weighted chi-squared divergences, converting KL estimation into a family of least-squares problems. We derive an explicit spectral formula based only on first- and second-order feature moments, yielding closed-form estimators of both divergences and log-density potentials for fixed features. The framework extends to a broad class of f-divergences and can be combined with kernelization or feature learning with neural networks. We prove convergence guarantees for the resulting estimators and empirically compare them on synthetic data with optimization-based variational formulations, including logistic and softmax regression for normalized conditional models.

</details>


### [838] [Natural Policy Gradient as Doubly Smoothed Policy Iteration: A Bellman-Operator Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10671)
*Phalguni Nanda,Zaiwei Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出双重平滑策略迭代（DSPI）框架，将自然策略梯度等算法统一为平滑贝尔曼算子的形式，证明了分布无关的全局几何收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然策略梯度等强化学习核心算法缺乏统一的收敛性分析框架。本文旨在建立一个贝尔曼算子框架，统一分析策略迭代、自然策略梯度等算法，并提供严格的收敛性保证。

Method: 提出双重平滑策略迭代（DSPI）框架，通过正则化贪婪步骤和平滑贝尔曼算子，将策略迭代、对偶平均策略迭代、自然策略梯度等统一为特殊形式。利用平滑贝尔曼算子的单调性和收缩性证明收敛性。

Result: 证明了DSPI的分布无关全局几何收敛性，得到标准自然策略梯度的迭代复杂度为O((1-γ)^{-1}log((1-γ)^{-1}ε^{-1}))。对无正则化贪婪情况证明了有限终止性，并扩展至线性函数逼近和随机最短路径问题。

Conclusion: DSPI为策略迭代、自然策略梯度等算法提供了统一的收敛性分析框架，证明了其几何收敛性，为强化学习算法提供了理论保障，并具有广泛的应用扩展性。

Abstract: In this work, we show that natural policy gradient, a core algorithm in reinforcement learning, admits an exact formulation as a smoothed and averaged form of policy iteration. Specifically, we introduce doubly smoothed policy iteration (DSPI), a Bellman-operator framework in which each policy is obtained by applying a regularized greedy step to a weighted average of past $Q$-functions. DSPI includes policy iteration, dual-averaged policy iteration, natural policy gradient, and more general policy dual averaging methods as special cases. Using only monotonicity and contraction of smoothed Bellman operators, we prove distribution-free global geometric convergence of DSPI. Consequently, standard natural policy gradient and policy dual averaging achieve an iteration complexity of $\mathcal{O}((1-γ)^{-1}\log((1-γ)^{-1}ε^{-1}))$ for computing an $ε$-optimal policy, without modifying the MDP, adding regularization beyond the mirror map inherent in the update, or using adaptive, trajectory-dependent stepsizes. For the unregularized greedy case, corresponding to dual-averaged policy iteration, we also prove finite termination. The same Bellman-operator framework further extends to discounted MDPs with linear function approximation and stochastic shortest path problems.

</details>


### [839] [Compander-Aligned Query Geometry for Quantized Zeroth-Order Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10673)
*Yao Shu,Zilin Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CAQ-ZO是一种针对非均匀量化器的零阶优化方法，通过将查询端点对齐到量化网格来消除几何失配误差，从而在低精度下实现更有效的模型适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的低比特零阶优化方法面临几何失配问题：当使用非均匀量化器时，查询端点的量化会改变查询方向，导致优化效果下降。传统的量化代码本无法准确预测零阶优化行为。

Method: CAQ-ZO将非均匀量化建模为Q = φ^{-1} ∘ U ∘ φ，在变换空间z = φ(x)中构建单网格步长的Rademacher模板z ± Δr，将端点映射回原始空间，并在z空间中更新参数。

Result: 理论分析证明了网格跨度失配问题，分解了端点量化估计器残差。CAQ-ZO使查询时残差精确为零，而通用离网查询保留Δ²/μ²残差通道。NF4 Qwen/Llama微调实验中，CAQ-ZO在相同量化器和评估预算下优于基线。

Conclusion: CAQ-ZO通过解决非均匀量化器在零阶优化中的几何失配问题，实现了更有效的低精度模型适应，为内存高效的零阶优化提供了新方法。

Abstract: Low-bit forward evaluation is an attractive route to memory-efficient zeroth-order (ZO) adaptation: the optimizer needs only scalar losses, and the model can be queried near deployment precision. The obstacle is that a quantized ZO query is not a continuous finite difference followed by harmless storage rounding. The query chooses endpoints, the low-precision engine rounds them, and the loss difference is measured along the rounded chord. For nonuniform companding quantizers, this makes the codebook insufficient to predict ZO behavior: a fixed weight-space radius can collapse in dense cells, over-span sparse cells, or assign a rounded chord to an unrounded update direction. We identify the missing object as query geometry and model scalar nonuniform quantization as $Q = φ^{-1} \circ U \circ φ$. CAQ-ZO (Compander-Aligned Queries for Zeroth-Order Optimization) forms one-grid-step Rademacher stencils $z \pm Δr$ in $z = φ(x)$, maps endpoints back through $φ^{-1}$, and updates in $z$. Our theory proves the grid-span mismatch, decomposes endpoint-rounding estimator residuals, and gives stationarity bounds in which generic off-grid queries retain a $Δ^2/μ^2$ residual channel while CAQ-ZO makes the query-time residual exactly zero. Synthetic experiments isolate this channel, and matched NF4 Qwen/Llama fine-tuning shows that CAQ-ZO improves the trained NF4 baseline under the same quantizer and evaluation budget.

</details>


### [840] [Step Rejection Fine-Tuning: A Practical Distillation Recipe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10674)
*Igor Slinko,Ilia Zavidnyi,Egor Bogomolov,Yaroslav Zharov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SRFT方法，利用失败轨迹中的部分正确步骤进行训练，相比传统RFT方法提升效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RFT方法完全丢弃失败轨迹，但这些轨迹中可能包含部分正确步骤，对于困难任务尤其浪费

Method: 使用critic LLM评估轨迹中每一步的正确性，训练时只对正确步骤计算损失，错误步骤保留在上下文窗口但不被学习

Result: 在SWE-bench Verified上，RFT提升2.4%解决率，SRFT提升3.7%，总解决率达到32.2%

Conclusion: SRFT能有效利用失败轨迹中的有价值信息，提升模型从错误中恢复的能力

Abstract: Rejection Fine-Tuning (RFT) is a standard method for training LLM agents, where unsuccessful trajectories are discarded from the training set. In the context of SWE-bench tasks, this corresponds to filtering out runs where the submitted patch does not pass the tests. However, this approach discards unresolved trajectories, even though they form a large portion of all trajectories for hard tasks and even then may be partially correct. In this work, we propose Step Rejection Fine-Tuning (SRFT) - a practical way to leverage these unresolved trajectories. For this, we employ a critic LLM to assess the correctness of each step in a trajectory. Consequently, during training, we mask the loss for erroneous steps while retaining them in the context window. This way we ensure the model learns to recover from errors without reproducing them. Evaluation on SWE-bench Verified shows that while RFT improves the resolution rate by 2.4% by excluding unresolved trajectories, SRFT improves it by 3.7% by filtering them instead of discarding completely, reaching the total resolution rate of 32.2%.

</details>


### [841] [Exact Unlearning from Proxies Induces Closeness Guarantees on Approximate Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10680)
*Virgile Dine,Teddy Furon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种将机器遗忘与数据分布结构直接关联的新范式，通过精确推断数据分布来获取精确的遗忘信号，在理论保证下实现接近理想重训练模型的遗忘效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器遗忘方法主要关注神经网络参数的更新，而本文认为应该将遗忘与底层数据分布的结构直接联系起来，通过精确推断数据分布来获得更准确的遗忘信号。

Method: 提出一种基于数据分布结构的机器遗忘框架，通过精确推断数据分布来提取精确的遗忘信号，在可验证的可容许性准则下，理论分析KL散度的上界。

Result: 在三种遗忘场景下进行实验验证，与竞争对手相比，该方法能达到最接近理想重训练模型的分类器性能。

Conclusion: 将机器遗忘与数据分布结构直接关联的范式是有效的，通过精确推断数据分布可以获得精确的遗忘信号，在理论保证下实现接近理想重训练模型的遗忘效果。

Abstract: This paper proposes a paradigm shift linking machine unlearning directly to the structure of the data distributions rather than a mere update of the neural network parameters. We show that inferring these distributions with precision enables distilling the exact unlearning signal induced by the modeling. Theoretical bounds on the Kullback-Leibler divergence from the ideal retrained model to our unlearned model, under verifiable admissibility criterion, reveal the soundness of our framework. This method is experimentally validated over three forgetting scenarios as reaching the closest classifier to the ideal retrained model when compared to competitors.

</details>


### [842] [Is Data Shapley Not Better than Random in Data Selection? Ask NASH](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10684)
*Xiao Tian,Jue Fan,Rachael Hwee Ling Sim,Zixuan Wang,Nancy F. Chen,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出NASH框架，通过分解目标效用函数为Shapley信息组件并非线性聚合，提升基于Shapley/半值的数据选择效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据选择方法中，基于Data Shapley的方法有时效果不佳，甚至与随机选择相当。需要确定Shapley在何种设置下有效，并利用这些设置来一致高效地选择高质量数据子集。

Method: 提出NASH框架：1) 将目标效用函数（如验证准确率）分解为更简单的Shapley信息组件函数；2) 通过非线性聚合这些组件的目标函数来选择数据。

Result: NASH显著提升了基于Shapley/半值的数据选择效果，同时仅增加了极小的额外运行时开销。

Conclusion: NASH框架通过分解和非线性聚合策略，有效解决了Data Shapley在实际应用中的局限性，为高效可靠的数据选择提供了新方法。

Abstract: Data selection studies the problem of identifying high-quality subsets of training data. While some existing works have considered selecting the subset of data with top-$m$ Data Shapley or other semivalues as they account for the interaction among every subset of data, other works argue that Data Shapley can sometimes perform ineffectively in practice and select subsets that are no better than random. This raises the questions: (I) Are there certain "Shapley-informative" settings where Data Shapley consistently works well? (II) Can we strategically utilize these settings to select high-quality subsets consistently and efficiently? In this paper, we propose a novel data selection framework, NASH (Non-linear Aggregation of SHapley-informative components), which (I) decomposes the target utility function (e.g., validation accuracy) into simpler, Shapley-informative component functions, and selects data by optimizing an objective that (II) aggregates these components non-linearly. We demonstrate that NASH substantially boosts the effectiveness of Shapley/semivalue-based data selection with minimal additional runtime cost.

</details>


### [843] [The finite expression method for turbulent dynamics with high-order moment recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10687)
*Xingjian Xu,Di Qi,Chunmei Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个两阶段数据驱动建模框架，结合符号回归和生成模型，共同识别湍流动力系统的主导动力学并预测关键统计量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 湍流动力系统的非线性相互作用和随机效应产生耦合的统计量（如非零高阶矩），这些量难以从数据中准确捕捉。

Method: 第一阶段：采用有限表达式方法（FEX）发现确定性动力学的闭式表达式；第二阶段：引入生成模型学习残差随机分量作为第一阶段近似的模型误差修正，从而准确表征高阶统计量。

Result: 在随机三元模型的多重体系下进行数值实验，成功恢复了相互作用项和强迫项表达式，并准确预测了高达五阶的统计矩。

Conclusion: 将可解释的符号发现与数据驱动的随机建模相结合，对复杂湍流系统具有巨大潜力。

Abstract: Turbulent dynamical systems are characterized by nonlinear interactions and stochastic effects that generate coupled statistical quantities, such as non-zero higher-order moments, which are difficult to capture from data with accuracy. We propose a two-stage data-driven modeling framework that combines symbolic regression with generative models to jointly identify the governing dynamics and predict their key statistical quantities. In Stage I of the framework, the Finite Expression Method (FEX) is adopted to discover closed-form expressions of the deterministic dynamics, recovering nonlinear interaction terms and external forcing without predefined libraries. In Stage II, generative models are introduced to learn the residual stochastic components as a refined correction to the model error from the Stage I approximation, enabling accurate characterization of higher-order statistics. Theoretical analysis establishes the consistency of the symbolic estimator and quantifies the estimation error in terms of data size and numerical discretization. The model performance is verified through detailed numerical experiments on the stochastic triad models across multiple regimes, demonstrating that the framework successfully recovers interaction terms and forcing expressions, and accurately predicts statistical moments up to order five. These results highlight the potential of integrating interpretable symbolic discovery with data-driven stochastic modeling for complex turbulent systems.

</details>


### [844] [DANCE: Detect and Classify Events in EEG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10688)
*Jarod Lévy,Hubert Banville,Jérémy Rapin,Jean-Remi King,Thomas Moreau,Stéphane d'Ascoli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DANCE是一个深度学习框架，将神经解码视为集合预测问题，直接从原始、未对齐的信号中联合检测和分类事件，在多种认知、临床和BCI任务中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在连续神经记录中识别事件是神经科学的关键任务。传统的EEG解码主要依赖已知事件起始点的对齐窗口分类，但在连续现实世界监测中，这些起始点信息通常不可用。

Method: 提出DANCE深度学习管道，将神经解码框架为集合预测问题，直接从原始未对齐信号中联合检测和分类事件。使用单一架构处理多种事件类型（持续时间从毫秒到分钟不等）。

Result: 在从文献中整理的10个数据集上评估，涵盖多种事件类型，模型在广泛的认知、临床和BCI任务中优于现有方法。在竞争性的癫痫监测任务中建立了新的SOTA，在BCI任务中与起始点知情模型精度相当。

Conclusion: 该方法标志着向端到端异步神经解码模型迈出了一步，能够直接从连续、未对齐的信号中检测和分类神经事件。

Abstract: Event identification in continuous neural recordings is a critical task in neuroscience. Decoding in EEG is dominated by classifying windows aligned to known event onsets. However, while available in controlled experiments, such onsets are absent in continuous real-world monitoring. Here, we introduce DANCE, a deep learning pipeline that frames neural decoding as a set-prediction problem and jointly detects and classifies events directly from raw, unaligned signals. Evaluated separately on ten datasets curated from the literature with a wide variety of event types (ranging from milliseconds to minutes in duration), our model outperforms existing methods on a broad range of cognitive, clinical and BCI tasks. This single architecture establishes a new state of the art in the competitive task of seizure monitoring and matches the accuracy of onset-informed models for BCI tasks. Overall, our method marks a step towards end-to-end asynchronous neural decoding models

</details>


### [845] [RelFlexformer: Efficient Attention 3D-Transformers for Integrable Relative Positional Encodings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10706)
*Byeongchan Kim,Arijit Sehanobish,Avinava Dubey,Min-hwan Oh,Krzysztof Choromanski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RelFlexformers，一种基于3D相对位置编码的高效注意力机制，使用可积调制函数f实现通用RPE，时间复杂度为O(L log L)，适用于非结构化异构场景如点云。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高效RPE注意力方法主要适用于结构化均匀网格场景，无法有效处理非结构化异构场景（如点云）中任意分布的token位置。

Method: 基于非均匀傅里叶变换理论，提出使用任意可积调制函数f的通用3D相对位置编码方法，构建RelFlexformers模型，将结构化RPE方法推广到非结构化场景。

Result: 在大量3D数据集上的实验表明，NU-FFT驱动的注意力调制技术在RelFlexformers中能带来质量提升，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: RelFlexformers为3D Transformer提供了一种灵活高效的RPE机制，特别适用于点云等非结构化数据，扩展了高效注意力机制的应用范围。

Abstract: We present a new class of efficient attention mechanisms applying universal 3D Relative Positional Encoding (RPE) methods given by arbitrary integrable modulation functions $f$. They lead to the new class of 3D-Transformer models, called \textit{RelFlexformers}, flexibly integrating those RPEs, and characterized by the $O(L \log L)$ time complexity of the attention computation for the $L$-length input sequences. RelFlexformers builds on the theory of the Non-Uniform Fourier Transform (NU-FFT), naturally generalizing several existing efficient RPE-attention methods from structured settings with tokens homogeneously embedded in unweighted grids into general non-structured heterogeneous scenarios, where tokens' positions are arbitrarily distributed in the corresponding 3D spaces. As such, RelFlexformers can be applied in particular to model point clouds. Our extensive empirical evaluation on a large portfolio of 3D datasets confirms quality improvements provided by the NU-FFT-driven attention modulation techniques in the RelFlexformers.

</details>


### [846] [What should post-training optimize? A test-time scaling law perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10716)
*Muheng Li,Jian Qian,Wenlong Mou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA)和Prefix-TEA估计器，用于解决大语言模型在训练和部署阶段预算不匹配的问题，通过外推奖励分布的尾部统计来优化最佳响应选择性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型部署时采用"从N个响应中选最优"的策略，但训练时通常只优化单个响应的平均奖励。当训练阶段的每个提示的采样预算(m)远小于部署时的预算(N)时，现有方法无法有效优化最佳响应选择的性能。

Method: 基于奖励分布尾部的结构假设，通过外推上尾统计来近似最佳响应选择目标的策略梯度。提出了两种估计器：简单的直接估计器Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA)和基于矩抵消的固定阶去偏Prefix-TEA估计器。

Result: 在指令跟随任务上的实验表明，TEA和Prefix-TEA在不同语言模型、奖励模型和数据集上，在各种训练和测试时间预算设置下，都能显著提升最佳响应选择的性能。

Conclusion: 该研究解决了训练与部署预算不匹配的问题，通过尾部外推方法有效优化了大语言模型在最佳响应选择部署下的性能，为实际应用提供了实用的后训练策略。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed with test-time strategies: sample $N$ responses, score them with a reward model or verifier, and return the best. This deployment rule exposes a mismatch in post-training: standard objectives optimize the mean reward of a single response, whereas best-of-$N$ performance is governed by the upper tail of the reward distribution. Recent test-time-aware objectives partly address this mismatch, but typically assume that training can use the same per-prompt rollout budget as deployment, which is impractical when post-training must cover many prompts while deployment can allocate much larger per-prompt test-time compute. We study this budget-mismatch regime, where only $m\ll N$ per-prompt rollouts are available during training but the target objective is best-of-$N$ deployment. Under structural assumptions on the reward tails, we show that the policy gradient of the best-of-$N$ objective can be approximated from a much smaller rollout group by extrapolating upper-tail statistics. This yields a family of Tail-Extrapolated estimators for best-of-$N$-oriented post-training: a simple direct estimator, Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA), and a fixed-order debiased Prefix-TEA estimator based on moment cancellation. Experiments on instruction-following tasks show that TEA and Prefix-TEA improve best-of-$N$ performance across different language models, reward models and datasets under various training and test-time budget settings.

</details>


### [847] [On Improving Graph Neural Networks for QSAR by Pre-training on Extended-Connectivity Fingerprints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10722)
*Sam Money-Kyrle,Markus Dablander,Thierry Hanser,Stephane Werner,Charlotte M. Deane,Garrett M. Morris*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出通过预测ECFP指纹进行预训练来改进分子图神经网络在QSAR任务中的性能，在多数基准测试中显著提升了OOD性能，但在异构数据集和复杂任务中效果有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子图神经网络在药物发现QSAR研究中应用日益广泛，但其相对于传统分子特征化方法的优势存在争议。研究者希望找到一种通用策略来改进GNN在QSAR任务中的表现。

Method: 提出通过预训练GNN来预测扩展连接性指纹（ECFP）的通用策略。使用统计测试和具有挑战性的分布外（OOD）分割进行验证，评估了ECFP预训练对下游QSAR任务的影响。

Result: 在六个Biogen基准测试中的五个，ECFP预训练的GNN在标准性能指标上显著优于所有评估基线。但对于更异构的数据集和更复杂的终点（如结合亲和力预测），预训练GNN在OOD设置中表现不佳。研究还发现预训练过程中的子结构级数据泄露会影响下游性能。

Conclusion: ECFP预训练可以增强GNN在多种实际相关QSAR任务中的下游OOD性能，尽管在某些情况下效果有限。该策略为提高分子GNN在药物发现中的实用性提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Molecular Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are increasingly common in drug discovery, particularly for Quantitative Structure-Activity Relationship (QSAR) studies; yet, their superiority compared to classical molecular featurisation approaches is disputed. We report a general strategy for improving GNNs for QSAR by pre-training to predict Extended-Connectivity Fingerprints (ECFP). We validate our approach with statistical tests and challenging out-of-distribution (OOD) splits. Across five out of six Biogen benchmarks, we observed a statistically significant improvement in standard performance metrics over all evaluated baselines when using ECFP pre-trained GNNs. However, for more heterogeneous datasets and more complex endpoints, such as binding affinity prediction, pre-trained GNNs underperformed in OOD settings. Importantly, we investigated the impact of substructure-level data leakage during pre-training on downstream performance. While we identified scenarios where pre-training on ECFPs was less effective, our findings show that ECFP-based pre-training can enhance downstream OOD performance on a diverse set of practically relevant QSAR tasks.

</details>


### [848] [Kernel-Gradient Drifting Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10727)
*Maria Esteban-Casadevall,Jorge Carrasco-Pollo,Max Welling,Jan-Willem van de Meent,Erik J. Bekkers,Floor Eijkelboom*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出核梯度漂移方法，将传统漂移模型中的固定欧几里得位移方向替换为核本身诱导的方向，实现无需蒸馏的单步生成建模，并扩展到黎曼流形和离散数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统漂移模型虽然能实现快速、高质量的单步生成而无需蒸馏大型预训练扩散模型，但其理论主要局限于高斯核，且漂移方向为固定的欧几里得位移。需要一种更通用的框架，能够处理各种核函数，并扩展到非欧几里得空间和离散数据。

Method: 提出核梯度漂移框架：1）用核本身诱导的方向替换传统漂移模型的固定欧几里得位移方向；2）漂移变为核平滑数据分布与模型分布之间的分数差异；3）对于特征核具有可识别性；4）将构造自然扩展到黎曼流形和通过概率单纯形的Fisher-Rao几何处理离散数据。

Result: 在球形地理空间数据、启动子DNA和分子生成等任务上，核梯度漂移方法在非欧几里得设置下实现了无需蒸馏的最先进单步生成性能。

Conclusion: 核梯度漂移为单步生成建模提供了一个统一的理论框架，不仅解释了传统漂移模型的分数匹配特性，还能扩展到更广泛的核函数和非欧几里得数据空间，在多种实际应用中表现出色。

Abstract: We propose kernel-gradient drifting, a one-step generative modeling framework that replaces the fixed Euclidean displacement direction in drifting models with directions induced by the kernel itself. Standard drifting is attractive because it enables fast, high-quality generation without distilling a large pretrained diffusion model, but its theory is currently understood mainly for Gaussian kernels, where the drift coincides with smoothed score matching and is identifiable. Our gradient-based reformulation exposes this score-based structure for general kernels: the resulting drift is the score difference between kernel-smoothed data and model distributions, yielding identifiability for characteristic kernels and a smoothed-KL descent interpretation of the drifting dynamics. Since kernel gradients are intrinsic tangent vectors, the same construction extends naturally to Riemannian manifolds and to discrete data via the Fisher-Rao geometry of the probability simplex. Across spherical geospatial data, promoter DNA and molecule generation, kernel-gradient drifting enables state-of-the-art one-step generation beyond the Euclidean setting without distillation.

</details>


### [849] [XQCfD: Accelerating Fast Actor-Critic Algorithms with Prior Data and Prior Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10734)
*Daniel Palenicek,Florian Vogt,Joe Watson,Ingmar Posner,Danica Kragic,Jan Peters*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: XQCfD 扩展了高效的 XQC actor-critic 算法，通过改进的演示数据利用方式，在稀疏奖励的复杂操作任务上实现了最先进的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算法未能充分利用专家演示数据来提升样本效率，特别是在稀疏奖励的硬探索任务中，现有算法设计存在缺陷，无法有效利用预训练策略。

Method: XQCfD 扩展了 XQC actor-critic 算法，通过增强的回放缓冲区、预训练策略和静态策略架构来学习演示数据，避免快速遗忘强大的初始策略。

Result: XQCfD 在 Adroit、Robomimic 和 MimicGen 等流行的稀疏奖励复杂操作任务基准上实现了最先进的性能，具有低更新数据比且无需集成网络。

Conclusion: 静态网络架构因其更高的熵预测能力，能够实现更好的分布外策略改进，XQCfD 通过有效利用演示数据和预训练策略，显著提升了强化学习的样本效率。

Abstract: For reinforcement learning in the real world online exploration is expensive A common practice in robotic reinforcement learning is to incorporate additional data to improve sample efficiency Expert demonstration data is often crucial for solving hard exploration tasks with sparse rewards While prior data is used to augment experience and pretrain models we show that the design of existing algorithms fails to achieve the sample efficiency that is possible in this setting due to a failure to use pretrained policies effectively We propose XQCfD which extends the sample-efficient XQC actor-critic to learn from demonstrations using augmented replay buffers pretrained policies and stationary policy architectures designed to avoid rapidly unlearning the strong initial policy like prior works We show our stationary network architecture enables policy improvement out-of-distribution better than standard network architectures due to its higher entropy predictions XQCfD achieves state of the art performance across a range of complex manipulation tasks with sparse rewards from the popular Adroit Robomimic and MimicGen benchmarks -- notably with a low update-to-data ratio and no ensemble networks

</details>


### [850] [AdaPaD: Adaptive Parallel Deflation for PEFT with Self-Correcting Rank Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10741)
*Barbara Su,Fangshuo Liao,Anastasios Kyrillidis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AdaPaD是一种自适应并行放气方法，用于LoRA微调，可同时训练所有秩-1分量，通过自校正机制减少放气误差，并实现动态秩发现，使秩分布成为输出而非输入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LoRA微调方法在秩选择上存在局限：要么顺序提取秩-1分量（导致误差永久冻结），要么联合优化低秩分解（仅保证整体更新而非单个方向）。需要一种能同时训练所有分量、实现自校正和动态秩发现的方法。

Method: AdaPaD采用并行放气框架：每个工作器针对基于最新前驱估计构建的放气目标优化自己的分量，实现自校正。添加提前学习（激活前私有预训练）和每模块动态秩发现（基于重要性增长直到预算耗尽），使秩分布成为输出。

Result: 理论证明每个分量的误差在预热期后呈指数衰减，泛化界限分为可消失的算法项和不可约的统计项。实证上，在匹配参数预算下与自适应秩LoRA基线竞争，在固定秩LoRA上平均减小30.7%的适配器大小。

Conclusion: AdaPaD提供了一种同时训练所有秩-1分量的有效框架，通过自校正减少误差积累，实现动态秩发现，在保持性能的同时减小适配器大小，为LoRA微调提供了更灵活和高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models with LoRA requires choosing a rank r before training starts. Existing approaches either extract rank-1 components sequentially, freezing each component's error permanently into every subsequent residual, or optimize the full low-rank factorization jointly with guarantees that describe only the joint update, not individual rank-1 directions. We present AdaPaD (Adaptive Parallel Deflation), which trains all rank-1 components simultaneously: each worker refines its component against a deflation target built from the latest estimates of all predecessors, and as those estimates improve, the targets improve too. We call this property self-correction: deflation errors converge to zero over rounds rather than persisting as fixed residuals. On top of this backbone, AdaPaD adds advance learning (private pre-training before activation) and per-module dynamic rank discovery (importance-based growth until a shared budget is exhausted), making the rank distribution an output rather than an input. We prove that every component's error decays exponentially after a warm-up period, with a generalization bound that splits into a vanishing algorithmic term and an irreducible statistical floor. Empirically, AdaPaD is competitive with adaptive-rank LoRA baselines on GLUE with DeBERTaV3-base at matched parameter budgets, and competitive with fixed-rank LoRA on Qwen3-0.6B SQuAD/SQuAD v2 while deploying an adapter that is on average 30.7% smaller.

</details>


### [851] [Provable Sparse Inversion and Token Relabel Enhanced One-shot Federated Learning with ViTs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10748)
*Li Shen,Xiaolei Hao,Qinglun Li,Xiaochun Cao,Zhifeng Hao,Xun Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FedMITR框架，通过稀疏模型反演和Token重标记解决单次联邦学习中非IID数据下的语义对齐问题，提升全局模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单次联邦学习方法在极端非IID设置下，生成的数据存在严重的语义错位问题，导致模型性能下降。

Method: 提出FedMITR框架：1）稀疏模型反演：选择性反演语义前景，停止反演无信息背景；2）Token重标记：对高信息密度patch使用生成伪标签，对低信息密度patch通过集成模型重标记进行鲁棒蒸馏。

Result: 理论分析表明稀疏模型反演消除背景噪声带来的梯度不稳定，Token重标记降低梯度方差；实验证明FedMITR在各种设置下显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: FedMITR通过创新的稀疏模型反演和Token重标记机制，有效解决了单次联邦学习中的语义对齐问题，为极端非IID场景提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: One-Shot Federated Learning, where a central server learns a global model in a single communication round, has emerged as a promising paradigm. However, under extremely non-IID settings, existing data-free methods often generate low-quality data that suffers from severe semantic misalignment with ground-truth labels. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel Federated Model Inversion and Token Relabel (FedMITR) framework, which trains the global model by fully exploiting all patches of synthetic images. Specifically, FedMITR employs sparse model inversion during data generation, selectively inverting semantic foregrounds while halting the inversion of uninformative backgrounds. To address semantically meaningless tokens that hinder ViT predictions, we implement a differentiated strategy: patches with high information density utilize generated pseudo-labels, while patches with low information density are relabeled via ensemble models for robust distillation. Theoretically, our analysis based on algorithmic stability reveals that Sparse Model Inversion eliminates gradient instability arising from background noise, while Token Relabel effectively reduces gradient variance, collectively guaranteeing a tighter generalization bound. Empirically, extensive experimental results demonstrate that FedMITR substantially outperforms existing baselines under various settings.

</details>


### [852] [DynaMiCS: Fine-tuning LLMs with Performance Constraints using Dynamic Mixtures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10770)
*Eleonora Gualdoni,Sonia Laguna,Louis Bethune,Joao Monteiro,Pierre Ablin,Marco Cuturi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DynaMiCS是一个用于大语言模型多领域微调的动态混合优化器，通过将微调建模为约束优化问题，动态计算数据混合权重，在提升目标领域性能的同时保持约束领域能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大语言模型多领域微调方法通常使用固定启发式或自适应规则进行数据混合，这些方法无法明确保证在提升目标领域性能的同时，保持模型在约束领域（如通用知识、指令遵循、安全评估）的能力。
